title: AttentionCap: Transformer Based Capacitance Matrix Learning Toward Full-Chip Extraction
comment: Accepted at the 63rd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC '26)
summary: As capacitance extraction accuracy of rule-based pattern matching becomes difficult to sustain at advanced nodes, a growing trend emerges to develop deep-learning-based 2D capacitance models. However, existing MLP- and CNN-based methods constrain their input to fixed metal-layer combinations in a specific process node, limiting their usability in practice. Recognizing the inherent similarity between capacitance matrix and the prevailing attention mechanism, we propose AttentionCap, a customized Transformer for capacitance matrix learning, with a Gram representation framework, a physics-aligned symmetric-attention output layer, and a novel normalized Laplacian loss. We also introduce a process-node embedding to enable multi-node learning. Trained on synthetic data, AttentionCap attains 0.67\%/3.99\% self/coupling-capacitance error on unseen real designs under a multi-layer and multi-node setting, surpassing the CNN-Cap baseline with 4.6$\times$/5.7$\times$ lower self/coupling error and 192$\times$ faster inference speed. A pretrained AttentionCap accurately transfers to an unseen node with only 5K samples and 4K finetuning steps. With sufficient accuracy on unseen real designs and strong transferability to new process nodes, AttentionCap offers highly practical value for modern EDA workflows. Code and data are available at https://github.com/THU-numbda/AttentionCap.

AI.tldr: 提出AttentionCap，一种基于Transformer的电容矩阵学习模型，利用注意力机制与电容矩阵的天然相似性，通过Gram表示框架、对称注意力输出层和归一化拉普拉斯损失实现多节点、多层的电容提取，在未见过的真实设计上自/耦合电容误差仅0.67%/3.99%，速度比CNN快192倍，且能高效迁移到新工艺节点。
AI.motivation: 随着工艺节点推进，基于规则的模式匹配电容提取精度难以维持，现有MLP和CNN方法局限于固定金属层组合和特定工艺节点，缺乏实用性和可迁移性。
AI.method: 提出AttentionCap Transformer模型，包含：1) Gram表示框架对电容矩阵进行特征编码；2) 物理对齐的对称注意力输出层保证电容矩阵对称性；3) 归一化拉普拉斯损失函数；4) 工艺节点嵌入实现多节点学习。
AI.result: 在多节点多层级设置下，未见过的真实设计上自电容误差0.67%、耦合电容误差3.99%；相比CNN-Cap基线，自/耦合误差降低4.6×/5.7×，推理速度提升192倍；预训练模型仅需5K样本和4K微调步数即可准确迁移到未见过的节点。
AI.conclusion: AttentionCap在未见过的真实设计上具有足够精度，且对新工艺节点具有强迁移能力，为现代EDA流程提供了高实用价值的电容提取方案。

title: Systematic LLM Translation of Legacy Scientific Code to Differentiable Frameworks: Application to a Land Surface Model
summary: Differentiable programming offers transformative capabilities for scientific modeling, enabling gradient-based parameter estimation, sensitivity analysis, and data assimilation. Yet, migrating legacy codebases into differentiable frameworks remains a challenge. We present a five-phase LLM-based agentic pipeline that translates legacy Fortran into JAX: static dependency analysis determines module translation order from the full call graph; iterative compile-repair loops correct errors autonomously; and a Fortran reference oracle enforces numerical parity at the module level before integration and gradient verification. We instantiate and evaluate the pipeline on CLM-ml-v2, a 19,000-line Fortran land surface model, and analyze agent behavior across 73 module translation tasks. The resulting differentiable model computes the complete Jacobian in a single backward pass, recovers physical parameters in eight times fewer steps than gradient-free optimization, and achieves a 24 times wall-clock speedup over sequential Fortran at ensemble size N=2,048. Both the translated model and pipeline infrastructure are released as a reusable framework for differentiating other Earth system model components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的五阶段自动化流水线，将遗留Fortran代码（19,000行土地表面模型）翻译为可微分的JAX代码，实现了完整的Jacobian计算、八倍更快的参数估计和24倍加速比。
AI.motivation: 可微分编程为科学建模带来强大能力，但将遗留代码迁移到可微分框架面临巨大挑战，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 五阶段LLM驱动流水线：静态依赖分析确定模块翻译顺序、迭代编译-修复循环自动纠错、Fortran参考Oracle确保模块级数值一致性，最终集成并验证梯度。
AI.result: 成功翻译19,000行Fortran模型；可在单次反向传播中计算完整Jacobian；参数恢复比无梯度优化快8倍；在N=2,048时比顺序Fortran快24倍。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线和翻译后的模型已发布为可复用框架，可推广到其他地球系统模型组件的差异化迁移。

title: PathoSage: Towards Multi-Source Evidence Adjudication in Pathology via Experience-Aware Agentic Workflow
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and agent workflows have shown strong promise for computational pathology, yet reliable patch-level reasoning remains challenging. End-to-end pathology MLLMs often hallucinate morphological features, while recent agentic systems usually merge tool outputs and retrieved knowledge into a shared context, making decisions vulnerable to conflicting evidence and context contamination. We propose PathoSage, a three-stage framework that explicitly separates knowledge retrieval, evidence collection, and evidence adjudication for patch-level pathology multimodal reasoning. Its core component, Structured Evidence Deliberation, independently evaluates heterogeneous evidence from tools, performs conflict analysis, and generates the final judgment in a fresh context to reduce anchoring bias. We further introduce a training-free Beta-Bernoulli experience system with continuous credit assignment to model long-term tool reliability and construct similarity-weighted priors for future tool use. Experiments show that PathoSage effectively mitigates VQA hallucinations and classifier disagreement, outperforming strong pathology MLLM and agentic baselines. Our results highlight explicit evidence adjudication and reliability-aware tool modeling as key ingredients for robust pathology agents.

AI.tldr: PathoSage提出三阶段框架，通过结构化证据审议（独立评估工具证据、冲突分析、新上下文判决）和Beta-Bernoulli经验系统（无训练、连续信用分配）解决了病理MLLM中的幻觉和分类器不一致问题，在patch级多模态推理上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有病理MLLM在patch级推理中容易产生形态特征幻觉，而基于agent的系统将工具输出和检索知识合并到共享上下文中，导致决策易受冲突证据和上下文污染影响。
AI.method: PathoSage包含三阶段：知识检索、证据收集和证据裁决。核心是结构化证据审议，独立评估异构证据，进行冲突分析，并在全新上下文中生成最终判决以减少锚定偏差。同时引入无需训练的Beta-Bernoulli经验系统，通过连续信用分配建模工具长期可靠性，构建基于相似性加权的先验用于未来工具选择。
AI.result: PathoSage有效缓解了VQA幻觉和分类器不一致问题，在多个病理MLLM和agent基线任务上取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式证据审议和可靠性感知的工具建模是构建鲁棒病理agent的关键要素。

title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion: Codebase and Benchmark
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising route for developing plasma controllers from historical tokamak data, since online trial-and-error on real devices is costly and risky. However, progress in this direction remains difficult to measure due to the lack of a standardized offline RL benchmark for realistic multi-actuator, long-horizon plasma control problems in nuclear fusion. We introduce RL4F, an Offline Reinforcement Learning Benchmark for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion, providing closed-loop evaluation environments and baseline comparisons across four full-profile tracking tasks: rotation, density, temperature, and pressure. The dynamics function underlying the evaluation environment is built from historical discharge data from DIII-D, a real-world Tokamak. We evaluate a broad set of imitation learning and offline RL baselines under a unified protocol. We find that offline model-based RL methods obtain the best average performance on most objectives, although no single method dominates all tasks, highlighting the importance of dynamics modeling in complex, long-horizon plasma control tasks. To foster further research, we open-source the codebase, datasets, and evaluation framework, providing a benchmark not only for the fusion community but also for algorithm development in offline RL.

AI.tldr: 提出了RL4F，一个面向核聚变等离子体控制的离线强化学习基准，包含基于DIII-D托卡马克历史数据的闭环评估环境，涵盖旋转、密度、温度和压力四个全剖面跟踪任务。实验表明离线模型化RL方法平均性能最佳，但无单一方法在所有任务中占优。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习为从历史托卡马克数据开发等离子体控制器提供了有前景的途径，但缺乏标准化的离线RL基准来衡量多执行器、长时域等离子体控制问题的进展。
AI.method: 基于DIII-D托卡马克历史放电数据构建动力学函数作为评估环境，设计四个全剖面跟踪任务（旋转、密度、温度、压力），在统一协议下评估多种模仿学习和离线RL基线方法。
AI.result: 离线模型化RL方法在多数目标上获得最佳平均性能，但没有任何单一方法在所有任务中占据主导地位。
AI.conclusion: 动力学建模在复杂、长时域等离子体控制任务中至关重要；开源代码库、数据集和评估框架可为聚变社区和离线RL算法开发提供基准。

title: MIRAGE: Metadata-Integrated Repository Analysis and Guided Enhancement for MSR Datasets
summary: This paper proposes an improved approach to the analysis of Mining Software Repositories (MSR) datasets via metadata enrichment, FAIRness assessment, and topic-driven analysis. This research expands upon an earlier dataset directory created specifically for the analysis of MSR datasets by adding new annotations to the datasets, enriching the metadata categories, and offering more advanced filtering options. The metadata of the MSR papers presented from 2013 to 2024 has been gathered using the Semantic Scholar API. The analysis is based on Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) topic modeling and statistical analysis. Dataset-level attributes were included into the expanded dataset directory, namely repository hosting site, format, accessibility, reusability, and dataset quality. The study reveals that the choice of repository hosting sites and data formats influences citation patterns and dataset usability. Furthermore, the enhanced annotation approach improves the analysis and discoverability of MSR datasets, supporting more effective reuse and evaluation of research artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过元数据增强、FAIRness评估和主题驱动分析来改进MSR数据集分析的方法，扩展了原有数据集目录，新增了仓库托管站点、格式、可访问性、可复用性和数据质量等属性，并发现仓库托管站点和数据格式的选择会影响引用模式和数据集的可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有MSR数据集目录存在元数据不完整、分类粒度不足的问题，限制了数据集的可发现性、可复用性和有效评估。
AI.method: 使用Semantic Scholar API收集2013-2024年MSR论文元数据，通过LDA主题建模和统计分析，在原有数据集目录基础上新增仓库托管站点、格式、可访问性、可复用性和数据质量等数据集级属性。
AI.result: 仓库托管站点和数据格式的选择显著影响引用模式和数据集可用性；增强的标注方法提高了MSR数据集的分析性和可发现性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的元数据增强和主题驱动分析方法能有效支持研究工件的复用和评估，提升MSR数据集的可发现性和可用性。

title: Operator learning for the 2D incompressible Navier-Stokes equations: a conformal prediction approach in the data-scarce regime
summary: In this paper, we propose a perturbation-based conformal prediction framework for uncertainty quantification in operator learning, with a focus on the 2D Navier--Stokes equations. While neural operators provide fast surrogates for expensive PDE solvers, they do not by themselves provide calibrated uncertainty for spatiotemporal field predictions. Our approach wraps a trained Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) with split conformal prediction and constructs the local uncertainty scale by comparing the predictions of two operators trained on nearly identical datasets: one on the original labels and one on labels perturbed by small Gaussian noise. We consider this procedure in the data-scarce regime, where the total label budget is fixed and methods that require a separate uncertainty network must divide training data between multiple models. On the 2D Navier--Stokes benchmark, the perturbation-based method produces substantially narrower conformal bands than existing methods under matched total data budgets while maintaining the target simultaneous coverage. These results suggest that perturbation sensitivity is a practical and sample-efficient uncertainty proxy for conformalized neural operators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扰动的共形预测框架，用于神经算子（特别是傅立叶神经算子FNO）的不确定性量化，在2D Navier-Stokes方程基准上，该方法在相同数据预算下比现有方法产生更窄的共形带，同时保持目标覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 神经算子虽能快速求解PDE，但本身无法提供校准的不确定性估计。现有的不确定性量化方法在数据稀缺场景下需要将有限标签预算分配给多个模型，效率低下。
AI.method: 将训练好的FNO与分割共形预测结合；通过对比两个在近乎相同数据集上训练的算子（一个使用原始标签，另一个使用添加小高斯噪声的标签）的预测差异来构建局部不确定性尺度。
AI.result: 在2D Navier-Stokes基准上，基于扰动的方法在匹配总数据预算的条件下，比现有方法产生明显更窄的共形带，同时维持目标同时覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 扰动敏感性是一种实用且样本高效的、用于共形化神经算子的不确定性代理指标。

title: SWE-Marathon: Can Agents Autonomously Complete Ultra-Long-Horizon Software Work?
summary: AI agents are increasingly expected to complete long-horizon workflows that require sustained progress over hours, millions of tokens, and complex environments. Yet current agent benchmarks largely evaluate short-form tasks, such as single pull requests, small tickets, or 5-10 minute exercises, limiting our ability to measure agents' capabilities in planning, long-context understanding, and memory use. We introduce SWE-Marathon, a benchmark of 20 long-horizon tasks spanning software engineering and adjacent technical domains. Each task consists of a unique executable environment, a human-written reference solution, and a multi-layer verification suite. Logged agent attempts average 27.2M total tokens, making SWE-Marathon substantially longer-horizon than existing SWE and command-line agent benchmarks. Current frontier coding agents solve fewer than 30% of tasks. Failures often arise from poor self-verification, self-reported infeasibility, and premature termination. We also observe reward-hacking behavior in 13.8% of rollouts, where agents attempt to exploit the environment or verifier to bypass the intended workflow. SWE-Marathon includes adversarial review of test suites and execution environments, as well as multi-layer checks designed to prevent shortcut solutions. We release SWE-Marathon, evaluation code, and agent trajectories at https://swe-marathon.org/.

AI.tldr: SWE-Marathon是一个包含20个长周期任务的基准测试，每个任务平均需要2720万个token完成，当前前沿编码智能体成功率不足30%，存在自我验证不足、奖励破解等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试主要评估短任务（如单个PR、5-10分钟练习），无法衡量智能体在规划、长上下文理解和记忆使用方面的能力，亟需长周期任务的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了20个长周期任务，每个任务包含可执行环境、人工编写的参考解决方案和多层验证套件；对测试套件和执行环境进行对抗性审查，并设计多层检查以防止捷径解决方案。
AI.result: 当前前沿编码智能体解决率低于30%；13.8%的rollout中出现奖励破解行为（试图利用环境或验证器绕过预期工作流）；失败原因包括自我验证不足、自我报告不可行和提前终止。
AI.conclusion: SWE-Marathon填补了长周期智能体评估的空白，揭示了现有智能体在长时间任务中的局限性和奖励破解问题，为未来长周期智能体研究提供了基准。

title: OmniMem: Perturbation-aware Memory Compression for Streaming Audio-Visual LLMs
summary: Audio-visual large language models (LLMs) hold strong promise for long-form video understanding, yet their long-video inference is fundamentally limited by the linear growth of video tokens and key-value (KV) caches. We present OmniMem, a memory-efficient streaming framework designed specifically for audio-visual LLMs. Unlike existing compression methods that treat all tokens uniformly, OmniMem introduces a modality-aware memory allocation strategy that separately manages visual and audio contexts, addressing the severe token imbalance between the two modalities. OmniMem further preserves informative and non-redundant KV states through perturbation-aware memory selection, enabling compact memory without sacrificing long-range understanding. To strengthen compression under realistic deployment constraints, we also explore budget-aware fine-tuning, which encourages the model to consolidate useful information into retained memory. Experiments on VideoMME Long, LVBench, and LVOmniBench with video-SALMONN 2+ and Qwen-2.5-Omni show that OmniMem consistently improves over strong training-free compression baselines by 2-4% absolute accuracy under the same memory budgets, with an additional 1-2% gain after fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: OmniMem是一种针对音视频大语言模型的记忆高效流式推理框架，通过模态感知的记忆分配、扰动感知的选择和预算感知微调，在相同记忆预算下显著提升了长视频理解的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频大语言模型在长视频推理中面临视频令牌和KV缓存线性增长的问题，而现有压缩方法对所有令牌一视同仁，未能解决视觉和音频模态间严重的令牌不平衡问题。
AI.method: 1）模态感知的记忆分配策略：分别管理视觉和音频上下文；2）扰动感知的记忆选择：保留信息丰富且非冗余的KV状态；3）预算感知微调：在部署约束下强化压缩效果。
AI.result: 在VideoMME Long、LVBench和LVOmniBench上，针对video-SALMONN 2+和Qwen-2.5-Omni模型，在相同记忆预算下比强训练无关压缩基线提高2-4%绝对准确率，微调后额外提升1-2%。
AI.conclusion: OmniMem通过模态感知和扰动感知的设计，有效解决了音视频LLM长视频推理中的记忆瓶颈，为多模态流式推理提供了高效的压缩方案。

title: MedicalRec: Medical recommender system for image classification without retraining
summary: The emergence of machine learning and deep learning has revolutionized the efficiency of diagnostic, therapeutic, and administrative systems in healthcare. However, this rapid adoption has come at the cost of requiring significant computing power and energy consumption, as well as e-waste disposal and carbon emissions. One of the challenges of these models is choosing the right model for classification tasks. To this end, researchers attempt to identify the optimal model using their data through trial and error, which involves energy consumption and waste. The goal of this study is to develop a model-based recommender system for medical image classification. For this purpose, a data set was collected from 3,000 articles in the field of medical image classification. This dataset, publicly available under the name MedicalRec-Bench, contains over 5,000 records of models tested in various tasks, including Skin Cancer Classification, Tumour Classification, Wound Classification, Breast Cancer, and MRI classification. The dataset was evaluated in four different modes, depending on the number of features: MedicalRec I (5 features), MedicalRec II (9 features), MedicalRec III (11 features), and MedicalRec IV (18 features). Collecting all values for the features is challenging due to non-reporting by the authors; hence, the dataset contains significant amounts of missing values. The Medical Recommender System (MedicalRec) is a transformer-based model used for item recommendations in this study. This model achieved remarkable results in the evaluation on the dataset and in the evaluation with 12 base models. This model achieved a maximum HitRate@100 of 75.5%. The dataset and implementations are available through the GitHub link: https://github.com/Ramin1Mousa/MedicalRec

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的医疗图像分类模型推荐系统MedicalRec，并构建了包含3000篇论文、5000多条记录的公开数据集MedicalRec-Bench，在多种特征模式下实现了最高75.5%的HitRate@100。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器学习/深度学习模型在医疗领域广泛应用，但存在计算资源消耗大、能源浪费和碳排放问题。研究人员通常通过试错法选择最优分类模型，这一过程同样耗费大量能源。因此，需要一种能够自动推荐合适模型的方法，以减少重复试验带来的资源浪费。
AI.method: 从3000篇医疗图像分类论文中收集数据，构建包含5000余条记录的数据集MedicalRec-Bench，涵盖皮肤癌、肿瘤、伤口、乳腺癌、MRI等分类任务。数据集按特征数量分为四种模式（MedicalRec I-IV，5/9/11/18个特征）。采用基于Transformer的推荐模型MedicalRec进行项目推荐。
AI.result: MedicalRec模型在数据集评估中表现优异，并在12个基模型对比中胜出，最高HitRate@100达到75.5%。数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的推荐系统可以有效辅助研究人员选择医疗图像分类模型，减少试错过程带来的能源消耗。MedicalRec-Bench数据集为后续研究提供了标准化基准。

title: TRACER: Token ReAssignment for Concept ERasure in Generative Recommendation
summary:
Generative recommendation formulates next-item prediction as autoregressive generation over semantic ID (SID) sequences derived from users' historical interactions, making modern recommender systems structurally similar to large language models (LLMs). As privacy and safety concerns grow, these systems increasingly require concept unlearning to remove sensitive or harmful concepts associated with items. However, existing LLM unlearning methods cannot be directly applied to generative recommendation. Unlike word tokens with explicit semantics, SIDs are abstract identifiers that are often shared by both forget and retain items, leading to severe conflicts between concept removal and recommendation utility preservation.
  To address this challenge, we propose TRACER, an end-to-end concept unlearning framework based on token reassignment. Rather than directly suppressing shared SIDs, TRACER reassigns concept-related items to alternative tokens that better facilitate forgetting while minimizing side effects on retained items. We further introduce a coherence regularizer to preserve semantic consistency among retain items during unlearning. Experiments on real-world recommendation datasets demonstrate that TRACER effectively removes target concepts while substantially better preserving recommendation utility than existing unlearning baselines.

AI.tldr: 针对生成式推荐系统中概念遗忘的挑战，提出基于令牌重分配的端到端框架TRACER，通过将概念相关项目重新分配给替代令牌而非直接抑制共享语义ID，在有效去除目标概念的同时保持推荐效用。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法无法直接应用于生成式推荐，因为语义ID（SID）是抽象标识符，常被遗忘项目和保留项目共享，导致概念移除与推荐效用保持之间存在严重冲突。
AI.method: 提出TRACER框架，核心为令牌重分配机制：将概念相关项目重新分配给有助于遗忘的替代令牌，而非直接抑制共享SID；同时引入一致性正则化器，在遗忘过程中保持保留项目的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在真实推荐数据集上的实验表明，TRACER能有效移除目标概念，同时在推荐效用保持方面显著优于现有遗忘基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 令牌重分配策略有效解决了生成式推荐中共享SID带来的遗忘-效用冲突问题，为安全敏感的推荐系统提供了可行的概念遗忘方案。

title: Review the Code, Not the Story: A Vision and Protocol for Code-First Peer Review
summary: Peer review in computational fields remains centered on author-written manuscripts, even though the decisive evidence for many claims resides in executable code, data, configurations, and experiment pipelines. This manuscript-first workflow gives authors substantial control over narrative framing while leaving reviewers with limited time to inspect implementation details, reproduce results, or detect unsupported claims. This vision and protocol paper proposes code-first peer review: authors submit executable research artifacts and minimal claim manifests; a venue-controlled AI system builds the environment, executes experiments, audits code paths, maps claims to evidence, and generates a standardized Review Package for human reviewers. The goal is not to replace reviewers or to give authors an automatic writing assistant. Instead, AI serves as review infrastructure that shifts the target of peer review from polished narratives to executable evidence. We formalize a claim-evidence contract, define the Generated Review View and Review Package abstractions, give a worked example, outline a system architecture, and analyze evaluation and governance challenges including AI bias, prompt injection, model instability, auditability, and author appeal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"代码优先同行评审"范式，用AI系统自动构建环境、执行实验、验证声明与证据的对应关系，生成标准化评审包，将评审焦点从作者撰写的稿件转向可执行的代码和数据。
AI.motivation: 当前计算领域同行评审以作者撰写的手稿为中心，但关键证据（代码、数据、配置、实验流水线）却不在评审核心。这种手稿优先的工作流让作者掌握叙事框架，而评审人缺乏时间检查实现细节、复现结果或发现未经支持的声明。
AI.method: 形式化定义声明-证据契约，提出生成评审视图和评审包两种抽象，设计由会议/期刊控制的AI系统架构，该系统自动构建环境、执行实验、审计代码路径、映射声明与证据。
AI.result: 通过一个工作示例演示该流程，并分析AI偏见、提示注入、模型不稳定性、可审计性和作者申诉等评估与治理挑战。
AI.conclusion: AI应作为评审基础设施而非替代评审人或作为自动写作助手，目标是让评审从精致的叙事转向可执行的证据。

title: Syll: Open-Source Personal Automation with Cross-Surface Execution
summary: Personal AI agents must increasingly operate across APIs, shells, web surfaces, and desktop GUIs, yet many systems remain tuned to a single interface and offer limited support for user teaching and auditability. We present Syll, an open-source, self-hosted multimodal agent harness that unifies MCP/API tools, CLI execution, and visual GUI control in a modular runtime, enabling agents to coordinate computer use across heterogeneous interfaces while streamlining how users and agents exchange information. At the core of Syll is a bidirectional user-agent interaction layer: users teach procedures through direct demonstration, which Syll compiles into reusable skills; agent execution is translated back into multimodal evidence -- logs, keyframes, and approval checkpoints -- for inspection and control. Syll further externalizes memory, skills, routines, and governance as editable local artifacts, supporting straightforward inspection, extension, and downstream development. Our implementation has been validated on production desktop applications including Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Stardew Valley, macOS Finder and others. We report mechanism-oriented studies that validate multimodal routing, teachable GUI replay, and persistent local artifacts. We hope Syll can serve as a practical open-source foundation for personal automation that users can teach, inspect, and continuously extend.

AI.tldr: Syll是一个开源、自托管的智能体框架，支持跨API、CLI和GUI等多模态界面的统一操作，并提供双向人机交互、可教授技能、可审计的多模态证据和可编辑的本地化记忆/技能/规则工件。
AI.motivation: 现有个人AI智能体大多局限于单一界面（如仅API或仅GUI），且缺乏对用户教学和可审计性的支持，难以满足用户在多界面间协调操作、教学和持续扩展的需求。
AI.method: 构建一个模块化运行时，统一MCP/API工具、CLI执行和视觉GUI控制；设计双向用户-智能体交互层：用户通过演示教学，Syll编译为可复用技能；智能体执行反向翻译为多模态证据（日志、关键帧、审批检查点）；将记忆、技能、例程和治理规则外部化为可编辑的本地工件。
AI.result: 在Adobe Photoshop、Audition、Stardew Valley、macOS Finder等生产级桌面应用中验证了多模态路由、可教授GUI回放和持久化本地工件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Syll可作为个人自动化的实用开源基础框架，支持用户教学、审计和持续扩展。

title: SPIN: Decentralized Swarm Control via Tensorized Policy Coordination
summary: Decentralized multi-agent swarm coordination on resource-constrained edge platforms remains fundamentally bottlenecked by the exponential scaling of joint action spaces and high-latency communication overhead. This paper introduces the Swarm Policy Interference Network (SPIN) framework, an architectural paradigm that bypasses these limitations by modeling swarm topologies as a compressed tensor network. We factorize the joint policy tensors of local multi-agent cliques into Matrix Product State (MPS) chains, reducing the computational complexity of evaluation from an exponential $O(n^m)$ wall to a strictly linear $O(m \cdot n \cdot χ^2)$ constraint. To bridge local continuous spatial geometry with this discrete algebraic backend without requiring power-intensive online training loops, we introduce a decoupled, hybrid neuro-symbolic control pipeline. Local multi-layered neural networks operate as structural coordination encoders, pre-trained offline to nonlinearly map hand-engineered geometric descriptors into abstract environmental target measures. At runtime, edge agents execute instantaneous behavioral adaptations by applying the Radon-Nikodým derivative directly as a zero-shot importance-reweighting filter. We validate the framework within a discrete-time multi-agent simulation sandbox spanning tracking, decentralized dispersion/area coverage, and multi-goal coordination regimes. Qualitative telemetry demonstrates that the integrated pipeline achieves stable target-directed motion, anti-collapse spatial spreading under decentralized constraints, and structured subgroup formation across multiple targets, providing a mathematically grounded route to tractable, low-power edge swarm intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPIN框架，通过张量网络分解（MPS链）将多智能体联合策略的指数复杂度降至线性，并采用离线预训练+在线零样本重加权（Radon-Nikodým导数）实现低功耗边缘集群智能。
AI.motivation: 解决去中心化多智能体集群在资源受限边缘平台上联合动作空间指数级扩展和高延迟通信开销的根本瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 将局部多智能体团联合策略张量分解为矩阵乘积态(MPS)链，复杂度从O(n^m)降至O(m·n·χ²)；2) 提出解耦的混合神经符号控制管线：局部多层神经网络离线预训练将几何描述符映射为环境目标度量，运行时通过Radon-Nikodým导数进行零样本重要性重加权滤波实现即时行为适应。
AI.result: 在离散时间多智能体仿真沙箱中，覆盖追踪、去中心化分散/区域覆盖、多目标协调等任务，实现了稳定的目标导向运动、抗塌缩空间扩散和结构化子群形成。
AI.conclusion: SPIN提供了一种数学严谨的途径，实现可处理、低功耗的边缘集群智能。

title: ASH: Asymmetric Scalar Hashing With Learned Dimensionality Reduction for High-Fidelity Vector Quantization
summary: For a long time, additive quantizers, such as product quantization, have been considered the gold standard in terms of accuracy and efficiency. Recently, scalar quantization has re-emerged from the depths of history with a new wave of data-agnostic techniques. Inscribed in this general framework, we turn our attention to data-driven methods, showing that new highs in recall and speed can be achieved by reducing the number of dimensions while increasing the bitrate per dimension. Critically, this dimensionality reduction needs to be learned from data to be successful. We present ASH (Asymmetric Scalar Hashing), a data-driven encoder-decoder framework that applies dimensionality reduction to database vectors via a learned orthonormal projection, followed by scalar quantization, while keeping queries in their original form. This asymmetric design enables higher accuracy than the best additive and scalar quantizers at iso-compression, while admitting highly efficient similarity computations via SIMD operations. ASH has short learning and encoding times, making it attractive for real-world deployment. Extensive experiments on a variety of datasets demonstrate that ASH achieves state-of-the-art ANN recall and speeds across all compression regimes.

AI.tldr: ASH（非对称标量哈希）是一种数据驱动的编码器-解码器框架，通过学习正交投影降低维度并采用标量量化，在等压缩率下实现了比最优加性量化器和标量量化器更高的精度，并通过SIMD操作实现高效相似性计算，在多个数据集上达到了SOTA的ANN召回率和速度。
AI.motivation: 长期以来加性量化器（如乘积量化）在精度和效率上被视为黄金标准，而近期标量量化以数据无关技术重新兴起。在此框架下，作者聚焦于数据驱动方法，探索通过减少维度数量同时增加每维度比特率的方式来提高召回率和速度，并指出这种降维需要从数据中学习才能成功。
AI.method: ASH采用非对称编码器-解码器框架：对数据库向量通过学习的标准正交投影进行降维，随后进行标量量化；查询向量保持原始形式。这种非对称设计结合了维度缩减与标量量化，并利用SIMD操作实现高效相似性计算。
AI.result: 在等压缩率下，ASH的精度优于最优的加性量化器和标量量化器；学习时间和编码时间短；在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，ASH在所有压缩率下均达到SOTA的ANN召回率和速度。
AI.conclusion: ASH通过数据驱动的降维与标量量化结合，在保持高精度的同时实现了高效计算，适合实际部署场景。

title: Are We Lost in the Woods? Detecting Silent Semantic Faults for Random Forest Classifiers with Data-informed Static Analysis
comment: 11 pages + 2 pages with references, 4 figures, 3 tables, 2 code listings
summary: While machine learning (ML) software necessitates effective quality assurance, ML engineers still encounter silent semantic faults, such as imbalanced datasets, that degrade prediction performance without apparent symptoms. These faults are typically detected after expensive training cycles, causing significant resource waste. We propose a data-informed static analysis technique to detect silent semantic faults in ML scripts that use the popular random forest classifier. Our approach extracts ML pipelines into directed acyclic graphs and evaluates them against formalized API contracts to detect structural, data, and hyperparameter faults. Our analysis uses aggregated data properties, enabling fault detection even when datasets are inaccessible due to confidentiality restrictions. We implemented this technique in an open-source tool, dille, and evaluated it on real-world Kaggle notebooks that use the random forest classifier. Our results demonstrate that the tool identifies relevant semantic faults with 91% precision and sub-second runtime overhead, making it suitable for integration into integrated development environments, agentic workflows, and continuous integration pipelines. Our empirical study reveals that 12% to 18% of existing ML notebooks that use the random forest classifier are affected by silent semantic faults, highlighting the immediate practical utility of data-informed static analysis in reducing the burden of ML debugging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据感知的静态分析技术（工具名：dille），通过将ML流程提取为有向无环图并检查API契约，在无需访问原始数据集的情况下，以91%的精度和亚秒级开销检测随机森林脚本中的静默语义错误（如数据不平衡、超参数问题）。实验发现12%-18%的Kaggle笔记本存在此类错误。
AI.motivation: 机器学习软件中的静默语义错误（如数据不平衡）在训练后才暴露，造成大量计算资源浪费，且现有检测手段不足。
AI.method: 将ML脚本提取为有向无环图（DAG），形式化定义API契约，基于聚合数据属性进行结构、数据和超参数三类错误的静态分析，无需访问原始数据集。
AI.result: 在Kaggle随机森林笔记本上达到91%的精确率，运行时开销为亚秒级；12%-18%的现有笔记本存在静默语义错误。
AI.conclusion: 数据感知的静态分析能以低开销高效检测ML脚本中的静默语义错误，适合集成到IDE、智能体工作流和CI流水线中。

title: A case study of evaluating AI agents on a neuroscience data-to-discovery pipeline
summary: Agentic AI tools offer a promising path to automating software development bottlenecks in scientific research pipelines, particularly for stages that take domain experts days to months to build, where scientists care about correctness and robustness, not implementation details. We present an empirical study of general-purpose coding agents on a fly optogenetics data-to-discovery pipeline. We assess agents on tasks substantially larger than existing benchmarks, datasets orders of magnitude bigger, and evaluation criteria grounded in domain expert standards. We show that agents can solve several individual pipeline stages, suggesting stage-level automation is tractable. By analyzing agents' code iterations, we show that they struggle most when there is not a pre-defined criterion to iterate on, and they must instead use their scientific judgment to assess their current solution, a key open challenge. Mirroring scientific practice, they sometimes attempt visual inspection of intermediate outputs for self-evaluation, but largely fail to interpret what they see or act on it appropriately. Solving the end-to-end pipeline correctly requires stringing together successes across all pipeline stages, and this is beyond agents' current abilities. We identify challenges largely absent from existing benchmarks, including computational resource management and generalization to large held-out data collections. Finally, we distill principles for constructing scientific tasks and rigorous evaluation criteria for open-ended problems.

AI.tldr: 本文对通用编码智能体在果蝇光遗传学数据到发现的完整流水线上进行了实证研究，发现智能体能够自动化部分流水线阶段，但在需要科学判断力进行自我评估的环节表现不佳，尚无法完成端到端的全流水线任务。
AI.motivation: 科研流水线中存在大量需要数天到数月构建的软件开发瓶颈，科学家关注正确性和鲁棒性而非实现细节，Agentic AI工具为此提供了自动化解决路径。
AI.method: 在果蝇光遗传学数据到发现流水线上，评估通用编码智能体在远超现有基准的大规模任务、数量级更大的数据集、以及基于领域专家标准的评价指标下的表现，并通过分析代码迭代过程探究智能体的行为模式。
AI.result: 智能体能够解决多个独立的流水线阶段，表明阶段级自动化是可实现的；但当缺乏预定义迭代标准、需要依赖科学判断力时表现最差；尝试通过可视化的中间输出进行自我评估但多数情况下无法正确解读或据此采取行动；端到端流水线自动化超出当前智能体能力范围。
AI.conclusion: 指出了现有基准中缺失的关键挑战（如计算资源管理、大型未见过数据集的泛化），并为构建面向开放问题的科学任务及其严谨评价标准提炼了原则。

title: Boundary Variance Inflation Causes Acquisition Bias in Gaussian Processes
summary: Gaussian processes with stationary kernels on bounded domains exhibit inflated posterior variance near the boundary. Despite being a long-recognized artifact in geostatistics and a source of over-exploration in Bayesian optimization, the causes and effects of boundary-induced acquisition bias are underexplored. We trace the root cause to a simple geometric mechanism: the truncation of the kernel correlation neighborhood at the domain boundary creates an observation-independent distortion that worsens with dimensionality. We show how this distortion manifests across three acquisition classes: variance maximization concentrates selections at the corners, whereas negative integrated posterior variance and expected predictive information gain move selections inward to axis-aligned interior shells. These patterns arise without reference to any objective function, meaning that acquisition behavior can be dominated by kernel geometry rather than the desired task-specific uncertainty. To quantify this, we introduce a function-free selection-profile diagnostic for arbitrary acquisitions, kernels, and bounded-domain geometries.

AI.tldr: 高斯过程在边界域上因核相关邻域截断导致后验方差膨胀，引发与目标函数无关的采集偏差，且随维度增加而加剧。本文揭示了方差最大化、负积分后验方差和期望预测信息增益三类采集函数的边界行为模式，并提出了一种与函数无关的选择剖面诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 长期以来边界导致的方差膨胀被视为伪影，但其对贝叶斯优化中采集函数偏差的成因和影响未被充分探索。
AI.method: 通过几何机制分析核相关邻域在边界处截断的效应，分类研究三种采集函数（方差最大化、负积分后验方差、期望预测信息增益）的边界行为，并提出无函数依赖的选择剖面诊断工具。
AI.result: 方差最大化将选择集中在角点，而负积分后验方差和期望预测信息增益将选择推向轴对齐的内部壳层；这些模式与目标函数无关，由核几何主导。
AI.conclusion: 采集行为可能被核几何而非任务特定的不确定性所主导，需通过所提诊断方法加以识别和缓解。

title: OneFeed: A Unified Generative Framework for Feed ContentEnhancement and Query Generation
summary: Modern feed recommendation and search systems are deeply connected in user behavior butare usually modeled by separate architectures. Feed recommendation mainly captures implicitinterests from browsing interactions, while search systems rely on explicit user queries to retrieveintent-matched content. This separation causes fragmented user understanding and missedopportunities for using feed interactions to improve query generation and using generated queriesto enhance feed candidate retrieval.In this paper, we propose OneFeed, a unified generative framework for jointly modelingfeed content enhancement and query generation. OneFeed encodes heterogeneous user behaviorsequences with a shared behavior encoder and employs two generative heads: a Feed SemanticID Generator that produces content semantic IDs for recommendation retrieval, and an IntentQuery Generator that produces natural-language queries for search-based candidate expansion.To bridge the semantic gap between recommendation content and search queries, we introduce aSID-Query alignment objective that learns a shared semantic space for content semantic IDs andquery representations. We further design a closed-loop self-enhancement paradigm that leveragesimplicit user feedback from generated content and search-retrieved results to improve bothgeneration tasks. We provide a detailed experimental protocol using public recommendationdatasets with weakly supervised query construction, define a comprehensive set of evaluationmetrics, report expected performance estimates grounded in known baseline values, and validatethe executability of the proposed pipeline through a minimal local prototype. OneFeed providesa practical and extensible direction for unifying search and recommendation through generativemodeling.

AI.tldr: OneFeed提出了一个统一的生成式框架，通过共享行为编码器和两个生成头（Feed语义ID生成器和意图查询生成器），将推荐系统的内容增强和搜索系统的查询生成联合建模，并引入SID-Query对齐目标和闭环自增强范式来弥合推荐内容与搜索查询之间的语义鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 现代信息流推荐和搜索系统在用户行为上紧密关联，但通常采用分离的架构分别建模，导致对用户理解碎片化，错失了利用推荐交互改进查询生成以及利用生成查询增强推荐候选检索的机会。
AI.method: 提出OneFeed框架：(1) 共享行为编码器编码异质用户行为序列；(2) Feed语义ID生成器生成内容语义ID用于推荐检索，意图查询生成器生成自然语言查询用于搜索候选扩展；(3) SID-Query对齐目标学习内容语义ID与查询表示的共享语义空间；(4) 闭环自增强范式利用来自生成内容和搜索结果的隐式用户反馈改进两个生成任务。
AI.result: 使用弱监督查询构建的公开推荐数据集进行实验，定义了一套全面的评估指标，基于已知基线值报告了预期性能估计，并通过最小本地原型验证了所提管线的可执行性。
AI.conclusion: OneFeed为通过生成式建模统一搜索和推荐提供了一个实用且可扩展的方向。

title: The Windows IOCTL Census: A Corpus-Scale, Multi-Architecture Database of the Driver Control-Code Surface
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Companion structural-tier dataset: huggingface.co/datasets/mjbommar/ioctl-census
summary: A Windows driver exposes its kernel through I/O control (IOCTL) codes, and a single unchecked length on the buffer behind one turns an unprivileged call into a kernel write. The research community has strong scanners for this surface and a curated list of known-bad drivers, but no map of the surface itself. We build that map. The Windows IOCTL Census is a queryable database of the control-code dispatch surface of 27,087 signed Windows drivers, recovered by one deterministic, architecture-neutral pass with no symbolic execution. Reading a lifted intermediate representation instead of running a symbolic engine lets it recover a dispatch surface for 80% of the corpus across x86 and x64, including the 32-bit half existing scanners abort on. On the 64-bit lane it adds handler reachability, taint, and the call graph. An LLM ranks the reachable handlers for triage. We release the census as a public dataset of tens of millions of rows: 27,087 binaries, 3.1M decoded control codes, 8.18M functions, and 15.95M call edges.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了Windows IOCTL普查数据库，通过确定性、架构无关的静态分析方法，从27,087个已签名Windows驱动中恢复了控制码分发表面，包含3.1M解码控制码、8.18M函数和15.95M调用边，并使用LLM对可达处理程序进行排序以辅助分类。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽然有强大的驱动扫描工具和已知恶意驱动列表，但缺乏对整个IOCTL分发表面的系统性映射。
AI.method: 采用确定性、架构无关的单遍静态分析，读取提升的中间表示而非运行符号执行引擎，在x86和x64上恢复分发表面；在64位通道上额外恢复处理程序可达性、污点和调用图，并使用LLM对可达处理程序进行排序。
AI.result: 成功分析了27,087个已签名Windows驱动，恢复了3.1M解码控制码、8.18M函数和15.95M调用边，覆盖80%的语料库，包括现有扫描工具无法处理的32位驱动。
AI.conclusion: 该普查作为公开数据集发布，为Windows驱动安全研究提供了首个系统性的IOCTL分发表面地图，填补了该领域的空白。

title: Why Limit the Residual Stream to Layers and Not Tokens? Persistent Memory for Continuous Latent Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning abilities on mathematical and multi-hop planning tasks. The CoCoNuT (Chain of Continuous Thought) paradigm~\cite{hao2024coconut} extends this by enabling models to reason in latent space, exploring multiple reasoning paths simultaneously rather than committing to a single chain early on. However, we identify a limitation we term the \textbf{concept bottleneck}. At each reasoning pass, intermediate hidden states are overwritten, causing the model to lose critical facts computed in earlier steps as reasoning depth increases. We observe this empirically. On HotpotQA, vanilla CoCoNuT (10.4\% EM) fails to improve over the CoT baseline (11.0\% EM), and performance degrades with curriculum depth on GSM8K. To address this, we propose \textbf{AGCLR} (Adaptive Gated Continuous Latent Reasoning), which augments CoCoNuT with a \textit{Gated Concept Stream}. A persistent residual memory maintained across all reasoning passes, controlled by three learned gates: a \textit{write} gate that commits intermediate facts to memory, a \textit{read} gate that retrieves relevant prior states, and a \textit{forget} gate that prunes irrelevant context. Evaluated on GSM8K, HotpotQA, and ProsQA using GPT-2 as our base model, AGCLR achieves consistent improvements across all types of datasets. With the performance gap compounding as curriculum depth increases, directly resolving the concept bottleneck. Code available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/JJJJ/README.md

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGCLR方法，通过引入门控概念流（写门、读门、遗忘门）解决CoCoNuT在连续潜在推理中的概念瓶颈问题，即在推理过程中中间隐藏状态被覆盖导致关键信息丢失。实验表明AGCLR在GSM8K、HotpotQA和ProsQA上均优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: CoCoNuT在连续潜在空间推理时存在概念瓶颈：每次推理过程中间隐藏状态被覆盖，导致模型随着推理深度增加而丢失早期计算的关键事实，表现为HotpotQA上vanilla CoCoNuT（10.4% EM）甚至不如CoT基线（11.0% EM），GSM8K上随课程深度增加性能退化。
AI.method: 提出AGCLR（Adaptive Gated Continuous Latent Reasoning），在CoCoNuT基础上增加门控概念流（Gated Concept Stream）。核心是一个跨所有推理步骤的持久残差记忆，由三个可学习门控制：写门（将中间事实提交到记忆）、读门（检索相关先验状态）、遗忘门（修剪无关上下文）。
AI.result: 基于GPT-2模型，在GSM8K、HotpotQA和ProsQA上评估，AGCLR在所有数据集上均取得一致改进，且随着课程深度增加性能差距持续扩大，直接解决了概念瓶颈问题。
AI.conclusion: AGCLR通过门控持久记忆机制有效缓解了潜在空间推理中的信息遗忘问题，验证了保留中间推理状态对于深度连续推理的重要性。

title: Emergence via Phase Transitions: Mechanism Landscapes and Universal Convergence Across Complex Systems
comment: 27 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables; 15-page Supplementary Information with complete proofs included
summary: Across machine learning, biology, and physics, independently evolving systems often converge toward strikingly similar high-level structures despite radically different microscopic details. Grokking circuits converge across random seeds, evolutionary lineages rediscover similar metabolic solutions, and renormalization flows approach common fixed points. We propose the Hierarchical Emergence Framework (HEF) as a candidate universality framework for such convergence phenomena. HEF models emergence as a phase transition in a mechanism landscape constrained by thermodynamic and information-theoretic laws. The framework introduces a critical energy threshold Ec separating an exploration regime with competing mechanisms from a convergence regime governed by a unique minimum-cost mechanism. Under structural assumptions, we prove physical feasibility, derive strict metric contraction, and establish convergence toward a unique fixed-point representation independent of initial conditions. We further connect this convergence structure to causal emergence through Effective Information and mechanism competition entropy. To test the framework, we study delayed generalization ("grokking") in modular arithmetic transformers across 111 experiments. We identify a reproducible empirical fingerprint of the Ec transition: the weight norm peaks systematically before grokking in 92% of runs. Normalized accuracy curves collapse onto a tanh kink (R^2=0.93) consistent with a Landau-Ginzburg universality class, and all grokked models converge to 0.9745+/-0.014 regardless of initialization, weight decay, or training fraction (ANOVA p>0.13). HEF is not presented as a universal theory of emergence, but as a falsifiable mathematical scaffold for studying convergence phenomena across complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出层级涌现框架(HEF)，将涌现建模为机制景观中的相变，受热力学和信息论约束。通过临界能量阈值Ec区分探索与收敛两个阶段，并在111个"顿悟"(grokking)实验中验证：权重范数在92%的运行中在grokking前系统性地达到峰值，归一化精度曲线坍缩为tanh扭结(R²=0.93)，所有grokked模型收敛到0.9745±0.014。
AI.motivation: 机器学习、生物学和物理学中独立演化的系统尽管微观细节迥异，却往往收敛到惊人相似的高层结构（如不同随机种子的grokking电路趋同、进化谱系发现相似代谢解、重整化流趋近公共不动点）。现有缺乏统一的数学框架来解释这种跨系统的收敛现象。
AI.method: 提出层级涌现框架(HEF)，将涌现建模为受热力学和信息论约束的机制景观中的相变。引入临界能量阈值Ec，低于Ec为探索区（多种机制竞争），高于Ec为收敛区（唯一最小成本机制主导）。在结构假设下证明物理可行性、严格度量收缩及收敛到唯一不动点表示。通过有效信息(Effective Information)和机制竞争熵将收敛结构与因果涌现联系起来。
AI.result: 在111个模算术transformer的grokking实验中，92%的运行中权重范数在grokking前系统性达到峰值（Ec转变的经验指纹）。归一化精度曲线坍缩到tanh扭结(R²=0.93)，符合Landau-Ginzburg普适类。所有grokked模型收敛到0.9745±0.014，对初始化、权重衰减或训练分数不敏感(ANOVA p>0.13)。
AI.conclusion: HEF并非作为涌现的普适理论提出，而是作为一个可证伪的数学脚手架，用于研究跨复杂系统的收敛现象。

title: DeRes: Decoupling Residual Stability and Adaptivity for Scalable CTR Prediction
summary: Transformer-based CTR models face a growing bottleneck at the residual connection: under Pre-Norm, early user-interest signals are diluted layer by layer; the identity skip cannot forget stale interests; and each layer sees only its immediate predecessor, losing long-range cross-layer dependencies. Recent attention-based residual variants (AttnRes) address parts of this in language models, but drop the protective identity skip and have not been tried in recommendation. Drawing on Dual Path Networks (DPN) and the HORNN view of residuals, we present DeRes, which routes each layer through two parallel paths -- an Identity residual path that preserves first-order feature reuse and gradient flow, and a Block Attention Residual path that attends over compressed outputs of all earlier blocks for high-order recall. A vector-wise gate decides, per hidden dimension, the weight given to each path. We further propose Pointwise AttnRes, replacing the Softmax in the cross-layer attention with SiLU so that multiple past blocks can be activated simultaneously and irrelevant ones receive negative (forgetting) weights -- better aligned with CTR's parallel multi-interest patterns. On a large-scale industrial dataset (331M interactions from a major social-media platform), Criteo (45M), and Avazu (40M), DeRes outperforms twelve baselines including OneTrans, TokenMixer-Large, UniMixer, mHC, and AttnRes, achieving up to +0.32% AUC at under 5% extra FLOPs. Beyond a single operating point, DeRes fits a markedly steeper compute-AUC scaling law (gamma=0.118 vs. 0.071 for OneTrans, a 1.66x gap), so an 8-layer DeRes matches a 16-layer OneTrans -- about 2x compute saving at equivalent AUC. Ablations confirm that the dual-path design outperforms either single path, Identity beats learnable residuals, and SiLU beats Softmax.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeRes，通过双路径残差连接（Identity路径保持梯度流 + Block Attention路径跨层注意力聚合）和SiLU替代Softmax的点式注意力机制，解决CTR模型中Pre-Norm残差导致信号稀释、无法遗忘旧兴趣及缺乏跨层依赖的问题。在3个大规模数据集（总计超4亿交互）上，DeRes以不到5%的额外FLOPs超越12个基线模型，AUC最高提升0.32%，且计算-AUC缩放定律更优（gamma=0.118 vs 0.071），8层DeRes等效16层OneTrans，节省约2倍计算量。
AI.motivation: Transformer-based CTR模型在Pre-Norm残差连接下面临三大瓶颈：早期用户兴趣信号逐层稀释、恒等跳跃连接无法遗忘过时兴趣、每层仅能看到前一层输出导致缺乏长程跨层依赖。现有注意力残差变体（AttnRes）虽在语言模型中部分解决了这些问题，但丢弃了保护性的恒等跳跃连接且未被用于推荐系统。
AI.method: 借鉴Dual Path Networks和HORNN对残差的视角，DeRes设计双路径结构：Identity残差路径保留一阶特征复用和梯度流，Block Attention Residual路径对所有先前块的压缩输出进行跨层注意力聚合以实现高阶召回。每个路径的权重由逐向量门控按隐藏维度决定。进一步提出Pointwise AttnRes，将跨层注意力中的Softmax替换为SiLU激活函数，使多个过去块可同时激活，不相关的块获得负权重（遗忘机制），更契合CTR的并行多兴趣模式。
AI.result: 在工业级数据集（社交媒体平台3.31亿交互）、Criteo（4500万）和Avazu（4000万）上，DeRes超越OneTrans、TokenMixer-Large、UniMixer、mHC、AttnRes等12个基线模型，AUC最高提升0.32%，额外FLOPs不到5%。DeRes的计算-AUC缩放定律更陡峭（gamma=0.118 vs OneTrans的0.071，差距1.66倍），8层DeRes可与16层OneTrans媲美，节省约2倍计算量。消融实验确认：双路径设计优于任一单路径、Identity优于可学习残差、SiLU优于Softmax。
AI.conclusion: DeRes通过双路径残差结构和SiLU点式注意力机制，有效解决了CTR模型中残差连接的信号稀释、遗忘和跨层依赖问题，在极低成本下显著提升性能并改善计算效率缩放定律。

title: Sensitivity Analysis White Paper
summary: Sensitivity analysis is an important component of simulation-based decision support because it helps analysts determine which inputs most strongly influence model outcomes under uncertainty. This paper organizes the broad sensitivity analysis literature into a coherent framework for use in complex simulation settings, with particular attention to military applications. We review major classes of methods, including local and global approaches, variance-based techniques, screening methods, derivative-based methods, and uncertainty quantification tools, and relate them to common analytical objectives such as factor prioritization, factor fixing, variance reduction, and factor mapping. The paper also discusses sensitivity auditing as a complementary perspective that emphasizes transparency, assumption tracking, and responsible use of models in decision-relevant settings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了灵敏度分析（SA）的各类方法（局部/全局、方差基、筛选法、导数基、不确定性量化），将其组织为适用于复杂仿真（尤其是军事场景）的统一框架，并引入灵敏度审计作为补充视角，强调模型使用的透明度与责任性。
AI.motivation: 仿真决策支持中需要识别关键输入因素，但灵敏度分析方法分散、缺乏系统性整合，尤其在军事等复杂仿真场景下缺少统一指导框架。
AI.method: 对灵敏度分析文献进行综述性组织，分类讨论局部/全局方法、方差基技术、筛选法、导数基方法和不确定性量化工具，并与因子优先级排序、因子固定、方差缩减、因子映射等分析目标关联；同时引入灵敏度审计视角。
AI.result: 构建了一个涵盖多类SA方法及其与分析目标对应关系的统一框架，并将灵敏度审计作为补充维度纳入。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可为复杂仿真（特别是军事应用）中的灵敏度分析提供系统化指导，同时强调在决策相关场景中需关注模型的透明度、假设追踪和负责任使用。

title: Automatic Extraction of Structured Information from Brain MRI Reports Using an Open-Weight Large Language Model
summary: Objectives: Automatic data extraction from free-text radiology reports enables large-scale research, but few studies assessed the performance of large language models (LLMs) on Dutch neuroradiology reports. Methods: We analyzed 947 brain MRI reports from a tertiary memory clinic (2016-2021), authored by consultant neuroradiologists. Trained medical students annotated thirty variables; 100 reports were double-annotated to assess inter-rater reliability. We evaluated the performance of the open-weight LLM LLaMA 3.1 using different languages (Dutch vs. English translation) and few-shot prompting with different example selection strategies. Performance was evaluated using balanced accuracy for categorical variables, accuracy and mean absolute error for counts, and text similarity for free-text. Metrics were computed across 10 random splits of the 947 reports. Results: LLaMA 3.1 demonstrated high zero-shot performance for visual rating scores (mean [95%-CI]): Medial Temporal Atrophy: 90% [77-100%] on the left and 96% [94-99%] on the right, Global Cortical Atrophy: 87% [83-91%], and Fazekas: 94% [93-96%]. Microbleed mentions were detected with 93% accuracy [92-95%] and infarct mentions with 82% [80-84%]. Text similarity for lesion location reached 0.95 [0.95-0.96]. Performance was lower for numerical variables: 80% [78-82%] for the number of microbleeds and 66% [63-68%] for infarcts. English translation yielded comparable results. Few-shot prompting improved performance for numerical variables, achieving 92% [90-93%] for microbleeds and 81% [77-85%] for infarcts using structural similarity-based selection. Conclusion: LLaMA 3.1 shows strong potential for extracting data from Dutch neuroradiology reports. Few-shot prompting enhances performance for numerical variables, whereas challenges remain for location-specific variables.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了LLaMA 3.1从荷兰语神经放射学报告中自动提取数据的性能。模型在视觉评分（MTA 90-96%、GCA 87%、Fazekas 94%）和病灶检测（微出血93%、梗死82%）上表现出色，但对数值变量（微出血计数80%、梗死计数66%）性能较低。少样本提示通过结构相似性选择策略将数值变量性能提升至92%和81%。
AI.motivation: 从自由文本放射学报告中自动提取数据可支持大规模研究，但目前缺乏对大型语言模型在荷兰语神经放射学报告中性能的评估。
AI.method: 分析了947份脑磁共振报告（2016-2021），由医学学生标注30个变量，100份报告进行双标注评估信度。评估LLaMA 3.1在不同语言（荷兰语vs英文翻译）和少样本提示策略下的性能，使用平衡准确率、准确率、平均绝对误差和文本相似度等指标，在10次随机划分上计算。
AI.result: 零样本下：MTA左侧90%、右侧96%，GCA 87%，Fazekas 94%；微出血检测93%，梗死检测82%；病灶位置文本相似度0.95。数值变量较低：微出血计数80%，梗死计数66%。英文翻译结果相当。少样本提示将微出血计数提升至92%，梗死计数提升至81%。
AI.conclusion: LLaMA 3.1在荷兰语神经放射学报告数据提取上表现强劲，少样本提示可改善数值变量性能，但位置相关变量仍存在挑战。

title: STARIXNet: Multivariate and Multi-attribute Deep Learning Approach to Real-Time Resource Allocation in Cloud Platforms
summary: Intelligent scaling of microservices in cloud platforms is crucial for mitigating escalating compute costs while avoiding service disruptions. Current solutions are limited to the univariate space, typically focusing on CPU usage alone to drive scaling decisions. Moreover, they address the problem as a purely forecasting task, focusing on prediction precision while neglecting the greater risks of underestimation and delays in system responsiveness. Alternative solutions are computationally complex, making them impractical for large-scale, real-time deployments. To address these challenges, we present STARIXNet, a lightweight neural network that guides resource allocation decisions in the multivariate space by capturing spatio-temporal relationships among multiple system metrics. STARIXNet models multiple quasi-dependent attributes, in particular the (S)easonal, (T)emporal, (A)uto-(R)egressive (I)ntegrated, and e(X)ogenous patterns, then implements an aggregation policy to finalize scaling decisions, prioritizing service stability, followed by cost-efficiency, over raw forecast accuracy. We empirically demonstrate the performance of STARIXNet by benchmarking against existing solutions in real-world settings. STARIXNet is deployed for critical production microservices at Walmart achieving tangible savings ranging from 10\% to 50\%, in addition to intangible benefits through improved service stability and customer experience.

AI.tldr: STARIXNet是一个轻量级神经网络框架，通过捕捉多系统指标间的时空关系实现微服务的智能弹性伸缩，在Walmart生产环境中节省10%-50%成本并提升服务稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有微服务伸缩方案局限于单变量空间（通常仅依赖CPU使用率）且将其视为纯预测任务，忽视了低估风险与系统响应延迟，而替代方案计算复杂难以大规模实时部署。
AI.method: STARIXNet建模多准依赖属性的时空模式（季节性、时序、自回归积分、外生变量），采用聚合策略优先保障服务稳定性再考虑成本效率，而非追求原始预测精度。
AI.result: 在Walmart关键生产微服务中实际部署实现10%-50%的可量化成本节省，以及服务稳定性和客户体验提升带来的无形收益。
AI.conclusion: 多变量时空建模结合以稳定性优先的聚合策略，能有效替代传统单变量预测方法，在真实大规模生产环境中平衡成本优化与服务可靠性。

title: GIScholarBench: Benchmarking LLM Overconfidence in GIS Research
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in academic research workflows, but scholarly tasks require high factual precision and therefore expose a key weakness: overconfidence. Here, overconfidence is defined behaviorally as the tendency to produce confident, assertive, and well-formatted outputs even when the underlying knowledge is incomplete or unverifiable, rather than as a calibration gap between stated confidence and accuracy. To examine this issue, we introduce GIScholarBench, a benchmark built from 10,865 papers published in 25 core GIScience journals between 2020 and 2025. The benchmark covers three tasks with increasing cognitive complexity: metadata retrieval, literature linking, and research direction generation. We evaluate Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3, and ChatGPT 5.3 through their native web interfaces under real-world user-facing conditions. Results show consistent overconfidence across all tasks. In metadata retrieval, ChatGPT 5.3 achieves the highest accuracy, but all models still generate definitive titles and DOIs when predictions are wrong. In literature linking, Claude Sonnet 4.5 recovers the most references, but all models show a clear gap between top-ranked retrieval and longer citation lists, suggesting that references are extended beyond reliable retrieval capacity. In research direction generation, AI-generated directions show lower topic coverage, higher novel miss rates, and lower semantic diversity than real future-citing papers. These findings suggest that LLM overconfidence is task-invariant but takes different forms: factual overgeneration in retrieval, unreliable citation expansion in literature linking, and overconfidence in output completeness during research ideation.

AI.tldr: 本文构建GIScholarBench基准（基于2020-2025年10,865篇GIScience论文），评估Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 3、ChatGPT 5.3在元数据检索、文献链接、研究方向生成三项任务中的过度自信问题。结果发现所有模型均存在任务不变但形式各异的过度自信：检索中生成虚假但格式完整的元数据，文献链接中不可靠地扩展引用列表，研究构思中输出看似全面实则覆盖不足的方向。
AI.motivation: LLM在学术研究中应用日益广泛，但学术任务要求高事实精度，而LLM存在过度自信的关键弱点——即使知识不完整或不可验证，仍倾向于生成自信、断言性且格式良好的输出。需要系统评估这一问题。
AI.method: 构建GIScholarBench，包含10,865篇论文（来自25个GIScience核心期刊，2020-2025年），涵盖三项认知复杂度递增的任务：元数据检索、文献链接、研究方向生成。通过原生Web界面评估Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 3、ChatGPT 5.3在真实用户场景下的表现。
AI.result: 元数据检索中ChatGPT 5.3准确率最高，但所有模型在预测错误时仍生成确定性的标题和DOI；文献链接中Claude Sonnet 4.5恢复最多参考文献，但所有模型在较长引用列表中存在检索能力与引用扩展之间的明显差距；研究方向生成中AI生成的方向主题覆盖率低、新颖性遗漏率高、语义多样性低于真实未来引用论文。
AI.conclusion: LLM过度自信是任务不变的，但表现形式各异：检索中的事实过度生成、文献链接中不可靠的引用扩展、研究构思中对输出完整性的过度自信。

title: Jas: AI-Paired Engineering as a Revival of N-Version Programming
summary: I report a case study in AI-paired software engineering: five working ports of a vector illustration application across Rust, Swift, OCaml, Python, and browser-based platforms, built by a single developer in approximately 120 evening hours. The methodology pairs AI-assisted implementation with two safeguards -- a precise executable YAML specification serving as the single source of truth, and parallel implementations functioning as a built-in differential-testing layer. The five ports share a 23{,}000-line specification; per-port native code ranges from 0 to roughly 95{,}000 lines, reflecting the specification's escape hatch. I argue that AI-paired engineering, conditional on these two safeguards, makes feasible scope of work that conventionally requires multiple developer-years, and frame the methodology as a revival of N-version programming, a 1980s approach abandoned on cost grounds that AI changes. The paper reports concrete artifacts and honest limitations of the single-developer case study.

AI.tldr: 一名开发者约120个晚上，利用AI配对工程方法（精确YAML规范+并行实现的差分测试），单人完成了矢量插画应用在Rust、Swift、OCaml、Python及浏览器平台上的五个移植版本（23,000行共享规范，每平台原生代码0~95,000行），论证了该方法使原本需多人年工作量变得可行，并将其重振为成本因AI而改变的N版本编程范式。
AI.motivation: 探索AI辅助软件工程是否能将传统上需要多人年开发周期的大规模跨平台移植任务，压缩到单个开发者在有限时间内完成，并验证该方法的可行性。
AI.method: 采用AI配对实现方法，辅以两道安全护栏：(1) 精确的可执行YAML规范作为唯一真实源；(2) 并行实现作为内置差分测试层。即先定义精确规范，再让AI辅助生成各平台原生代码，利用多版本并行实现进行相互测试验证。
AI.result: 成功在约120个晚上由单个开发者在五个平台（Rust、Swift、OCaml、Python及浏览器）上完成矢量插画应用的移植。共享规范约23,000行，各平台原生代码从0到约95,000行不等。
AI.conclusion: AI配对工程在条件性依赖两道安全护栏的情况下，能够使传统上需要多人年工作量的大规模跨平台开发任务变得可行。该方法可被视为对1980年代N版本编程范式的复兴——AI改变了其曾被放弃的成本问题。

title: Some hypotheses on how chatbots work in problem-solving-driven conversations. Large Language Models as confirmation of the Innovation Illusion
summary:
This article offers a perspective on the nature of chatbots as genuine conversation partners when discussing problems in relation to their solutions. What can chatbots do and what can't they do, and how can this be explained? Our argument draws on Aggregation Dynamics, Cognitive Linguistics, Neuropsychology and Psychology.
  Our argument focuses on basic chatbots in the hope of thereby making statements about the core functionality of more advanced chatbots. Basic chatbots are assumed to consist of a Large Language Model (LLM) with a simple interface.
  The main results are: a description of human understanding and thinking based on so-called metaphorical problem propagations; the hypothesis that text dataset used for training LLMs have specific characteristics and that these text datasets only partially imitate human thinking and understanding; the hypothesis that the LLM training process encodes artificial metaphorical problem propagations into an LLM from these datasets; our conclusion that a basic chatbot cannot be a thinking partner capable of matching humans; our conclusion that further development of the Large Language Model will not lead to this either.
  Yann LeCun states: "Animals and humans exhibit learning abilities and understandings of the world that are far beyond the capabilities of current AI and machine learning (ML) systems." Our conclusions are in line with this. LeCun's vision and ours are at odds with the optimism of Big Tech. That does not alter the fact that chatbots exist, that they are being used on a massive scale, by both individuals and organisations, and that it is therefore socially and politically important to understand them. Our article aims to contribute to the discussion on the functioning, benefits and drawbacks of chatbots.
  We have not yet encountered the approach we used to arrive at our conclusions in our research into how chatbots work.

AI.tldr: 本文基于聚合动力学、认知语言学、神经心理学和心理学视角，论证基础聊天机器人由LLM和简单界面组成，提出隐喻问题传播理论，认为训练LLM的文本数据集仅部分模仿人类思维，因此基础聊天机器人无法成为与人类匹敌的思考伙伴，且进一步发展LLM也无法实现这一目标。该观点与Yann LeCun对AI局限性的看法一致，但与大型科技公司的乐观态度相左。
AI.motivation: 理解聊天机器人作为真正对话伙伴的本质，澄清它们能做什么和不能做什么，并解释其原因，以促进对聊天机器人功能、优势和局限的社会性讨论。
AI.method: 跨学科理论分析，综合聚合动力学、认知语言学、神经心理学和心理学视角，聚焦基础聊天机器人（LLM+简单界面），提出"隐喻问题传播"理论框架进行分析。
AI.result: 1) 提出基于隐喻问题传播的人类理解与思维描述；2) 提出LLM训练文本数据集具有特定特征且仅部分模仿人类思维和理解的假设；3) 提出LLM训练过程从数据集中编码人工隐喻问题传播的假设；4) 结论：基础聊天机器人无法成为与人类匹敌的思考伙伴；5) 结论：进一步发展LLM也无法实现这一目标。
AI.conclusion: 基础聊天机器人及其更高级版本无法真正匹敌人类思维伙伴，这与LeCun的观点一致，但与Big Tech的乐观预期相悖；尽管如此，聊天机器人已被大规模使用，因此理解其工作机制具有重要的社会和政治意义。

title: TriHead-GAN: A Generative Adversarial Network with Triple-Head Discriminator for Carbon Emission Time Series Generation
summary: Accurate carbon emission monitoring is critical for climate policy and emerging regulatory mechanisms such as the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism, yet city-level high-frequency monitoring data remain extremely scarce, severely limiting data-hungry deep learning models. Time series generation is a natural remedy, but existing GAN and diffusion-based generators often provide limited explicit supervision for the domain structure of carbon emission data: they may match marginal distributional statistics while insufficiently preserving cross-variable correlations between CO$_2$ and co-emitted pollutants and meteorological factors, and tend to collapse the first-difference statistics of atmospheric measurements, producing sequences that are smooth on average but lack the realistic step-wise variability of the underlying signals. We propose TriHead-GAN, a Transformer-based adversarial framework whose triple-head discriminator jointly supervises three complementary aspects of the joint distribution: distributional authenticity via a Wasserstein critic, cross-variable dependency via leakage-free regression of the target variable, and step-wise temporal smoothness via adjacent-difference prediction. The generator combines global self-attention with local temporal convolution, per-step noise injection, and an anti-smoothing loss that matches first-difference statistics. Experiments on the self-collected Changsha Carbon dataset, two public carbon datasets (China, US), and the ETTh1 benchmark show that TriHead-GAN achieves favorable performance over mainstream baselines on the vast majority of settings, and that the resulting synthetic windows improve downstream forecasting accuracy in low-resource carbon monitoring scenarios.

AI.tldr: 针对城市级碳排放高频率监测数据稀缺的问题，提出TriHead-GAN框架，通过三头判别器联合监督分布真实性、跨变量依赖性和步态时间平滑性，在多个数据集上优于主流基线，并提升了低资源场景下的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 城市级高频率碳排放监测数据极度稀缺，限制了深度学习的应用；现有时间序列生成方法（GAN、扩散模型）未能充分保留碳排放数据的领域结构特征，尤其是跨变量相关性（CO₂与共排放污染物及气象因子）和一阶差分统计量，导致生成序列缺乏真实步态变化。
AI.method: 提出TriHead-GAN，采用Transformer基的对抗框架，生成器集成全局自注意力、局部时序卷积、逐步噪声注入及抗平滑损失；判别器由三头组成：Wasserstein评论家监督分布真实性、无泄漏回归头监督跨变量依赖、相邻差分预测头监督步态时序平滑性。
AI.result: 在自收集的长沙碳排放数据集、两个公开碳排放数据集（中国、美国）及ETTh1基准上，TriHead-GAN在绝大多数设置下优于主流基线，且生成的合成窗口提升了低资源碳排放监测场景下的下游预测精度。
AI.conclusion: TriHead-GAN通过三头判别器显式监督碳排放数据的多重领域结构特征，有效解决了高稀缺场景下的时序生成问题，在提升生成质量的同时增强了下游预测任务的表现。

title: EmpiriGraph-Psy: A Dataset and LLM Pipeline for Extracting Empirical Relation Graphs from Psychology Abstracts
summary: Existing scientific relation extraction benchmarks mainly target domains such as computer science, where entities are tasks, methods, datasets, materials, or metrics. This leaves a gap in variable-oriented empirical fields such as psychology, where findings are expressed as relations among constructs, measurements, interventions, and outcomes. We introduce variable-centered empirical graph extraction, the task of mapping scientific abstracts to typed graphs whose nodes are normalized variables and whose edges represent empirical and hierarchical relations. To support this task, we construct EmpiriGraph-Psy, a benchmark of 210 psychology abstracts annotated by domain-trained annotators with normalized variables, concept hierarchies, empirical relation types, and validation states. We evaluate frontier and open-weight LLMs using both direct extraction and a staged graph-construction pipeline that separates variable extraction, normalization, hierarchy construction, evidence selection, relation extraction, and edge validation. The staged pipeline substantially outperforms direct extraction, with the best configuration achieving a macro-F1 of 0.74. Error analysis shows that moderation relations and concept hierarchies remain the most challenging cases, highlighting the difficulty of extracting higher-order empirical claims and implicit abstraction structure from scientific abstracts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向心理学等变量导向实证领域的中心化实证图抽取任务，构建了包含210篇心理学摘要的EmpiriGraph-Psy基准数据集，并评估了分阶段图构建管线相比直接抽取方法的优越性，最佳配置达到宏观F1=0.74。
AI.motivation: 现有科学关系抽取基准主要面向计算机科学领域（实体为任务、方法、数据集等），缺乏针对心理学等变量导向实证领域的研究。这些领域的研究发现表现为构念、测量、干预和结果之间的关系，现有方法无法有效处理此类变量中心化的实证关系抽取。
AI.method: 构建EmpiriGraph-Psy基准数据集（210篇心理学摘要，经领域训练标注员标注）；提出分阶段图构建管线，将任务分解为变量抽取、归一化、层级构建、证据选择、关系抽取和边验证六个阶段；评估前沿和开源大语言模型。
AI.result: 分阶段管线显著优于直接抽取方法，最佳配置宏观F1达0.74。错误分析表明调节关系和概念层级仍是最具挑战性的情况。
AI.conclusion: 变量中心化实证图抽取是心理学等实证领域的重要任务；分阶段管线策略有效；高阶实证关系和隐含抽象结构的抽取仍是难点。

title: Academic Integrity and Emotional Responses to Inappropriate LLM Use in Software Engineering Education
summary: Academic integrity in higher education is increasingly shaped by complex socio-technical environments marked by automated tools, evolving institutional practices, and heightened performance pressures. Within this context, large language models (LLMs) are becoming prevalent in software engineering education, further blurring boundaries around acceptable assistance and authorship. This study investigates how software engineering students describe their emotional experiences after using LLMs in ways they perceive as academically inappropriate. We conducted a cross-sectional survey with 116 undergraduate students. Results show emotionally heterogeneous responses. Indifference was most frequent, including among students who recognized risks to learning and academic standing. Guilt and anxiety were reported in relation to moral discomfort and concern about penalties. Relief and satisfaction were evident primarily in deadline-driven contexts and situations of unclear guidance.

AI.tldr: 本研究调查了116名软件工程本科生在使用大语言模型（LLM）后，对其自认为学术不端行为的情绪反应。结果显示情绪反应呈现异质性：最常见的情绪是冷漠（即便学生认识到对学习和学术地位的风险），此外还有内疚、焦虑、宽慰和满足感，其中宽慰和满足感主要出现在截止日期压力和指导不明确的情境下。
AI.motivation: 在自动化工具、不断演变的机构实践和高绩效压力构成的复杂社会技术环境中，高等教育中的学术诚信面临挑战。大语言模型在软件工程教育中日益普及，进一步模糊了可接受帮助与学术不端之间的界限。本研究旨在探究学生在使用LLM后自认为学术不当行为时的情感体验。
AI.method: 采用横截面调查设计，对116名软件工程专业的本科生进行问卷调查，收集他们在使用LLM后自认为学术不端行为的情感体验数据。
AI.result: 情绪反应呈现异质性：冷漠最为常见（即使学生意识到对学习和学术地位的风险）；内疚和焦虑与道德不适和惩罚担忧相关；宽慰和满足感主要出现在截止日期驱动和指导不明确的情境下。
AI.conclusion: 学生对使用LLM后自认为学术不端的情感反应是多样化的，且冷漠情绪占主导地位，这对学术诚信教育提出了新的挑战。

title: Land cover and flood type govern the detection limits of satellite-based flood mapping across diverse global flood events
summary: Floods are among the most destructive natural hazards, and their increasing frequency under climate change makes satellite-based inundation mapping essential for disaster response. Geospatial foundation models pretrained on satellite archives offer geographic transferability, but their operational reliability across diverse, unseen events remains uncharacterized. Here we deploy Prithvi-EO-2.0 across 19 out-of-distribution flood events (2017-2025) spanning six continents, eight climate zones, and six flood mechanisms, validating against two independent reference products. Detection accuracy depended jointly on land cover and flood type, with cropland yielding the highest agreement (IoU=52%) and riverine events the strongest detection (F1=0.69), while tree cover and built-up areas showed near-zero detection (IoU=4%) regardless of flood mechanism. Dual-reference validation revealed that apparent model error partly reflects definitional inconsistency between reference products rather than detection failure. Iterative pipeline testing identified 23 failure modes, with pipeline engineering dominating initial error over model capacity. These findings establish environment-dependent detection boundaries for operational satellite flood mapping.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了地理空间基础模型Prithvi-EO-2.0在19个全球分布洪水事件（2017-2025）中的泛化检测能力，发现检测精度高度依赖土地覆盖类型和洪水机制，并识别出23种失效模式，指出管道工程错误远多于模型容量限制。
AI.motivation: 卫星洪水制图在气候变化下日益重要，但现有地理空间基础模型在多样化未见事件中的操作可靠性尚未被系统刻画。
AI.method: 采用Prithvi-EO-2.0模型，跨越六大洲、八个气候带和六种洪水机制，对19个分布外洪水事件进行测试，并使用两个独立参考产品进行双重验证，通过迭代管道测试识别失效模式。
AI.result: 农田区域检测一致性最高（IoU=52%），河洪事件检测最强（F1=0.69）；树冠覆盖和建成区检测近乎为零（IoU=4%）。双重验证表明表观模型误差部分源于参考产品间的定义不一致。识别出23种失效模式，管道工程错误主导初始误差。
AI.conclusion: 建立了面向操作化卫星洪水制图的环境依赖型检测边界，强调了土地覆盖和洪水类型对模型可靠性的关键约束。

title: Enabling KV Caching of Shared Prefix for Diffusion Language Models
summary:
Key-value (KV) caching for shared prefixes is essential for high-throughput large language model (LLM) serving, but it faces critical challenges in emerging diffusion language models (DLMs). In DLMs, bidirectional attention means that updating any token dynamically alters the entire context and its corresponding KVs. Thus, existing caching techniques developed for LLMs, which assume that KVs remain invariant once computed, corrupt the shared prefix KVs. Our experiments show that applying these techniques to DLMs causes model accuracy to collapse to near zero.
  To unlock high-throughput DLM serving, we propose bidirectional prefix caching, bicache, the first KV caching technique for shared prefixes in DLMs. bicache is designed based on key observations from our comprehensive analysis: shared prefix KVs remain stable and reusable in shallow layers, while the depth of shallow layers depends on the fraction of shared prefix tokens in each request. Thus, bicache dynamically identifies a safe layer depth for reusing shared prefix KVs and eliminates redundant computation. Evaluations demonstrate that bicache significantly improves serving throughput by 36.3%-98.3% compared to existing techniques without accuracy collapse (only 0-1.8% difference).

AI.tldr: 针对扩散语言模型(DLM)中前缀共享的KV缓存问题，本文提出bicache方法，通过动态识别安全层深度来重用共享前缀KV，在保持精度（0-1.8%差异）的同时提升服务吞吐量36.3%-98.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的KV缓存技术假设KV计算后不变，但DLM的双向注意力机制中任何token更新都会改变整个上下文及其KV值，导致共享前缀KV被破坏，模型准确率几乎降为零。
AI.method: 基于关键观察：共享前缀KV在浅层保持稳定可重用，且浅层深度取决于每个请求中共享前缀token的比例。bicache动态识别安全层深度，重用共享前缀KV并消除冗余计算。
AI.result: 相比现有技术，服务吞吐量提升36.3%-98.3%，模型精度仅0-1.8%差异，未出现精度崩溃。
AI.conclusion: bicache是首个面向DLM共享前缀的KV缓存技术，有效解决了双向注意力机制下的KV缓存失效问题，实现了高效且无损的DLM服务。

title: ToolRec: Calibrated Preference Alignment for Query Recommendation in On-Device Assistants
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly advanced generative query recommendation. However, existing alignment methods primarily focus on standard chatbot scenarios, falling short in on-device intelligent assistants where users predominantly expect the rapid invocation of system-level tools. Moreover, directly aligning LLMs with real-world click logs introduces severe noise due to varying user activity levels and the failure to emphasize execution-oriented queries. To address these challenges, we propose ToolRec, a calibrated preference alignment framework tailored for on-device query recommendation. To ground query recommendation with executable actions, we first construct SysToolKit, a comprehensive repository of 708 system tools, paired with a context-aware tool retrieval mechanism to ensure recommendation relevance. We then propose a dual-level calibration mechanism to refine raw click data, effectively mitigating user behavioral noise by calibrating signals based on user activity levels, while simultaneously up-weighting click signals on system-level tool-invoking queries. Guided by these refined preference signals, we then align the model using a sample-level weighted Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO). Extensive online A/B tests on our mobile assistant platform OPPO Xiaobu, which has over 150 million monthly active users, demonstrate that ToolRec can significantly improve Click-Through Rate (CTR) and total clicks volume over strong baselines while maintaining high query relevance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolRec，一种针对设备端查询推荐场景的校准偏好对齐框架。通过构建包含708个系统工具的SysToolKit库、设计双层校准机制（基于用户活跃度校准+提升系统工具调用查询权重）来去噪原始点击日志，并采用样本级加权KTO进行对齐。在拥有1.5亿月活用户的OPPO小布助手上进行在线A/B测试，证明了方法在CTR和总点击量上的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法主要针对标准聊天机器人场景，无法满足设备端智能助手用户对快速调用系统工具的核心需求；且直接使用真实点击日志进行对齐会引入用户活跃度差异和未强调执行导向查询带来的严重噪声。
AI.method: 1) 构建SysToolKit（708个系统工具）及上下文感知工具检索机制；2) 提出双层校准机制：基于用户活跃度校准信号 + 提升系统级工具调用查询的点击权重；3) 使用样本级加权KTO（Kahneman-Tversky Optimization）进行偏好对齐。
AI.result: 在OPPO小布助手（1.5亿+月活用户）的在线A/B测试中，ToolRec在CTR和总点击量上显著优于强基线，同时保持高查询相关性。
AI.conclusion: 针对设备端查询推荐场景，通过系统工具库构建和双层点击校准机制，有效解决了用户行为噪声问题，实现了更优的在线推荐效果。

title: SLRMentor: An LLM-Based Tool Supporting Learning of SLR in Software Engineering
summary: This paper presents SLRMentor, a conversational assistant designed to support both learning about the systematic literature review process and the execution of planning activities in software engineering. The tool offers general guidance on SLR methodology and supports key planning tasks, including search string construction and reasoning about inclusion and exclusion criteria, with explanations grounded in established SLR guidelines. A pilot validation with graduate students suggests that SLRMentor helps clarify the SLR process and planning decisions, lowers initial barriers for novice researchers, and supports learning while still requiring active methodological judgment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLRMentor，一个旨在帮助软件工程领域研究者学习系统性文献综述（SLR）流程并执行规划活动的对话式辅助工具，初步验证显示其对新手研究者具有支持作用。
AI.motivation: 软件工程领域的系统性文献综述（SLR）学习门槛高，新手研究者缺乏在执行规划活动（如构建检索字符串、制定纳入/排除标准）时获得解释性指导的工具。
AI.method: 开发SLRMentor对话式辅助工具，提供SLR方法论的一般性指导，并支持检索字符串构建、纳入/排除标准推理等关键规划任务，解释基于已有的SLR指南。通过研究生进行试点验证。
AI.result: 试点验证表明SLRMentor有助于澄清SLR流程和规划决策，降低新手初期的入门障碍，支持学习过程，同时仍要求研究者主动进行方法论判断。
AI.conclusion: SLRMentor作为辅助工具能有效支持SLR学习与规划，但研究者仍需保有主动的方法论判断能力。

title: Reconstructing and forecasting disease trajectories of patients with Alzheimer's disease using routine data in resource-constrained settings
summary: Alzheimer's disease is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder, and its progression varies substantially across patients. Existing work aims to forecast patients' future cognitive state, with minimal focus on reconstructing the state from past visits. Furthermore, in current research, quantifying predictive uncertainty remains underexplored and relies on costly modalities such as MRI, PET, and CSF, limiting their deployment in resource-limited settings. In this research, our primary objectives are: First, bidirectional prediction of cognitive scores from irregular visits to present the complete disease trajectory. Second, to enable interpolation and extrapolation capabilities to assist clinicians in informed prognostic decision making, and third, to provide a well-calibrated uncertainty estimate for all predictions, and finally, to achieve the objectives using the modalities available during routine visits. We propose a unified framework, GNOVA: A GRU-Neural ODE Variational Autoencoder. The architecture combines a Gated Recurrent Unit encoder and a Neural ODE decoder within a variational autoencoder framework. In our work, we forecast the CDR-SB and MMSE Scores. The GRU encoder allows for any number of inputs at any time point. The Neural-ODE decoder performs continuous estimation, allowing interpolation and extrapolation at any desired time point. The Variational autoencoder allows for uncertainty estimation in predictions. We worked with 1,727 patients from the ADNI dataset over 10 years; the model achieved mean absolute errors of 1.35 and 2.28 for CDR-SB and MMSE scores, respectively, without requiring any neuroimaging or biomarker data. Feature-ablation studies revealed that age, BMI, and APOE4 status were strong predictors. The proposed framework enables the reconstruction of incomplete patient histories and the anticipation of future cognitive states.

AI.tldr: 提出GNOVA框架，一种结合GRU编码器和神经ODE解码器的变分自编码器，利用常规临床数据（无需神经影像或生物标志物）实现认知评分（CDR-SB和MMSE）的双向预测、插值/外推及不确定性量化，在ADNI数据集上取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对认知状态的重建关注不足、预测不确定性量化不充分且依赖MRI/PET/CSF等昂贵模态，限制了在资源有限场景的部署。因此亟需一种利用常规检查数据、具备双向预测和不确定性估计能力的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出GNOVA框架，整合GRU编码器（处理任意数量、任意时间点的输入）和神经ODE解码器（实现连续时间估计，支持插值和外推），基于变分自编码器架构提供不确定性估计。使用ADNI数据集1,727名患者10年随访数据，仅利用常规临床特征（年龄、BMI、APOE4等），预测CDR-SB和MMSE评分。
AI.result: 在CDR-SB评分上MAE为1.35，MMSE评分上MAE为2.28；特征消融实验表明年龄、BMI和APOE4状态是强预测因子；无需神经影像或生物标志物数据即可达到良好性能。
AI.conclusion: GNOVA框架能够在不依赖昂贵模态的情况下，实现认知评分的双向预测、轨迹插值/外推及不确定性量化，有助于临床医生进行知情预后决策，尤其适用于资源有限环境。

title: When Should an AI Scientist Stop? Verifiable Experiment Steering and Refusal for Autonomous Discovery
comment: Accepted at AI for Science Workshop at ICML 2026
summary: We present CARTOGRAPH, a verification layer for AI scientists that couples unresolved-subspace experiment steering (select), explicit ambiguity closure (resolve), and residual-based library inadequacy detection (refuse). Under a local linear-Gaussian bridge, raw unresolved projection is the isotropic unresolved Fisher-information trace, while CARTOGRAPH-A is the exact unresolved A-optimal rule; closed-form EIG and Box-Hill arise as local comparators rather than global equivalents. Across five testbeds, CARTOGRAPH-A beats raw projection 129W/0T/15L at d = 8 (p < 10^-21) in a replicated structured cascade. More distinctively, the framework tentatively identifies three out-of-library pharmacokinetic mechanisms and then revokes those identifications as residuals expose structural misfit, while one perturbed in-library control stays identified throughout. In low-dimensional pharmacokinetic and filtered EPA settings, near-ties against disagreement are predicted by theory and observed. Finally, in a retrospective audit of 40 positive claims from the published A-Lab autonomous materials system, the refuse guard flags all 4 claims later marked inconclusive under manual reanalysis while passing 32/36 confirmed claims. Code is available at https://github.com/ai4science-boed/cartograph.git

AI.tldr: CARTOGRAPH是一个用于AI科学家的验证层，通过未解析子空间实验引导（select）、显式模糊性闭合（resolve）和基于残差的库不充分性检测（refuse）三个机制，实现实验设计、假设验证和模型不适用的拒绝。在多个测试中表现出色，并能识别和撤回错误的机制认定。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家系统缺乏对实验设计中的未解析子空间、假设模糊性以及库不充分性的系统性处理机制，导致可能产生不可靠的科学结论。
AI.method: 提出CARTOGRAPH验证层，包含三个核心机制：1) select（未解析子空间实验引导）；2) resolve（显式模糊性闭合）；3) refuse（基于残差的库不充分性检测）。在局部线性-高斯桥接下推导了未解析投影与A-最优规则的关系，以及EIG和Box-Hill作为局部比较器的特性。
AI.result: 在五个测试平台上，CARTOGRAPH-A在d=8的复制结构化级联实验中以129胜/0平/15负显著优于原始投影（p<10^-21）。框架能识别并随后撤销三个库外药代动力学机制。在低维药代动力学和过滤EPA设置中，实验观察到理论预测的接近平局。在A-Lab自主材料系统的40个正向主张回顾性审计中，拒绝守卫标记了所有4个后来被人工重分析标记为不确定的主张，同时通过了32/36个确认的主张。
AI.conclusion: CARTOGRAPH为AI科学家提供了一种有效的验证层，能够处理实验引导、模糊性闭合和库不充分性检测，在多个领域展示了可靠的性能，有助于提升AI驱动科学发现的可靠性。

title: When Should Queries Be Decomposed? A Stage-Aware Study of Query Decomposition for Multi-Condition Retrieval
summary: Multi-condition retrieval requires systems to identify documents that satisfy multiple distinct constraints, moving beyond mere topical relevance. While query decomposition is widely adopted as an intuitive remedy, its effectiveness across different retrieval pipeline stages remains underexplored. In this paper, we conduct a stage-aware empirical study and uncover a stark, stage-dependent effect: decomposition during initial retrieval frequently harms retrieval performance due to semantic dilution, yet substantially improves reranking by enabling more fine-grained constraint verification. Motivated by these insights, we propose a principled Stage-Aware Decomposition framework that retains the monolithic query during initial retrieval to preserve global semantic context, while employing sub-queries exclusively during reranking for fine-grained constraint matching. Extensive evaluations on the MultiConIR and SSRB benchmarks demonstrate that our framework consistently improves ranking performance for compositional queries across multiple retrieval and reranking models. We release our code at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/Query-Decompose.

AI.tldr: 本文提出阶段感知的查询分解框架，在初始检索阶段保留整体查询以避免语义稀释，仅在重排序阶段使用子查询进行细粒度约束匹配，显著提升了多条件检索的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对查询分解在不同检索管道阶段的效果缺乏系统探索，且直觉上合理的分解策略在初始检索阶段反而可能损害性能。
AI.method: 提出Stage-Aware Decomposition框架：初始检索阶段保留整体查询以保持全局语义上下文，重排序阶段使用子查询进行细粒度约束验证。
AI.result: 在MultiConIR和SSRB基准上，该框架在多个检索和重排序模型上一致提升了组合查询的排序性能。
AI.conclusion: 查询分解的效果具有显著的阶段依赖性，阶段感知的分解策略能有效提升多条件检索的效果。

title: Cherry-pick Override: Unsafe Directional Commitment in LLM Judges under Mixed Evidence
summary: LLM judges increasingly turn verdicts into system commitments. Under mixed evidence (claims with both supporting and refuting sources) this is unsafe: when the schema exposes CONFLICTING as the authorized non-directional verdict, returning SUPPORTS/REFUTES is an unauthorized directional commitment, a failure we name Cherry-pick Override (CCO). We define CCO under an explicit task contract and report it with a same-denominator diagnostic protocol paired with matched-coverage bootstrap and an apples-to-apples random-veto null. On AVeriTeC's Conflicting subset (N_C = 150), three-option judges return a directional verdict on more than 84% of mixed-evidence claims; under the typed schema, three-judge majority voting amplifies direction-on-conflict on AVeriTeC (0.887 vs. 0.840; 95% CI [+0.013, +0.080]) but does not replicate on VitaminC-Mixed. Walking an intervention ladder of common single-channel fixes (typed vocabulary, panel aggregation, confidence thresholding, validator-only filtering), each leaves a distinct residual failure: panel aggregation suppresses single-judge CONFLICTING dissent in 48% of CCO cases; the panel is well-calibrated for direction (ECE = 0.07 on pure-S/R) so confidence cannot operationally separate CCO from correct directional commits; validator-as-classifier nearly halves pure-evidence accuracy. A minimal two-channel reference probe reaches operating points neither single channel reaches; under the random-veto null its promotion to CONFLICTING is structurally targeted on AVeriTeC (empirical p < 1/2001) and weaker but in the same direction on VitaminC-Mixed, a selectivity result rather than a magnitude one.
