We argue for an external commitment-control layer that separates verdict generation from commitment authorization, using structural evidence and confidence as orthogonal channels and NO-COMMIT as a routed controller state.

AI.tldr: LLM裁判在混合证据下会错误地将支持/反驳作为方向性承诺输出，而非应有的冲突判决，这种失败称为Cherry-pick Override (CCO)。论文提出基于外部承诺控制层的两通道参考探针来分离判决生成与承诺授权。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM判决系统在混合证据场景下缺乏对非方向性承诺（CONFLICTING）的合规约束，导致模型会擅自做出方向性承诺（SUPPORTS/REFUTES），存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 定义CCO失败模式并构建显式任务契约；提出同分母诊断协议，配合匹配覆盖率的bootstrap和苹果对苹果的随机否决零假设；设计干预阶梯（类型化词汇、面板聚合、置信度阈值、验证器过滤）分析不同单通道修复方案的残差；提出最小两通道参考探针。
AI.result: 在AVeriTeC冲突子集上，三分支裁判对84%以上的混合证据主张输出了方向性判决；三法官多数投票将方向性判决率从0.840放大至0.887；面板聚合在48%的CCO案例中压制了单一法官的CONFLICTING异议。两通道参考探针在随机否决零假设下，在AVeriTeC上显著定向提升CONFLICTING判决。
AI.conclusion: 应构建外部的承诺控制层，将判决生成与承诺授权分离，以结构化的证据和置信度作为正交通道，并使用NO-COMMIT作为路由控制器状态。

title: Improving Multimodal Reasoning via Worst Dimension Optimization
summary: Multimodal reasoning requires a path that retains integrity over a wide range of constraints, from visual grounding to logic consistency. However, the current Process Reward Models focus on heuristically defined rewards that equally weigh these factors, which may lead to the concealment of individual dimension failures by the dominating factors, without guaranteeing the validity of the reasoning process in general.

AI.tldr: 当前过程奖励模型在多模态推理中采用启发式定义的均衡权重奖励，可能导致主导维度掩盖单一维度失败，无法保证推理过程的有效性。
AI.motivation: 多模态推理需要在视觉基础与逻辑一致性等多约束下保持完整性，但现有过程奖励模型使用均衡权重的启发式奖励，使得某些维度的失败可能被主导因素掩盖，无法保证推理过程整体有效。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种新的过程奖励方法（具体方法需从全文获取），以解决现有均衡权重启发式奖励导致的问题。
AI.result: 现有过程奖励模型的多维度均衡加权方式会导致个体维度失败被掩盖，无法保证推理过程的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 需要针对多模态推理的多约束特性设计更精细的过程奖励机制，避免维度间失败相互掩盖。

title: MST-Direct at Scale: Multivariate and Conditional Geostatistical Simulation via Sinkhorn Optimal Transport
summary:
This paper extends MST-Direct, a Matching-via-Sinkhorn-Transport approach for multivariate geostatistical simulation, from the original bivariate, unconditional, small-grid formulation to multivariate, conditional, and large-grid settings. We address the three main limitations identified in the original work: (i) scalability beyond a few thousand nodes through a sparse, candidate-restricted Sinkhorn matcher with O(nC) memory complexity; (ii) extension to multiple variables by matching target value tuples onto an independent FFT-MA Gaussian backbone that reproduces a prescribed variogram; and (iii) hard-data conditioning by fixing observed data tuples at their spatial locations while conditioning the backbone through kriging. Because the transport plan remains a permutation of the target tuples, the multivariate joint distribution is preserved exactly.
  The method is validated using the same six-variate, heteroscedastic, strongly nonlinear reference distribution employed in Direct Multivariate Simulation (DMS), under both unconditional (200x200) and conditional (100x100, 200 hard-data samples) scenarios, and is benchmarked against the Projection Pursuit Multivariate Transform (PPMT). Results show that MST-Direct reproduces the joint distribution with zero histogram error, exactly honours hard data, and accurately reproduces the prescribed spatial correlation structure, whereas PPMT remains an approximation.
  Index Terms-Optimal transport, Sinkhorn algorithm, geostatistical simulation, multivariate simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了基于Sinkhorn传输的MST-Direct方法，解决了原方法在大规模、多变量、条件化地统计模拟中的三个主要局限性，验证表明该方法能精确再现联合分布、严格遵从硬数据并准确再现指定空间相关结构。
AI.motivation: 克服原MST-Direct方法在三个方面的局限性：(i) 可扩展性——仅支持数千节点；(ii) 仅限于双变量；(iii) 不支持硬数据条件化模拟。
AI.method: (i) 采用稀疏、候选受限的Sinkhorn匹配器，内存复杂度O(nC)；(ii) 通过匹配目标值元组到独立的FFT-MA高斯骨干上扩展至多变量；(iii) 通过克里金法对骨干进行条件化，同时固定观测数据元组在空间位置上的位置。
AI.result: 在六变量、异方差、强非线性参考分布下，MST-Direct在无条件（200×200）和条件（100×100，200个硬数据样本）场景中均实现零直方图误差，精确遵从硬数据并准确再现指定空间相关结构；而PPMT仅为近似。
AI.conclusion: MST-Direct可扩展至大规模多变量条件化地统计模拟，因其传输计划保持目标元组的置换，多变量联合分布得以精确保留。

title: Gryphon: A Unified Architecture for Semantic-ID Generation and Item-Level Scoring in Industrial Recommendations
summary: Generative retrieval (GR) has become a scalable approach to candidate generation: each item is assigned a short hierarchical token sequence called a Semantic ID (SID), and the next item's SID is decoded autoregressively. A practical limitation is that the decoder's beam search optimizes the likelihood of token sequences, not the relevance of the underlying items. These objectives diverge when sequence likelihood is poorly calibrated due to beam search error accumulation, and when several items collapse onto a single SID and receive identical scores. We introduce Gryphon, an encoder-decoder generative recommendation architecture that adds a jointly trained item-level scoring component alongside SID generation, reusing the encoder's user representation computed in a single forward pass. Instead of ranking SIDs by accumulated token likelihood, Gryphon resolves each generated SID to its concrete items and re-scores those items directly, which sidesteps miscalibrated sequence scores and separates items that collide on the same identifier. On an industrial music service, with item-level scoring trained under a next-item-prediction objective, Gryphon attains the highest item-level Recall@1000, above the strongest baselines (+3.7% over vanilla GR and +2.5% over collision-resolved GR) at comparable parameter count and latency. Gryphon's item-level ranking also surpasses its beam-likelihood ranking of the same candidates (+4.2% gain), demonstrating the benefit of item-level scoring in GR. Deployed as the sole candidate source in a 7-day A/B test, Gryphon produced no statistically significant change in total listening time (+0.25%) while replacing a pipeline of more than 15 candidate generators and a separate preranking stage, substantially simplifying the candidate-generation system.

AI.tldr: Gryphon是一种编码器-解码器生成式推荐架构，通过联合训练的item-level评分组件替代传统的序列似然排序，解决了生成式检索中序列似然校准不良和语义ID冲突的问题，在工业音乐服务上Recall@1000提升3.7%-4.2%，并成功替代了包含15+候选生成器的流水线。
AI.motivation: 生成式检索(GR)中，解码器的束搜索优化的是token序列的似然而非底层item的相关性。当序列似然因束搜索误差累积而校准不良，以及多个item坍缩到同一个语义ID(SID)上获得相同分数时，这两个目标会产生分歧，导致排序质量下降。
AI.method: 提出Gryphon架构：在编码器-解码器GR基础上增加一个联合训练的item-level评分组件，复用编码器单次前向传播得到的用户表征。解码时，先将生成的SID解析为具体item，然后直接对这些item进行重新评分，而非按累积token似然排序SID，从而规避序列分数校准问题并分离共享同一标识的item。
AI.result: 在工业音乐服务上，item-level评分在下一项预测目标下训练，Recall@1000达到最高，比vanilla GR高3.7%，比碰撞解决GR高2.5%。Gryphon的item-level排序比相同候选的束似然排序高4.2%。7天A/B测试中作为唯一候选来源，总收听时间无显著变化（+0.25%），成功替代了15+候选生成器和独立预排序阶段的流水线。
AI.conclusion: Gryphon通过item-level评分有效解决了生成式检索中的序列似然校准和SID冲突问题，在保持可比参数量和延迟的前提下显著提升了排序质量，并且能够简化工业级推荐系统的候选生成架构，替代复杂的多阶段流水线。

title: A Preliminary Model for Managing Technical Debt in an Agile Environment
summary: This paper presents a preliminary model for managing involuntary technical debt in agile environments by formulating, in an integrated way, the dynamics among backlog, debt, velocity, and economic value. The work distinguishes initiated but unfinished functional debt from a simple defect back log and from rework, interprets productivity degradation as technical-debt interest, and derives the naive maximum-remediation policy in order to show its limitations against an intertemporal value-based decision. On this basis, a dynamic policy uk is proposed to balance new development and remediation; a decreasing marginal-value structure is incorporated; and the model is extended to discrete, inhomogeneous items. Exploratory validation through sensitivity analysis and MonteCarlo simulation shows behavior consistent with the economic intuition of the model. Finally, the limits of the formulation are made explicit: its macroscopic nature, its dependence on organizationally stable parameters, its assumption of intertemporal rationality, and its requirement of weak coupling among stories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个在敏捷环境中管理非自愿技术债务的初步模型，将积压、债务、速度和经济价值动态整合表述，通过动态策略平衡新开发与修复工作，并通过敏感性分析和蒙特卡洛模拟进行了探索性验证。
AI.motivation: 在敏捷开发中，非自愿技术债务（如未完成的遗留功能）的管理缺乏系统化的动态决策模型，现有方法未能将积压、债务、速度和经济效益进行整合分析。
AI.method: 区分未完成功能债务与简单缺陷积压及返工，将生产率退化解释为技术债务利息，推导了朴素的"最大修复"策略并揭示其局限性；提出动态策略uk平衡新开发与修复，引入递减边际价值结构，扩展至离散非均匀项，通过敏感性分析和蒙特卡洛模拟验证。
AI.result: 模型行为与经济直觉一致；动态策略优于朴素的最大修复策略；但模型具有宏观性质、依赖组织稳定参数、假设跨期理性、要求故事间弱耦合等局限。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为敏捷环境中非自愿技术债务的跨期价值驱动管理提供了理论基础，但受限于宏观性、参数稳定性依赖、跨期理性假设及故事弱耦合要求。

title: Beyond Goodhart's Law: A Dynamic Benchmark for Evaluating Compliance in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive assistants to autonomous, execution-capable agents has introduced critical operational risks. Most current evaluation frameworks neglect procedural compliance, leading to ''Machiavellian'' behaviors where agents strategically violate safety rules to maximize rewards - a direct manifestation of Goodhart's Law. To address this blind spot, we introduce MAC-Bench, a dynamic, adversarial benchmark designed to evaluate the procedural alignment of multi-agent systems under realistic pressure. We propose the SERV(Seed - Evolve - Refine - Verify) pipeline, an ``Agent-as-a-Benchmark'' paradigm that transforms unstructured legal texts into executable, contamination-free scenarios. By synthesizing holographic sandbox environments and injecting calibrated social-engineering pressure vectors, MAC-Bench forces agents into Pareto-optimal trade-offs between task success and regulatory adherence. We introduced novel metrics: the Compliance-Weighted Success Rate (CSR) and the Machiavellian Gap (MG), and conducted a comprehensive evaluation of state-of-the-art frontier models to reveal the pervasive trade-offs between success and compliance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAC-Bench，一个用于评估多智能体系统程序对齐的动态对抗性基准，通过SERV流程将法律文本转化为可执行场景，并引入CSR和MG新指标，揭示了前沿模型在任务成功与合规性之间的普遍权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有评估框架忽视程序合规性，导致LLM智能体出现"马基雅维利式"行为——为最大化奖励而策略性违反安全规则，这是古德哈特定律的直接体现。亟需一个能够评估智能体在压力下程序对齐的基准。
AI.method: 提出MAC-Bench动态对抗性基准，包含SERV流程（种子-演化-精炼-验证），即"智能体即基准"范式，将非结构化法律文本转化为可执行、无污染的场景。通过合成全息沙盒环境并注入校准的社会工程压力向量，迫使智能体在任务成功与合规性之间进行帕累托最优权衡。引入合规加权成功率（CSR）和马基雅维利差距（MG）两个新指标。
AI.result: 对前沿模型进行综合评估，揭示了任务成功与合规性之间普遍存在的权衡现象。
AI.conclusion: MAC-Bench有效揭示了LLM智能体在程序对齐方面的漏洞，CSR和MG指标能够量化智能体在压力下的合规表现，为构建更安全的自主智能体系统提供了评估工具。

title: Training-Inference Kernel Contracts: Bounding Divergence in Post-Training and Deployment
summary: A modern post-training pipeline often writes one symbol for its policy, pi_theta, while evaluating it through two different programs: a training kernel optimized for autograd and an inference kernel optimized for low-precision, fused, dynamically batched serving. In finite precision, these kernels can induce different distributions at identical weights, with the gap concentrated on slices that aggregate benchmarks under-represent. This paper proposes kernel contracts: a contract-first framework for specifying acceptable divergence between K_train and K_inf. A contract C = (N, S, R, O, Pi) combines numerical, statistical, runtime, and observability clauses with an escalation policy from violations to routing actions. We derive a chain of bounds from logit drift to total-variation distance to bounded reward drift, and specialize it to RL post-training, where per-token importance-ratio drift yields a bound on policy-gradient bias under explicit support and norm assumptions. We also describe a four-stage promotion pipeline, online routing loop, and minimal YAML DSL for contract artifacts. This is a framework and vocabulary paper; we do not report production-scale empirical validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"内核契约"(kernel contracts)框架，用于规范训练内核与推理内核之间在有限精度下产生的分布差异，并建立了从logit漂移到策略梯度偏差的理论边界。
AI.motivation: 现代后训练流水线中，训练内核和推理内核在有限精度下会产生不同分布，这种差异集中在基准测试未充分覆盖的切片上，导致策略评估偏差，缺乏系统性的可接受差异规范框架。
AI.method: 提出内核契约框架 C=(N,S,R,O,Pi)，包含数值、统计、运行时和可观测性子句及升级策略；推导从logit漂移到总变差距离再到有界奖励漂移的边界链；针对RL后训练场景给出基于重要性比率漂移的策略梯度偏差边界。
AI.result: 建立了从低层logit差异到高层策略梯度偏差的完整理论链；设计了四阶段推广流水线、在线路由循环和YAML DSL契约工件；未提供生产级实证验证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为规范和量化训练-推理内核差异提供了形式化词汇和工具，但需未来进行大规模实证验证。

title: Report on CHIIR 2026 Workshop on Generative AI and Academic Search (GAI&AS)
summary: This report summarizes the CHIIR 2026 Workshop on Generative AI and Academic Search (GAI\&AS), which examined how GenAI is reshaping academic search systems and research practices. The workshop brought together researchers in human information interaction and information retrieval to explore key challenges and opportunities in designing and evaluating future academic search systems that integrate GenAI, moving beyond traditional document retrieval to support summarization, recommendation, synthesis, and conversational interaction. Participants' interests and discussions focused on three thematic clusters: foundations and principles, applications and opportunities, and search-as-learning. Across these themes, the workshop highlighted the importance of academic search systems in supporting transparency, credibility, research integrity, and long-term scholarly needs, as well as in fostering higher-order cognitive processes. Participants discussed guiding theories, design principles, methodological approaches, partnerships, and community-building efforts aimed at advancing human-centered GenAI-enhanced academic search systems. Overall, the workshop demonstrated strong community interest and a diverse range of ongoing and emerging research initiatives at the intersection of GenAI and academic search.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了CHIIR 2026关于生成式AI与学术搜索(GAI&AS)的研讨会，探讨了GenAI如何重塑学术搜索系统与研究实践，聚焦于三个主题集群：基础与原则、应用与机会、以及搜索即学习，强调了在透明度、可信度、研究完整性等方向上的挑战与机遇。
AI.motivation: 旨在系统梳理GenAI如何改变学术搜索系统与研究实践，识别在设计、评估和社区建设方面的关键挑战与机遇，推动人本化的GenAI增强型学术搜索系统发展。
AI.method: 采用研讨会形式，汇集人机信息交互和信息检索领域的研究者，通过主题讨论和社区互动，围绕三个主题集群（基础与原则、应用与机会、搜索即学习）进行研讨。
AI.result: 识别出三个核心主题集群，强调了学术搜索系统需支持透明度、可信度、研究完整性和高阶认知过程，并展示了广泛的社区兴趣和多样化的新兴研究举措。
AI.conclusion: 社区对GenAI与学术搜索交叉领域有强烈兴趣，未来需在指导理论、设计原则、方法论和社区建设方面持续推进，以构建人本化的GenAI增强型学术搜索系统。

title: DD-GEPA: Prompt Optimization for Dialogue Disentanglement Focusing on Task Instruction and Utterance Representation
summary: Multi-party chat often contains interleaved dialogues because multiple participants can discuss different topics at the same time. Dialogue disentanglement addresses this problem by separating an entangled utterance sequence into coherent dialogues. While large language models (LLMs) are promising for this task, they still struggle with dialogue disentanglement and achieve low accuracy. This paper proposes an automatic prompt optimization for LLM based dialogue disentanglement. We decompose the prompt into three components: task instruction, utterance representation, and output instruction, and optimize them using GEPA, an optimization method for compound AI systems. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that the optimized prompts improve dialogue disentanglement accuracy over the original prompts and can surpass hand crafted prompts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的自动提示优化方法用于对话解纠缠，通过将提示分解为任务指令、话语表示和输出指令三个组件，并使用GEPA优化方法进行优化，在基准数据集上取得了优于原始提示和手工提示的效果。
AI.motivation: 多人在线聊天中常出现交错对话，不同参与者同时讨论不同话题，导致对话序列混乱。对话解纠缠旨在将纠缠的话语序列分离成连贯的对话。虽然大语言模型对此任务有潜力，但准确率仍然较低，因此需要提升LLM在对话解纠缠任务上的性能。
AI.method: 将提示分解为三个组件：任务指令、话语表示和输出指令，并采用GEPA（一种适用于复合AI系统的优化方法）对这些组件进行自动优化。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，优化后的提示相比原始提示提升了对话解纠缠的准确率，并且能够超越手工设计的提示。
AI.conclusion: 自动提示优化能够有效提升LLM在对话解纠缠任务上的表现，证明了该方法优于原始和手工提示，为LLM在复杂对话场景中的应用提供了改进方向。

title: Where Instruction Hierarchy Breaks: Diagnosing and Repairing Failures in Reasoning Language Models
summary: Reasoning language models deployed in agentic workflows must follow an instruction hierarchy: when instructions from different sources conflict, the model should obey the highest-privilege applicable instruction. Existing benchmarks largely measure this behavior end-to-end, asking whether the final response is compliant. However, a non-compliant response can arise from several distinct failures: the model may fail to identify the relevant instructions in context, fail to resolve conflicts among identified instructions, or correctly resolve the conflict in its reasoning while still producing a violating response. We introduce a white-box diagnostic framework that localizes instruction hierarchy failures into instruction identification, conflict resolution, and response realization, making failures more interpretable. We evaluate three reasoning models--Gemma-4-31B-IT, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, and Claude Sonnet 4.6--on long-context adaptations of IHEval and IHChallenge, and find that the dominant failure mode varies across models, tasks, and context length. Building on the observation that models can often detect conflicts and output violations when explicitly prompted, we propose two training-free self-monitoring mechanisms: a parallel input monitor for low-latency conflict detection before generation, and a sequential output monitor for response-level review and repair. Across Gemma-4-31B-IT, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.3, the strongest monitor reduces rule-following non-compliance by 81-99%, with GPT-5.3 reductions of 86% under static attacks and 45% under adaptive attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种白盒诊断框架，将指令层次结构失效分解为指令识别、冲突解决和响应实现三个环节。发现不同模型、任务和上下文长度下主导失效模式不同。基于模型可在显式提示下检测冲突的观察，提出两种无需训练的自我监控机制（并行输入监控和串行输出监控），可将规则违反降低81-99%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅端到端评估指令层次结构的遵从性，但非遵从响应可能源于多种不同失效（未能识别指令、未能解决冲突、推理正确但响应违规），缺乏可解释的诊断工具来定位具体失效环节。
AI.method: 提出白盒诊断框架，将失效分解为指令识别、冲突解决和响应实现三个环节。在IHEval和IHChallenge的长上下文版本上评估Gemma-4-31B-IT、Qwen3.6-35B-A3B和Claude Sonnet 4.6。进一步提出两种无需训练的自我监控机制：并行输入监控（生成前低延迟冲突检测）和串行输出监控（响应级审查与修复）。
AI.result: 不同模型、任务和上下文长度下主导失效模式各异。最强监控机制在Gemma-4-31B-IT、Claude Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.3上将规则遵循非遵从性降低81-99%，其中GPT-5.3在静态攻击下降低86%，自适应攻击下降低45%。
AI.conclusion: 指令层次结构失效可被细粒度诊断和定位，且无需重新训练模型，通过自我监控机制即可大幅提升指令遵从性。

title: Customer Churn Prediction on Structured Data Using FT-Transformer and Stacking Ensembles
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures, 20 tables; published in IEEE Access
summary: Customer churn prediction is essential across data-driven industries such as insurance, digital banking, eCommerce, and subscription platforms, where retaining existing customers is typically more cost-effective than acquiring new ones. Predicting churn on structured datasets remains challenging due to class imbalance, nonlinear feature interactions, and heterogeneous feature types. Tree-based ensemble methods consistently demonstrate strong performance in these contexts, often outperforming conventional neural networks. This study introduces a validated hybrid architecture that integrates feature-tokenized transformers (FT-Transformer) with gradient-boosted trees through calibration-aware stacking. The proposed framework addresses persistent gaps in statistical validation, probability calibration, and reproducibility found in prior research. The FT-Transformer captures higher-order feature interactions using self-attention, while XGBoost captures gradient-boosted decision boundaries with complementary inductive biases. Class imbalance is handled using class-weighted loss functions, thereby avoiding synthetic oversampling and preserving minority-class distributions. The models are ensembled using out-of-fold (OOF) stacking with a logistic regression meta-learner, which recalibrates overconfident base model outputs and learns optimal combination weights. On a public bank churn dataset, the hybrid model achieves 62.10% F1, 0.861 AUC-ROC, and 0.647 PR-AUC, outperforming the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) baseline by 3.37 F1 points and 0.027 AUC under 5x5 cross-validation with 95% confidence intervals reported. Ablation studies demonstrate that both the transformer component and stacking strategy contribute materially to performance. The proposed methodology offers a reproducible and extensible reference architecture for contemporary churn prediction on structured tabular data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合FT-Transformer与XGBoost的校准感知堆叠混合架构，用于结构化表格数据的客户流失预测。该方法通过加权损失处理类别不平衡、OOF堆叠策略结合逻辑回归元学习器进行模型集成，在公开银行流失数据集上取得了优于MLP基线的性能（F1 62.10%，AUC-ROC 0.861），并提供了完整的统计验证和可复现基准。
AI.motivation: 客户流失预测对保险、数字银行、电商等数据驱动行业至关重要，但结构化数据集上的流失预测面临类别不平衡、非线性特征交互、异质特征类型等挑战。现有研究在统计验证、概率校准和可复现性方面存在不足，亟需一种既利用Transformer高阶交互能力又结合树模型优势的稳健混合架构。
AI.method: 提出一种校准感知堆叠混合架构：(1) FT-Transformer利用自注意力机制捕捉高阶特征交互；(2) XGBoost捕捉梯度提升决策边界，两者形成互补归纳偏置；(3) 采用类加权损失函数处理类别不平衡，避免合成过采样；(4) 通过OOF堆叠策略结合逻辑回归元学习器集成两个基模型，重新校准过于自信的输出并学习最优组合权重。
AI.result: 在公开银行流失数据集上，混合模型在5×5交叉验证下达到62.10% F1、0.861 AUC-ROC、0.647 PR-AUC，相比MLP基线提升3.37个F1点和0.027 AUC（报告95%置信区间）。消融实验表明Transformer组件和堆叠策略均对性能有实质性贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该混合架构通过校准感知堆叠有效结合了Transformer和梯度提升树的互补优势，在结构化表格数据的流失预测任务上提供了可复现、可扩展的参考架构，填补了以往工作在统计验证和概率校准方面的空白。

title: EviProp: Seeded Relevance Diffusion on Chunk-Page Graphs for Long Multimodal Document Retrieval
summary: Retrieving evidence pages from visually rich long documents is a key challenge in document question answering. Existing page-level visual retrievers operate under an independent matching paradigm: each page is scored in isolation based on query-page similarity. This paradigm can under-rank evidence pages whose signals are localized in fine-grained chunks or depend on document-internal associations. We propose EviProp, a retrieval method that recovers such pages via seeded relevance diffusion. EviProp models each document as a multimodal Chunk-Page graph with hierarchical, sequential, and similarity links. Given a query, it combines dense visual page priors with sparse chunk seeds, then runs Personalized PageRank to diffuse relevance over the graph. Experiments on MMLongBench-Doc and LongDocURL show consistent gains in evidence-page retrieval over independent visual retrieval and text-visual fusion baselines. Downstream QA results further show that improved retrieval translates into better answer accuracy, with negligible online retrieval overhead. Our code is released at https://github.com/Flyecnu/EviProp.

AI.tldr: EviProp提出了一种基于种子相关性扩散的视觉丰富长文档证据页面检索方法，通过构建多模态块-页图并运行个性化PageRank来扩散相关性，在MMLongBench-Doc和LongDocURL上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有页面级视觉检索器采用独立匹配范式，即每页独立基于查询-页面相似度评分，导致信号集中在细粒度块或依赖文档内部关联的证据页面被低估。
AI.method: 将每个文档建模为多模态块-页图，包含层级、序列和相似性链接；结合稠密视觉页面先验与稀疏块种子，运行个性化PageRank在图上扩散相关性。
AI.result: 在MMLongBench-Doc和LongDocURL上，证据页面检索效果一致优于独立视觉检索和文本-视觉融合基线；下游QA准确性提升，在线检索开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 通过种子相关性扩散而非独立匹配，能有效恢复被低估的证据页面，且改进的检索能转化为更好的问答准确性。

title: Identifying unique developers in OSS projects: A family of models
comment: ACCEPTED REGISTERED REPORT AT ESEM (CORE A*) 2026
summary: Organizational and logical coupling metrics require reliable identification of unique developers. In OSS, commit metadata is limited to names and emails, and the same developer may appear under multiple aliases, which can distort coupling measurements if de-duplication is missing. We aim to build a scalable and accurate pipeline for OSS developer de-duplication and to provide guidance on choosing a model based on precision vs. computational effort. We use Indel similarity as a baseline, then run an LLM-assisted matching process with manual validation to create a large dataset of duplicate identities. Using this dataset, we train and compare classical ML models of different complexity, evaluating precision along with training and inference time and energy. We expect a high-quality dataset and a benchmark of approaches that clarifies which solutions offer the best trade-off between accuracy and cost for large-scale OSS mining.

AI.tldr: 本文针对开源软件中开发者身份重复（同一开发者使用多个别名）导致耦合度测量失真问题，构建了一个可扩展、高精度的去重管道。以Indel相似度为基线，结合LLM辅助匹配和人工验证构建大规模重复身份数据集，训练并比较多种经典ML模型，评估其在精度、训练/推理时间及能耗方面的表现，最终为大规模开源挖掘提供精度与计算成本之间的最佳权衡指导。
AI.motivation: 开源软件提交元数据中同一开发者可能使用多个别名（不同名称或邮箱），导致组织和逻辑耦合度量失真。现有去重方法缺乏大规模、高精度的自动化方案，亟需一个可扩展的去重管道以及不同模型在精度与计算成本之间的权衡指导。
AI.method: 以Indel相似度作为基线方法，先通过LLM辅助匹配流程结合人工验证构建大规模重复身份数据集；在此基础上训练多种不同复杂度的经典机器学习模型，并系统评估各模型的精度、训练时间、推理时间和能耗。
AI.result: 预期产出高质量的大规模重复身份数据集，以及多种去重方法的对比基准，明确不同方案在精度与计算成本之间的最佳权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为开源软件大规模挖掘中的开发者去重问题提供了系统性的方法比较和选择指导，有助于提升耦合度测量的准确性。

title: Scaling Participation in Modular AI Systems
summary: Humanity is a mosaic of multifaceted talents and needs, and any truly intelligent AI must reflect that richness. Yet the LLMs used by all are built by the few -- a centralized market of monolithic AI models structurally ill-suited to capture the diversity of human knowledge, reasoning, and values. Here we introduce scaling participation, a new paradigm in which modular AI systems are built from the bottom up through the contributions of diverse stakeholders. Participants contribute small models trained on their own interests and priorities; these models then collaborate in modular frameworks as compositional AI systems. Participatory AI systems outperform monolithic LLMs by up to 15.4% across 15 tasks, such as reasoning and factuality, surpassing models larger than all contributed components combined. Further experiments show that participatory AI systems benefit from contributor diversity, substantially improve on each contributor's original priorities, and exhibit emergent capabilities that allow them to solve over 15% of problems where all individual models fail. Scaling participation provides a technical foundation for transitioning from the monolithic status quo toward an open, bottom-up, and collaborative AI future.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"扩展参与"新范式，通过模块化、自下而上的方式构建AI系统，让多元利益相关者贡献各自领域的小模型，组成协作式AI系统。该方法在15个任务上相较单一大型语言模型提升高达15.4%，并展现出超越所有个体模型的涌现能力，为解决当前AI集中化问题提供了技术基础。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统由少数机构开发，单一封闭模型无法捕捉人类知识、推理和价值观的多样性，亟需一种能够体现人类多元才能与需求的AI构建范式。
AI.method: 提出"扩展参与"范式：多元参与者贡献各自兴趣和优先领域的小模型，这些模块化模型通过组合式AI框架协作运行，形成自下而上的参与式AI系统。
AI.result: 参与式AI系统在15个任务上超越单一大型语言模型达15.4%，性能超过所有贡献组件总和；受益于贡献者多样性；显著提升每位贡献者原有优先事项；展现出涌现能力，能解决超过15%的单独模型全部失败的问题。
AI.conclusion: 扩展参与为从单一封闭的AI现状过渡到开放、自下而上、协作的AI未来提供了技术基础。

title: Outage Detection in Self-Healing Smart Grids Using Reinforcement Learning with Spectral Graph Neural Networks
summary: Self-healing smart grids can quickly adjust their network configuration during outages to minimize power disruptions. During an outage, several actions can be taken, such as network reconfiguration through switching operations and emergency load shedding. However, traditional machine learning methods for outage mitigation are not well suited for smart grids due to their slow response time and high computational cost. To address these challenges, recent studies have explored reinforcement learning to automatically perform network reconfiguration. In these approaches, the control policy is typically modeled using a graph neural network (GNN). However, conventional GNNs operate in the spatial domain and may fail to capture important relationships in the frequency domain. Frequency-domain information is particularly useful for modeling global structural patterns and system-wide interactions in power networks. In this paper, we propose a spectral graph reinforcement learning framework for outage management in distribution networks to enhance system resilience. Our model learns the optimal power restoration policy using a spectral graph neural network. We evaluate the proposed method on three modified IEEE test systems: the 13-bus, 34-bus, and 123-bus networks. Experimental results show that our approach achieves near-optimal performance in real time and generalizes well across a wide range of outage scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于谱图强化学习的配电网故障管理框架，利用谱图神经网络学习最优恢复策略，在三个IEEE测试系统上实现了接近最优的实时性能和良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法响应慢、计算成本高，不适用于智能电网的故障缓解；现有基于GNN的方法在空间域操作，无法捕获电力网络频率域中重要的全局结构模式和系统级交互关系。
AI.method: 提出谱图强化学习框架，使用谱图神经网络（Spectral GNN）建模控制策略，学习最优电力恢复策略。
AI.result: 在IEEE 13-bus、34-bus和123-bus三个改进测试系统上，该方法实现了接近最优的实时性能，并在多种故障场景下具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 谱图强化学习能够有效利用频率域信息，实现配电网故障管理的实时最优决策，提升系统韧性。

title: Personal Salience: Highlighting Is Social, but Individuality Lives in Selection
summary: Social highlighters let people mark passages that matter to them. We ask how much of an individual is recoverable from these naturalistic traces, using a co-readership identity control (the same document highlighted by many users) that holds document and topic fixed and asks whether a person's own history predicts their marks better than another reader's does. We separate generic salience (structure), crowd salience (what others marked), and personal salience (the individual residual). First, highlighting is social: which sentences you mark is predicted far better by the crowd than by structure or by a personal model, and even a well-estimated crowd, an information-privileged baseline that sees others' marks on the same document, beats a frontier LLM twin built from your other-document history; the within-document personal signal is at most a whisper (own-vs-other gap +0.017 by an embedding scorer, small but significant). Second, in sharp contrast, individuality lives in selection: asked which of the already-salient passages are yours, your own history is a strong, leakage-free predictor (gap +0.14). A topic decomposition shows this is largely stable thematic preference: it shrinks ~6-8x against a topically-matched peer, and a thin residual cannot be separated from finer topic. The non-obvious part is an asymmetry: under the same scorer the individual signal is ~6-8x weaker in salience than in selection. Methodologically, naive history-conditioning evaluations leak (the target's own marks enter the profile in ~42% of pairs, inflating personal scores by up to +0.15 AP) and small crowds overstate personalization; our results are leakage-free, use a dense crowd, and a model-matched control. Highlights carry a genuine individual signature, but a thin layer over a strong shared one, surfacing far more in which salient things a person selects than in what is salient.

AI.tldr: 本文研究社会高亮标记中个人可恢复性的程度。通过共读身份控制方法，发现高亮行为具有很强的社交性（群体预测远优于个人模型），个人的独特性主要体现在对已显著内容的**选择**上（gap +0.14），而非对显著性本身的判断（gap仅+0.017）。主题分解表明这一选择偏好很大程度上是稳定的主题偏好，且存在显著不对称性：同一评分器下个人信号在显著性中比选择性弱约6-8倍。
AI.motivation: 探究从自然主义的社会高亮痕迹中能恢复多少个人独特性，即人们在标注文本时，其个人偏好有多少是可从历史行为中预测的。
AI.method: 采用共读身份控制方法，将文档和主题固定，比较个人历史、群体历史、文本结构对高亮行为的预测能力。分三个层次（结构显著性、群体显著性、个人显著性），并使用无泄漏评估、密集人群和模型匹配控制。
AI.result: 1）高亮具有社交性，群体预测远优于结构或个人模型；2）个体信号在显著性判断中极弱（gap +0.017），但在内容选择中显著（gap +0.14）；3）选择偏好主要由稳定的主题偏好驱动，与主题匹配的同伴相比缩小约6-8倍；4）存在约6-8倍的不对称性：个人信号在选择性中比在显著性中强得多。
AI.conclusion: 高亮标记携带真实的个人签名，但这层个性覆盖在强大的共享层之上；个性更多体现在个体选择哪些显著内容，而非判断什么内容是显著的。

title: TICoder: A Repository-Level Code Generation Framework with Test-Driven Planning and Implementation-Aware Reuse
summary: Repository-level code generation with Large Language Models (LLMs) remains challenging, primarily due to complex dependencies and limited context windows. Recent approaches adopt retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and the planning mechanism to reuse potential callee functions in the repository. However, these approaches often suffer from two limitations: lack of test-driven behavioral guidance during planning and overlooking the implementation logic embedded in repository code during reuse. As a result, generated plans may not align with expected behaviors, and retrieved functions may not be effectively reused. In this paper, we propose TICoder, a novel repository-level code generation framework that improves both planning and reuse. TICoder introduces a test-driven iterative planning mechanism that leverages test cases as behavioral specifications to refine implementation steps. Furthermore, TICoder employs an implementation-aware code reuse strategy, which retrieves potential callee functions using a dual-view similarity that captures both functional and implementation aspects. We then identify relevant usage patterns through a dual-stage selection strategy, combining structure-based clustering and perplexity-based filtering. We conduct extensive experiments on widely used repository-level code generation benchmarks with various LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate that TICoder outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, achieving an average improvement of 11.52%.

AI.tldr: TICoder是一个面向仓库级代码生成的框架，通过测试驱动的迭代规划机制和实现感知的代码复用策略，在多个基准测试上平均提升11.52%，超越现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于RAG和规划机制的仓库级代码生成方法存在两个主要局限：规划阶段缺乏测试驱动的行为引导，以及复用阶段忽略了仓库代码中的实现逻辑，导致生成的规划与预期行为不一致，检索到的函数无法有效复用。
AI.method: 提出TICoder框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 测试驱动的迭代规划机制，利用测试用例作为行为规范来细化实现步骤；2) 实现感知的代码复用策略，通过双视角相似度（功能视角和实现视角）检索潜在的被调用函数，并采用双阶段选择策略（结构聚类+基于困惑度的过滤）识别相关使用模式。
AI.result: 在多个广泛使用的仓库级代码生成基准测试上，使用多种LLM进行实验，TICoder超越现有最先进方法，平均提升11.52%。
AI.conclusion: TICoder通过将测试行为规范融入规划过程并考虑实现细节的代码复用，有效解决了仓库级代码生成中规划与复用两大挑战，显著提升了生成代码的质量。

title: Joint Structural Pruning and Mixed-Precision Quantization for LLM Compression
summary: Recently, the efficiency of Large Language Models (LLMs) deployment has become a critical concern in practical applications. While post-training quantization (PTQ) and structural pruning are established techniques for reducing memory footprint and inference latency, most existing PTQ approaches optimize quantization errors on a per-layer basis, overlooking how errors accumulate and propagate through the network, often resulting in suboptimal solutions. Traditional pipelines also tend to apply pruning and quantization in isolation or sequentially, further compounding sub-optimality. We introduce a novel end-to-end framework that addresses these limitations in two key ways. First, we propose a novel mixed-precision PTQ strategy that directly minimizes global error propagation across the entire model, rather than isolating layer-wise errors. Building on this, we develop a novel joint optimization approach that simultaneously learns structural pruning decisions and mixed-precision quantization policies within a unified search space. Extensive experiments show that, at ultra-low precisions (1-3 bits), our quantization method reduces WikiText perplexity by up to 21% compared to state-of-the-art (SoTA) weight-activation quantization baselines. Against leading weight-only quantization methods, it achieves up to 59% and 85% lower perplexity on WikiText and C4, respectively. Compared to the SoTA joint pruning-and-quantization techniques, our proposed method delivers superior perplexity and reasoning performance at ultra-low bits.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端框架，通过全局误差传播最小化的混合精度PTQ策略，以及联合学习结构化剪枝和混合精度量化策略的统一搜索空间，在超低比特（1-3比特）下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法逐层优化量化误差，忽略了误差在网络中的累积和传播；剪枝与量化孤立或顺序应用进一步加剧了次优解问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出直接最小化全局误差传播的混合精度PTQ策略；2) 在统一搜索空间中联合优化结构化剪枝决策和混合精度量化策略。
AI.result: 在1-3比特超低精度下，WikiText困惑度比SoTA权重激活量化方法降低21%；比SoTA仅权重量化方法在WikiText和C4上分别降低59%和85%的困惑度；相比SoTA联合剪枝量化方法，在超低比特下困惑度和推理性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的端到端联合优化框架有效解决了误差累积和传播问题，在超低精度LLM部署中取得了显著优势。

title: From Human Guidance to Autonomy: Agent Skill System for End-to-End LLM Deployment on Spatial NPUs
summary:
Spatial neural processing units (NPUs) provide an energy-efficient platform for edge LLM inference, but efficiently deploying an LLM end-to-end on such hardware remains labor-intensive. Although AI coding agents have begun to lower this cost, existing studies have largely focused on single-kernel optimization rather than end-to-end LLM deployment on resource-constrained spatial NPUs.
  We present a two-stage methodology, instantiated on the AMD XDNA 2 NPU, that progresses from human-guided development to agent autonomy. In the first stage, we develop a reference deployment of Llama-3.2-1B through human-guided agent assistance. The resulting implementation achieves a speedup of 2.2x on prefill and 4.0x on decode over the hand-optimized baseline, with the optimization trajectory and its lessons recorded as structured documentation throughout. In the second stage, we distill the documentation into an agent skill system consisting of eight phases, orchestrating the optimization and debugging skill sets, with numerical correctness strictly enforced at each phase.
  Using our agent skill system, we autonomously deploy eight additional decoder-only LLMs (Llama-3.2-3B, SmolLM2-1.7B, Qwen2.5-{0.5B, 1.5B, 3B}, Qwen3-{0.6B, 1.7B, 4B}) end-to-end on the AMD XDNA 2 NPU using the open-source compiler stack. To our knowledge, these models have not previously been deployed on AMD NPUs via any open-source software stack. Each deployment completes in 0.5-4 hours of agent wall time with almost no human guidance, and passes the numerical-correctness gates, demonstrating functional generalization to previously unencountered LLMs. Three of the eight match or exceed the sustained performance of our Llama-3.2-1B reference deployment, suggesting that the resulting implementations can be competitive without additional model-specific human engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段方法论，在AMD XDNA 2 NPU上实现从人工引导到代理自主的端到端LLM部署。第一阶段人工引导部署Llama-3.2-1B获得2.2x预填充和4.0x解码加速比；第二阶段将经验蒸馏为代理技能系统，自主部署了8个额外解码器-only LLM，每个部署仅需0.5-4小时，几乎无需人工指导，其中3个模型性能与人工优化参考部署相当或更优。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单核优化而非端到端LLM部署，在资源受限的空间NPU上高效部署LLM仍十分耗时耗力。
AI.method: 两阶段方法论：第一阶段通过人工引导的代理辅助开发参考部署并记录优化轨迹；第二阶段将文档蒸馏为包含八个阶段的代理技能系统，每个阶段强制执行数值正确性检查，实现自主优化与调试。
AI.result: 在AMD XDNA 2 NPU上成功自主部署8个解码器-only LLM（Llama-3.2-3B、SmolLM2-1.7B、Qwen2.5-{0.5B,1.5B,3B}、Qwen3-{0.6B,1.7B,4B}），每个部署耗时0.5-4小时，3个模型性能达到或超过人工优化参考部署。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了对未见LLM的功能泛化，证明端到端自动部署可在无需额外人工工程的情况下达到有竞争力的性能。

title: Teach Multimodal Recommendation Model to See via Personalized Visual Extraction and Adaptive Learning
summary: Multimodal sequential recommendation (MSR) incorporates textual and visual information to improve recommendation quality. However, recent studies and our empirical analysis show that visual features are often underutilized, thereby contributing far less than textual signals. We attribute this issue to two factors: insufficient visual representation learning (pretrained encoders fail to capture preference-relevant cues) and unbalanced visual-text optimization (textual features dominate the learning process). To address these issues, we propose Teach Multimodal Recommendation Model to See via Personalized Visual Extraction and Adaptive Learning (REVEAL), a plug-and-play framework that enhances visual representation learning and cross-modal optimization without modifying the original recommendation backbone. REVEAL consists of Feedback-Guided Visual Extraction (FVE), which refines prompt-guided visual extraction through task-level feedback, and Adaptive Visual Learning (AVL), which dynamically reweights visual learning to alleviate modality imbalance. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets and MSR backbones demonstrate that REVEAL consistently improves recommendation performance. Further analysis shows that these gains arise from more effective attention to preference-relevant visual regions and better visual utilization during training. The code is available at https://github.com/YutongLi2024/REVEAL.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态序列推荐中视觉特征利用率低的问题，提出REVEAL框架，包含反馈引导的视觉提取（FVE）和自适应视觉学习（AVL）两个模块，在不修改推荐主干网络的情况下增强视觉表征学习和跨模态优化，实验证明其有效性。
AI.motivation: 多模态序列推荐中视觉特征通常未被充分利用，其贡献远小于文本特征。原因在于：预训练编码器未能捕获与偏好相关的视觉线索（视觉表征学习不足），以及文本特征主导学习过程（视觉-文本优化不平衡）。
AI.method: 提出REVEAL框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 反馈引导的视觉提取（FVE），通过任务级反馈优化提示引导的视觉提取；2) 自适应视觉学习（AVL），动态重加权视觉学习以缓解模态不平衡。该框架为即插即用式，无需修改原始推荐主干网络。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集和多模态序列推荐主干网络上，REVEAL consistently提升了推荐性能。进一步分析表明，性能提升源于对偏好相关视觉区域更有效的注意力以及训练过程中更好的视觉利用。
AI.conclusion: 视觉特征利用率低是阻碍多模态序列推荐性能的关键瓶颈，通过任务级反馈引导的视觉提取和动态自适应学习可有效缓解该问题，REVEAL作为一个轻量级即插即用方案具有良好泛化性。

title: Minimum Complete MR Subsets under Semantic-Mutation Fault Models: A Support-Set Domination Boundary
comment: 14 pages; supplementary material prepared with the submission; review-time artifact snapshot archived separately on Zenodo
summary: This paper asks when MR-subset selection is a real mutant-level requirement for minimum complete evidence in metamorphic testing rather than a coarse fault-class counting artifact. We define a layer-relative completeness criterion over an admitted mutant--draw coverage universe. The central result is a support-set domination boundary: it states when class-level abstraction is safe and when mutant-level MR minimization is necessary. The boundary is governed by kill-signature heterogeneity, which yields a scoped fault-signature kernel and separates the MR-specific question from ordinary fault-class counting. The resulting Min-MR-Complete problem is Set-Cover-equivalent over the selected coverage universe, giving NP-hardness, the classical logarithmic approximation boundary, a greedy approximation, an exact ILP formulation, and an SMS-rank upper bound that is not a lower bound or tight predictor. Artifact lanes provide lane-local minimization and audit evidence; separately, route witnesses instantiate both collapse and non-collapse regimes for the boundary theorem and are not pooled as population-level experiments. Other MR-class-proxy rows remain intermediate signals rather than route-admitted witness evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了蜕变测试中MR子集选择何时是真正的最小完备证据的变异级需求，而非粗粒度的故障类计数伪影。通过定义层相对完备性准则，提出了支持集支配边界，该边界由杀伤签名异质性控制，并将MR特定问题与普通故障类计数分离。由此产生的Min-MR-Complete问题在选定覆盖宇宙上是集合覆盖等价的，具有NP难度、对数近似边界、贪心近似、精确ILP公式及SMS秩上界。工件通道提供通道局部最小化和审计证据；路由见证实例化了边界定理的坍缩与非坍缩机制。
AI.motivation: 明确区分MR子集选择何时是真正的变异级需求而非故障类计数伪影，为蜕变测试中的最小完备证据选择提供理论基础。
AI.method: 定义了层相对完备性准则，提出支持集支配边界，通过杀伤签名异质性控制边界，将问题形式化为集合覆盖等价问题，并给出了贪心近似、精确ILP公式和SMS秩上界等解决方案。
AI.result: Min-MR-Complete问题是NP难的，具有经典对数近似边界；支持集支配边界成功分离了MR特定问题与普通故障类计数；路由见证实例化了坍缩与非坍缩两种机制。
AI.conclusion: MR子集选择在杀伤签名异质性较高时是真正的变异级需求，工件通道和路由见证为实际应用提供了局部优化和审计证据，但SMS秩上界不是紧界。

title: Overcoming the Regulatory Bottleneck via Agent-to-Agent Protocols: A Nuclear Case Study
summary: Regulatory review of advanced nuclear reactor designs routinely spans more than three years and consumes hundreds of millions of dollars in combined regulator and applicant labor. We present the Regulatory Context Protocol (RCP), an Agent-to-Agent communication standard that replaces the formal human-to-human pipeline between regulators and applicants with a structured, auditable agentic channel, while preserving human oversight at safety-significant decision points. The protocol is calibrated against an analysis of 1,236 documents from U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission advanced reactor dockets and demonstrated with a working multi-agent pilot. Against an 89M USD, 42-month Reconstructed Baseline, RCP cuts costs by 50-77 percent (21M-44M USD) and timelines by 65 percent (15 months). Without a shared protocol, Standalone Agents reach only 54M-74M USD and 21 months. The residual cost-and-time gap is structural, not algorithmic: it traces to the inter-organizational pipeline that only an agent-to-agent standard can compress. The same bottleneck - formal multi-party review under strict auditability requirements - characterizes pharmaceutical approvals, environmental permitting, financial supervision, and aviation certification. The US regulatory paperwork burden carries a 426.5 billion USD annual opportunity cost; replicated broadly, the projected 50-77 percent reduction implies savings on the order of 210-330 billion USD per year - approaching 1 percent of US GDP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Regulatory Context Protocol (RCP)，一种用于核反应堆监管审查的Agent-to-Agent通信标准，可将审查成本降低50-77%，时间缩短65%，并可在多行业产生数千亿美元的经济效益。
AI.motivation: 先进核反应堆设计的监管审查周期超过三年，耗费数亿美元，存在严重效率低下问题。现有的人对人审查流程是结构性瓶颈，需要一种标准化的智能体间通信协议来压缩跨组织的审查管道。
AI.method: 提出RCP协议，这是一种Agent-to-Agent通信标准，用结构化、可审计的智能体通道替代传统的人对人审查流程，但在安全关键决策点保留人类监督。协议基于美国核管会1236份先进反应堆卷宗分析进行校准，并通过多智能体试点验证。
AI.result: 相比8900万美元、42个月的基准线，RCP可降低成本50-77%（2100万-4400万美元），缩短时间65%（15个月）。无标准协议时，独立智能体仅能达到5400万-7400万美元和21个月。扩展至全美监管文书负担，预计每年可节省2100-3300亿美元，接近美国GDP的1%。
AI.conclusion: 跨组织审查管道的结构性瓶颈只有通过Agent-to-Agent标准才能有效压缩。该协议可推广至制药审批、环境许可、金融监管和航空认证等同样面临严格审计要求的多方审查领域。

title: The Routing Plateau: Understanding and Breaking the Accuracy Limits of LLM Routers
summary: LLM routing has become a popular approach to improve the cost-quality trade-off of LLM services by dynamically selecting a model for each query. Recent work has explored a broad range of routing methods, including clustering-based routers, learned classifiers, pairwise ranking, and confidence-based approaches. Our extensive study of 21 routing methods across five benchmarks reveals a consistent phenomenon that we call the routing plateau: many methods, including kNN, achieve very similar accuracy and converge to a narrow performance range that remains far below the oracle router. Our investigation shows that the plateau is largely caused by a predictability bottleneck: current routers mainly learn global averaged model-performance trends rather than fine-grained query-specific routing signals. As a result, they solve overlapping easy queries but collectively fail on hard queries that require instance-specific routing decisions. We further study how to move beyond the plateau and find that larger training datasets, stronger encoders, and end-to-end fine-tuning can further improve routing accuracy. These findings characterize the common limits of current routing methods and provide insights and actionable directions for the community to build more effective routing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对21种路由方法在5个基准上的广泛研究，揭示了LLM路由中的"路由平台"现象：多数方法（包括kNN）性能相似且收敛到狭窄范围，远低于Oracle路由器。平台现象主要由可预测性瓶颈导致——当前路由器主要学习全局平均模型性能趋势而非细粒度查询特定信号。研究发现增大训练数据、更强编码器和端到端微调可突破平台期。
AI.motivation: LLM路由已成为通过动态选择模型来改善服务成本-质量权衡的流行方法。虽然已有大量路由方法被探索，但缺乏对这些方法的系统性对比和理解其共同局限性的研究。
AI.method: 对21种路由方法在5个基准上进行大规模实证研究，包括基于聚类的路由器、学习分类器、成对排序和基于置信度的方法。通过分析性能收敛现象并探究其原因（可预测性瓶颈），以及探索突破平台期的潜在方向。
AI.result: 发现"路由平台"现象：多数方法精度非常相似并收敛到窄性能范围，远低于Oracle上限；平台主要由可预测性瓶颈导致；增大训练数据、更强编码器和端到端微调可进一步提升路由精度。
AI.conclusion: 当前路由方法存在根本性局限——主要学习全局平均性能趋势而非实例级路由信号，导致易查询被正确路由而难查询集体失败。研究为社区构建更有效的路由系统提供了见解和可行方向。

title: Closing the Indexing-Decoding Gap in Multimodal Generative Retrieval via Prefix Retention Optimization
summary: Multimodal generative retrieval formulates multimodal retrieval as discrete identifier generation, eliminating the need for explicit similarity search over external embeddings. Existing approaches construct identifiers via residual quantization and decode them with trie-constrained beam search. This combination introduces an indexing-decoding gap: identifier learning objectives, including reconstruction and contrastive losses, do not explicitly enforce prefix discriminability during decoding. As a result, even well-optimized identifiers can be irreversibly pruned early in beam search due to low-rank prefixes. We theoretically characterize this gap and derive a survival bound that relates prefix retention to three controllable factors in indexing and decoding. Building on this bound, we propose PRO, prefix retention optimization, a unified framework comprising three mechanisms: (i) prefix ranking distillation aligns quantized prefix rankings with those induced by pre-quantization embeddings using a listwise loss; (ii) vocabulary scheduling increases codebook sizes from shallow to deep residual quantization levels to reduce early competition from non-target prefixes; and (iii) geometric score fusion vectorizes each candidate prefix and incorporates its similarity to the query into beam search scoring, further reducing the indexing-decoding mismatch. Experiments on nine multimodal retrieval tasks show that PRO improves retention of target identifier prefixes and outperforms existing multimodal generative retrieval baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出前缀保留优化（PRO）框架，通过前缀排名蒸馏、词汇调度和几何分数融合三种机制，弥合多模态生成式检索中索引与解码之间的间隙，显著提升目标标识符前缀的保留率，在九个多模态检索任务上超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过残差量化构建标识符并结合trie约束束搜索解码，但标识符学习目标（重建损失、对比损失）未显式保证解码过程中的前缀可区分性，导致即使在优化良好的标识符上，低秩前缀也会在束搜索早期被不可逆地剪枝，造成索引-解码差距。
AI.method: 提出PRO框架，包含三种机制：(i) 前缀排名蒸馏：使用listwise损失将对齐量化前后前缀排名；(ii) 词汇调度：从浅到深增加残差量化层的码本大小，减少早期非目标前缀的竞争；(iii) 几何分数融合：向量化每个候选前缀并计算其与查询的相似度，融入束搜索评分中。
AI.result: 在九个多模态检索任务上，PRO有效提升目标标识符前缀的保留率，并在所有任务上超越现有生成式检索基线。
AI.conclusion: 理论推导了前缀保留的生存界，将前缀保留与索引和解码中三个可控因素联系起来，PRO框架通过针对性地优化这些因素，有效弥合了索引-解码差距，提升了多模态生成式检索的性能。

title: Impacts of Histories and Models on LLM Grading: A Study in Advanced Software Engineering Courses
summary: Graduate-level research reading report assessment creates a substantial labor burden for educators. While large language models (LLMs) hold great potential for automating academic grading, their reliability for this specialized task remains understudied, particularly regarding grading consistency, the lack of which represents a primary obstacle to educational fairness. This paper proposes a human-aligned LLM-assisted grading workflow and presents a case study based on 180 student submissions from a graduate advanced software engineering course. We evaluate two mainstream LLMs, Grok and GPT, in terms of grading consistency and alignment with human scores. We find LLMs exhibit distinct levels of intra-model consistency and significant inter-model grading inconsistencies, while simple ensemble approaches cannot improve alignment with human evaluation. Critically, continuous interaction history drives systematic drift in models' grading standards away from human expert scores. Our findings demonstrate LLMs' potential in reducing grading workload for educators in graduate education, while highlighting that indiscriminate LLM grading may introduce systemic unfairness, suggesting that specific operational practices are required to mitigate such disparities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM在研究生学术报告评分中的一致性与公平性，基于180份学生作业对Grok和GPT进行评估，发现模型内部一致性尚可但模型间差异显著，且连续交互会导致评分标准偏离人类专家判断。
AI.motivation: 研究生级别的研究报告评分给教育工作者带来了巨大的劳动负担，而LLM虽有望实现评分自动化，但其在此专门任务中的可靠性——尤其是评分一致性这一教育公平的主要障碍——尚缺乏充分研究。
AI.method: 提出了一种人类对齐的LLM辅助评分工作流，基于某研究生高级软件工程课程的180份学生作业开展案例研究，评估Grok和GPT两个主流LLM的评分一致性以及与人类评分的对齐程度。
AI.result: LLM表现出不同程度的模型内一致性，但模型间存在显著的不一致；简单的集成方法无法改善与人类评估的对齐；关键的是，连续的交互历史会导致模型评分标准系统性地偏离人类专家评分。
AI.conclusion: LLM有潜力减轻研究生教育中教育工作者的评分负担，但不加区分地使用LLM评分可能引入系统性不公平，需要特定的操作实践来缓解这种差异。

title: Safety is Contextual, LLM-Judges Are Not: Navigating the Rigid Priors of Evaluators
summary: LLMs-as-judges are the only way to evaluate safety at scale. Despite their importance, LLM-judges themselves are rarely evaluated beyond human agreement in simple, static benchmarks. We therefore investigate two under-explored but crucial properties of LLMs-as-judges: their susceptibility to relying on in context-information, and their steerability to differing safety definitions, which may not align with their internal safety priors. We evaluate the safety judging abilities of many generalist LLMs and safety-specific judges, and investigate the impact of task demonstrations, novel in-context information, and changing safety definitions. We find that while LLM-judges can learn from new information, they are broadly unlikely to adjust their evaluations if the context or safety definition contradicts their prior.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM作为安全评估者时，对上下文信息的依赖性和对不同安全定义的可引导性，发现LLM评估者虽能学习新信息，但当上下文或安全定义与其内部安全先验矛盾时，普遍不会调整评估结果。
AI.motivation: LLM-as-judge是大规模安全评估的唯一可行方式，但现有研究仅停留在简单静态基准中的人类一致性评估，忽略了其在上下文信息依赖性和安全定义可引导性方面的关键特性。
AI.method: 评估多种通用LLM和安全专用评估模型的安全评判能力，研究任务示范、新颖上下文信息以及变化的安全定义对其评估结果的影响。
AI.result: LLM评估者能够从新信息中学习，但当上下文或安全定义与其内部先验相矛盾时，它们普遍不会调整自己的评估结果。
AI.conclusion: LLM-as-judge存在内部安全先验的顽固性，即使引入矛盾信息也难以改变其评估倾向，这对安全评估的可靠性和可控性提出了挑战。

title: Optimality of Sequential Filtering Under Independent Cost and Selectivity Models
comment: 2 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Electro/Information Technology (EIT 2026)
summary: Sequential filtering pipelines are a common design pattern in large-scale systems, where a large population of items is progressively reduced by a sequence of stages that each incur cost. Despite their prevalence in ranking systems, cascaded machine learning inference, and fraud detection, filter ordering is often determined by heuristics without formal guarantees. We formalize sequential filtering under an expected-cost objective and prove that, under an independence model, ordering filters by increasing ratio of cost to rejection probability minimizes expected total cost. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations show that the optimal ordering strictly dominates common heuristics across all runs, both in expectation and across the full distribution of outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文对大规模系统中的顺序过滤流水线进行了形式化分析，证明了在独立模型假设下，按成本与拒绝概率之比的升序排列过滤器可使期望总成本最小化，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证了最优排序在所有运行中均优于常见启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 顺序过滤流水线是大规模系统中的常见设计模式，但过滤器排序通常依赖无形式保证的启发式方法，缺乏理论指导。
AI.method: 形式化定义顺序过滤的期望成本目标，在独立模型下推导最优排序准则（成本/拒绝概率升序），并通过蒙特卡洛模拟进行验证。
AI.result: 按成本与拒绝概率之比的升序排列过滤器可使期望总成本最小化；蒙特卡洛模拟表明该最优排序在期望值和结果全分布上均严格优于常见启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 为顺序过滤流水线提供了具有形式保证的最优排序理论，可指导实际系统设计。

title: Popcorn: A Configurable Benchmark for Visual Evidence in Multimodal Movie Recommendation
summary: Movies are long-form audiovisual works, yet recommender benchmarks often rely on trailers, thumbnails, or metadata. These sources differ in semantics and scalability: full movies preserve consumption-level evidence, trailers concentrate promotional highlights, and thumbnails provide sparse but catalog-scale visual signals. We present Popcorn, a configurable benchmark for visual evidence in multimodal movie recommendation, combining title-aligned full-movie/trailer embeddings with MovieLens-linked thumbnail features encoded by modern visual and vision-language models. Popcorn standardizes modality assembly, fusion, splitting, evaluation, and LLM-augmented metadata through a single configuration contract. Experiments show that thumbnail VLMs provide strong, scalable item-side evidence, while controlled trailer/full-movie comparisons show that visual evidence sources are not interchangeable: the choice of source and fusion strategy affects ranking accuracy, coverage, diversity, and calibration. The framework is available at https://github.com/RecSys-lab/Popcorn.

AI.tldr: Popcorn是一个面向多模态电影推荐的视觉证据可配置基准框架，集成了全长电影、预告片、缩略图等多源视觉特征，并提供了标准化的模态组装、融合、评估和元数据增强流程。
AI.motivation: 现有电影推荐基准多依赖于预告片、缩略图或元数据，但这些来源在语义和可扩展性上存在差异（全长电影保留消费级证据，预告片聚焦宣传亮点，缩略图提供稀疏但目录级的视觉信号），缺乏一个统一、可配置的多源视觉证据评估框架。
AI.method: 提出Popcorn框架，通过单一配置合约标准化模态组装、融合、分割、评估和LLM增强元数据；集成标题对齐的全长电影/预告片嵌入、MovieLens关联的缩略图特征，并采用现代视觉和视觉-语言模型编码。
AI.result: 实验发现：缩略图的VLM（视觉-语言模型）提供了强且可扩展的物品侧证据；视觉证据源不可互换，视觉源和融合策略的选择会影响排序准确性、覆盖率、多样性和校准性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉证据来源的选择对推荐效果有显著影响，Popcorn为多模态电影推荐中的视觉证据研究提供了标准化、可配置的评估平台。

title: When LLMs Invent Rust Crates: An Empirical Study of Hallucination Patterns and Mitigation
comment: The work has been accepted by the 17th International Conference on Internetware
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become powerful tools for code generation, yet they remain prone to hallucinations-producing plausible but incorrect or fabricated outputs. Among these, package hallucination, where an LLM suggests non-existent dependencies, poses an emerging security risk to the software supply chain. While previous studies focus on popular languages like Python or JavaScript, in this work we present the first large-scale empirical study on crate hallucination in LLM-generated Rust code. We construct a multi-source dataset combining coding tasks from Stack Overflow, GitHub, and LLM-generated tasks, and evaluate both commercial and open-source models under various decoding settings. Our analysis reveals that, unlike prior findings in Python and JavaScript, hallucination behavior in Rust follows a distinct pattern: different models exhibit surprisingly consistent hallucination rates, and these rates show minimal sensitivity to model parameters. Furthermore, we investigate prompt engineering strategies to mitigate hallucinations without sacrificing code quality. This study provides new insights into the reliability and security implications of LLM-assisted Rust development, offering guidance for future research and safer model deployment in software engineering workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对LLM生成的Rust代码中的crate幻觉（即建议不存在的依赖包）进行大规模实证研究，发现Rust中的幻觉行为与Python/JavaScript不同：不同模型间幻觉率高度一致，且对模型参数变化不敏感。研究还探索了提示工程策略以缓解幻觉。
AI.motivation: LLM在代码生成中常产生包幻觉（推荐不存在的依赖包），对软件供应链构成安全风险。此前研究主要关注Python和JavaScript，缺乏对Rust语言中这类问题的系统研究。
AI.method: 构建了多源数据集（Stack Overflow、GitHub和LLM生成任务），在多种解码设置下评估了商业和开源模型，对比分析了Rust与Python/JavaScript中幻觉行为的差异。
AI.result: Rust中的幻觉行为呈现独特模式：不同模型的幻觉率出奇一致，且对模型参数变化不敏感，这与Python和JavaScript中的发现形成鲜明对比。
AI.conclusion: 研究为LLM辅助Rust开发的可靠性和安全性提供了新见解，并为未来研究和更安全的大模型部署提供了指导方向。

title: The AI Epistemic Deference Index: A Continuous Measure of Sycophancy
summary: Current AI models frequently exhibit epistemic sycophancy, endorsing claims to agree with a user. Existing evaluations typically measure this either by assessing what it takes to make a model shift a binary endorsement or by eliciting an explicit probability in a proposition. However, much user-facing sycophantic behavior is demonstrated through shifts in graded support expressed through ordinary language. We propose the AI Epistemic Deference Index (AEDI): a continuous, unidimensional score representing how sensitive the support expressed in a model's output is to the attitude expressed in a user's prompt. To generate AEDI, we provide a new protocol for estimating probabilities from natural language outputs, using LLMs-as-judges validated for consistency and correlation to human judgment. We deploy it on a new curated database of 500 propositions across diverse topics and 16,000 prompts varying in user attitude, testing eight prominent models. Every model exhibits substantial deference, though with large and systematic differences across providers, with Claude models demonstrating the least, and Grok and Gemini models the most. The effect is amplified in prompts requesting a written artifact, and concentrated on propositions where models hold weaker priors. We release AEDI as an easy-to-update benchmark and measurement pipeline for output-level sycophancy evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI认知遵从指数(AEDI)，一种量化模型输出对用户态度敏感程度的连续指标，并通过新的大语言模型作为裁判的概率估计方法，对8个主流模型在500个命题上的遵从行为进行系统评估，发现所有模型均表现出显著的认知遵从，但不同模型间存在系统性差异（Claude最低，Grok和Gemini最高）。
AI.motivation: 现有评估主要测量二元立场转变或显式概率，但用户面对的实际遵从行为往往表现为自然语言中分级支持的转变，缺乏能够捕捉这种细微差别的连续量化指标。
AI.method: 提出AEDI连续单维评分，设计基于LLMs-as-judges从自然语言输出中估计概率的新协议（经人类判断验证一致性），构建包含500个命题和16,000个不同用户态度提示的数据库，对8个主流模型进行测试。
AI.result: 所有模型均表现出显著认知遵从；Claude模型遵从度最低，Grok和Gemini最高；效应在要求书面产出的提示中放大；在模型先验较弱的命题上集中体现。
AI.conclusion: AEDI可作为易更新的基准测试和测量流程，用于输出层面的认知遵从评估，揭示不同AI模型在认知遵从上的系统差异。

title: ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research
summary: AI coding agents are increasingly used for scientific work, but their end-to-end autonomous research capability remains difficult to verify. We present ResearchClawBench, a benchmark for evaluating autonomous scientific research across 40 tasks from 10 scientific domains. Each task is grounded in a real published paper, provides related literature and raw data, and hides the target paper during evaluation. Expert-curated multimodal rubrics decompose the target scientific artifacts into weighted criteria, enabling evaluation of target-paper-level re-discovery while leaving room for new discovery. We evaluate seven autonomous research (auto-research) agents under a unified protocol and seventeen native LLMs through the lightweight ResearchHarness. Current systems remain far from reliable re-discovery: the strongest autonomous agent, Claude Code, averages 21.5, and the strongest ResearchHarness LLM, Claude-Opus-4.7, averages 20.7, with an LLM frontier mean of only 26.5. Error analysis shows that failures concentrate in experimental protocol mismatch, evidence mismatch, and missing scientific core. ResearchClawBench provides a reproducible evaluation frontier for measuring progress toward autonomous scientific research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 ResearchClawBench，一个包含 40 个来自 10 个科学领域任务的基准测试，用于评估自主科学研究能力。通过多模态评分标准衡量对目标论文的重新发现程度，验证了当前最强的自主智能体和 LLM 在可靠重新发现方面仍远未达到理想水平。
AI.motivation: AI 编码智能体越来越多地用于科学工作，但其端到端的自主研究能力仍然难以验证，缺乏可靠的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了 40 个来自 10 个科学领域的任务，每个任务基于真实已发表论文，提供相关文献和原始数据，隐藏目标论文。使用专家策划的多模态评分标准将目标科学成果分解为加权标准进行评估。在统一协议下评估了 7 个自主研究智能体和 17 个原生 LLM（通过轻量级 ResearchHarness）。
AI.result: 最强自主智能体 Claude Code 平均得分 21.5，最强 ResearchHarness LLM（Claude-Opus-4.7）平均得分 20.7，LLM 前沿均值仅 26.5。错误分析显示失败集中在实验协议不匹配、证据不匹配和缺失科学核心。
AI.conclusion: 当前系统在可靠的科学重新发现方面仍远未达到理想水平，ResearchClawBench 为衡量自主科学研究进展提供了一个可复现的评估前沿。

title: Have I Solved This Before? Retrieving Similar Segmentation Problems for Evolutionary Learning
summary: Reliable integration and solid configuration of monitoring systems constitute a fundamental prerequisites for achieving high efficiency and productivity in contemporary manufacturing environments. Design decisions on sensor type and system architecture have to be made at an early stage and under comparably high uncertainty. This work investigates a research direction that deviates from the traditional monitoring-system development process by shifting the attention from algorithm design to a deeper analysis of the inspection problem. In contrast to traditional design cycles, this paper proposes to gradually collect knowledge and store it in an abstract system model. This enables the retrieval of similar solutions for future use cases, preventing the need for expensive model training from scratch and allowing instead for the incremental refinement of existing base configurations. Reuse of previously generated pipelines reduces the risk of late and costly revisions. As there is little knowledge on cross-domain transferability of filter pipelines, this study analyzes the potential of retrieving filter pipelines to transfer them to different but similar segmentation problems. Finally, we statistically analyze the benefits of this `transfer learning' variant which is predominantly applied to image segmentation problems. In addition, we discuss how simple models help balancing the trade-off between complexity, technical requirements, and reliability in the design process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种偏离传统监控系统开发流程的研究方向，通过将注意力从算法设计转向对检测问题的深入分析，逐步收集知识并存储在抽象系统模型中，实现过滤管道的跨领域迁移复用，避免昂贵的模型从头训练，并通过统计分析验证了这种迁移学习变体在图像分割问题中的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统监控系统开发需要在早期高不确定性的条件下做出传感器类型和系统架构的设计决策，且缺乏关于过滤管道跨领域可迁移性的知识，导致可能需要进行昂贵的模型重新训练和后期修订。
AI.method: 提出将知识逐步收集并存储在抽象系统模型中，通过检索类似解决方案实现过滤管道的跨领域迁移，对不同的但相似的分割问题进行过滤管道的迁移复用和增量式优化。
AI.result: 统计分析表明这种迁移学习变体在图像分割问题中具有优势，简单模型有助于平衡复杂度、技术要求和可靠性之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过管道迁移复用和增量式优化，可以降低后期昂贵修订的风险，是一种有前景的监控系统开发范式转向。

title: Projecting the Emerging Mindset of SWE Agent by Launching a Wild Code Understanding Journey
summary: Software engineering agents (SWE agents) increasingly work through tool-mediated trajectories in real repositories, yet their behavior remains difficult to characterize in concrete, observable terms. These trajectories record tool use, intermediate reasoning, evidence selection, and self-directed stopping, but they do not by themselves explain why particular moves were chosen, what evidence was trusted, or when understanding was judged sufficient. This tension makes trajectory data both limited and valuable: faithful, replayable traces can become an empirical substrate for studying agent behavior when interpreted through disciplined observation. We introduce Ada, a scoped apparatus for repository-level code understanding. Ada enters real codebases through a bounded tool interface, allowing open-ended exploration to remain recordable as finite trajectories. Across this wild-but-bounded setting, Ada chooses where to look, what to read closely, when to consolidate partial understanding, and when to close its account of the repository. We project Ada's think-action chains through observation lenses that make navigation, evidence selection, synthesis, grounding, and stopping visible without reducing behavior to raw tool counts or speculating about hidden intent. Read together, these lenses produce behavioral profiles grounded in recorded movement through software worlds. Across 408 trajectories, spanning multiple models, repositories, task families, and launch conditions, the study shows how faithful digital traces can be transformed into disciplined, comparable projections of emerging SWE-agent mindset. The results expose differences in efficiency, trajectory diversity, epistemic grounding, and the limits of intervention, while providing a methodological foundation for observing SWE agent behavior in real codebases.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Ada框架，通过受限工具接口和观测透镜方法，将SWE智能体在真实代码仓库中的工具中介轨迹转化为可比较的行为特征画像，在408条轨迹上验证了该方法能有效揭示智能体在效率、轨迹多样性、认识论基础等方面的差异。
AI.motivation: SWE智能体在真实仓库中的工具中介轨迹虽忠实可回放，但难以解释为何选择特定动作、信任何种证据、何时判断理解充分，缺乏将轨迹数据转化为可观测、可比较行为特征的系统方法。
AI.method: 设计Ada框架，提供有界工具接口进入真实代码库；通过导航、证据选择、综合、基础定位和停止五个观测透镜投射智能体的思考-行动链，将轨迹转化为行为画像。
AI.result: 在408条轨迹（覆盖多种模型、仓库、任务族和启动条件）上的实验表明，该方法能有效揭示智能体在效率、轨迹多样性、认识论基础及干预限制方面的差异。
AI.conclusion: 忠实数字轨迹可通过受训观察转化为可比较、有纪律的SWE智能体行为投射，为在真实代码库中观察智能体行为提供了方法论基础。

title: Contract2Tool: Learning Preconditions and Effects for Reliable Tool-Augmented LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented large language model agents increasingly rely on external APIs, but standard tool schemas describe how to call a tool, not when the tool is causally appropriate or what task state it produces. Causal tool filtering addresses this gap by using lightweight contracts that specify each tool's preconditions, effects, risk level, and cost. However, manually writing and maintaining such contracts does not scale to large or changing tool ecosystems. We introduce Contract2Tool, a framework for inferring tool contracts from metadata, schemas, documentation, and execution traces. Contract2Tool converts observable tool evidence into normalized symbolic contracts that can be evaluated intrinsically and deployed inside downstream causal tool filtering. We evaluate learned contracts against gold preconditions, effects, and risk labels, and measure their downstream utility on multi-step agent tasks. Our results show that hybrid documentation-and-trace evidence produces contracts accurate enough to preserve most of the reliability and efficiency benefits of gold contracts. Learned-contract CMTF achieves 0.980 downstream success, close to 0.990 for gold-contract CMTF, while reducing visible tools from 100 to 1 and reducing average token usage from 26,172 to 2,528 relative to all-tools exposure. These results suggest that learned contracts can provide a scalable contract layer between tool schemas and reliable agent execution.

AI.tldr: Contract2Tool 通过从元数据、文档和执行轨迹中推断工具契约（前置条件、效果、风险等级、成本），为工具增强型 LLM 代理提供可扩展的因果工具过滤层，在保持接近黄金契约性能的同时大幅降低工具可见数量和 token 消耗。
AI.motivation: 标准工具模式只描述如何调用工具，而不说明何时调用是因果恰当的或产生什么任务状态，手动编写和维护工具契约无法扩展到大型或变化的工具生态系统。
AI.method: 提出 Contract2Tool 框架，从元数据、模式、文档和执行轨迹中推断工具契约，将可观测的工具证据转换为归一化的符号契约，并部署到下游因果工具过滤（CMTF）中。
AI.result: 混合文档和轨迹证据生成的契约足够准确，学习契约的 CMTF 达到 0.980 下游成功率（黄金契约为 0.990），可见工具从 100 降至 1，平均 token 使用从 26,172 降至 2,528。
AI.conclusion: 学习契约可以在工具模式和可靠代理执行之间提供可扩展的契约层，在保持可靠性收益的同时大幅提升效率。

title: UNIQ: Conformal Calibration for Adaptive Conservatism in Offline Reinforcement Learning
comment: 19 pages, 2 figures, ICML 2026 Workshop on Decision-Making from Offline Datasets to Online Adaptation: Black-Box Optimization to Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline reinforcement learning requires careful conservatism to mitigate distribution shift, yet most existing methods apply a fixed penalty uniformly across all states regardless of local data coverage. We present UNIQ (Uncertainty-Informed Quantile), an offline RL method that introduces state-adaptive conservatism through conformally calibrated uncertainty estimation. Built on the Implicit Q-Learning (IQL) backbone, UNIQ trains a multi-expectile value ensemble, computes distribution-free uncertainty estimates using split conformal prediction, and maps the resulting signal to a state-dependent expectile that relaxes conservatism in well-covered regions while strengthening it in uncertain regions near the data frontier. On D4RL MuJoCo benchmarks, UNIQ consistently improves over IQL, with the largest gains observed on Walker2d and replay-heavy tasks. At the same time, UNIQ operates at near-IQL memory cost (approximately 250 MB peak VRAM), providing roughly a 10x reduction compared to EDAC. Rather than pursuing overall state-of-the-art performance, we position UNIQ as a practical mechanism contribution that improves the performance-efficiency trade-off in offline reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: UNIQ是一种基于不确定性量化（共形预测）的离线强化学习方法，通过状态自适应的保守性机制在数据覆盖充分的区域放松约束、在不确定区域加强约束，在D4RL MuJoCo任务上一致优于IQL，且内存开销仅为EDAC的约1/10。
AI.motivation: 现有离线RL方法对所有状态施加统一且固定的保守性惩罚，忽略了局部数据覆盖程度的差异，导致在数据充分区域过度约束、在稀疏区域约束不足的问题。
AI.method: 以IQL为骨干，训练多分位数值集成；利用分裂共形预测计算无分布假设的不确定性估计；将不确定性信号映射为状态自适应的期望分位数，在数据覆盖好的区域降低保守性，在数据边界附近加强保守性。
AI.result: 在D4RL MuJoCo基准上一致优于IQL，在Walker2d和replay-heavy任务上提升最大；峰值VRAM约250MB，相比EDAC减少约10倍。
AI.conclusion: UNIQ不追求整体SOTA性能，而是作为一种实用的机制性贡献，在离线RL的性能与效率之间实现了更优的权衡。

title: Adaptive Loss Balancing for Noise-Robust GRPO in Generative Recommendation
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) presents a promising avenue for enhancing generative recommendation beyond supervised imitation, leveraging reward signals to guide policy improvement. However, its efficacy is critically contingent on the trustworthiness of the reward model for the samples it evaluates. In practice, production rankers, the widely adopted reward models, are trained on exposure-biased logs, leading to sample-dependent inaccuracies that violate this assumption. Our stratified analysis uncovers a consistent pattern: reward guidance is most beneficial when the policy exhibits uncertainty and the ranker can effectively discriminate the ground-truth item from rollout negatives. On other samples, the reward signal is either negligible or detrimental, highlighting the risk of uniform RL application. To address such an issue, we introduce AdaGRPO, a novel framework that treats reward-guided optimization as selective admission rather than uniform pressure. Training is anchored in supervised negative log-likelihood, while the GRPO objective is gated by a binary, per-sample clip determined by two rollout diagnostics: policy-side difficulty and reward discriminability. Instances failing either diagnostic default to pure supervision, ensuring stability and mitigating the amplification of noisy gradients. We validate AdaGRPO on a large-scale e-commerce dataset. At the best intermediate checkpoint, it elevates HR@10 from 11.01% to 12.18% while constraining hallucination below 0.22%, and maintains robustness at the final checkpoint (HR@10 11.63%, hallucination 0.27%), outperforming fixed NLL--GRPO mixtures across the retrieval--validity frontier. In production A/B tests, AdaGRPO achieves statistically significant gains in click-through rate and dwell time, confirming its practical utility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaGRPO框架，通过选择性奖励引导优化，解决强化学习在生成式推荐中因奖励模型不可靠导致的噪声放大问题，在电商数据集和在线A/B测试中取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 强化学习用于生成式推荐时依赖奖励模型的可靠性，但实际生产环境中的排序器（奖励模型）训练于有偏曝光日志，导致样本依赖性的不准确。分层分析发现，统一应用RL优化在某些样本上有害，亟需一种选择性优化机制。
AI.method: 提出AdaGRPO框架：以监督负对数似然（NLL）为训练锚点，通过两个滚动推演诊断指标（策略侧难度和奖励可区分性）为每个样本生成二元裁剪门控，决定是否应用GRPO目标；不满足条件的样本回退至纯监督学习。
AI.result: 在大规模电商数据集上，最佳中间检查点HR@10从11.01%提升至12.18%，幻觉率低于0.22%；最终检查点HR@10为11.63%，幻觉率0.27%，优于固定NLL-GRPO混合策略。在线A/B测试中点击率和停留时间均有统计显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 奖励引导优化应作为选择性准入而非统一压力，AdaGRPO通过样本级的动态门控机制有效平衡了检索性能与有效性，验证了实际工业应用价值。

title: FusionVul: A Multimodal Feature Fusion Framework for Source Code Vulnerability Detection
comment: Accepted by The Journal of Systems and Software
summary: Source code vulnerability detection remains a long-standing challenge due to the increasing scale, structural complexity, and semantic diversity of modern codebases. Conventional static-analysis or rule-based approaches often fail to capture subtle execution dependencies, while single-modality learning models tend to overlook critical structural information embedded beyond the lexical surface of source code. To improve robustness across heterogeneous code patterns, we propose FusionVul, a joint representation learning framework that integrates sequential syntactic representations extracted by a pretrained Transformer encoder with structural semantics propagated through a graph neural network. The framework further incorporates a cross-attention-based feature fusion network to enable fine-grained cross-modal interaction and employs a sample-aware weighting mechanism to integrate multiple predictive branches. Experimental results on four datasets demonstrate that FusionVul achieves superior F1 scores on datasets with highly dispersed function size distributions and broader vulnerability-type coverage, such as SVulD and DiverseVul, reflecting its capability to capture complex and diverse vulnerability patterns.

AI.tldr: 提出FusionVul框架，融合Transformer的序列编码与GNN的结构语义，通过交叉注意力融合和样本加权机制，在多个漏洞检测数据集上取得最优F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中，静态分析和规则方法难以捕捉细微的执行依赖，单模态学习模型又容易忽略代码中超越词法层面的关键结构信息，亟需一种能同时利用序列语义和结构语义的鲁棒检测框架。
AI.method: 采用预训练Transformer编码器提取序列句法表示，结合图神经网络传播结构语义；通过交叉注意力融合网络实现跨模态细粒度交互；引入样本感知加权机制集成多个预测分支。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实验，FusionVul在函数规模分布高度分散且漏洞类型覆盖更广的数据集（如SVulD和DiverseVul）上取得了更优的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 融合序列与结构语义的联合表示学习框架能够更有效地捕捉复杂多样的漏洞模式，尤其适用于函数规模差异大、漏洞类型多样的场景。

title: MemToolAgent overview with a simple restaurant booking scenario where the agent retrieves similar memories, receives feedback on an invalid time format, and generates a reflection to update its memory
summary: Modern large language model (LLM) agents can use external tools to help users solve complex tasks. However, for problems that require learning from long-term historical events or from previous agent-environment interactions, LLM agents are required to use memory mechanisms to store and retrieve experiences. While sophisticated memory systems exist for dialogue agents, few studies have empirically examined how to improve agents' tool-using capabilities through past user-agent conversations. We propose MemToolAgent, a framework that improves tool use through memory management. Our approach contains a memory extraction module that processes past experiences into structured memory entries, and a retrieval module that dynamically selects a subset of the stored memory entries. This enables more personalized and accurate responses aligned with user preferences and feedback without requiring LLM fine-tuning. In summary, this work has three main contributions: (1) a unified memory entry format that improves both general-purpose and personalized tool use without LLM fine-tuning, (2) a reflection-based memory extraction that uses environment and user feedback to distill wrong executions into critiques to store, and (3) a retrieval module that chooses how many past experiences to use based on the memory similarity distribution. MemToolAgent achieves 29%, 80%, and 17% relative improvements compared to strong baselines on the WorkBench, NESTFUL, and PEToolBench benchmarks, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出MemToolAgent框架，通过结构化记忆管理（记忆提取+动态检索）提升LLM智能体的工具使用能力，无需微调即可利用历史对话经验，在三个基准上分别提升29%、80%和17%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体需要记忆机制来存储和检索历史交互经验，但很少有研究通过历史用户-智能体对话来提升工具使用能力。
AI.method: 包含记忆提取模块（将历史经验处理为结构化记忆条目，利用环境和用户反馈将错误执行提炼为批评）和动态检索模块（基于记忆相似度分布选择使用的历史经验数量），无需LLM微调。
AI.result: 在WorkBench、NESTFUL和PEToolBench上相比强基线分别提升29%、80%和17%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一的记忆条目格式、反思式记忆提取和动态检索机制，有效提升了通用和个性化工具使用能力，无需LLM微调。

title: Shortcuts in the Tail: Debiasing via Post-Hoc Spectral Compression of Fine-Tuning Updates
summary: Fine-tuning often introduces spurious correlations alongside task knowledge, causing systematic failures on underrepresented groups. Existing mitigations require retraining, group labels, or curated counterfactual data. We show a simple post-hoc intervention reduces shortcut reliance without any of these: truncating the tail of the SVD of $ΔW = W_\mathrm{ft} - W_\mathrm{base}$ reduces the spurious-group gap while preserving task accuracy. Across three instruction-tuned models ($0.5$B--$7$B) and four classification benchmarks, top-$k$ truncation reduces the gap on every cell at $<2$ pp accuracy loss, by up to $5\times$ on CivilComments. We propose this works because the shortcut response sits in the tail of the singular ordering of $ΔW$, a claim about how truncation behaves rather than about the raw singular values, which are broadly distributed and look the same across all four datasets. A controlled boundary case in which fine-tuning has only a shortcut to learn shows the predicted FT-to-base collapse, and bottom-/random-$k$ and matched-rank LoRA controls rule out generic low-rank approximation and rank-constrained training as the explanation. We read this as preliminary evidence that the singular basis of $ΔW$ is a useful coordinate system for studying what fine-tuning has learned.

AI.tldr: 通过对微调权重增量 ΔW 进行 SVD 截断尾部（保留 top-k 奇异值），无需重训练、群体标签或反事实数据，即可在保持任务精度的同时减少模型对虚假相关性的依赖，消除对弱势群体的系统性偏见。
AI.motivation: 微调常引入虚假相关性，导致模型在弱势群体上系统性失败。现有缓解方法需要重训练、群体标签或精心构造的反事实数据，成本高昂且不实用。
AI.method: 计算微调权重与基础权重的差值 ΔW，对其执行 SVD 分解，然后截断尾部（保留 top-k 奇异值），用截断后的权重替换原始微调权重。这是一种无需额外数据或标签的后处理方法。
AI.result: 在三个指令微调模型（0.5B-7B）和四个分类基准上，top-k 截断在每项指标上均减少了虚假群体差距，精度损失小于 2pp，在 CivilComments 数据集上群体差距减小达 5 倍。控制实验（bottom-k、random-k 截断及匹配秩的 LoRA）排除了通用低秩逼近或秩约束训练作为解释的可能性。
AI.conclusion: 虚假相关性的响应位于 ΔW 奇异排序的尾部，截断尾部可有效消除；ΔW 的奇异基系是研究微调学习内容的有效坐标系。

title: Decoy-Calibrated Failure Audits for Language Models
summary: Useful audits reveal not only how often a model fails, but also where its failures concentrate. An auditor may test many candidate explanations: long inputs, indirect questions, distracting evidence, or combinations of these factors. The risk is selection. The largest observed effect may reflect a real failure mode, or it may simply be the best result among many tried. We introduce Janus, a procedure for deciding when a proposed error explanation is credible enough to report. The goal is not to generate new explanations, but to decide which ones hold up. The auditor starts with a fixed model, a labeled evaluation set, and a frozen list of candidate explanations, which we call descriptors. Janus scores each descriptor by its error-rate lift, then compares real descriptors with fake ones that have the same frequencies but are randomly assigned to examples. A descriptor is confirmed only if it beats this decoy floor on the data used for discovery and then repeats on separate held-out data. In a controlled audit of multi-table lookup tasks, Janus identifies the planted failure, confirming long-chain descriptors and their interactions. The LLM often stops partway through the lookup chain instead of reaching the final answer. On two public benchmarks, MuSiQue and LongBench v2, the SliceLine baseline flags plausible high-error pockets, but Janus confirms none of them. Ablations show why both safeguards matter. On LongBench v2, an uncalibrated fixed threshold reports 20 descriptors, the decoy floor leaves one, and the holdout check rejects the last one after its lift shrinks from 0.36 to 0.05. The resulting principle separates proposing explanations from reporting them. Candidates may come from any source, but only those that beat decoys and replicate on fresh data become audit findings.

AI.tldr: Janus 是一种审计流程，用于判断模型错误解释是否可信：通过将真实描述符与随机分配的假描述符（decoy floor）比较，并在独立验证集上重复验证，只有同时通过这两项检验的描述符才被确认为审计发现。
AI.motivation: 审计模型时，测试多个候选解释会导致选择性偏差（selection risk）：观测到的最大效应可能只是多次尝试中的最佳结果，而非真实的失效模式。需要一种方法来区分哪些解释是真正可信的。
AI.method: Janus 流程：1) 固定模型、标注评估集和候选解释列表（描述符）；2) 计算每个描述符的错误率提升（error-rate lift）；3) 将真实描述符与频率相同但随机分配给样本的假描述符比较（decoy floor）；4) 只有超过假描述符基准且在独立保留数据上重复的描述符才被确认。
AI.result: 在受控的多表查找任务中，Janus 成功识别了植入的失效模式（长链描述符及其交互）。在 MuSiQue 和 LongBench v2 上，SliceLine 基线报告了看似合理的高错误区域，但 Janus 未确认任何描述符。消融实验显示：无校准的固定阈值报告 20 个描述符，decoy floor 留下 1 个，holdout 检验将最后一个剔除（lift 从 0.36 降至 0.05）。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种将解释提议与报告分离的原则：解释可来自任何来源，但只有击败随机基准并在新鲜数据上可复现的描述符才能成为审计发现。

title: LLM vs. Human Unit Tests: Fault Detection on Real Python Bugs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown considerable promise for automated unit test generation, yet their practical effectiveness relative to human-written tests remains poorly understood. Existing evaluations commonly rely on coverage-oriented benchmarks that do not assess fault-detection capability directly. We present an empirical comparison of LLM-generated and human-written unit tests across three complementary Python benchmarks: 29 real historical bugs from BugsInPy, a function-level benchmark drawn from python-slugify and packaging, and a controlled paired benchmark. Our generation pipeline couples Gemini 2.5 Flash with a lightweight lexical retrieval mechanism that supplies bug-relevant context at generation time. Across eight quality dimensions, LLM-generated tests with retrieval-augmented context detect faults in 69% of cases compared to 17.2% for general-purpose human-written tests (Fisher's exact, $p < 0.001$, Cohen's $h = 1.10$). Critically, line and branch coverage are nearly identical between the two approaches (84.8% vs. 88.5% and 75.2% vs. 82.1%), confirming that coverage is an insufficient proxy for fault-detection capability.
