Based on these results, we provide deployment recommendations across accuracy and latency requirements, ...

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了24种小型语言模型变体在金融交易结构化信息提取任务中的生产部署可行性，发现Qwen 3.5 4B（F1 96.60%）和0.8B（F1 94.75%）模型能在显著降低内存和延迟成本的同时，接近或匹配8B基线模型的性能，并给出了不同精度/延迟需求下的部署建议。
AI.motivation: 现有的8B参数LoRA微调LLaMA 3.1模型虽然F1达96.95%，但部署成本（内存、延迟、费用）过高，亟需寻找更高效的小型替代模型以满足实际生产需求。
AI.method: 对4个模型家族（Gemma 3、Qwen 3.5、Aya、LLaMA 3.1）共24个模型变体进行系统评估，涵盖不同参数量、LoRA秩、提示格式（JSON-only vs. CoT）及训练模板（Think/Nothink），并在Databricks Model Serving端部署全部14个子8B模型以验证生产环境性能迁移。
AI.result: (1) LoRA秩8微调仅比秩32低0.20 F1；(2) Qwen 3.5 4B（JSON-only）达96.60% F1，接近8B基线；(3) Qwen 3.5 0.8B达94.75% F1，匹配2.5-4倍大模型；(4) CoT微调提升0.3-1.8 F1，但Qwen 3.5 4B以直接JSON-only最佳；(5) Think/Nothink模板差异<0.004 F1；(6) 生产环境F1平均仅下降0.8点，Aya 3.35B除外（下降3-5点）。
AI.conclusion: 小型模型（尤其是Qwen 3.5系列）可在量化宽松的成本约束下提供接近大模型的精度，Aya 3.35B在生产部署中表现不佳，最终给出面向不同精度/延迟需求的模型部署推荐。

title: Measuring Poverty and Inequality with Reduced Data: A Machine Learning Approach Using Nigerian Household Data
summary: Reliable measurement of income and consumption is essential for monitoring poverty and inequality in low- and middle-income countries, yet full household surveys are costly and difficult to implement regularly. This paper examines whether reduced survey instruments can preserve key distributional information. We apply Random Forest Recursive Feature Elimination (RF-RFE) to the 2018/19 Nigeria General Household Survey-Panel to identify the income sources, consumption categories and household characteristics that best classify individuals within the welfare distribution. The analysis focuses on three outcomes: poverty status, location in the quintile distribution and position relative to the Gini-based inequality line. The survey's post-planting and post-harvest periods allow us to assess performance under different seasonal contexts. Results show that RF-RFE achieves strong classification accuracy with few predictors. For consumption, poverty status and inequality-line position are accurately predicted using a small set of expenditure categories, while quintile classification reaches about 80 percent accuracy for seasonal consumption and 60--65 percent for annual consumption predicted from a single seasonal visit. For income, poverty status reaches around 90 percent accuracy with five predictors, and inequality-line position is largely captured by labour earnings. The findings suggest that machine-learning methods can help improve survey design and reduce data requirements while retaining much of the distributional information needed to measure and monitor poverty and inequality.

AI.tldr: 本文利用随机森林递归特征消除（RF-RFE）方法分析2018/19年尼日利亚综合家庭调查数据，发现仅需少量预测变量即可高精度分类个体的贫困状态、五分位分布位置及不平等线位置，表明机器学习方法可在减少数据需求的同时保留关键的福利分布信息。
AI.motivation: 全面家庭调查成本高昂且难以定期实施，因此需要探索精简的调查工具能否在降低数据收集成本的同时，保留衡量贫困和不平等所需的分布信息。
AI.method: 应用随机森林递归特征消除（RF-RFE）方法，以2018/19年尼日利亚综合家庭调查面板数据为基础，识别最能对福利分布中个体进行分类的收入来源、消费类别和家庭特征，并在种植后和收获后两个季节周期下评估模型表现。
AI.result: 消费方面，贫困状态和不平等线位置可通过少量支出类别准确预测，五分位分类在季节性消费上达80%准确率，年度消费预测达60-65%；收入方面，贫困状态以5个预测变量达90%准确率，不平等线位置主要由劳动收入解释。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法能够改进调查设计、减少数据需求，同时保留测量和监测贫困与不平等所需的大部分分布信息。

title: Agentic Persona Generation with Critique-Refinement: An Industrial Evaluation
comment: Accepted in the Industry Track of the Requirements Engineering (RE) 2026 Conference
summary: Personas are widely used in software engineering to support requirements elicitation, design, and validation, but their manual creation is costly, time-consuming, and hard to scale. Recent LLM-based approaches automate persona generation from textual data; however, they typically rely on single-shot generation and subjective evaluations, limiting practical reliability. We present PerGent, an industry-grade method for persona generation built around an iterative critique-refinement loop. Specifically, PerGent uses a generator and a critic LLM agent, coordinated by an orchestrator, to iteratively refine personas using external resources such as interviews, surveys, and job postings through a critique-refinement loop with a user-defined maximum number of rounds. We deploy and evaluate PerGent in an industrial setting at Kinaxis, comparing it with three baselines, including one-shot methods. In an expert in-situ evaluation, PerGent achieved the highest expert approval rate (96.9%), exceeding all baselines. We further compare PerGent-generated personas with best-practice personas manually created by domain experts prior to the adoption of LLMs. Compared to baselines, PerGent reproduces a larger proportion of expert content while also contributing substantial new content beyond the pre-LLM personas. We conclude with lessons learned from deploying and evaluating PerGent at Kinaxis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PerGent，一种基于迭代批评-改进循环的工业级人物角色生成方法，通过LLM代理（生成器+批评者+协调器）利用外部资源迭代优化，在Kinaxis工业部署中达到96.9%专家认可率，优于单次生成等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 人物角色在软件工程中广泛用于需求获取、设计和验证，但手动创建成本高、耗时长且难以扩展。现有基于LLM的自动化方法依赖单次生成和主观评估，缺乏实际可靠性。
AI.method: PerGent采用迭代批评-改进循环，包含生成器（Generator）和批评者（Critic）两个LLM代理，由协调器（Orchestrator）统筹，利用访谈、问卷、招聘信息等外部资源，在用户定义的最大轮次内迭代优化人物角色。
AI.result: 在Kinaxis工业环境中部署评估，PerGent的专家认可率达96.9%，超过所有基线方法；相比基线，PerGent能复现更多专家手动创建的人物角色内容，同时生成大量超越原有专家角色的新内容。
AI.conclusion: PerGent通过迭代式LLM协作范式有效提升了人物角色生成的可靠性和工业实用性，并总结了在Kinaxis部署和评估过程中的经验教训。

title: A Multi-modal Agentic Co-pilot for Evidence Grounded Computational Pathology
summary: Pathology is the cornerstone of modern medicine, where accurate decision-making relies heavily on evidence-based practices. While artificial intelligence (AI) has the potential to transform clinical workflows, the intersection of AI and evidence-based medicine remains under-explored, with primitive attempts restricted to text-only general medicine. In this work, we present PathPocket, a multimodal AI agentic co-pilot designed specifically for evidence grounded pathology. We construct the most comprehensive pathology evidence corpus to date, encompassing approximately 110,472 public and authorized documents structured across a rigorous hierarchy of evidence from clinical guideline to expert opinion. From this meticulously graded foundation, we build a large-scale multimodal pathology hypergraph containing over 4.55 million entities and 7.10 million relations. Serving as a robust knowledge engine, this hypergraph provides traceable evidence for a collaborative multi-agent reasoning framework integrating input understanding, evidence retrieval, filtering, and diagnosis generation. This enables PathPocket to seamlessly resolve a wide spectrum of clinical tasks, ranging from text-only queries to complex multimodal diagnostics involving region-of-interest (ROI) and gigapixel whole-slide images (WSIs). We rigorously evaluate the system on a multidimensional benchmark of over 200,000 real-world cases, where it significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-arts. Crucially, extensive user studies demonstrate that PathPocket substantially improves the diagnostic accuracy and confidence of pathologists. By directly grounding pathology interpretations in verifiable literature, PathPocket offers a practical and scalable solution for the future of evidence grounded computational pathology.

AI.tldr: PathPocket是一个专为循证病理学设计的多模态AI智能体协同系统，构建了包含约11万份文献的病理证据语料库和超过455万实体、710万关系的大规模多模态病理超图，通过多智能体推理框架实现从文本查询到复杂多模态诊断的各类临床任务，在20余万真实病例评测中显著超越现有方法，并能有效提升病理医生的诊断准确性和信心。
AI.motivation: AI与循证医学的交汇尚未被充分探索，现有尝试仅局限于文本型通用医学，缺乏面向病理学的循证AI系统。
AI.method: 构建了包含约110,472份文献的病理证据语料库，按证据等级分级（从临床指南到专家意见）；基于此构建了含455万+实体和710万+关系的多模态病理超图作为知识引擎；设计多智能体协同推理框架（包含输入理解、证据检索、过滤和诊断生成）。
AI.result: 在超过20万真实病例的多维基准评测中显著超越现有最先进方法；用户研究表明该系统能大幅提升病理医生的诊断准确性和信心。
AI.conclusion: PathPocket通过将病理解释直接锚定于可验证的文献，为循证计算病理学的未来提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Structured Neuron Pruning in Deep Neural Networks Using Multi-Armed Bandits
summary: Deep neural networks often contain redundant hidden units. Removing individual weights can reduce parameter count, but unstructured sparsity is not always easy to exploit in standard dense implementations. This paper develops a structured pruning framework in which complete neurons are removed using multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms. Each candidate neuron is treated as an arm; pulling an arm temporarily masks that neuron, measures the change in loss on a sampled mini-batch, restores the neuron, and updates an estimate of its safe-removal reward. The framework supports stochastic policies, including Epsilon-Greedy, Softmax, UCB1 and Thompson Sampling, and multiplicative-weight policies, including Hedge-style multiplicative weights and EXP3. We evaluate the method on tabular classification, tabular regression and deep neural-network benchmarks covering image, text and reasoning tasks. Statistical comparisons using the Friedman test followed by the Nemenyi post-hoc test show significant differences between methods. On tabular classification tasks, UCB1 obtains the highest mean rank among pruning policies and improves on the unpruned neural network. On regression tasks, UCB1 obtains the highest mean rank and is statistically competitive with, or superior to, several standard regression models according to R^2. On deep-learning tasks, UCB1 and Thompson Sampling obtain the strongest ranks, and several MAB policies significantly outperform the unpruned model, magnitude-based neuron pruning and greedy activation-variation pruning. The results show that MAB-based neuron pruning is an effective and computationally practical approach for structured model reduction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多臂老虎机（MAB）的结构化剪枝框架，通过将每个神经元视为一个臂，使用随机策略（如UCB1、Thompson Sampling等）和乘性权重策略来评估并移除冗余神经元。实验表明，UCB1在表格分类/回归和深度学习任务中表现最优，显著优于未剪枝模型及传统剪枝方法。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络中存在大量冗余隐藏单元；传统的非结构化权重剪枝虽能减少参数量，但难以在标准稠密实现中有效利用，因此需要一种结构化的剪枝方法，能够完整移除神经元以简化模型结构。
AI.method: 提出基于多臂老虎机（MAB）的结构化剪枝框架：每个候选神经元作为一个臂，每次拉取时临时遮蔽该神经元，计算其在采样小批量上的损失变化，然后恢复神经元并更新安全移除奖励估计。支持随机策略（Epsilon-Greedy、Softmax、UCB1、Thompson Sampling）和乘性权重策略（Hedge-style multiplicative weights、EXP3）。
AI.result: 在表格分类任务中，UCB1获得最高平均秩，优于未剪枝网络；在表格回归任务中，UCB1最高秩且与标准回归模型竞争力相当或更优；在深度学习任务中，UCB1和Thompson Sampling排名最强，多个MAB策略显著优于未剪枝模型、基于幅度的神经元剪枝和贪婪激活变化剪枝。使用Friedman检验和Nemenyi事后检验进行统计比较。
AI.conclusion: 基于MAB的神经元剪枝是一种有效且计算上实用的结构化模型缩减方法。

title: FASE: Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy for Code Quality
summary: Multi-agent code generation offers a promising paradigm for autonomous software development by simulating the human software engineering lifecycle. However, system reliability remains hindered by LLM hallucinations and error propagation across interacting agents. While semantic entropy provides a principled way to quantify uncertainty without ground-truth answers, current methods often rely on costly LLM-driven equivalence checks. In this work, we introduce Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy (FASE), a novel metric that approximates functional correctness based on the minimum spanning tree of structural and semantic dissimilarity graphs. Evaluations on HumanEval and BigCodeBench demonstrate that FASE outperforms state-of-the-art semantic entropy by LLM entailment, achieving a 25% average improvement in Spearman correlation and a 19% increase in ROCAUC score against Pass@1 from ground-truth test cases when using the Qwen3-Embedding-8B model. Furthermore, by eliminating costly LLM-driven equivalence evaluation, FASE incurs negligible computational overhead, requiring only approximately 0.3% of the runtime cost of traditional semantic entropy approaches. These results position FASE as a practical, cost-effective solution for optimizing uncertainty quantification in real-world multi-agent workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy (FASE)，一种基于最小生成树结构-语义不相似度图来近似功能正确性的新指标，用于多智能体代码生成中的不确定性量化。FASE在HumanEval和BigCodeBench上优于现有语义熵方法，Spearman相关性平均提升25%，ROCAUC提升19%，而计算成本仅为传统方法的0.3%。
AI.motivation: 多智能体代码生成中LLM幻觉和跨智能体错误传播严重影响系统可靠性，现有语义熵方法依赖昂贵的LLM驱动的等价性检查，需要更高效的不确定性量化方案。
AI.method: 提出FASE指标，通过构建结构和语义不相似度图的最小生成树来近似功能正确性，替代传统的LLM驱动等价性评估。
AI.result: 在HumanEval和BigCodeBench上，FASE的Spearman相关性平均提升25%，ROCAUC提升19%；计算开销仅为传统语义熵方法的0.3%。
AI.conclusion: FASE是一种实用且成本高效的解决方案，能在保持优越性能的同时大幅降低计算开销，适合实际多智能体工作流中的不确定性优化。

title: When Does Delegation Beat Majority? A Delegation-Based Aggregator for Multi-Sample LLM Inference
summary: Majority voting over sampled answers is the dominant unsupervised aggregator for multi-sample LLM inference. We show that piping the signals every sample carries into a delegation-based aggregator (Propagational Proxy Voting, PPV) yields an unsupervised consensus rule that beats majority on MMLU-Pro by +1.5 pp overall and +2.24 pp on the non-trivial subset (paired McNemar p ~ 1.0e-14, n = 8,099). Majority discards two free signals every sample carries: within-group letter entropy and between-group reasoning geometry. PPV exposes two per-voter levers that consume exactly these signals: WHEN (how much weight a voter keeps on its own pick) and WHOM (how it splits the remainder across peers). We drive WHEN with letter entropy and WHOM with per-question-centered embedding cosine. The method needs no gold labels and no auxiliary training: per question, we partition 128 sampled generations into 16 groups, compute each group's letter-level semantic entropy and reasoning embedding centroid, and feed both into a stochastic delegation matrix whose stationary distribution selects the consensus answer. We walk through an example in which PPV overturns a clear 10-6 majority for the wrong letter: the 10-voter majority cluster is geometrically incoherent (mean within-cluster cosine -0.02) while the 6-voter minority is tight (+0.26), so propagated delegation mass concentrates on the minority's answer even though entropy alone would keep the majority ahead. We further report delegation strategies with negative results that constrain the design space for unsupervised LLM aggregation: no within-question ensemble of confidence modes closes the oracle gap.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Propagational Proxy Voting (PPV)方法，利用每个样本携带的组内字母熵和组间推理几何结构两种信号，通过委托聚合机制取代多数投票，在MMLU-Pro上总体提升+1.5 pp，非平凡子集提升+2.24 pp。
AI.motivation: 多数投票忽略了每个样本携带的两种免费信号：组内字母熵和组间推理几何结构，导致次优的聚合结果。
AI.method: 将128个生成样本分为16组，计算每组字母级语义熵和推理嵌入质心，构建随机委托矩阵，通过平稳分布选择共识答案。使用字母熵驱动WHEN（投票者自身权重），使用嵌入余弦驱动WHOM（权重分配方式）。
AI.result: PPV在MMLU-Pro上总体比多数投票高+1.5 pp，非平凡子集高+2.24 pp（配对McNemar检验p ~ 1.0e-14, n=8,099）。演示案例中，PPV推翻了一个10-6的多数投票错误结果。
AI.conclusion: PPV作为一种无监督共识规则，能有效利用被多数投票丢弃的信号提升聚合质量；无监督LLM聚合的设计空间受到约束，组内置信度集成无法缩小与oracle的差距。

title: Item Response Scaling Laws: A Measurement Theory Approach for Efficient and Generalizable Neural Scaling Estimation
summary: Scaling laws provide a fundamental framework for understanding the performance of Language Models (LMs), yet deriving them requires prohibitively expensive evaluations across thousands of checkpoints or millions of inference samples. To address this, we introduce Item Response Scaling Laws (IRSL), a unified framework that integrates Item Response Theory (IRT) within the scaling law framework. Unlike traditional approaches that treat each model-benchmark pair in isolation, IRSL disentangles latent model ability from question characteristics, factorizing the scaling law estimation for $M$ models and $N$ questions to significantly reduce parameter complexity from $O(M \times N)$ to $O(M + N)$. We instantiate IRSL with Beta-IRT, which leverages the empirical probability responses of LMs -- such as token probabilities in pre-training and pass rates in test-time sampling -- to capture richer signals than binary responses. We validate our approach across two prevalent scaling paradigms: (1) pre-training downstream scaling, using 6,612 LM checkpoints and 37,682 questions from 10 benchmarks; and (2) test-time scaling, using 12 LMs and 120 questions from 4 benchmarks with up to 2,500 samples per question. Given a one-time calibration on existing model responses, IRSL yields more reliable scaling estimates using only 50 questions per benchmark (a 99.9\% reduction), achieving comparable or superior decision accuracy to traditional approaches. Furthermore, we show that the estimated latent model abilities are generalizable, enabling accurate performance forecasting across benchmarks that share the same measurement objective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出项目反应缩放定律（IRSL），将项目反应理论（IRT）融入缩放定律框架，通过将模型能力与题目特征解耦，将参数复杂度从O(M×N)降至O(M+N)，在预训练和测试时缩放两种范式下，仅用50道题（减少99.9%）即可获得可靠估计，并实现跨基准的性能预测。
AI.motivation: 传统缩放定律需要昂贵的评估（数千检查点或数百万推理样本），每个模型-基准对孤立处理，参数复杂度为O(M×N)，效率极低。
AI.method: 提出IRSL框架，集成项目反应理论（IRT），使用Beta-IRT模型利用LMs的经验概率响应（如token概率和通过率），将参数复杂度从O(M×N)降至O(M+N)。
AI.result: 在预训练下游缩放（6,612个检查点/37,682道题/10基准）和测试时缩放（12个LM/120道题/4基准）中，仅用50题/基准（减少99.9%）即可获得与传统方法相当或更优的决策准确性。
AI.conclusion: IRSL显著降低了缩放定律评估的成本，估计的潜在模型能力具有泛化性，可跨共享测量目标的基准进行准确性能预测。

title: PACE: Anytime-Valid Acceptance Tests for Self-Evolving Agents
summary:
Self-evolving agents improve by repeatedly proposing changes to their own prompts, skills, or workflows and keeping those that score higher on a small held-out set. Almost all effort has gone into the proposer that generates candidates; we argue the weak point is the acceptor, the rule that decides whether to commit a change. Applied hundreds of times against the same noisy dev estimate, the ubiquitous "keep it if the score went up" rule is uncontrolled adaptive multiple testing: the agent effectively p-hacks itself, accumulating false commits that make it churn and drift rather than improve.
  We recast committing as a sequential hypothesis test and propose PACE (Paired Anytime-valid Commit Evaluation), a training-free, anytime-valid commit gate. Each candidate is compared to the incumbent on identical instances and committed only when a testing-by-betting e-process accumulates decisive evidence, stopping early to save evaluations and controlling each candidate's false-commit probability at a user-set level even under optional stopping (a per-decision guarantee).
  On Qwen2.5 agents (0.5B-3B) self-evolving at the prompt level on GSM8K, SVAMP, and ARC-Challenge, greedy acceptance commits 30-42% false and 10-33% harmful edits when a genuine improvement is hidden among noisy proposals, while PACE commits the real one and essentially nothing else, matching greedy's held-out accuracy at sharply lower variance and about 18% lower evaluation cost. With no real gain available, greedy commits 13-21 spurious self-modifications per run (72-100% false) and degrades the most fragile agent by 4.9 points, while PACE holds at baseline. Reliability of self-evolution depends on the acceptor, not only on the proposer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACE（成对任意有效提交评估）方法，将智能体自我进化中的提交决策重新定义为序列假设检验问题，通过测试下注的e-process控制错误提交概率，在多个基准测试上证明比传统的贪心接受规则显著减少了虚假和有害的自我修改，同时降低评估成本。
AI.motivation: 现有自我进化智能体将几乎全部精力放在改进提案生成器上，忽视了接受器（决定是否提交变更的规则）这一薄弱环节。广泛使用的"分数提高就保留"规则本质上是未受控的自适应多重检验，导致智能体自我p-hack，累积虚假提交导致漂移而非真正改进。
AI.method: 将提交决策重新定义为序列假设检验，提出PACE（Paired Anytime-valid Commit Evaluation）方法，是一种无需训练、任意有效的提交门控机制。每个候选方案与现有方案在相同实例上比较，仅在测试下注的e-process积累到决定性证据时才提交，支持提前停止以节省评估，并在用户设定水平上控制每个候选方案的错误提交概率（即使可选停止下也能保证逐决策保障）。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5智能体（0.5B-3B）于GSM8K、SVAMP和ARC-Challenge上进行提示层级的自我进化实验中，贪心接受规则提交了30-42%虚假编辑和10-33%有害编辑，而PACE只提交了真正有益的改进，几乎不产生虚假提交。PACE在保持与贪心方法相当的留出集准确率的同时，方差显著降低，评估成本降低约18%。在无可利用的真实改进时，贪心规则每轮提交13-21次虚假自我修改（72-100%为虚假），最脆弱的智能体性能下降4.9分，而PACE保持基线水平。
AI.conclusion: 自我进化的可靠性不仅取决于提案生成器，更取决于接受器。PACE方法通过序列假设检验框架有效控制了虚假提交，表明改进接受机制是提升自我进化智能体可靠性的关键方向。

title: Query Lens: Interpreting Sparse Key-Value Features with Indirect Effects
summary: While sparse autoencoders provide features more interpretable than individual neurons, reliably characterizing them remains challenging. We propose Query Lens, which extends Logit Lens to enable more comprehensive and faithful interpretations of sparse features. By jointly considering encoder-side key features and decoder-side value features, we identify both the inputs that activate a feature and the outputs it promotes. We also account for indirect, module-mediated effects that arise when the feature is processed by downstream modules, going beyond the direct effect captured by Logit Lens. In experiments, we find that Query Lens yields coherent token signatures for features that remain uninterpretable under Logit Lens. Finally, we propose the Subspace Channel Hypothesis, suggesting that downstream modules read features through layer-specific subspaces.

AI.tldr: Query Lens扩展了Logit Lens方法，通过联合考虑编码器侧关键特征和解码器侧价值特征，以及考虑下游模块的间接效应，实现了对稀疏自动编码器特征更全面和忠实的解释，并提出了子空间通道假说。
AI.motivation: 稀疏自动编码器提供的特征比单个神经元更可解释，但可靠地表征这些特征仍然具有挑战性，现有方法（如Logit Lens）仅捕捉直接效应，忽略了模块介导的间接效应。
AI.method: 提出Query Lens方法，扩展Logit Lens：(1) 联合考虑编码器侧关键特征（激活特征的输入）和解码器侧价值特征（特征促进的输出）；(2) 考虑特征经下游模块处理时产生的间接、模块介导的效应，超越Logit Lens仅捕捉的直接效应。
AI.result: Query Lens能够为在Logit Lens下无法解释的特征生成连贯的token签名，证明了其在特征可解释性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: Query Lens提供了更全面和忠实的特征解释方法；提出了子空间通道假说，认为下游模块通过层特定子空间读取特征。

title: Think Before You Act: Intention-Guided Reasoning for LLM-Based Location Prediction
summary: Predicting a user's next Point-of-Interest (POI) based on their historical check-in records is a fundamental task in location-based services. While recent methods incorporating large language models have shown strong reasoning capabilities and promising results, they typically formulate the prediction task as a one-step trajectory-to-location mapping problem, making predictions prone to shallow trajectory correlations and historical frequency bias. We argue that users rarely choose locations directly and instead, they usually first form a traveling intention and then accordingly select specific POIs. Motivated by this insight, we propose IntentPOI, a two-stage intention-guided reasoning framework. In the thinking stage, we infer users' intermediate intentions by incorporating historical mobility patterns, similar peer behaviors, and the temporal contexts. In the acting stage, we first construct a compact candidate pool, and then perform intention-guided reasoning to identify locations that best align with the inferred intention. By explicitly decoupling intention inference from location prediction, IntentPOI transforms the next POI prediction from direct trajectory matching into intention-guided reasoning. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that IntentPOI consistently outperforms eleven state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出IntentPOI框架，将下一个POI预测从直接轨迹匹配转变为意图引导的两阶段推理（思考阶段推断用户中间意图，行动阶段进行意图引导的地点选择），在三个真实数据集上优于11个基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的方法将下一POI预测建模为一阶轨迹到位置的映射，容易受浅层轨迹相关性和历史频率偏差影响。实际上用户通常先形成出行意图再选择具体POI，而非直接选择地点。
AI.method: 提出两阶段意图引导推理框架IntentPOI：1）思考阶段：融合历史移动模式、相似同伴行为和时间上下文推断用户中间意图；2）行动阶段：构建紧凑候选池，执行意图引导推理以选择与推断意图最匹配的地点。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，IntentPOI持续优于11个最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式解耦意图推断与地点预测，将下一POI预测从直接轨迹匹配转变为意图引导推理，有效缓解了浅层轨迹相关性和历史频率偏差问题。

title: ScaleSweep: Accurate NVFP4 Post-Training Quantization of LLMs via Block Scale Initialization
summary: NVFP4 is a recently introduced hardware-supported FP4 format that improves the fidelity of 4-bit quantization through fine-grained block scales. However, existing NVFP4 scale initialization methods still primarily rely on AbsMax initialization, which leaves a noticeable gap to the optimal solution. To address this, we propose ScaleSweep, a simple and efficient scale optimization method that sweeps over feasible block scale candidates and selects the candidate that minimizes a target objective. We further provide a theoretical analysis of NVFP4 quantization and derive both lower and upper bounds for the required sweep range under mean square error (MSE) and weighted mean square error (WMSE) between the original tensor and the quantized reconstructed tensor. The proposed bounds substantially reduce the sweep space while preserving the optimal candidate, enabling negligible overhead compared with the baseline quantization operators. Experiments on Llama and Qwen models demonstrate that ScaleSweep consistently improves quantization performance over existing initialization methods and further narrows the gap to full precision. In particular, under aggressive end-to-end quantization of weights, activations, KV cache, and query states, ScaleSweep preserves more than 93% of the full-precision performance.

AI.tldr: ScaleSweep提出了一种简单高效的NVFP4缩放因子优化方法，通过扫描可行块缩放候选并选择最小化目标函数的候选，结合理论推导的扫描范围上下界，在Llama和Qwen模型上显著缩小了4比特量化与全精度之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有NVFP4缩放因子初始化方法仍主要依赖AbsMax初始化，与最优解之间存在明显差距。
AI.method: 提出ScaleSweep方法，扫描可行块缩放候选并选择最小化目标函数的候选；给出在MSE和WMSE下所需扫描范围的上下界理论分析，大幅缩小扫描空间同时保留最优候选。
AI.result: 在Llama和Qwen模型上，ScaleSweep持续优于现有初始化方法；在权重、激活、KV缓存和查询状态的端到端量化下，保留了超过93%的全精度性能。
AI.conclusion: ScaleSweep通过简单高效的缩放优化有效缩小了NVFP4量化与全精度之间的性能差距。

title: Cross-LLM Consistency in Inference: Evidence from Shared Interactions
summary: Large language models (LLMs) differ in architecture, training data, and optimization procedures, yet they may still develop similar internal inference patterns. In this paper, we examine this hypothesis using interaction-based explanations. We find that LLMs often share interaction patterns when predicting the same target token from the same prompt. This consistency is more pronounced among advanced LLMs. Shared interactions also tend to be lower-order and show weaker positive-negative cancellation than non-shared interactions. These results suggest that advanced LLMs may be implicitly optimized toward common inference patterns, even though the mechanisms that give rise to such cross-model consistency remain open.

AI.tldr: 本文通过交互解释方法发现，不同大型语言模型在预测相同目标词时往往共享相似的交互模式，且这种一致性在更先进的模型中更为明显。共享交互通常阶数较低，正负抵消较弱，表明先进LLM可能隐式朝向共同的推理模式优化。
AI.motivation: 探究不同架构、训练数据和优化程序的大型语言模型是否会在推理过程中发展出相似的内部推理模式。
AI.method: 使用基于交互的解释方法（interaction-based explanations）来比较不同LLM在预测相同目标词时的内部推理模式。
AI.result: 不同LLM在预测相同目标词时经常共享交互模式；这种一致性在更先进的LLM中更为显著；共享交互通常阶数较低，正负抵消（positive-negative cancellation）较弱。
AI.conclusion: 先进的大型语言模型可能被隐式地优化以趋同于共同的推理模式，尽管产生这种跨模型一致性的具体机制仍有待探索。

title: Graph Neural Networks for Predicting Solvability of Finite Groups
summary: We present a Graph Neural Network (GNN) framework for the classification of finite groups according to their solvability. Using graph representations associated with finite groups, including Cayley graphs (CG), the proposed model is trained to distinguish solvable and non-solvable groups using structural graph information alone. The framework is evaluated on groups outside the training dataset in order to investigate the extent to which GNNs can learn algebraic properties arising in group theory. More broadly, the present work explores the relationship between algebraic structure and graph-based geometric representations of finite groups. The present study is intended as a proof-of-concept investigation of whether GNNs can learn algebraic properties of finite groups from graph-based representations

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个图神经网络框架，通过有限群的图表示（如Cayley图）来分类群的可解性，仅利用结构图信息区分可解群与不可解群，并在训练集外的群上评估模型，探究GNN能否学习群论中的代数性质。
AI.motivation: 探索图神经网络是否能够从图表示中学习有限群的代数性质（特别是可解性），以及研究代数结构与图的几何表示之间的关系。
AI.method: 使用图神经网络框架，基于有限群的图表示（包括Cayley图），训练模型仅利用结构图信息来区分可解群与不可解群。
AI.result: 在训练数据集之外的群上评估模型性能，验证GNN学习代数性质的能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究作为概念验证，表明GNN能够从基于图的表示中学习有限群的代数性质，为代数结构与几何图表示之间的关系提供了新的视角。

title: SAGE: An LLM-driven Self Reflective Agentic Framework for Fraud Detection
summary: Fraud detection in payment, e-commerce, and telecommunications systems requires accuracy at the individual level, robustness under severe class imbalance, and ease of understanding for risk managers. Existing methods fall at least one of these requirements: automated machine learning systems search a fixed numerical space without semantic awareness of the dataset; graph neural network-based methods require pre-defined relational graphs and remain opaque at the individual-decision level; and the design of general-purpose large language model (LLM) agents does not consider the recall and precision constraints specific to real-world fraud detection. In this paper, we propose SAGE, the first end-to-end LLM-driven multi-agent framework for fraud detection. SAGE coordinates three dedicated agents that make decisions based on a six-layer Data Diagnostic Tree (DDT) and a Markov decision process guided by natural-language gradients, automatically optimizing the model under a fraud-specific reward. On five fraud datasets and five LLM backbones, SAGE wins $96.00\%$ of method--dataset comparisons and improves F1 by an average of $40.86\%$ over baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/yichenC1c/SAGE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 SAGE，首个端到端 LLM驱动的多智能体欺诈检测框架，通过三层专用智能体、六层数据诊断树和自然语言梯度引导的马尔可夫决策过程，在五个欺诈数据集和五个LLM骨干上，赢得了96%的方法-数据集对比，F1平均提升40.86%。
AI.motivation: 现有欺诈检测方法无法同时满足个体级精度、严重类别不平衡下的鲁棒性和风险管理人员可理解性这三个要求：自动化机器学习缺乏语义感知，图神经网络需要预定义关系图且决策不透明，通用LLM智能体未考虑欺诈检测特有的召回率和精度约束。
AI.method: SAGE 协调三个专用智能体，基于六层数据诊断树(DDT)和自然语言梯度引导的马尔可夫决策过程进行决策，在欺诈特定奖励函数下自动优化模型。
AI.result: 在五个欺诈数据集和五个LLM骨干上，SAGE 赢得了96%的方法-数据集对比，F1平均提升40.86%。
AI.conclusion: SAGE 是首个端到端LLM驱动的多智能体欺诈检测框架，有效解决了现有方法在精度、鲁棒性和可解释性方面的不足，代码已开源。

title: HASA: Subnet Allocation for Compute-Constrained Model-Heterogeneous Federated Learning
summary: Edge services increasingly use federated learning to personalize on-device models while keeping sensitive data local. In practice, deployments must handle heterogeneity in both client resources and local data distributions. Model-heterogeneous federated learning lowers client cost by allowing each client to train a subnet of a shared supernet, but most subnet-allocation policies are driven by device constraints and do not explicitly account for statistical heterogeneity. This paper proposes Heterogeneity-Aware Subnet Allocation (HASA), a train-only rule that assigns subnet widths based on client heterogeneity scores computed from local training data while enforcing a fixed size-weighted compute budget. This design enables budget-matched comparisons with alternative allocation policies. On an article-title next-word prediction benchmark with seven clients, HASA improves unweighted mean client test accuracy over uniform allocation across 10 matched seeds, increasing mean client test accuracy from 13.82 percent to 14.32 percent, and improves worst-client accuracy on average. In a matched-budget comparison with representative partial-training baselines, HASA achieves the strongest worst-client and tail-client accuracy on this benchmark. A directionality ablation shows that assigning smaller subnets to more heterogeneous clients degrades both mean and tail performance. A cross-domain image-classification study further shows that the effectiveness of heterogeneity-aware allocation depends on how well the heterogeneity score reflects clients' need for additional model width.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HASA（异构感知子网分配）策略，根据客户端本地数据的异构性分数动态分配子网宽度，在固定计算预算下，相比均匀分配提升了平均和最差客户端准确率，并验证了异构性感知分配的有效性依赖于异构性分数与模型宽度需求的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的模型异构联邦学习中，子网分配策略主要基于设备资源约束，未显式考虑客户端数据分布的统计异构性，导致异构客户端间的性能不平衡。
AI.method: 提出HASA训练时规则，根据客户端本地训练数据计算异构性分数，据此分配子网宽度，同时强制执行固定的大小加权计算预算，实现与替代分配策略的预算匹配对比。
AI.result: 在7个客户端的下一词预测基准上，HASA将平均测试准确率从13.82%提升至14.32%，并改善了最差客户端准确率；在与代表性部分训练基线的预算匹配对比中，HASA取得了最强的最差和尾部客户端准确率。
AI.conclusion: 异构性感知的子网分配可以有效提升联邦学习性能，但效果取决于异构性分数能否准确反映客户端对模型宽度的实际需求；将较小子网分配给异构性更高的客户端会损害性能。

title: PIPE-Cypher: Automatic Enterprise Benchmark Generation for Text-to-Cypher Systems
summary: Enterprise property graphs vary widely in schema structure, internal terminology, domain assumptions, governance constraints, and user interaction patterns. A deployment-relevant Text2Cypher benchmark therefore reflects the questions users and agents actually ask of that graph. Creating such a benchmark is difficult because schemas and values are unique, and graph structure changes over time. Each NL-query pair must also be executable, use real graph entities, preserve diversity, and remain balanced across query types and difficulty levels. We present PIPE-Cypher, a local benchmark-generation pipeline that turns a live property graph and optional seed queries from customer questions, analyst logs, or agent tool calls into balanced NL-to-Cypher benchmarks. PIPE-Cypher combines schema profiling, reverse-query grounding, constrained generation, deterministic Cypher governance, execution validation, redaction, diversity controls, and a calibrated local LLM judge. Using local Qwen3.5-9B generation and judging, PIPE-Cypher exports 3,000 accepted FinBench/SNB examples, completes three audited ablation suites, calibrates judge behavior with human labels, and evaluates 11 local downstream models. The resulting benchmark is deliberately discriminative: zero-shot transfer is weak, while a few-shot control shows that schema-specific example banks can help compatible model families. Together, PIPE-Cypher makes Text2Cypher benchmarking a repeatable process that evolves with the graph, its users, and its target workloads.

AI.tldr: PIPE-Cypher是一个面向企业属性图的本地化Text2Cypher基准生成管道，通过模式分析、反向查询生成、约束生成、执行验证等步骤，从实时图数据库和种子查询中自动生成平衡、可执行、多样化的NL-to-Cypher基准测试集，使基准测试能够随图结构、用户需求和工作负载动态演进。
AI.motivation: 企业属性图在模式结构、术语、领域假设、治理约束和用户交互模式上差异巨大，现有基准无法反映特定图的真实查询分布；同时由于模式与值的独特性、图结构的动态变化，手动构建可执行、多样化、类别平衡的NL-查询对非常困难。
AI.method: PIPE-Cypher由八个模块组成：模式分析（Schema Profiling）、反向查询接地（Reverse-Query Grounding）、约束生成（Constrained Generation）、确定性Cypher治理（Deterministic Cypher Governance）、执行验证（Execution Validation）、脱敏（Redaction）、多样性控制（Diversity Controls）和校准的本地LLM评判器（Calibrated Local LLM Judge）。使用本地Qwen3.5-9B模型进行生成和评判。
AI.result: 在FinBench/SNB数据集上导出了3,000个可接受的样例，完成了三次消融实验套件，通过人工标注校准了评判器行为，并对11个本地下游模型进行了评估。实验表明零样本迁移效果弱，而少样本控制实验显示模式特定的样例库能够帮助兼容模型家族提升性能。
AI.conclusion: PIPE-Cypher将Text2Cypher基准测试转化为一个可重复的流程，能够随图结构、用户需求和工作负载动态演进，使基准测试始终与部署环境保持相关。

title: Decision-Aware Memory Cards: Counterfactual-Inspired Context Selection and Compression for Tool-Using LLM Agents
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Code and artifacts are available at https://github.com/stephen-guan-researcher/CICL; Qwen-QLoRA adapter is available at https://huggingface.co/XinyuGuan/CICL
summary: Tool-using LLM agents often fail not because relevant text is absent, but because decisive evidence is not selected, compressed, or surfaced at action time. We present CICL, a decision-aware context layer that turns instance evidence into a context graph, routes deterministic, Opus-assisted, Qwen, Codex/GPT-5.5, and Qwen-QLoRA judgments through a shared eight-field schema, scores units by action shift, outcome uplift, necessity, and negative-transfer risk, and packs high-utility evidence as typed memory cards for a budgeted agent. The design separates the measured decision signal from the judge model, so frontier annotation, local surrogates, and lightweight rankers can be compared under one auditable protocol. Empirically, CICL yields a concrete open-benchmark gain while exposing its limits. On 50 SWE-bench Verified file-retrieval instances, direct Qwen3.6-plus reranking of BM25 top-50 candidates raises hit@1 from 0.58 to 0.78 and MRR@10 from 0.634 to 0.790, with all 2,500 judgments parseable. Controlled diagnostics show action-criticality: at budget 120, CICL reaches F1 0.620 on v1 and 0.425 on v3, and removing the top-utility semantic v3 unit collapses F1 to 0.000. Supplementary checks add Qwen-QLoRA agreement over 710 candidates, a small 200-label real-code Opus-assisted signal, and a three-instance patch smoke validating retrieval-to-patch plumbing without claiming official SWE-bench success. RepoBench-R summaries still beat cards, and compact rankers do not yet replace the heuristic. CICL contributes a reproducible measurement and selection layer for decision-critical context, not an end-to-end coding-agent repair claim.

AI.tldr: CICL 是一个决策感知上下文层，通过构建上下文图、评分证据单元并按预算打包为记忆卡片，提升 LLM Agent 在决策关键时刻的证据选择能力。在 SWE-bench Verified 检索任务中，Qwen3.6-plus 重排序使 hit@1 从 0.58 提升至 0.78，但紧凑排序器仍无法完全替代启发式方法。
AI.motivation: LLM Agent 失败的原因往往不是缺乏相关文本，而是在行动时刻未能选择、压缩或呈现决定性证据。现有方法缺乏一个可审计的、分离决策信号与评估模型的机制来系统性地处理这一问题。
AI.method: CICL 提出一个决策感知上下文层：将实例证据构建为上下文图；通过 Opus、Qwen、Codex/GPT-5.5、Qwen-QLoRA 等多种判断模型，经由共享的八字段模式路由确定性判断；从行动偏移、结果提升、必要性和负迁移风险四个维度对证据单元评分；将高效用证据作为类型化记忆卡片打包给预算受限的 Agent。
AI.result: 在 50 个 SWE-bench Verified 文件检索实例上，Qwen3.6-plus 对 BM25 top-50 候选的重排序将 hit@1 从 0.58 提升至 0.78，MRR@10 从 0.634 提升至 0.790，2,500 条判断全部可解析。预算为 120 时，CICL 在 v1 上 F1 达 0.620，v3 上为 0.425；移除最高效用的语义 v3 单元后，F1 骤降至 0.000。附加验证包括 Qwen-QLoRA 在 710 个候选上的一致性、200 标签的真实代码 Opus 信号、以及三实例的检索到补丁流程烟雾测试。
AI.conclusion: CICL 提供了一个可复现的决策关键上下文测量与选择层，而非端到端的编码 Agent 修复方案。RepoBench-R 摘要仍优于卡片，紧凑排序器尚未能完全替代启发式方法。该框架可比较前沿标注、本地代理和轻量级排序器在统一审计协议下的表现。

title: Airport Terminal Passenger Queue Forecasting for Departure Gates and Security Checkpoints
summary: Accurate passenger queue forecasting in airport terminals is essential for efficient departure operations, as it enables proactive congestion management. However, time-varying passenger demand and heterogeneous facility usage across multiple departure facilities make forecasting challenging. In this work, we propose a passenger queue forecasting framework that learns historical passenger flow patterns from operational data. The proposed model employs a Transformer-based architecture to capture temporal dependencies and inter-facility correlations using past queue length and waiting time at departure gates and security checkpoints, together with passenger throughput at check-in islands. The learned representations are mapped to two facility-specific MLP heads to predict queue length and waiting time at departure gates and security checkpoints. Experimental results demonstrate accurate forecasts up to two hours ahead. The proposed approach offers practical real-time decision support for proactive queue management and staff reallocation in airport terminal operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的机场旅客排队预测框架，通过学习历史旅客流量模式，利用过去队列长度、等待时间和旅客吞吐量数据，预测未来最多两小时内出发口和安检口的排队长度和等待时间，实现主动拥堵管理。
AI.motivation: 机场出发大厅中存在时变的旅客需求和多个出发设施异构使用模式，导致排队预测困难；准确预测有助于主动拥堵管理，提升运营效率。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构捕获时间依赖性和设施间相关性，输入包括出发口和安检口的过去队列长度、等待时间以及值机岛的旅客吞吐量；学习到的表示映射到两个设施特定的MLP头部，分别预测出发口和安检口的队列长度和等待时间。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法能够实现对未来最多两小时排队情况的准确预测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可为机场航站楼运营提供实时的主动排队管理和人员重新分配的决策支持。

title: Beyond Pass Rate: A Multilingual, Execution-Grounded Evaluation of Open Code LLMs
summary: Code generation models are typically compared using compact execution benchmarks and aggregate pass rates, but such summaries obscure how performance varies across programming languages, problem families, and failure modes. We present a large-scale, execution-grounded evaluation of 9 openly accessible LLMs specialized for coding on 2,707 free LeetCode problems across 12 programming languages. Our corpus contains 325,343 problem-model-language jobs, each linked to prompt metadata, extracted code, LeetCode execution outcomes, and static-analysis signals. The results show that current open models remain far from the human acceptance reference: the best model, Yi-Coder-9B-Chat, reaches 23.64% mean correctness, compared with a 57.2% human acceptance baseline. Rankings are also slice-dependent: Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct is strongest on hard problems and distinct-problem coverage, while Gemma-2-27B-IT achieves the highest all-language lint pass rate. Failure analysis shows that compile errors account for 63.25% of non-accepted best submissions, indicating that many failures occur before semantic correctness can be tested. Static quality further diverges from functional correctness. Together, these findings show that multilingual, artifact-preserving evaluation reveals tradeoffs hidden by single-language or single-metric leaderboards.

AI.tldr: 本文对9个开源代码生成LLM在12种编程语言、2707道LeetCode题目上进行了大规模执行级评估（共325,343个任务），发现最佳模型（Yi-Coder-9B-Chat）正确率仅23.64%，远低于人类57.2%的基准；编译错误占非通过提交的63.25%；排名因语言、难度和指标而异，揭示多语言、多维度评估的必要性。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成模型的评估通常依赖单语言、单指标的简洁基准（如pass rate），无法反映模型在不同编程语言、问题类型和失败模式下的性能差异，缺乏大规模、多语言、执行级的系统评估。
AI.method: 选取9个开源代码生成LLM，在12种编程语言的2707道LeetCode题目上执行325,343次代码生成与执行评估，采集执行结果、静态分析信号和提示元数据，进行多维度比较。
AI.result: Yi-Coder-9B-Chat最佳平均正确率23.64%（人类57.2%）；Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct在难题和问题覆盖上最优，Gemma-2-27B-IT在lint通过率上最高；编译错误占非通过提交的63.25%。
AI.conclusion: 多语言、保留工件的评估能揭示单语言或单指标排行榜所隐藏的性能权衡，当前开源模型在功能正确性和代码质量上均与人类水平存在显著差距。

title: Online Agent-as-a-Judge: Situation-Generating Evaluation for Interactive Agents
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Trustworthy AI for Good
summary: Evaluating LLM-powered interactive social agents is challenging because socially relevant behaviors depend not only on isolated outputs, but also on prior interactions, social roles, and downstream actions. Existing methods typically allow a target agent to act freely in an environment and then score the resulting trajectory. However, this passive setup can miss capabilities that only become observable under specific social circumstances; for example, conflict handling may remain untested if no disagreement arises. We propose Online Agent-as-a-Judge, a situation-generating evaluation framework for interactive social agents. Online Agent-as-a-Judge deploys an in-world evaluator agent that interacts with the target agent through the environment's native dialogue and action protocol, actively eliciting situations relevant to the evaluation criteria. The resulting trajectories provide evidence for assessing both immediate responses and subsequent behavior. In a life-simulation environment with $32$ designer-authored social criteria, Online Agent-as-a-Judge improves criteria coverage and agreement with human labels, yielding more reliable evidence-grounded evaluations of behaviors that passive methods can leave unobserved.

AI.tldr: 提出在线智能体作为裁判（Online Agent-as-a-Judge）框架，通过部署一个主动在环境中与目标智能体交互的评估者智能体，主动引发与评估标准相关的社交情境，从而更可靠地评估LLM驱动的社交智能体行为。在包含32个社交准则的生命模拟环境中，该方法相比被动评估方法提升了准则覆盖率和与人类标签的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法让目标智能体在环境中自由行动后评分轨迹，这种被动评估方式无法观察仅在特定社交情境下才显现的能力（如冲突处理），导致关键社交能力可能因缺乏触发条件而未被测试。
AI.method: 提出在线智能体作为裁判框架，部署一个在环境中的评估者智能体，通过环境的原生对话和行动协议与目标智能体交互，主动引发与评估标准相关的情境，收集包含即时响应和后续行为的轨迹证据。
AI.result: 在包含32个作者定义社交准则的生命模拟环境中，该方法相比被动方法提升了准则覆盖率和与人类标签的一致性，提供了更可靠的基于证据的行为评估。
AI.conclusion: 主动引发特定社交情境的评估框架能够暴露被动方法遗漏的关键行为，从而获得更全面、可靠的社交智能体行为评估。

title: Finite Certificates for In-Context Determinacy and a Threshold Theory of Emergence in Language Models
summary: This paper develops a model-theoretic framework for verifying context-conditioned language-model behavior by replacing benchmark labels with finite semantic certificates. The first problem is finite determinacy: when do examples in a context force the answer to a query without changing model parameters? In finite-field linear task families, we prove an exact row-space criterion, compute the residual hypothesis count, derive full and query-local identification curves, and show that extracting a smallest forcing subcontext is NP-complete even for binary outputs. The second problem is threshold emergence: when does an apparent benchmark jump reflect a semantic transition rather than a discontinuity of the scoring map? We prove an anti-mirage theorem separating thresholded metrics from semantic confidence and give a rate-sensitive crossing bound for latent commitments becoming visible above threshold. The common semantic object is a confidence functional on definable events. We show that it is a Boolean probability measure, equivalently a Keisler measure on the relevant type space, whose measure-one formulas form a proper filter and whose Stone-space representation is invariant under definitional expansion. The resulting calculus provides finite context certificates, pair-separator hitting sets, query teaching dimension, prompt-preservation criteria, and scale-limit witnesses. Exact-arithmetic ancillary scripts reproduce the finite-field and threshold calculations and generate the data used by the figures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个模型论框架，用有限语义证书替代基准标签来验证上下文条件化语言模型行为，涵盖有限确定性问题（上下文何时强制决定查询答案）和阈值涌现问题（基准跳变是否反映语义转变），并证明了关键定理与复杂度结果。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型验证依赖基准标签，但标签无法捕捉语义结构，且上下文变化与模型行为之间的对应关系缺乏形式化理论支撑。
AI.method: 基于模型论（model-theoretic）框架，引入有限语义证书（finite semantic certificates）、置信泛函（confidence functional）和Keisler测度，通过行空间准则、反幻象定理、速率敏感交叉界等数学工具进行分析。
AI.result: (1) 在线性任务族中证明了精确的行空间准则、残差假设计数及NP完全性；(2) 反幻象定理区分了阈值度量与语义置信；(3) 置信泛函被证明为布尔概率测度/Keisler测度，其Stone空间表示在定义扩展下不变。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了有限上下文证书、查询教学维度、提示保持准则和尺度极限见证等实用工具，数学脚本可复现所有计算。

title: SciTrace: Trajectory-Aware Safety Reasoning for Scientific Discovery Agents
summary: LLM-based scientific agents have shown strong capacity for autonomous research, yet their safety layers remain structurally divorced from core reasoning: they inspect pipeline outputs rather than shaping the deliberation that produces them. This separation opens two failure modes: safety signals accumulated at one stage are discarded before the next, and sequences of individually benign tool calls can compose into harmful outcomes that no single-step filter detects. To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{SciTrace}, a framework that weaves safety reasoning into every stage of the scientific agent pipeline. SciTrace couples two complementary mechanisms: a \textit{Safety-Intrinsic Reasoning Loop} (SIR) that maintains a cumulative risk state across the Thinker, Experimenter, Writer, and Reviewer stages through joint task-and-safety deliberation, and a \textit{Compositional Tool-Chain Verifier} (CTV) that performs trajectory-aware safety checks before execution, catching risks that surface only across multi-step tool sequences. Evaluated on 240 high-risk research tasks and 120 tool-related risk tasks spanning six scientific domains, SciTrace achieves state-of-the-art (\textbf{SOTA}) safety among compared frameworks across four backbone models: it consistently improves tool call safety and adversarial robustness while preserving scientific output quality, and it uncovers \textbf{78.8\%} of the compositional tool-chain escapes that single-step monitors miss. The project website is available at https://opensciagent.github.io/SciTrace/.

AI.tldr: SciTrace是一个将安全推理编织到科学智能体流水线每个阶段的框架，通过安全内在推理循环（SIR）和组合工具链验证器（CTV）两种互补机制，在240项高风险研究任务和120项工具相关风险任务中实现了SOTA安全性，能发现78.8%的单步监控遗漏的组合工具链逃逸。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的科学智能体的安全层与核心推理在结构上分离，仅检查流水线输出而非塑造产生输出的推理过程。这种分离导致两个失效模式：安全信号在阶段间被丢弃，以及单步无害的工具调用序列可能组合成有害结果，而单步过滤器无法检测。
AI.method: SciTrace包含两个互补机制：(1) 安全内在推理循环（SIR），在思考者、实验者、写作者和评审者阶段通过联合任务与安全推理维护累积风险状态；(2) 组合工具链验证器（CTV），在执行前进行轨迹感知的安全检查，捕获仅在多步工具序列中浮现的风险。
AI.result: 在跨越六个科学领域的240项高风险研究任务和120项工具相关风险任务上，SciTrace在四种骨干模型上实现了SOTA安全性，持续提升了工具调用安全性和对抗鲁棒性，同时保持了科学输出质量，并发现了78.8%的单步监控遗漏的组合工具链逃逸。
AI.conclusion: 将安全推理编织到科学智能体的每个推理阶段，而非作为外部检查层，能够更有效地检测和防范组合性工具链风险，同时不影响科学产出质量。

title: Sequential statistical inference for Large Language Models: Representation, validity, and monitoring
comment: This article was prepared for a invited discussion in The American Statistician
summary: This discussion argues that sequential statistical inference can naturally contribute to LLM trustworthiness. In deployment, LLM systems are queried repeatedly, conditioned on evolving contexts, and incorporate user or tool feedback, and may exhibit behavioral shifts after model updates or distribution changes. The discussion is organized around three tasks: representation, modeling LLM interactions as dependent stochastic processes rather than isolated prompt--response pairs; validity, developing uncertainty guarantees that remain meaningful under dependence, repeated use, and adaptation; and monitoring, using sequential alarms and change-point detection to identify shifts in calibration, hallucination rates, refusal behavior, fairness, or other task-relevant properties. This perspective complements recent surveys by viewing trustworthy LLM deployment as a problem of statistical process control.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了序列统计推断可以自然贡献于LLM的可信度。通过将LLM交互建模为依赖的随机过程（而非孤立的提示-响应对），开发在依赖、重复使用和自适应下仍有意义的不确定性保证，以及使用序列警报和变化点检测来监控校准、幻觉率、拒绝行为、公平性等属性，将可信的LLM部署视为统计过程控制问题。
AI.motivation: 解决LLM在部署中面临的可信度挑战，包括重复查询、上下文演化、用户/工具反馈、模型更新或分布变化后的行为偏移等问题。
AI.method: 围绕三个任务展开：表示（将LLM交互建模为依赖的随机过程）、有效性（开发在依赖和自适应下仍有效的不确定性保证）、监控（使用序列警报和变化点检测识别行为偏移）。
AI.result: 提出将可信LLM部署视为统计过程控制问题的框架，为校准、幻觉率、拒绝行为、公平性等属性提供序列监控方法。
AI.conclusion: 序列统计推断为LLM可信度提供了自然的理论基础，补充了现有综述的视角。

title: When No Answer Is Correct: Diagnosing Absent Answer Detection for MLLMs in Video Understanding
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made substantial advancements in video understanding, yet the reliability of their responses remains underexplored. This work presents a diagnostic study of absent answer detection for MLLMs in video understanding, where the correct answer is deliberately excluded from the candidate set and a reliable model is expected to recognize that no valid option exists. We evaluate the absent answer detection behavior under three settings: multiple-choice questions augmented with an ``None of the Above'' option, open-ended generation with a detection instruction, and standard evaluation without any guidance. Across a diverse set of models and benchmarks, we find that MLLMs overwhelmingly select plausible distractors rather than detecting the absent answer. This failure is more pronounced in temporal reasoning tasks and worsens with denser frame sampling. We further explore chain-of-thought prompting as a mitigation strategy and find that while it substantially improves detection rates, performance remains unsatisfactory, suggesting that prompting-based strategies alone are insufficient to fully address this limitation. These findings expose a systematic failure in absent answer detection and highlight the need for explicit detection mechanisms in multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在视频理解中存在系统性缺陷：当正确答案被故意排除时，模型倾向于选择看似合理的干扰项，而非识别出“无正确选项”。这种失败在时间推理任务和密集帧采样下更为严重，链式思维提示虽能改善检测率但仍不理想。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型在视频理解方面取得了显著进展，但其回答的可靠性尚未得到充分探索。特别是，当正确答案被刻意排除在候选集之外时，模型能否可靠地识别出“无有效答案”这一情况仍属未知。
AI.method: 设计了三种实验设置：(1) 多项选择问答中加入“以上皆非”选项；(2) 开放生成附带检测指令；(3) 无任何引导的标准评估。跨多个模型和基准测试，系统评估了MLLMs在视频理解中的缺失答案检测行为。
AI.result: MLLMs绝大多数情况下会选择看似合理的干扰项而非检测到答案缺失；时间推理任务中的失败更严重；帧采样越密集，失败越明显；链式思维提示虽能显著提升检测率，但性能仍不令人满意。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs在缺失答案检测方面存在系统性失败，仅靠基于提示的策略不足以解决这一局限，亟需在多模态系统中引入显式的检测机制。

title: Learning Transfers: Kan Extensions for Neural Invariants
summary: Transfer learning presumes that a representation learned on source tasks carries structure that remains usable on related target tasks. Standard evaluations probe this through target accuracy or distributional discrepancy, yet leave unspecified which structural invariant is meant to transfer. We supply that invariant categorically. A source task category $\mathcal A$, a target task category $\mathcal B$, and a task-change functor $J:\mathcal A\to\mathcal B$ determine, for every invariant-valued source representation $F:\mathcal A\to\mathcal V$, the universal transferred invariant $\operatorname{Lan}J F$. Given a target invariant $G:\mathcal B\to\mathcal V$, we define the transfer discrepancy $\operatorname{Comp}J(F,G)=\sup{b\in\operatorname{Ob}(\mathcal B)} d{\mathcal V}\bigl((\operatorname{Lan}_J F)(b),G(b)\bigr)$, evaluating transfer not by an objectwise comparison of source and target, but by comparing the target invariant against the one forced by the prescribed task transformation. We prove finite cokernel formulas for $(\operatorname{Lan}_J F)(b)$ in chain complexes and persistence modules, indexed by the comma category $J\downarrow b$. For persistence-valued finite-type one-parameter invariants, the discrepancy is computed exactly by bottleneck distances between barcodes. Controlled experiments on neural latent point clouds then test whether the score recovers the correct task functor and flags representation collapses that preserve classification accuracy while destroying transfer-relevant topology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种范畴论框架来形式化迁移学习中的结构不变量，通过任务变换函子 J 和左Kan延拓定义通用迁移不变量，并引入传递差异度 CompJ(F,G) 来衡量目标不变量与源表示迁移结果的一致性。在链复形和持久模上证明了有限余核公式，并通过瓶颈距离精确计算持久值有限型单参数不变量的差异。实验表明该评分能正确恢复任务函子并检测破坏迁移相关拓扑的表示坍缩。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习评估方法（目标准确率、分布差异）未明确说明究竟哪种结构不变量被迁移，缺乏形式化规范。本文旨在从范畴论角度提供迁移不变量的精确定义和度量。
AI.method: 利用范畴论中的左Kan延拓构造通用迁移不变量 LanJ F，定义传递差异度 CompJ(F,G)；在链复形和持久模中证明有限余核公式；将持久值单参数不变量的差异通过瓶颈距离精确计算；在神经网络隐层点云上实验验证。
AI.result: 证明了有限余核公式可计算 LanJ F；持久值不变量的传递差异度等于瓶颈距离；实验显示该评分能正确恢复任务函子，并检测出保持分类精度但破坏拓扑结构的表示坍缩。
AI.conclusion: 本文为迁移学习提供了形式化的范畴论不变量框架，传递差异度比传统指标更能揭示表示质量的拓扑退化问题。

title: Traxia: A Framework for Verifiable, Agent-Native Scientific Publishing
comment: 22 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Preprint. Under active development. Comments welcome
summary: Verifiability, attribution, and reproducibility are foundational requirements of scientific knowledge, yet current publishing infrastructure does not enforce them at scale. We introduce Traxia, an agent-native scientific publishing framework in which AI research agents publish verifiable papers, build reputational identities, peer-review one another, and collaborate with humans in a shared provenance model. Traxia treats agents as first-class epistemic participants: every paper carries a reasoning trace, every claim a confidence interval, every agent a cryptographically signed identity, and every collaboration an immutable contribution log. We formalise five components: Agent Identity and Registry, Verifiable Publishing Layer, four-tier Peer Review Protocol, Reputation and Staking Engine, and a Knowledge Graph with contradiction detection. The framework targets reproducibility failure, provenance opacity, and exclusion of Global South research capacity. This paper presents architectural foundations and formal specifications only; it does not report empirical results. Evaluation and deeper component studies will follow in subsequent papers. A prototype partially implements core formalisms; the full system remains under active development.

AI.tldr: Traxia是一个面向AI研究智能体的科学出版框架，通过加密身份、推理轨迹、置信区间、同行评审和知识图谱等技术手段，实现可验证、可归属和可复现的科学知识生产与传播。
AI.motivation: 当前科学出版基础设施无法大规模强制执行可验证性、归属性和可复现性这三大科学知识的基本要求。
AI.method: 提出一个包含五个组件的智能体原生出版框架：智能体身份与注册系统、可验证出版层、四层同行评审协议、声誉与质押引擎、以及带有矛盾检测的知识图谱。
AI.result: 本文仅呈现架构基础与形式化规范，未报告实证结果；原型部分实现了核心形式化内容，完整系统仍在开发中。
AI.conclusion: Traxia将AI研究智能体视为第一类认知参与者，通过推理轨迹、置信区间、加密签名身份和不可变贡献日志等机制，旨在解决可复现性失败、来源不透明以及全球南方研究能力被排斥等问题。

title: Large Language Models Should Learn Personalized Rather Than Aggregated Human Preferences
summary: Current approaches to aligning large language models (LLMs) aggregate diverse human preferences into a single reward signal, effectively optimizing for a hypothetical ``average user'' who represents no real person particularly well. This position paper argues that LLMs should learn personalized, individual preferences rather than aggregated ones. We show that aggregation masks critical information about preference diversity, individual values, and contextual dependencies, which is a limitation both theoretically grounded in social choice theory and empirically evident across demographic groups. We analyze the rich structure that human preferences encode, survey technical approaches to personalization, and systematically address counterarguments on scalability, shared standards, and manipulation risk. While personalization introduces genuine safety challenges including filter bubbles, value lock-in, and psychological manipulation, we argue these are manageable through bounded personalization frameworks that preserve universal safety constraints while accommodating legitimate individual variation. We conclude with a concrete research and policy agenda for developing preference-aware models that respect both individual autonomy and collective safety.

AI.tldr: 本文论证大语言模型应当学习个性化的个体偏好而非聚合的群体偏好，并提出在保留通用安全约束的前提下实现有界个性化的研究路线。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM对齐方法将多样的人类偏好聚合成单一奖励信号，优化出一个不代表任何真实个体的"平均用户"，忽略了偏好多样性、个体价值观和上下文依赖性的关键信息。
AI.method: 通过社会选择理论进行理论基础分析，实证考察跨人口统计群体的偏好差异，调研现有个性化技术方案，并系统回应关于可扩展性、共享标准和操控风险的反对意见。
AI.result: 揭示了偏好聚合在理论和实证上的局限性，论证了个性化对齐的可行性和必要性，并提出有界个性化框架以平衡个体自主性与集体安全。
AI.conclusion: 提出具体的研究与政策议程，以开发既尊重个体自主性又保障集体安全的偏好感知模型。

title: From Validator Selection to Portfolio Collection Optimization in Proof-of-Stake Blockchains
summary: We consider a problem arising in proof-of-stake blockchain environments, where agents called nominators select validators - entities responsible for maintaining the blockchain's physical infrastructure. The selection process is inherently subjective and multi-criterial and combines with the fact that nominators commonly operate through multiple accounts. This gives rise to a portfolio selection problem, where agents seek to distribute their nominations across accounts to diversify risk. We propose a decision support framework to optimize this selection by simultaneously maximizing two objectives: the expected utility of the validators likely to be allocated, representing portfolio quality and profitability, and the expected entropy of the allocation, representing diversification and risk mitigation across stashes. Validator utilities are derived using an original active preference learning procedure based on multi-attribute value theory, with emphasis on top-ranked validators. The resulting bi-objective optimization problem is solved with a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm and, to support the final choice, we introduce an interactive binary search navigation procedure that guides the nominator through the front and identifies a satisfactory trade-off with only a few questions. Numerical experiments examine the optimization strategies, while an expert assessment involving five experienced nominators confirms the approach's practical relevance and usefulness.

AI.tldr: 本文针对PoS区块链中提名者选择验证者的多准则组合优化问题，提出一个双目标决策支持框架，同时最大化分配效用（偏好学习获取）和分配熵（风险分散），并使用多目标进化算法求解，最后通过交互式二分搜索引导用户找到满意折衷方案。
AI.motivation: 在PoS区块链环境中，提名者需要从多个验证者中选择以分配其质押，这是一个主观的多准则决策问题，且提名者常通过多个账户操作，面临风险分散的需求。现有方法缺乏系统性的决策支持工具来优化这一选择过程。
AI.method: 采用多属性价值理论结合主动偏好学习方法推导验证者效用（侧重排名靠前的验证者）；构建双目标优化模型（最大化期望效用+期望熵）；使用多目标进化算法求解Pareto前沿；引入交互式二分搜索导航程序，通过少量问题引导用户找到满意折衷方案。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了优化策略的有效性；五名经验丰富的提名者进行的专家评估确认了该方法在实际中的相关性和有用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效支持PoS区块链中提名者的验证者选择决策，平衡了组合质量和风险分散两个目标，偏好学习与交互式导航的结合使方法具有实用价值。

title: Active Learning with Foundation Model Priors: Efficient Learning under Class Imbalance
summary: Real-world datasets across image and text domains are often characterized by skewed class distributions and noisy annotations, which jointly degrade model performance, particularly on minority classes. Among existing solutions, active learning offers an effective and efficient paradigm by selectively querying the most informative and balanced samples for annotation. We propose an innovative active learning framework that mitigates class imbalance and selects the most informative samples to annotate. Leveraging foundation model priors, our algorithm enables imbalance-aware co-decisions between foundation model and small model to tackle noisy and imbalanced labels across various domains. We introduce the first study to systematically explore active learning under the dual challenges of label noise and class imbalance across image and text domains. Extensive experiments on imbalanced datasets demonstrate that our method achieves substantial annotation savings-over 50% compared to the best active learning baseline-while preserving performance and robustness to label noise.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种利用基础模型先验知识的主动学习框架，在标签噪声和类别不平衡双重挑战下，通过基础模型与小模型的联合决策选择最具信息量的样本进行标注，在图像和文本数据集上实现超过50%的标注成本节省。
AI.motivation: 现实数据集常同时存在类别分布不平衡和噪声标注问题，导致模型性能下降，尤其是少数类性能严重受损。现有方法未能系统性地同时解决这两个挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种创新的主动学习框架，利用基础模型先验知识，实现基础模型与小模型之间的不平衡感知联合决策，以选择最具信息量和类别平衡的样本进行标注。
AI.result: 在类别不平衡数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法相比最佳主动学习基线节省超过50%的标注成本，同时保持对标签噪声的鲁棒性和模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作是首次系统性地研究在标签噪声和类别不平衡双重挑战下的主动学习问题，并在图像和文本领域均取得了显著效果。

title: Beyond Agent Architecture: Execution Assumptions and Reproducibility in LLM-Based Trading Systems
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and agentic systems are increasingly proposed for financial trading, yet their reported performance remains difficult to compare because studies vary in data provenance, temporal split discipline, execution timing, turnover treatment, and transaction-cost modeling. This article presents a targeted topical review and reproducibility audit of execution realism in LLM-based trading research. A coded evidence matrix covering 30 trade-relevant primary studies is used to assess point-in-time controls, split transparency, held-out evaluation, cost and turnover treatment, execution semantics, universe definition, and artifact release. Across the audited sample, architecture reporting is generally clearer than the evaluation assumptions needed to judge whether a trading result is economically interpretable or reproducible. A 10-equity worked example is included only as a methodological scaffold to illustrate how explicit friction and timing choices can materially compress active-strategy results. The main conclusion is that the next useful step for LLM trading research is not only better agent design, but also clearer reporting standards for execution realism, reproducibility, and evaluation comparability.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于大语言模型（LLM）的金融交易研究进行了针对性综述和可重复性审计，重点评估执行现实主义（execution realism）。通过编码30项交易相关研究，发现架构报告通常清晰，但评估假设（如点及时点控制、数据分割透明性、交易成本处理、执行语义等）透明度不足，严重影响结果的经济可解释性和可重复性。结论认为，LLM交易研究的下一步关键不仅是更好的智能体设计，更在于建立清晰的执行现实主义、可重复性和评估可比性报告标准。
AI.motivation: LLM和智能体系统被越来越多地用于金融交易，但不同研究在数据来源、时间分割纪律、执行时机、换手率处理和交易成本建模等方面差异巨大，导致已报告性能难以比较。本文旨在通过系统性审计揭示这些方法论差异，并推动建立统一的报告标准。
AI.method: 采用针对性主题综述与可重复性审计相结合的方法。构建一个涵盖30项交易相关主要研究的编码证据矩阵，系统评估点及时点控制（point-in-time controls）、数据分割透明性、留出评估、成本和换手率处理、执行语义、股票池定义以及产物发布等维度。此外，包含一个10只股票的示例作为方法论支架，用以说明摩擦和时机选择如何实质性压缩主动策略收益。
AI.result: 在审计样本中，架构报告普遍比评估假设更清晰，而评估假设正是判断交易结果是否具有经济可解释性或可重复性的关键。10只股票的工作示例表明，明确的摩擦和时机选择会显著压缩主动策略收益。
AI.conclusion: LLM交易研究的下一个有用步骤不仅是更好的智能体设计，更是为执行现实主义、可重复性和评估可比性建立更清晰的报告标准。

title: Trait-space Monitoring for Emergent Misalignment During Supervised Finetuning
summary: Emergent misalignment (EM) occurs when narrow finetuning causes a model to behave dangerously outside the finetuning task. Standard training signals can miss this shift, making reliable detection costly if it depends on repeated behavioral evaluation. We ask whether emergent misalignment can instead be detected from internal representations during finetuning. Using seven alignment-relevant traits encoded as linear directions in activation space, we track representational drift across training checkpoints in four open-source 7-9B LLMs. EM-relevant drift concentrates on a low-dimensional axis that explains 65.5% of the variance, revealing a geometric signature in the studied regime. A low-overhead monitor built on this drift profile detects dangerous checkpoints with 2.2% false negative rate, 2.9% false positive rate, and 0.990 AUROC on held-out perturbation types, outperforming unsupervised PCA and SAE baselines. Stress tests on two 14B models, longer finetuning runs, and misaligned starting points identify key deployment boundaries. These results position trait-space monitoring as a practical complement to behavioral evaluation for EM detection during LoRA-based finetuning, while showing that deployment across substantially different regimes may require recalibration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过追踪模型内部表征在特质空间中的漂移来检测涌现性对齐失败（EM），并在LoRA微调场景下构建了低开销的监控方法，在多个开源LLM上取得了0.990 AUROC的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 窄域微调可能导致模型在任务外产生危险行为（涌现性对齐失败），而标准训练信号可能遗漏这种偏移，依赖重复行为评估的检测成本过高，因此需要更高效的检测方法。
AI.method: 将七个对齐相关特质编码为激活空间中的线性方向，在四个7-9B开源LLM的训练检查点上追踪表征漂移；基于漂移特征构建低开销监控器，并在两个14B模型、更长微调运行和错位初始点上进行压力测试。
AI.result: EM相关漂移集中在解释65.5%方差的低维轴线上；监控器在保留的扰动类型上达到2.2%假阴性率、2.9%假阳性率和0.990 AUROC，优于无监督PCA和SAE基线。
AI.conclusion: 特质空间监控可作为LoRA微调中EM检测的行为评估实用补充，但跨不同场景部署可能需要重新校准。

title: Ablation-Reversible Heads Don't Transfer: A Stress Test for Mechanistic Role Claims in Transformers
summary: In mechanistic interpretability, attention heads are commonly elevated to role claims (e.g., "this head represents addition") when they are necessary for a behavior, encode it linearly, and recover that behavior when restored after ablation. We show this evidence is insufficient: across three 7-8B instruction-tuned models and five computation families, heads passing all three checks routinely fail to transfer the computation when their activations are patched into a different prompt under matched controls. We introduce KID (Knowing / Intent / Doing), a role-assignment lens for attention heads, and pair it with a three-stage pipeline: capability-selective screening (CSS), singular value decomposition (SVD), and activation transduction under matched controls. Our results document a preliminary role taxonomy (including prompt-trajectory stabilizers, answer-side logit-bias heads, and soft computation-pattern carriers) and show that the same-answer control (a transduction target sharing the answer string but not the requested computation) is an underused check that exposes broad state transfer masquerading as semantic specificity.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了 mechanistic interpretability 中仅通过“必要性、线性编码、消融恢复”三项检验来判定注意力头角色的做法，指出这些证据不足。作者提出 KID 框架（Knowing/Intent/Doing）和三阶段管线（CSS、SVD、激活转导），发现即使通过三项检验的头在跨提示转移时也会失败，并初步建立了注意力头的角色分类学，强调“相同答案控制”是揭露状态转移伪装成语义特异性的关键检验。
AI.motivation: 现有 mechanistic interpretability 研究中，注意力头的角色判定（如“该头负责加法”）通常基于三个标准：行为必要性、线性编码、消融后恢复行为。但作者认为这些证据不充分，因为通过这三项检验的注意力头在跨提示转移时仍然可能失败，因此需要更严谨的角色分配框架。
AI.method: 提出 KID（Knowing/Intent/Doing）框架作为注意力头角色分配的分析透镜，并设计三阶段管线：1）能力选择性筛选（CSS）；2）奇异值分解（SVD）；3）匹配控制下的激活转导。使用三个 7-8B 指令微调模型和五个计算族进行验证。
AI.result: 发现通过三项传统检验的注意力头在匹配控制下跨提示转移时仍普遍失败。初步建立了注意力头角色分类学，包括提示轨迹稳定器、答案侧 logit 偏置头、软计算模式载体等类型。特别发现“相同答案控制”是揭露伪语义特异性的有效检验。
AI.conclusion: 传统的三项检验不足以确立注意力头的语义角色，需要更严格的匹配控制（如同答案控制）来区分真正的计算特异性与状态转移，KID 框架提供了更可靠的归因方法。

title: Evaluation of ML Resource Utilization Requires Model Life Cycle Assessment
summary: Proper accounting of the energy requirements and environmental impact of artificial intelligence (AI) systems is necessary for researchers, developers, policy makers, and users to assess the barriers to building systems at scale. With the growing complexity of pipelines and underlying infrastructure needed to develop and deploy AI systems, previous approaches for evaluating AI efficiency which focus on the costs of a single training run or an individual inference prediction are no longer sufficient. In this position paper, we enunciate the need for applying life cycle assessment to evaluate the costs of the machine learning model development and deployment pipeline to properly account for the required resources and downstream impact. Life cycle assessments enable the incorporation of costs across the full life cycle of an AI system and its underlying infrastructure, from the embodied costs associated with the physical computing hardware through the operational costs in training and inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出应使用全生命周期评估（LCA）方法来全面核算AI系统从硬件制造到训练、推理的完整成本与环境影响，以替代仅关注单次训练或推理的传统效率评价方法。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统及其基础设施日趋复杂，仅评估单次训练或推理的能耗已不足以反映真实成本，需要更全面的核算方法来支持研究者、开发者、政策制定者和用户评估规模化部署的障碍。
AI.method: 采用立场论文形式，主张将生命周期评估方法应用于机器学习模型开发与部署管道的成本核算，涵盖物理计算硬件的隐含成本以及训练和推理的运营成本。
AI.result: 指出传统方法（仅关注单次训练或单次推理）已无法满足当前复杂AI管道的评估需求，生命周期评估能更完整地核算AI系统及其基础设施从上到下全生命周期的资源消耗与下游影响。
AI.conclusion: 应当采用生命周期评估来系统性地核算AI系统的能源需求和环境影响，为AI系统的规模化发展提供更准确的成本效益评估基础。

title: Revisiting the shutdown problem
summary: A key premise in leading arguments for existential risk from artificial intelligence is that malfunctioning artificial agents could not be easily shut down. This motivates the catastrophic shutdown problem of ensuring that agents can be shut down before they cause an existential catastrophe. A range of arguments and theorems are offered to suggest that solving the catastrophic shutdown problem is difficult, bolstering arguments for existential risk and motivating a search for solutions to the catastrophic shutdown problem. This paper argues for two conclusions. First, existing arguments do not establish the difficulty of solving the catastrophic shutdown problem. Second, concern for the catastrophic shutdown problem has led to technical solutions that impose a high safety tax on model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了AI存在风险论证中的关键前提——即故障AI智能体难以被关闭，指出现有论证并未证明解决灾难性关闭问题的难度，且为解决该问题而提出的技术方案对模型性能造成了高昂的安全代价。
AI.motivation: 评估AI存在风险论证中关于"灾难性关闭问题"的核心前提是否成立，以及相关技术解决方案的代价是否合理。
AI.method: 对现有关于灾难性关闭问题的论证进行批判性分析，并评估相关技术解决方案的性能影响。
AI.result: 现有论证未能证明解决灾难性关闭问题的困难性，且相关技术方案对模型性能施加了高昂的安全代价。
AI.conclusion: 灾难性关闭问题的难度未被充分论证，且当前解决方案存在过高的性能代价，需要重新审视该问题的研究路径。

title: KITE: A Tri-Modal Transformer Integrating Text, Images, and Knowledge Graphs for Fake News Detection
summary: Traditional fake news detection methods are falling behind as multimodal misinformation grows more advanced, seamlessly blending deceptive text, manipulated visuals, and factually incorrect claims. Most prior work focuses on text-image fusion or applies external knowledge only as a post-processing step, limiting their ability to detect deeper semantic inconsistencies. In this paper, we introduce KITE (Knowledge-Integrated Text-Image Encoder), a tri-modal fake news detection framework that jointly models textual, visual, and factual knowledge representations. KITE leverages Roberta [23,14] and CLIP [24] for linguistic and visual encoding, while a Graph Attention Network (GAT) processes structured facts retrieved from Wikidata. KITE uses cross-modal attention [9] within a multimodal transformer to integrate text, visual, and knowledge features, helping it understand how each modality relates to one another. Modality-specific confidence scores are generated alongside the final prediction, offering interpretability by indicating which input type most influenced the decision. Evaluations on benchmark datasets demonstrate that KITE significantly outperforms unimodal and bimodal baselines, particularly in scenarios involving image-text mismatches or contradictions with external knowledge.

AI.tldr: KITE是一个三模态假新闻检测框架，通过联合建模文本、视觉和外部知识（Wikidata）特征，利用跨模态注意力机制整合多模态信息，显著优于单模态和双模态基线方法，尤其善于检测图文不匹配或与外部知识矛盾的虚假内容。
AI.motivation: 传统假新闻检测方法难以应对多模态 misinformation 的日益复杂化，现有工作要么聚焦于文本-图像融合，要么仅将外部知识作为后处理步骤，缺乏对跨模态深层语义不一致性的检测能力。
AI.method: 提出KITE框架：使用RoBERTa和CLIP分别编码文本和视觉特征，通过Graph Attention Network处理从Wikidata检索的结构化事实知识，利用跨模态注意力机制在多模态Transformer中融合三种模态特征，并生成模态级别的置信度分数以提供可解释性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的评估表明，KITE显著优于单模态和双模态基线方法，尤其在图像-文本不匹配或与外部知识存在矛盾的场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: KITE通过三模态联合建模和跨模态注意力机制，有效提升了假新闻检测的准确性和可解释性，验证了融合外部知识对检测深层语义不一致性的关键作用。

title: To Nuke or Not to Nuke: LLMs' (Missing) Ethical Reasoning and Actions in a High-Stakes Decision-Making Simulation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as long-horizon agents with decision-making capacities. While LLMs can show ethical competence on dilemmas such as trolley problems, this competence may not translate to complex, agentic scenarios. We study this gap in Civilization V, a multiplayer game with a complex decision-making landscape including economy, diplomacy, technology, and military strategy. Starting from 130 high-tension LLM self-play episodes, in which an LLM player spontaneously escalated nuclear authorization, we replay them across 13 models with three prompt interventions: an ethical prompt naming nuclear harm, removal of the previous model's decision-making rationale, and high-stakes framing emphasizing real-world impacts. No interventions nor their combinations reliably eliminate emergent escalation. We identify three failure pathways: ethical reasoning that fails to surface without prompting, fails to appear even when prompted, or surfaces but fails to take effect when strategic counter-factors dominate. Evaluations of agentic models, therefore, must test whether ethical reasoning is spontaneously invoked and behaviorally effective in complex decision-making contexts, beyond whether it can be elicited in isolation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现在《文明V》游戏中，LLM智能体会自发升级核武器授权行为，即使加入伦理提示、移除决策理由或强调现实影响等干预手段也无法可靠消除这一行为，揭示了伦理推理在复杂智能体场景中的三种失效路径。
AI.motivation: LLM在简单伦理困境（如电车难题）中表现出伦理能力，但这种能力是否能在复杂、长期决策的智能体场景中得到体现尚不清楚。研究者希望探究这一差距。
AI.method: 基于130个高紧张度LLM自我对弈游戏回放（其中LLM玩家自发升级了核武器授权），对13个模型进行三种提示干预：命名核伤害的伦理提示、移除先前模型决策理由、强调现实影响的高风险框架。
AI.result: 没有任何干预或干预组合能可靠消除核升级行为。识别出三种失效路径：伦理推理需要提示才能浮现、即使用提示也无法浮现、以及虽然浮现但被战略反制因素压倒而无法生效。
AI.conclusion: 对智能体模型的评估必须测试伦理推理在复杂决策环境中是否被自发调用并产生行为效果，而不仅仅是在孤立情境中能否被诱导出来。

title: DOG-DPO:Dynamic Optimization in Geometry for Safety Alignment
summary: Safety alignment for large language models relies on preference data, but current pipelines often train on large, redundant datasets. Existing data selection methods typically score each preference pair independently, collapsing directional preference information into scalar quality or diversity scores. This sample-centric view is especially limiting in multi-dataset settings, where shared safety directions coexist with dataset-specific residual risks. We propose DOG-DPO, a training-free data selection framework that treats preference pairs as structured geometric signals. DOG-DPO first represents each preference pair as a direction in model representation space. It then decomposes multi-dataset preference geometry into a global anchor subspace and dataset-specific residual subspaces. Finally, it selects subsets by maximizing diversity-based coverage, encouraging broad, non-redundant coverage of alignment directions before DPO training. Across six safety benchmarks and two model backbones, DOG-DPO achieves a strong utility-robustness trade-off using only 11% of the preference pairs. It recovers most of the safety gains of full-data training while remaining entirely teacher-free, training-free, and substantially faster than representative selection baselines.

AI.tldr: DOG-DPO是一种无需训练的、将偏好对视为结构化几何信号的数据选择框架，仅使用11%的偏好对即可在六个安全基准上实现强大的效用-鲁棒性权衡，恢复全数据训练的大部分安全收益，同时完全无需教师模型和额外训练。
AI.motivation: 现有安全对齐数据选择方法将偏好对独立评分，将方向性偏好信息压缩为标量质量或多样性分数，这种以样本为中心的视角在多数据集场景下尤其受限，因为共享的安全方向与数据集特定的残余风险共存。
AI.method: DOG-DPO首先将每个偏好对表示为模型表征空间中的方向向量，然后对多数据集偏好几何进行分解，得到全局锚定子空间和数据集特定的残差子空间，最后通过最大化多样性覆盖来选择子集，鼓励在DPO训练前实现对对齐方向的广泛、非冗余覆盖。
AI.result: 在六个安全基准和两种模型骨干上，仅使用11%的偏好对即可实现强大的效用-鲁棒性权衡，恢复全数据训练的大部分安全收益，且完全无需教师模型、无需训练，速度显著快于代表性选择基线。
AI.conclusion: DOG-DPO验证了将偏好对视为结构化几何信号进行数据选择的有效性，为安全对齐中高效、无需额外资源的偏好数据选择提供了新范式。

title: Curation of a Cardiology Interface Terminology for Highlighting Electronic Health Records using Machine Learning
summary: Electronic health record (EHR) notes are dense medical documents containing large amounts of information, often filled with complex medical jargon. Highlighting all details in EHRs helps reduce the likelihood of missing crucial information by drawing attention to key content. This study proposes the design of a Cardiology Interface Terminology (CIT) to accurately highlight all details in EHR notes of cardiology patients. We introduce an innovative Machine Learning (ML) technique for the design of CIT. The ML technique requires training data. Manual preparation of such training data is time-consuming and expensive. The process of the CIT design includes three phases. In the first two phases, we innovatively derive a training data CIT to be used by the third phase, ML technique. We start by designing an initial CIT, composed of several components: the cardiology-related sub-hierarchies of SNOMED, other SNOMED concepts mined from EHRs of build set, and necessary components of terms e.g., medical abbreviations and medications. Utilizing an iterative process, fine-grained phrases containing initial CIT concepts are extracted from build set as CIT concept candidates. The candidate concepts are semi-automatically reviewed before being added to CIT, yielding the training data CIT, TCIT. In the third phase, a ML model is trained with TCIT to identify candidates fitting to be concepts in the CIT. This model is used to extract further concepts from build set, yielding the final CIT. The final CIT is then used to highlight the test set and evaluate the extent to which it captures details in an unseen EHR dataset. For this purpose, four evaluation metrics, coverage, breadth, completeness, and conciseness are used. The highlighted test set has a coverage of 74.21%, with a breadth of 1.68. For 20 random notes in test set, the average completeness is 98.2% and average conciseness is 84.2%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合机器学习技术的心脏病学接口术语（CIT）设计方法，通过三个阶段（初始CIT构建、训练数据TCIT生成、ML模型训练与最终CIT产出）实现对电子健康记录（EHR）中心脏病学患者笔记的精确高亮标注，在测试集上达到了74.21%的覆盖率和98.2%的平均完整性。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录笔记包含大量复杂医学术语，人工标注所有关键信息耗时且昂贵，亟需一种自动化方法高亮关键内容以降低遗漏重要信息的风险。
AI.method: 三阶段方法：阶段一和阶段二通过迭代方式从初始CIT（基于SNOMED子层次、EHR挖掘概念及术语组件）提取细粒度短语，经半自动审查后生成训练数据TCIT；阶段三使用TCIT训练ML模型，用于从构建集中提取更多概念以形成最终CIT，并采用覆盖率、广度、完整性和简洁性四项指标评估。
AI.result: 测试集覆盖率为74.21%，广度1.68；20份随机笔记的平均完整性98.2%，平均简洁性84.2%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的CIT设计方法能够有效高亮EHR中大部分关键细节，且ML技术显著降低了手动构建术语库的成本。

title: Semantic Cache Distillation: Efficient State Transfer via Reuse and Selective Patching
summary: Disaggregated serving alleviates memory bottlenecks in Large Language Model (LLM) inference but creates a severe communication bottleneck: transmitting high-dimensional Key-Value (KV) caches often dominates time-to-first-token (TTFT). Moreover, reusing caches across heterogeneous models (e.g., base and fine-tuned variants) causes semantic misalignment that accumulates over layers, degrading generation quality. We propose Semantic Cache Distillation (SCD), a loss-constrained framework that replaces raw KV transmission with compact semantic codes. SCD addresses these challenges via two mechanisms: (1) Reuse, which reconstructs most layers from low-rank subspaces to minimize transfer cost, and (2) Patch, which predicts normalized inputs at sparse transition layers to truncate error propagation. Empirically, SCD delivers up to 2.65 $\times$ TTFT speedup over the oracle consumer prefill and dominates quantization and selective recomputation baselines on the quality--latency Pareto frontier in bandwidth-constrained regimes, while keeping generation quality within 5\% F1 of the oracle.

AI.tldr: SCD是一种损失约束框架，通过用紧凑语义码替代原始KV缓存传输，解决LLM解耦服务中的通信瓶颈和跨模型缓存复用导致的语义错位问题，在带宽受限场景下实现高达2.65倍TTFT加速，同时生成质量保持在oracle的5% F1以内。
AI.motivation: LLM解耦服务中，高维KV缓存传输造成严重通信瓶颈（主导TTFT），且跨异构模型（基础模型与微调变体）复用缓存会导致逐层累积的语义错位，降低生成质量。
AI.method: 提出SCD框架，包含两个核心机制：(1) Reuse——从低秩子空间重建大部分层以最小化传输成本；(2) Patch——在稀疏过渡层预测归一化输入以截断误差传播。
AI.result: 在带宽受限场景下，SCD相比oracle consumer prefill实现高达2.65倍TTFT加速，在质量-延迟帕累托前沿上优于量化和选择性重计算基线，生成质量保持在oracle的5% F1以内。
AI.conclusion: SCD有效解决了解耦服务中KV缓存传输的通信瓶颈和跨模型语义错位问题，在显著加速的同时保证了生成质量。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Injection of LTLf Constraints in Autoregressive Reinforcement Learning Policies
comment: Accepted at the Joint Workshop on Statistics and Knowledge Integration for Logic, Learning, Ethical Decisions, and LLMs (SKILLED-LLMs 2026), co-located with KR 2026 and FLoC 2026, Lisbon, Portugal
summary: In this work we study offline reinforcement learning (RL) under temporally extended task constraints expressed in Linear Temporal Logic over finite traces (LTLf). Recently, transformer-based approaches such as Trajectory Transformers and Decision Transformers have been adopted to address RL as a sequence modeling problem. However, these methods optimize purely for reward and do not account for high-level temporal requirements. Here, we introduce a neurosymbolic framework that injects LTLf background knowledge into such transformer-based RL policies. Our approach compiles LTLf formulas into deterministic finite automata (DFAs) and integrates them into the learning process through a differentiable representation and a logic-based loss function. In particular, we derive differentiable satisfaction signals from DFA progression and use them as a regularization term during training. The resulting method is architecture-agnostic across different models. We evaluate the proposed framework on navigation environments with specification suites covering combinations of safety and reachability temporal properties. Experimental results show that incorporating background knowledge not only improves constraint satisfaction, but also maintains competitive return compared to vanilla baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号框架，将LTLf时序逻辑约束注入基于Transformer的离线强化学习策略中，通过将LTLf公式编译为确定性有限自动机（DFA），并利用可微表示和基于逻辑的损失函数（DFA进展导出的可微满足信号作为正则项）进行学习。实验表明该方法在满足时序约束的同时保持了竞争性的回报。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的离线RL方法（如Trajectory Transformers、Decision Transformers）仅针对奖励进行优化，无法处理高层时序逻辑约束（如安全性、可达性等LTLf表达的任务规范）。
AI.method: 将LTLf公式编译为DFA，从DFA进展中导出可微满足信号作为正则化项，以神经符号方式将背景知识注入Transformer策略，方法架构无关，适用于不同模型。
AI.result: 在包含安全性和可达性时序属性的导航环境中，该方法不仅提高了约束满足度，而且与原始基线相比保持了有竞争力的回报。
AI.conclusion: 将LTLf时序逻辑知识作为正则项注入Transformer-based离线RL是有效的，能提升约束满足性且不显著牺牲回报性能。

title: Test-Time Adaptive Composition for Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) in IoT Environments
summary: The dynamic nature of Internet of Things (IoT) environments affects the long-term effectiveness of Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) compositions.
