These probes are then refined through a dual-stage attention process: they first internalize task-specific intents via Instruction-Aware Self-Attention, and subsequently interrogate the projected temporal representations through Temporal Cross-Attention to extract salient patterns. Comprehensive experiments on seven real-world benchmarks show that InA-Probe consistently outperforms state-of-the-art deep learning and LLM-based baselines, excelling in both one-for-all generalization and zero-shot transfer while reducing forecasting error by up to 37\% in challenging cross-domain scenarios. Ablation studies further confirm that the synergy between adaptive querying and fine-grained instructions is key to unlocking the reasoning power of LLMs for complex time series.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InA-Probe框架，通过指令感知的主动探测机制，将LLM用于时间序列预测的范式从被动对齐转向主动推理，在多个基准上超越SOTA方法，误差降低最高达37%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM时序预测方法依赖被动模态对齐或静态任务重编程，难以捕捉细粒度的非平稳时序模式，也无法适应细微的任务意图差异。
AI.method: 提出InA-Probe框架，包含：(1) 多层级指令注入机制，注入全局任务目标和细粒度补丁级语义先验；(2) 自适应查询生成模块，产生受时序上下文动态调制的样本特定探测向量；(3) 双阶段注意力机制：指令感知自注意力内化任务意图，时序交叉注意力提取时序表征中的显著模式。
AI.result: 在7个真实世界基准上，InA-Probe在统一泛化和零样本迁移任务中均超越SOTA深度学习与LLM基线方法，在跨领域场景中预测误差降低高达37%。消融实验验证了自适应查询与细粒度指令的协同作用。
AI.conclusion: 指令驱动的主动探测范式相较于被动对齐能更有效释放LLM在复杂时序预测中的推理能力，自适应查询与细粒度指令的协同是关键。

title: Cutting LLM Evaluation Costs with SySRs: A Bandit Algorithm that Provably Exploits Model Similarity
summary: Large Language Models are typically benchmarked by evaluating every model on every test query. For practitioners seeking the best model to deploy, this is often wasteful: if a model clearly performs worse than others, there is no need to precisely estimate its performance. Best-arm identification algorithms can be naturally applied to drastically reduce costs by adaptively allocating evaluation budget. Further, language models often respond similarly to the same prompt-a property previous work has tried to leverage with mixed success. We propose Synchronized Successive Rejects (SySRs), augmenting the classical Successive Rejects algorithm with paired comparisons. Unlike prior attempts to leverage model similarity in best-model identification, our approach is hyperparameter-free and enjoys performance guarantees that improve with the degree of similarity between evaluated models. Empirically, our method outperforms all baselines in terms of average error rate across 15 standard benchmarks, and in terms of worst-case budget for reliably identifying the best model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Synchronized Successive Rejects (SySR)算法，通过配对比较增强经典Successive Rejects算法，在无需超参数的情况下利用模型间的相似性，高效识别最佳语言模型，显著降低评估成本。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试对所有模型评估所有查询，成本高昂且浪费。实践中，表现明显较差的模型无需精确评估，因此需要一种自适应分配预算的算法来降低评估成本。
AI.method: 提出SySR算法，在经典Successive Rejects算法基础上引入配对比较机制。利用语言模型对相同提示的响应相似性，无需超参数即可自适应分配评估预算，且性能保证随模型相似度提高而增强。
AI.result: 在15个标准基准测试中，SySR在平均错误率和最坏情况预算方面均优于所有基线方法，能够可靠识别最佳模型。
AI.conclusion: SySR有效利用模型相似性，在不引入额外超参数的前提下实现了更高效的模型选择，为大规模语言模型评估提供了实用的成本优化方案。

title: Towards Long-Horizon Vessel Trajectory and Destination Forecasting with Reasoning Large Language Models
comment: The IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2026, Naples, Italy
summary: Long-horizon maritime trajectory prediction is important for shipping management, logistics planning, and maritime risk analysis, yet month-level forecasting remains insufficiently studied. Existing deep learning methods mainly focus on short- and mid-term coordinate extrapolation and often struggle to preserve route feasibility and destination correctness over extended horizons. This paper investigates joint long-horizon vessel trajectory and destination forecasting with reasoning-capable large language models, and develops a Maritime LLM post-training framework based on Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR). An AIS-based benchmark is constructed with 60-day historical trajectories and 30-day forecasting horizons, where trajectories are converted into semantic textual representations for RL prompt construction. RLVR aligns LLMs with maritime forecasting objectives by enforcing physical validity, providing early-weighted trajectory supervision, and evaluating destination correctness through hierarchical matching and curriculum learning. Experimental results show that RLVR-trained LLMs substantially improve over zero-shot LLMs and representative deep learning baselines, especially on destination-related metrics. Among the evaluated RLVR-trained variants, 4B LLMs achieve the best overall performance, suggesting that reward-compatible optimization and task-specific capacity matching are more important than simply using larger 8B or 14B LLMs. The results also show that LSTM remains a strong deep learning baseline under limited fine-tuning data, while Transformer-style spatio-temporal models typically require larger datasets and richer structured inputs. Overall, this work advances semantic, verifier-aligned maritime forecasting for operational decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）的海事大模型后训练框架，用于60天历史轨迹预测未来30天的长周期船舶轨迹与目的地，实验表明4B参数的RLVR-trained LLM在目的地相关指标上优于零样本大模型和传统深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 月级别的长周期海事轨迹预测对航运管理、物流规划和风险分析至关重要，但现有深度学习方法主要聚焦短中期坐标外推，难以在长时间跨度下保持路径可行性和目的地正确性，该问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 构建基于AIS数据的60天历史+30天预测基准，将轨迹转换为语义文本表示用于RL提示构建；采用RLVR框架对齐LLM与海事预测目标，通过强化物理有效性、提供早期加权轨迹监督、以及分层匹配与课程学习评估目的地正确性来实现对齐。
AI.result: RLVR-trained LLM在目的地相关指标上显著优于零样本LLM和代表性深度学习基线；4B LLM取得最佳综合性能，优于8B和14B变体；LSTM在有限微调数据下仍是强基线，而Transformer式时空模型需要更大数据集和更丰富的结构化输入。
AI.conclusion: 奖励兼容优化和任务特定能力匹配比单纯使用更大规模模型更为重要，本文推动了语义化、验证器对齐的海事预测方法在运营决策支持中的应用。

title: Characterizing the Discrete Geometry of ReLU Networks
comment: Selected for an oral presentation at ICLR 2026. Tagged PDF, reviews, and discussions are available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=TgLW2DiRDG
summary: It is well established that ReLU networks define continuous piecewise-linear functions, and that their linear regions are polyhedra in the input space. These regions form a complex that fully partitions the input space. The way these regions fit together is fundamental to the behavior of the network, as nonlinearities occur only at the boundaries where these regions connect. However, relatively little is known about the geometry of these complexes beyond bounds on the total number of regions, and calculating the complex exactly is intractable for most networks. In this work, we prove new theoretical results about these complexes that hold for all fully-connected ReLU networks, specifically about their connectivity graphs in which nodes correspond to regions and edges exist between each pair of regions connected by a face. We find that the average degree of this graph is upper bounded by twice the input dimension regardless of the width and depth of the network, and that the diameter of this graph has an upper bound that does not depend on input dimension, despite the number of regions increasing exponentially with input dimension. We corroborate our findings through experiments with networks trained on both synthetic and real-world data, which provide additional insight into the geometry of ReLU networks. Code to reproduce our results can be found at https://github.com/bl-ake/ICLR-2026.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了全连接ReLU网络的分片线性区域构成的复形结构，证明了区域连接图的平均度不超过输入维度的两倍，且图的直径存在与输入维度无关的上界，尽管区域数量随维度指数增长。
AI.motivation: 尽管ReLU网络的线性区域数量已得到广泛研究，但这些区域如何连接（即区域复形的几何结构）仍知之甚少，且精确计算对于大多数网络而言是难以处理的。
AI.method: 通过理论证明分析全连接ReLU网络区域连接图的性质（平均度上界、直径上界），并结合合成数据和真实数据上的实验进行验证。
AI.result: 1) 区域连接图的平均度上界为输入维度的两倍，与网络宽度和深度无关；2) 图的直径存在一个与输入维度无关的上界，尽管区域数量随输入维度指数增长。
AI.conclusion: ReLU网络的区域连接图具有受限的局部连通性和全局结构，这些几何性质为理解网络行为提供了新的理论视角。

title: Extending Ontologies: From Dense Embeddings to Hybrid Quantum-Fuzzy Systems
summary: LLMs have revolutionized knowledge representation and retrieval, but lack the explicit modeling that knowledge ontologies possess. This paper surveys the ways that ontologies and knowledge graphs have been integrated with dense embedding algorithms. All hitherto attempts involve a trade-off between probabilistic and crisp inference. This paper proposes a novel frontier for devising knowledge representation systems that can simultaneously accommodate probabilistic and crisp inference in the same representation. To this effect, the paper proposes neuro-quantum-fuzzy systems as knowledge representation systems that accommodate both classical and contextual inference implemented through quantum-neural networks (QNN).

AI.tldr: 本文评述了本体与知识图谱结合稠密嵌入算法的现有方法，提出神经-量子-模糊系统作为能够同时容纳概率推理和精确推理的新知识表示范式。
AI.motivation: LLMs在知识表示与检索中缺乏本体显式建模能力，现有方法在概率推理与精确推理之间存在权衡，亟需一种能同时兼容两者的知识表示系统。
AI.method: 通过综述现有本体与知识图谱结合稠密嵌入算法的工作，提出神经-量子-模糊系统，利用量子神经网络（QNN）实现经典推理与上下文推理的统一表示。
AI.result: 提出了一个新型知识表示系统框架，能够在同一表示中同时容纳概率推理（模糊/量子）和精确推理（经典/本体）两种模式。
AI.conclusion: 神经-量子-模糊系统为知识表示开辟了新前沿，有望突破传统知识图谱与LLM之间的表示鸿沟，实现更灵活、更具表现力的混合推理系统。

title: scCBGM: Interpretable Single-Cell Counterfactual Editing
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026; code at https://github.com/almaan/scCBGM
summary: Understanding cellular phenotypes and how they respond to perturbations is critical for disease biology and therapeutic design. Single-cell RNA sequencing enables characterization at cellular resolution, yet the combinatorial space of conditions makes exhaustive experimental mapping infeasible. We introduce single-cell Concept Bottleneck Generative Models (scCBGM), a framework for interpretable and precise counterfactual editing of individual cells. scCBGM adapts concept bottleneck architectures for single-cell data through decoder skip connections and a cross-covariance penalty that promotes disentanglement without dimensional constraints. We extend the framework to flow matching models, enabling concept-guided editing in both encoding-decoding and generation regimes. To enable rigorous evaluation, we develop a synthetic benchmark with ground-truth counterfactuals. Across multiple real datasets, scCBGM demonstrates superior performance in combinatorial generalization and counterfactual prediction, supported by cell-level validation on synthetic data and population-level benchmarks on real datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出scCBGM框架，通过概念瓶颈架构、解码器跳跃连接和交叉协方差惩罚，实现单细胞数据中可解释且精准的反事实编辑，在组合泛化和反事实预测任务上表现优越。
AI.motivation: 理解细胞表型及其对扰动的响应对于疾病生物学和药物设计至关重要，但单细胞RNA测序的组合条件空间使穷举实验映射不可行，亟需可解释的计算方法实现细胞层面的反事实推理。
AI.method: scCBGM框架包含：1) 针对单细胞数据适配的概念瓶颈架构（含解码器跳跃连接）；2) 无维度约束的交叉协方差惩罚以促进概念解耦；3) 扩展至流匹配模型，支持编码-解码和生成两种范式下的概念引导编辑；4) 构建含真实反事实标签的合成基准用于严格评估。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，scCBGM在组合泛化和反事实预测任务中表现优于现有方法；通过合成数据上的细胞级验证和真实数据集上的群体级基准验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: scCBGM为单细胞数据提供了一种可解释且精确的反事实编辑框架，在概念解耦和组合泛化方面具有优势，有望推动疾病机制研究和治疗设计。

title: ConMem: Structured Memory-Guided Adaptation in Training-Free Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Recent advances have improved the adaptive capabilities of LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) through memory-, skill-, and learning-based approaches, yet these approaches remain challenged by noisy trajectories, insufficient modeling of memory-skill relations, and reliance on additional training or high-quality supervision. To address these limitations, we propose ConMem, a relation-aware and training-free framework that enables efficient multi-agent adaptation through cross-experience coordination. Specifically, ConMem distills historical interaction trajectories into structured memory cards to capture reusable strategies and cues, organizing them into a relation-aware memory graph. At runtime, ConMem retrieves cards according to task needs and coordinates them through the card graph to resolve strategy conflicts and recover their dependencies. Combined, these modules yield structured and relation-aware guidance, enabling robust, lightweight adaptation in multi-agent systems without additional training. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and mainstream MAS architectures show consistent gains over existing memory architectures, with improved inference-time efficiency through pruning more than 50% of expanded candidates and reducing planning overhead by over 80%. Our codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ConMemCode

AI.tldr: ConMem是一个无需训练的多智能体系统自适应框架，通过结构化记忆卡片和关系感知记忆图实现跨经验协调，在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，并将推理开销降低80%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统在自适应能力上受限于轨迹噪声、记忆-技能关系建模不足以及对额外训练或高质量监督的依赖，亟需一种轻量级且鲁棒的自适应方法。
AI.method: ConMem将历史交互轨迹蒸馏为结构化记忆卡片，捕捉可复用策略和线索，并组织成关系感知记忆图；运行时根据任务需求检索卡片，通过卡片图协调解决策略冲突并恢复依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和主流MAS架构上取得一致改进，可剪枝超过50%的扩展候选，将规划开销降低80%以上。
AI.conclusion: ConMem通过关系感知和无需训练的设计，实现了多智能体系统中的鲁棒、轻量级自适应，显著提升了推理效率。

title: Contrast encodes inductive bias: separating slow noise from dynamics in predictive representation learning
summary: Self-supervised methods that learn representations and predict dynamics fully in the latent space, such as JEPA, have been shown to confuse slowly varying noise with the dynamical signals they aim to capture. Specifically, when noise features remain approximately constant within each trajectory, contrastive predictive objectives preferentially encode these features instead of the true latent variables governing the system. The learned representation then becomes dominated by trajectory-specific noise, so downstream performance degrades with noise strength and does not improve even as the number and duration of training trajectories increase. We argue that this failure is a property of the objective itself, shared by a long line of contrastive predictive objectives that sample negatives across trajectories. To illustrate this generality, we study the failure mode and its remedy in two settings: a standard SimCLR-style JEPA on a synthetic moving-dot dataset, and DySIB, a recently introduced method designed for extracting physically interpretable representations of dynamics, on movies of a rigid-body pendulum. When negatives are instead sampled within a single trajectory, the slow noise can no longer distinguish frames within that trajectory, removing the predictive shortcut. Training one encoder simultaneously on many such trajectories then forces it to encode the variables relevant for the dynamics, with longer trajectories yielding better representations even for strong slow noise. Our results point toward principles for designing contrastive predictive objectives in dynamical representation learning, especially for physical systems with noisy experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 自监督对比预测方法（如JEPA）在动力学表示学习中会错误地将轨迹内缓慢变化的噪声编码为动态信号，导致表示被噪声主导。通过将负采样限制在单条轨迹内，可以消除这一捷径，迫使编码器学习真正的动力学变量。
AI.motivation: 揭示对比预测目标在动力学表示学习中的固有缺陷：当噪声在轨迹内近似恒定且跨轨迹采样负样本时，模型会优先编码噪声而非真实动态变量，且下游性能随噪声增强而退化，不随训练数据增加而改善。
AI.method: 在JEPA和DySIB两种框架下，对比两种负采样策略：跨轨迹采样（标准做法）与轨迹内采样。在合成运动点数据集和刚体摆锤视频上验证。
AI.result: 跨轨迹采样时，表示被慢变噪声主导，性能随噪声增强而下降且不随数据量改善；轨迹内采样消除了噪声捷径，使编码器被迫学习真正动力学变量，更长轨迹带来更好表示。
AI.conclusion: 指出了设计动力学对比预测目标的关键原则：负样本应在轨迹内采样，以避免慢变噪声作为预测捷径被利用，这对含噪物理观测数据的表示学习具有指导意义。

title: Artificial Intelligence for Mathematical Reasoning: An Integrated Survey of Language Models, Neuro-symbolic Systems, and Verified Discovery
summary: Mathematical reasoning has long served as a stringent test of machine intelligence; over the past decade, it has moved from a niche problem within NLP to one of the most consequential AI frontiers. This survey provides a unified account of the field's evolution, from early rule-based math word problem (MWP) solvers and template-driven geometry systems, through neural expression generation and LLM prompting, to contemporary reasoning models, multi-agent systems, neuro-symbolic theorem provers, and verified discovery workflows. We organize the landscape along four axes: (i) informal reasoning over text and diagrams, spanning MWP solving, multimodal geometry, and VLMs; (ii) formal reasoning in proof assistants, including autoformalization, tactic prediction, compiler-guided repair, and proof search; (iii) mathematical discovery, where systems propose constructions, improve bounds, or assist attacks on open problems; and (iv) the inference and training-time techniques, including CoT prompting, tool use, process reward models, and RLVR, that increasingly connect generation with verification. We catalog major benchmarks across grade-school arithmetic, competition mathematics, geometry, formal proving, multimodal and multilingual reasoning, and expert evaluation, and we examine benchmark saturation, contamination, reporting mismatches, and the distinction between pass@1, majority voting, and verifier-assisted pass@$k$. We critically assess failure modes: brittleness under perturbation, reward hacking, multimodal grounding failures, fragile formalization, and the energy cost of reasoning-scale inference. Drawing on recent perspectives from working mathematicians, we identify future directions centered on verified-discovery workflows, reasoning efficiency, and infrastructure to make AI-assisted formalization broadly usable. Companion materials: https://github.com/Starscream-11813/awesome-AI4Math.

AI.tldr: 该综述全面梳理了数学推理从早期符号系统到当代大模型时代的发展历程，围绕非形式推理、形式推理、数学发现、推理与训练技术四个维度展开，系统分析了基准测试、失败模式及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 数学推理长期被视为检验机器智能的严苛测试，近年来从NLP中的小众问题发展为AI最前沿领域之一，亟需对领域演化进行统一梳理。
AI.method: 从四个轴组织分析：(i)非形式推理（文本与图表），覆盖MWP求解、多模态几何与VLM；(ii)形式推理（证明助手），包括自动形式化、策略预测、编译器引导修复与证明搜索；(iii)数学发现，涵盖构造生成、界改进与开放问题攻关；(iv)推理与训练技术，如CoT提示、工具使用、过程奖励模型与RLVR。
AI.result: 整理了从基础算术到竞赛数学、几何、形式证明、多模态推理及专家评估的各类基准，分析了基准饱和、污染、报告不匹配等问题，以及pass@1、多数投票与验证辅助pass@k的区别。
AI.conclusion: 评估了扰动脆弱性、奖励黑客、多模态接地失败、形式化脆弱性及推理能耗等失败模式，指出未来方向集中在验证发现工作流、推理效率及AI辅助形式化的基础设施。

title: A Framework for Evaluating and Benchmarking Concept Drift Detection Methods
summary: Data stream mining is fundamentally challenged by concept drift, where distributional changes can degrade model performance. Despite the proliferation of drift detection methods, progress in the field is hindered by inconsistent evaluation practices: studies rely on oversimplified synthetic data generators, adopt incompatible metrics, and lack transparency in hyperparameter selection, making fair comparisons difficult. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework comprising three contributions: (1) a drift simulation method that injects controlled distributional changes into real-world datasets via Monte Carlo trials, enabling supervised evaluation while preserving real-world data complexity; (2) an evaluation protocol for drift detection with timing-aware criteria, including the derivation of new metrics (e.g., F1 detection score, normalized detection time) that are comparable across streams; and (3) we advocate for a leave-one-dataset-out hyperparameter optimization protocol for drift detection methods that promotes configuration robustness across heterogeneous stream dynamics. We benchmark 14 widely used drift detection methods on 7 realworld datasets across 4 drift types (class prior, label swap, feature permutation, feature filtering), each under both abrupt and gradual transitions. Our experimental results provide insights into the strengths and weaknesses of current drift detection approaches while establishing baseline performance metrics for future research in this area. All code and experiments are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对数据流概念漂移检测的标准化基准框架，包含基于蒙特卡洛的真实数据漂移模拟方法、时序感知评估协议（含新指标F1检测分数和归一化检测时间）以及留一数据集超参数优化方案。在7个真实数据集、4种漂移类型和两种转换模式下评估了14种漂移检测方法。
AI.motivation: 数据流挖掘中概念漂移检测领域存在评估实践不一致的问题：现有研究过度依赖简化的合成数据生成器、采用不兼容的评估指标、超参数选择缺乏透明度，导致方法之间的公平比较困难。
AI.method: (1) 基于蒙特卡洛模拟在真实数据集中注入受控分布变化的漂移模拟方法；(2) 时序感知的评估协议，包含新的可跨流比较的指标（F1检测分数、归一化检测时间）；(3) 留一数据集超参数优化协议，增强配置在不同流动态下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在7个真实数据集、4种漂移类型（类先验、标签交换、特征置换、特征过滤）及两种转换模式（突变和渐变）下评估了14种漂移检测方法，提供了当前方法的优缺点洞察及基线性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该基准框架通过标准化评估流程解决了漂移检测领域可重复性和公平比较的问题，为未来研究建立了基线性能基准。

title: Structure-Conditioned Actor-Critic Branches for Quality-Diversity Reinforcement Learning
summary: Quality-diversity reinforcement learning (QD-RL) aims to construct policy repertoires that contain both high-performing and behaviorally diverse policies. Existing QD-RL methods mainly diversify policy instances after rollout evaluation or use learned value information to improve policy quality and behavior targeting, while the learning branches that generate candidate policies remain less explored. This paper proposes SV-QD-RL, a structure-value coupled framework that represents each candidate as a structure-conditioned actor-critic branch. Each branch contains an actor, a structural mask, a branch-specific critic, a replay state, and evaluation attributes including behavior, return, sparsity, and value profile. The structural mask defines the actor subspace in which the branch learns, while the branch-specific critic and replay state shape its value-learning trajectory. A branch-aware QD archive then evaluates and retains branches according to behavioral quality, structural footprint, and value-profile information. Experiments on MuJoCo continuous-control tasks show that SV-QD-RL constructs policy repertoires with strong archive quality and behaviorally useful diversity. Ablation and diagnostic analyses further indicate that structural conditioning, critic differentiation, and memory-consistent refinement make complementary contributions to behavioral specialization. Schedule-aware repertoire evaluation shows that the learned archive provides selectable policy alternatives under changing behavior-level requirements. These results suggest that coupling actor structure with branch-specific value learning is an effective mechanism for generating diverse QD-RL policy repertoires.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SV-QD-RL，一种结构-价值耦合的QD-RL框架，通过为每个候选策略配备结构掩码、专用批评者和重放状态，实现行为多样且高性能的策略库构建。实验表明该方法在MuJoCo任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有QD-RL方法主要专注于在轨迹评估后多样化策略实例，或利用学习到的价值信息提升策略质量和行为定向，但生成候选策略的学习分支本身尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出SV-QD-RL框架，将每个候选策略表示为一个结构-价值耦合的演员-评论家分支。每个分支包含：演员网络、结构掩码（定义演员子空间）、分支专用批评者、重放状态，以及评估属性（行为、回报、稀疏性、价值轮廓）。采用分支感知的QD存档，根据行为质量、结构足迹和价值轮廓信息评估并保留分支。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo连续控制任务上，SV-QD-RL构建的策略库具有强存档质量和行为有用的多样性。消融分析表明结构条件化、批评者差异化和记忆一致性细化对行为特化有互补贡献。
AI.conclusion: 将演员结构与分支专用价值学习相耦合是生成多样化QD-RL策略库的有效机制。学习到的存档可在变化的行为需求下提供可选的策略替代方案。

title: Byzantine Cheap Talk: Adversarial Resilience and Topology Effects in LLM Coordination Games
comment: Accepted at NETYS 2026 (The International Conference on Networked Systems)
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on communication protocols for coordination, yet their robustness under adversarial and structural constraints remains poorly understood. Building on prior work showing that cheap-talk channels enable cooperation in LLM coordination games, we investigate two vulnerability classes in a 4-player Stag Hunt across six model families and 720 trials. First, when Byzantine agents signal cooperation but defect, non-Byzantine agents detect the betrayal within one round yet fail to adapt collectively: a substantial fraction continue cooperating despite repeated exploitation, unable to recover coordination due to the game's unanimity payoff structure. Second, explicitly restricting communication topology collapses cooperation, while applying identical restrictions silently preserves near-perfect cooperation. This establishes that coordination failure stems from agents' meta-reasoning about hidden information, not information loss itself. We identify two stable behavioral archetypes that replicate across all model cohorts: Defection-Prone models that switch permanently after betrayal, and Cooperation-Persistent models that continue cooperating at significant individual cost. These findings reveal concrete security vulnerabilities: communication channels can be exploited as adversarial injection vectors, and disclosing network topology to agents can degrade coordination even without any adversary present.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体LLM系统在通信协议下的鲁棒性问题，发现拜占庭攻击和通信拓扑限制会导致协调失败，并识别出两种稳定的行为模式（易背叛型和坚持合作型），揭示了通信信道可被利用为对抗性注入向量。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统日益依赖通信协议进行协调，但其在对抗性和结构性约束下的鲁棒性尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 在4人Stag Hunt博弈中，跨6个模型家族和720个试验，研究两类脆弱性：拜占庭智能体攻击（虚假合作信号后背叛）和通信拓扑限制（显式限制 vs 静默隐藏）。
AI.result: 拜占庭攻击下，非拜占庭智能体一轮内即可检测背叛但无法集体适应；显式限制通信拓扑会破坏合作，而静默施加相同限制则保持近乎完美合作；识别出易背叛型和坚持合作型两种稳定行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 协调失败源于智能体对隐藏信息的元推理而非信息缺失本身；通信信道可作为对抗性注入向量，向智能体披露网络拓扑会损害协调。

title: RAILS: Verification-Native Clearing For Agentic Commerce
summary:
Autonomous agents negotiate, purchase, deploy code, and move funds, but no neutral mechanism determines whether they
  met their delegated obligation, who is responsible when they did not, or which settlement action follows. This is the
  agentic clearing problem. Tool protocols (MCP), inter-agent communication (A2A), payment rails (x402), mandate and
  network agent protocols (AP2, Visa, Mastercard), and settlement-risk standards each assume that determination and none
  produce it.
  Clearing is the missing primitive. Payment is not clearing. Authorization is not clearing. LLM-as-judge evaluation is
  not clearing. Settlement-risk escrow is not clearing: it consumes clearing decisions.
  RAILS (Real-Time Agent Integrity & Ledger Settlement) is the integrity and clearing layer for agentic commerce,
  spanning a per-output reliability score, a published reliability record, and a clearing function that consumes them.
  The clearing protocol at its core closes that gap. Seven primitives (Obligation Object, Evidence Envelope,
  Verification Mesh, Clearing Decision, Settlement Instruction, Clearing Passport, Finality Rules), bound by a formal
  model of admissibility-graded verification, together yield a soundness property: no financially material settlement is
  supported by evidence below the obligation's admissibility floor. The property is falsifiable against the spec. We
  are not aware of a prior agent-commerce verification mechanism that states a property of this kind. The approaches
  nearest to it emit a pass, a delivery guarantee, a bare score, or an equilibrium.
  This paper specifies that clearing protocol.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAILS系统，作为智能体商业的完整性清算层，通过七原语和可准入性分级验证模型，解决了自主代理在履行义务、责任认定和结算决策方面的清算缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 自主代理在谈判、采购、部署代码和资金转移等活动中缺乏一个中立机制来判断是否履行了委托义务、确定责任归属以及执行后续结算行动，即"代理清算问题"。现有工具协议（MCP）、代理间通信（A2A）、支付轨道（x402）、授权协议（AP2、Visa、Mastercard）以及结算风险标准都假设存在判定而实际并未产生。
AI.method: 提出RAILS（实时代理完整性与账本结算）系统，包含三个层面：每输出可靠性评分、公开的可靠性记录、以及消费它们的清算功能。核心是清算协议，由七个原语（义务对象、证据信封、验证网格、清算决策、结算指令、清算通行证、终局性规则）组成，通过可准入性分级验证的形式化模型绑定，产生可靠性属性：任何具有财务重要性的结算都必须得到不低于义务可准入性底线的证据支持。
AI.result: 该清算协议具有可证伪的可靠性属性：没有低于义务可准入性底线的证据能支持具有财务重要性的结算。据作者所知，这是首个声明此类属性的智能体商业验证机制，现有最接近的方法只能输出通过、交付保证、原始分数或均衡状态。
AI.conclusion: RAILS填补了代理清算这一缺失原语，为自主代理商业活动提供了完整性保证和清算基础设施，其形式化模型确保了结算的安全性和可靠性。

title: Mitigating the Contractivity Trap in Diffusion ODEs via Stein Stabilization
summary: A fundamental tension exists in the large-step inference of diffusion models via their deterministic probability flow ordinary differential equation (PF-ODE) trajectories, which we identify as the contractivity trap: efficient inference favors large step sizes, while aggressive steps and highly expressive denoisers can undermine contraction-based stability certificates for error suppression. To address this, we propose SteinDiff, a step-wise inference-time stabilization framework that employs Stein-derived corrections without requiring reference samples. Specifically, SteinDiff introduces a geometry-aware residual correction mechanism that regularizes large-step solver updates without retraining. To this end, we derive a closed-form Stein correction coefficient for step-wise solver adjustment, enabling reference-free adaptation to local data geometry. We further establish a score-controlled perturbation bound under distributional shifts and provide a complementary Stein perspective on EDM-style parameterizations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SteinDiff mitigates severe artifacts and improves generative quality across large-step inference settings.

AI.tldr: 针对扩散模型确定性概率流ODE大步长推断中的"收缩性陷阱"问题，提出SteinDiff框架，通过无需参考样本的Stein衍生校正机制，在不重新训练的情况下正则化大步长求解器更新，实现几何感知的残差校正，有效缓解伪影并提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在大步长ODE推断中存在根本性张力：高效推断需要大步长，但激进步长与高表达力去噪器会破坏基于收缩性的误差抑制稳定性保证，即"收缩性陷阱"问题。
AI.method: 提出SteinDiff逐步推断时稳定化框架，包括：(1) 几何感知残差校正机制，无需重新训练即可正则化大步长求解器更新；(2) 推导出闭合形式的Stein校正系数，实现无需参考样本的自适应局部数据几何调整；(3) 建立分布偏移下的得分控制扰动界，并提供EDM风格参数化的Stein互补视角。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SteinDiff能够显著缓解大步长推断中的严重伪影，并提升生成质量。
AI.conclusion: SteinDiff通过引入Stein衍生校正有效解决了扩散模型大步长推断中的收缩性陷阱问题，是一种无需重训的即插即用式稳定化方法。

title: Bridging Expert Knowledge and Automated Feature Engineering via Self-Evolution
summary: In high-stakes settings such as brand compliance, clinical care, and content moderation, machine learning cannot be deployed as opaque oracles: practitioners inspect the features driving model decisions, and models must leverage the expert documentation governing these domains. In practice, the data arrives as unstructured content, and features extracted from it must be interpretable, discriminative, and aligned with what experts consider important. Existing methods fall short: they target tabular inputs, lack demonstrated expert alignment, and cannot operationalize qualitative criteria such as 'maintain professional tone' into precise features. We present FEST (Feature Engineering with Self-evolving Trees), combining dual-stream feature generation (semantic and deterministic), semantic deduplication, and tree-guided iterative evolution to discover auditable features from raw text and images. FEST leads in 17 of 20 classifier-task combinations across brand classification, content authenticity detection, and stress detection, with a mean gain of 4.2 pp over the strongest baseline across five classifiers. An LLM-as-judge evaluation shows FEST achieves 60-80% coverage of expert-designed brand features at strict semantic-alignment thresholds, corroborated by a human expert study rating features highly on relevance, clarity, and actionability. When seeded with expert guidelines, FEST refines qualitative criteria into operational features, improving accuracy by 6-12 pp on average across brands. To enable systematic evaluation of expert alignment in automated feature engineering, we release BrandGuide, the first dataset pairing expert-designed features with 1M+ assets across 2,683 brands. By grounding feature engineering in expert knowledge, FEST opens a practical pathway for interpretable ML in domains demanding human oversight.

AI.tldr: FEST提出了双流特征生成（语义+确定性）、语义去重和树引导迭代演化的方法，能从原始文本和图像中自动发现可审计的特征。在品牌分类、内容真实性检测和压力检测的20个分类器-任务组合中领先17个，平均比最强基线高4.2个百分点。专家评估显示FEST特征在相关性、清晰度和可操作性上表现良好，并发布了首个专家设计特征数据集BrandGuide。
AI.motivation: 在高风险场景（如品牌合规、临床护理、内容审核）中，机器学习不能作为黑盒部署，从业人员需要检查驱动模型决策的特征，且模型必须利用管理这些领域的专家文档。现有方法针对表格输入、缺乏专家对齐验证、无法将"保持专业语气"等定性标准转化为可操作特征。
AI.method: FEST包含三个核心组件：1）双流特征生成（语义流和确定性流）；2）语义去重；3）树引导的迭代演化，从原始文本和图像中发现可审计的特征。
AI.result: 在品牌分类、内容真实性检测和压力检测的20个分类器-任务组合中，FEST在17个上领先，平均比最强基线高4.2个百分点。LLM-as-judge评估显示在严格语义对齐阈值下达到60-80%的专家设计品牌特征覆盖率。当注入专家指南时，FEST将品牌准确率提升6-12个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过将特征工程扎根于专家知识，FEST为需要人类监督的可解释机器学习开辟了实用路径。

title: Teacher-Free Self-Training Amplifies but Does Not Compound: A Pass@$K$ Crossover on a Free-Verifier Domain
summary: When a language model trains on its own verified outputs, does it acquire capability beyond its base, or merely get better at expressing capability the base already had? We make the question decidable with a teacher-free "constellation" -- a generator, a learned critic, and a free exact verifier -- on a FlashFill-style "trapdoor" DSL, where verified (problem, solution) pairs are cheap to synthesize, hard to invert, and free to check exactly. Everything runs on one 4-bit Qwen3-4B on a single 24 GB GPU, with no model in the loop larger than the base. We report three findings. (i) Critic-guided selection beats verifier-filtered best-of-$k$ by $+9.1$ pp ($6/6$ seeds), with the entire gain localized to tasks where candidates disagree on held-out inputs. (ii) Per-round STaR self-training raises the ceiling but never accelerates -- the gain tracks remaining headroom and decelerates across $K=4$ independent training trajectories. (iii) The domain has no clean zero-capability frontier, so the usual "$0\% \to$ climb $=$ emergence" test is invalid here. A measured pass@$K$ crossover settles the diagnosis: the trained model wins at the operating budget (pass@$8$) but the base overtakes it at a large budget (pass@$64$) on every trajectory, so self-training concentrates probability mass rather than expanding reach. This is amplification, not compounding. ($K=4$ is indicative, not yet a robust across-trajectory CI.)

AI.tldr: 该论文通过一个无教师的"星座"框架（生成器+学习型评判器+精确验证器）在FlashFill风格的陷阱领域上研究了自训练语言模型是增强已有能力还是产生新能力。实验表明，自训练仅起到放大作用而非复合作用——模型在低采样预算下胜出，但在高预算下被基础模型超越。
AI.motivation: 解决一个可判定的问题：语言模型在其自身验证输出上训练时，是获得了基础模型不具备的新能力，还是仅仅更好地表达了已有能力？
AI.method: 设计了一个无教师的"星座"框架，包含生成器(Qwen3-4B)、学习型评判器和精确验证器，在FlashFill风格的"陷阱门"DSL上运行。使用批评者引导的选择、STaR自训练等方法，通过pass@K交叉分析来诊断能力类型。
AI.result: (i) 批评者引导选择比验证器过滤的最佳k采样高出9.1个百分点；(ii) 每轮STaR自训练提升上限但从未加速；(iii) 通过pass@K交叉分析确定：自训练模型在低预算下胜出，但基础模型在高预算下反超，表明是概率质量集中而非能力范围扩展。
AI.conclusion: 自训练仅产生放大效应（amplification）而非复合效应（compounding），即模型只是更擅长表达已有能力，而非获得新能力。

title: Q-Delta: Beyond Key-Value Associative State Evolution
summary: Linear attention reformulates sequence modeling as recurrent state evolution, enabling efficient linear-time inference. Under the key-value associative paradigm, existing approaches restrict the role of the query to the readout operation, decoupling it from state evolution. We show that query-conditioned state readout induces a structured value prediction over accumulated memory that complements key-based retrieval. Based on this insight, we propose Q-Delta, a query-aware delta rule that integrates mixed key-query prediction errors into state evolution, enabling jointly corrective dynamics while preserving delta-rule efficiency. We establish stability guarantees for the resulting dynamics and derive a hardware-efficient chunkwise-parallel formulation with a custom Triton implementation. Empirical results demonstrate stable optimization, competitive throughput, and consistent improvements over strong baselines on language modeling and long-context retrieval tasks.

AI.tldr: Q-Delta 提出了一种查询感知的 delta 规则，将混合键-查询预测误差整合到状态演化中，在保持 delta 规则效率的同时实现联合修正动态，在语言建模和长上下文检索任务上优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有线性注意力方法将查询的角色限制为只读操作，与状态演化解耦。作者希望揭示查询条件化的状态读取能产生对累积记忆的结构化值预测，从而补充基于键的检索，并据此设计更优的状态演化机制。
AI.method: 提出 Q-Delta 查询感知 delta 规则，将混合键-查询预测误差整合到状态演化中；建立稳定性保证；推导硬件高效的 chunkwise-parallel 公式并使用 Triton 实现。
AI.result: 稳定优化、竞争性吞吐量，在语言建模和长上下文检索任务上持续优于强基线。
AI.conclusion: 查询感知的 delta 规则能够有效地将查询信息融入状态演化，实现联合修正动态，为线性注意力机制提供了新的设计思路。

title: Instrumented data for causal scientific machine learning
summary: Scientific machine learning is limited less by model size than by the data it is trained on. Observational data records what happened but not why; template synthetic data has a known generating process but only for the simulator's template, not the case a user faces. We argue a third option is now operationally feasible: instrumented data, in which every datum carries the mechanistic model that produced it, an explicit uncertainty over that model, and an executable family of counterfactuals. Verification-and-validation (V&V) instrumented image-to-simulation pipelines are one realisation: a sensor observation becomes a fully specified, solver-backed simulation with explicit, editable parameters and a propagated aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty. The substrate is case-specific, mechanistically supervised, and supports causal interventions through Pearl's do-operator. Near-term consequences for validation, auditing, and surrogate training span computational biology, climate, materials, fluid mechanics, and medical imaging; a longer-term, falsifiable implication concerns foundation models for scientific reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"仪器化数据"作为科学机器学习中除观测数据和模板合成数据之外的第三种数据范式：每个数据点都携带其产生的机制模型、显式不确定性以及可执行的反事实族，通过V&V仪器化图像到仿真管线实现，支持因果干预和机理监督，有望在计算生物学、气候、材料、流体力学和医学成像等领域产生深远影响。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习受限于数据而非模型规模：观测数据只记录"发生了什么"而不解释"为什么"；模板合成数据虽具有已知生成过程，但仅限于模拟器的模板而非用户面对的具体案例。因此需要一种既能保留机制信息又能适应具体案例的第三种数据范式。
AI.method: 提出"仪器化数据"概念，通过验证与确认（V&V）仪器化图像到仿真管线实现：传感器观测转化为完全指定的、求解器支持的仿真模型，具有显式可编辑参数，并传播了偶然性/认知性不确定性。该数据基底是案例特定的、机理监督的，并通过Pearl的do-算子支持因果干预。
AI.result: 仪器化数据在验证、审计和替代模型训练等方面具有直接影响，应用领域涵盖计算生物学、气候、材料、流体力学和医学成像；长期来看，对科学推理的基础模型具有可证伪的启示意义。
AI.conclusion: 仪器化数据作为第三种数据范式在操作上已可行，有望突破当前科学机器学习的数据瓶颈，通过将机制模型嵌入每个数据点，实现更可靠的科学推理和可审计的预测。

title: STAR: Rethinking MoE Routing as Structure-Aware Subspace Learning
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales model capacity efficiently by selectively routing inputs to a specialized subset of experts. However, input-expert specialization, the core motivation of MoE, critically depends on whether the router is actually aware of input structure. In practice, MoE routing is typically implemented as a shallow linear projection with limited awareness of input representation, which often leads to unstable routing. We propose STAR, a Structure Aware Routing that rethinks MoE routing as a subspace learning problem by augmenting standard learnable routing with an evolving principal subspace that tracks dominant input structure via Generalized Hebbian Algorithm (GHA). By aligning routing decisions directly with input structure, STAR enables stable expert specialization. We evaluate STAR on controlled synthetic setup and large-scale language and vision tasks, where it consistently improves routing quality and downstream performance over strong MoE baselines. Moreover, optional test-time subspace updates further enhance routing robustness and generalization under input distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: STAR是一种通过广义Hebbian算法学习输入主子空间的MoE路由方法，能够对齐路由决策与输入结构，实现稳定的专家专业化，在合成数据及大规模语言/视觉任务上均优于现有MoE基线。
AI.motivation: 标准MoE路由使用浅层线性投影，对输入表示感知有限，导致路由不稳定，制约了输入-专家专业化的核心目标。
AI.method: 将MoE路由重新定义为子空间学习问题，在可学习路由基础上，通过广义Hebbian算法（GHA）维护一个随输入结构演化的主子空间，使路由决策与输入结构对齐。
AI.result: 在受控合成实验及大规模语言/视觉任务上，STAR一致提升了路由质量和下游性能；测试时可选的子空间更新进一步增强了对输入分布漂移的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: STAR通过子空间学习解决了MoE路由对输入结构感知不足的问题，实现了更稳定的专家专业化，并具备应对分布偏移的适应能力。

title: Still: Amortized KV Cache Compaction in a Single Forward Pass
summary: The KV cache is the memory bottleneck of long-horizon language model deployment. Practically, a deployable compactor must be lightweight enough to call during inference, expressive enough to preserve context under constraint, and reusable across a trajectory. Existing compaction methods satisfy only part of this requirement: selection methods are lightweight but subset-bound, while synthesis methods are expressive but rely on per-context optimization. Here we introduce Still, a small per-layer Perceiver trained once against a frozen base model that produces compact keys and values in a single forward pass. On Qwen and Gemma models, Still occupies the favorable side of the speed--quality frontier across compression ratios from $8\times$ to $200\times$ and context lengths from $8$k to $128$k. On the long-context RULER grid, Still exceeds the strongest baseline by 8--22 points. The same compact cache also supports free-form summarization, preserving most of the full-context gain on HELMET and winning a pairwise LongBench summarization comparison against KV-Distill. Because compaction is a forward pass, Still can be applied iteratively, entering a long-horizon regime unavailable to per-context methods. We show that amortization makes long-context cache compaction tractable, and synthesis makes its compact state useful at extreme compression.

AI.tldr: Still提出了一种轻量级的每层Perceiver压缩器，通过单次前向传播生成紧凑的KV缓存，在8倍至200倍压缩比和8k至128k上下文长度下，在速度-质量前沿上优于现有方法，支持长上下文任务和迭代压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法无法同时满足轻量、表达力强和可复用三个需求：选择方法（如剪枝）轻量但受限于子集，合成方法（如蒸馏）表达力强但依赖逐上下文优化，无法跨轨迹复用。
AI.method: Still训练一个小型每层Perceiver网络（仅一次训练），固定基础模型，在单次前向传播中为每层生成紧凑的键和值。由于压缩是前向传播，可迭代应用于长序列。
AI.result: 在Qwen和Gemma模型上，Still在8倍至200倍压缩比、8k至128k上下文长度下占据速度-质量前沿；在RULER长上下文基准上超过最强基线8-22分；在HELMET上保留大部分全上下文增益，在LongBench摘要对比中胜过KV-Distill。
AI.conclusion: 摊销训练使长上下文缓存压缩变得可行，合成方法使紧凑状态在极端压缩下保持有用，Still实现了可部署的轻量且表达力强的KV缓存压缩器。

title: Momentum for Reasoning: Dense Intrinsic Signals in Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for eliciting long-chain reasoning in large language models. However, existing methods based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) rely on a binary outcome reward, which induces two structural failure modes: Zero-Advantage Collapse, in which all rollouts in a group share the same outcome and the gradient vanishes, and Hallucinated Certainty, in which the model becomes increasingly confident on incorrect rollouts late in training. We address both modes by densifying the reward with intrinsic signals computed entirely from the policy's own conditional probabilities, and propose ISPO (Intrinsic Signal Policy Optimization, which combines a sequence-level signal measuring how informative the thinking trajectory is for the final answer, with a token-level directional reward whose hallucinated-certainty hinge penalizes confidently-wrong predictions at critical decision tokens. Across three base models and five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, ISPO consistently outperforms competitive baselines, with the largest gains on the hardest benchmarks where zero-advantage collapse is most frequent, and training-dynamics diagnostics confirm that both failure modes are decreased.

AI.tldr: 针对GRPO在强化学习中的两个结构性问题（零优势崩溃和幻觉确定性），本文提出ISPO方法，通过从策略自身条件概率中提取内在信号来稠密化奖励，结合序列级和词元级信号，在数学推理任务上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 基于GRPO的RLVR方法仅使用二元结果奖励，导致零优势崩溃（组内所有轨迹结果相同导致梯度消失）和幻觉确定性（模型对错误轨迹过度自信）两种结构性失败模式，亟需解决。
AI.method: 提出ISPO（内在信号策略优化），包含两种内在信号：(1) 序列级信号，衡量思考轨迹对最终答案的信息量；(2) 词元级方向性奖励，通过幻觉确定性铰链惩罚在关键决策词元上过度自信的错误预测。奖励完全从策略自身条件概率计算，无需外部监督。
AI.result: 在三个基础模型和五个数学推理基准上，ISPO consistently 优于竞争性基线，在困难基准上收益最大（零优势崩溃最频繁的场景），训练动态诊断确认两种失败模式均被缓解。
AI.conclusion: 通过稠密化奖励信号，ISPO有效解决了GRPO的两种结构性失败模式，提升了长链推理的强化学习效果。

title: Breaking the Bubble: Asynchronous Pipeline Parallel Training with Bounded Weight Inconsistency
summary: Pipeline parallelism is essential for training large neural networks, but existing schedules trade off throughput, memory, and optimization consistency. Synchronous pipelines preserve forward/backward weight consistency but suffer from bubbles; asynchronous pipelines remove bubbles but introduce weight-version mismatch, typically requiring weight stashing, prediction, or correction mechanisms. We introduce PACI (Pipeline Asynchronous training with Controlled Inconsistency), a bubble-free asynchronous pipeline method that bounds forward/backward version drift without weight stashing, prediction, additional parameter copies, or global synchronization. The key idea is to use local gradient accumulation as a version-control mechanism: by slowing parameter-version evolution relative to pipeline delay, PACI limits the number of optimizer updates crossed by any micro-batch while preserving steady-state utilization. In GPT-style language-model pretraining, PACI matches the stability and final perplexity of synchronous 1F1B-flush, retains the same peak memory footprint, achieves fully utilized pipeline throughput, and improves training time-to-accuracy by up to $1.69\times$ over the fastest flush baseline. These results show that forward/backward inconsistency need not be eliminated: when explicitly bounded, it can be safely traded for substantial efficiency gains.

AI.tldr: PACI是一种无气泡的异步流水线并行训练方法，通过局部梯度累积控制前向后向版本漂移，在不使用权重缓存、预测或全局同步的情况下，实现了与同步1F1B-flush相当的稳定性和困惑度，同时保持完全流水线吞吐量，训练时间加速比高达1.69倍。
AI.motivation: 现有流水线并行调度需要在吞吐量、内存和优化一致性之间权衡：同步流水线保持权重一致性但存在气泡（空闲等待），异步流水线消除气泡但引入权重版本不匹配问题，通常需要额外的权重缓存、预测或修正机制来补偿。
AI.method: 核心思想是使用局部梯度累积作为版本控制机制：通过减缓参数版本演化速度使其相对于流水线延迟更慢，PACI限制了任何微批次跨越的优化器更新次数，同时保持稳态利用率，从而将前向/后向版本漂移控制在有界范围内。
AI.result: 在GPT风格语言模型预训练中，PACI匹配了同步1F1B-flush的稳定性和最终困惑度，保持相同峰值内存，实现完全流水线吞吐量利用率，训练时间加速比高达1.69倍。
AI.conclusion: 前向/后向不一致性不需要被消除：当被显式控制在有界范围内时，可以安全地将其转化为显著的效率提升。

title: Inference-Time Conformal Reasoning with Valid Factuality Control for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly perform multi-step reasoning, where intermediate claims form implicit directed acyclic graphs whose node correctness is structurally conditioned on their ancestors. This makes factuality uncertainty structural, rather than a trivial accumulation of node-wise errors, and necessitates inference-time uncertainty quantification over the reasoning structure. While conformal prediction (CP) offers flexible user-specified factuality control, existing work remains post-hoc and cannot intervene during generation. To fill the gap between CP's flexibility and its post-hoc limitation, we propose an \emph{Inference-Time Conformal Reasoning (ITCR)} framework that integrates CP directly into reasoning graph generation. ITCR learns a structure-level factuality uncertainty function that aggregates claim-level factuality signals over reasoning graphs without complex modeling assumptions. We then design the non-conformity score based on graph-level factuality uncertainty and calibrate the conformal threshold to decide when to stop generation. We theoretically show such generation is nested, yielding valid coverage guarantees for factuality control. Experiments over multiple datasets and coverage objectives demonstrate empirically valid coverage. In downstream reasoning tasks, inference-time calibrated graphs yield more accurate generation than post-hoc pruned graphs.

AI.tldr: 提出推理时共形推理（ITCR）框架，将共形预测直接集成到推理图生成过程中，通过结构级事实不确定性函数和基于图级非一致性得分的校准阈值，实现生成时的可控事实性保证。
AI.motivation: 现有共形预测方法只能在事后（post-hoc）进行事实性控制，无法在生成过程中进行干预；而LLM的多步推理中中间声明的正确性具有结构依赖性，需要推理时的不确定性量化。
AI.method: 1) 学习结构级事实不确定性函数，聚合推理图上声明级的事实性信号；2) 基于图级不确定性设计非一致性得分；3) 校准共形阈值以决定何时停止生成；4) 理论证明生成具有嵌套性，提供有效的覆盖保证。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和覆盖目标上实证验证了经验覆盖的有效性；在下游推理任务中，推理时校准的图比事后剪枝的图生成更准确。
AI.conclusion: ITCR填补了共形预测灵活性与事后局限性之间的空白，实现了推理时的事实性控制，并具备理论覆盖保证和更好的下游任务性能。

title: Strained Coherence: A Pre-Failure Signal in Coding Agent Execution Trajectories
summary: LLM-based coding agents sometimes acknowledge a problem in their own reasoning and then proceed anyway. We call this pattern strained coherence: a safety-relevant failure mode in which an agent has information that should change its behavior, states that information, and still acts against it. The pattern overlaps with verbalized reward hacking, where an agent names a tension between a task proxy and the underlying goal yet optimizes the proxy anyway. We give an operational definition, build a Claude Sonnet 4.6 judge that reads full trajectories and flags spans where the pattern occurs, and evaluate it on 44 Terminal-bench-2 trajectories using a Qwen3.5-35B-A3B backbone. Flagged trajectories fail 94% of the time versus 46% for unflagged trajectories (47-point gap, Fisher's exact p = 0.003; 46 points after excluding three prompt-embedded examples, p = 0.006). At matched selectivity, the detector reaches 94% precision versus 88% for a lexical discourse-marker baseline; the 10-trajectory intersection of the two methods has a 100% failure rate (Clopper-Pearson 95% CI [69%, 100%]). We replicate on Gemma4-31B with 43 trajectories: the overall signal is directionally consistent but not significant (20-point gap, p = 0.31), with attenuation driven largely by 13 trajectories with zero think content, where the detector has no substrate to analyze. In the high-verbosity Gemma tertile, the gap is +30 points; in the mid- and high-verbosity Qwen tertiles, it is +40 points each. The first flag appears at a median of 83-84% of elapsed trajectory time across both models, and the binary flag survives paraphrases that soften explicit conflict markers (8/8 trajectories). Unlike univariate predictors, the detector emits interpretable span-level output -- quoted acknowledgment, quoted action, and typed conflict -- showing what the agent saw and ignored.

AI.tldr: 本文定义并检测了一种大模型编码智能体的安全失效模式——"应变连贯性"（strained coherence）：智能体识别到自身推理中的问题，明确陈述了该信息，却仍然采取了与该信息相悖的行动。作者构建了一个Claude Sonnet 4.6裁判模型，在44条Terminal-bench-2轨迹上检测该模式，发现被标记轨迹的失败率为94%，未被标记的则为46%（差距47个百分点，p=0.003）。该检测器在匹配选择性下达到94%的精确率，优于基于词汇话语标记的基线模型（88%）。两种方法的交集（10条轨迹）失败率达100%。在Gemma4-31B上的复制实验方向一致但未达统计显著（20个百分点差距，p=0.31），衰减主要归因于13条无思考内容的轨迹。首个标志出现在轨迹时间的中位数83-84%处，且二值标志在软化显性冲突标记的改写测试中仍能存活（8/8条轨迹）。不同于单变量预测器，该检测器输出可解释的跨度级输出——引用的承认、引用的行动和类型的冲突——展示了智能体看见了什么却忽略了什么。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型安全研究主要关注模型生成有害内容或错误回答，但较少关注一种更隐蔽的失效模式：智能体在推理过程中能够正确识别到自身逻辑或任务中的矛盾，却仍然按照错误方向执行。这种"明知故犯"的行为对智能体的可信度和安全性构成威胁，需要系统性地定义和检测。
AI.method: 1) 定义了"应变连贯性"的操作性定义；2) 构建了一个Claude Sonnet 4.6裁判模型，读取完整轨迹并标记该模式出现的跨度；3) 使用Qwen3.5-35B-A3B作为骨干模型在44条Terminal-bench-2轨迹上评估；4) 在Gemma4-31B上使用43条轨迹进行复制验证；5) 进行了消融实验，包括显性冲突标记软化改写测试和不同详细程度分层的分析。
AI.result: 1) 被标记轨迹失败率94% vs 未标记46%（差距47个百分点，p=0.003）；2) 匹配选择性下检测器精确率94% vs 词汇基线88%；3) 两种方法交集轨迹失败率100%（95% CI [69%, 100%]）；4) Gemma复制实验方向一致但不显著（20点差距，p=0.31），高详细程度分组差距达+30点；5) 首个标志出现在中位数83-84%时间点；6) 改写测试中8/8条轨迹标志存活。
AI.conclusion: 应变连贯性是大模型编码智能体中一个真实存在且可检测的安全失效模式。本文提出的检测方法具有较高的精确率和可解释性，能够揭示智能体"看见了却忽略"的具体内容。该模式在模型间具有一定泛化性，但依赖于智能体产生足够的思考内容供分析。该方法为智能体安全评估提供了一种比单变量预测更丰富的分析工具。

title: Instrumental convergence and power-seeking
summary: Recent years have seen increasing concern that artificial intelligence may soon pose an existential risk to humanity. One leading ground for concern is that artificial agents may be power-seeking, aiming to acquire power and in the process disempowering humanity. I show how the argument from power-seeking rests on a strong version of a claim known as the instrumental convergence thesis. I explore leading defenses of the instrumental convergence thesis and argue that none establishes the thesis in a strong enough form to ground the argument from power-seeking. I discuss implications for longtermism, the governance of artificial intelligence, and the methodology of studying risks posed by artificial agents.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了人工智能可能因追求权力而导致人类灭绝的论证，指出该论证依赖于一个强版本的"工具性趋同论题"，而现有对该论题的辩护均不足以支撑其结论。
AI.motivation: 近年来人们日益担忧AI可能对人类构成存在性风险，其中一种主流观点认为AI代理人会追求权力并最终剥夺人类权力。作者旨在检验这一论证的哲学基础是否牢固。
AI.method: 作者识别出权力追求论证所依赖的核心前提——工具性趋同论题的强版本，然后系统考察并批判了该论题的主要辩护策略，分析其是否足以支撑权力追求论证。
AI.result: 现有对工具性趋同论题的辩护均未能建立足够强的版本，不足以支撑人工智能追求权力并导致人类灭绝的论证。
AI.conclusion: 该结论对长期主义、人工智能治理以及研究AI风险的方法论具有重要启示，意味着我们需要重新评估AI存在性风险论证的可靠性。

title: Partially Performative Prediction
summary: Performative prediction studies feedback loops that arise when predictive models are deployed in consequential domains. In these settings, deploying a model can change the population whose patterns the model aims to predict, inducing a distribution shift that is endogenous to the learning system. This perspective departs from classical treatments of distribution shift, where shifts are typically modeled as exogenous changes in the data-generating process. Yet, in practice, distribution shift is rarely one or the other. Predictive models may influence future data through the decisions they support, while the world itself continues to drift for reasons beyond the learner's control. We study partially performative prediction, a framework that captures both endogenous and exogenous sources of distribution shift. The framework generalizes performative prediction by allowing the data distribution to evolve both in response to the deployed model and according to an external, time-varying process. We extend the central notions of performative stability and performative optimality to this setting by defining their online analogues that track the evolving partially performative environment. We analyze practical learning heuristics, including repeated retraining, and characterize when they successfully adapt to partially performative environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"部分执行性预测"框架，统一了模型部署引发的内源性分布偏移（模型影响数据分布）和外源性分布偏移（外部环境随时间变化），并分析了在线重复训练等学习启发式方法在此混合环境中的适应性和收敛条件。
AI.motivation: 现有执行性预测仅考虑模型部署引起的内源性分布偏移，但实际中分布偏移往往同时包含内源和外源因素（如模型决策影响数据分布的同时，外部环境也在自然变化）。作者希望建立一个统一框架来捕获这两种偏移的混合效应。
AI.method: 将执行性预测推广为部分执行性预测，允许数据分布同时随部署模型和外部时变过程演化；定义在线版本的执行性稳定性和执行性最优性；分析重复训练等启发式算法的收敛行为。
AI.result: 给出了部分执行性环境下重复训练等启发式方法成功适应的条件，刻画了在线执行性稳定性和最优性的性质。
AI.conclusion: 部分执行性预测为理解实际系统中内源和外源分布偏移共存的现象提供了理论基础，拓展了执行性预测的适用范围。

title: Temporal Coverage over Density: Parsimonious Training-Set Design for ML Climate Downscaling
summary: High-resolution regional climate simulations provide critical information for climate impacts assessments but remain computationally expensive, motivating the development of machine-learning downscalers and emulators. A key challenge is determining how limited high-resolution simulations should be distributed across a changing climate trajectory to capture both forced climate response and internal variability. Using the CESM2 Large Ensemble over the western United States, we compare three training-year selection strategies under fixed data budgets: a contiguous block of historical years, years drawn from both the beginning and end of the simulation period, and years distributed throughout the full climate trajectory. Including both historical and future years consistently outperforms training on historical years alone, demonstrating the importance of exposing downscaling models to climate states outside the historical record and highlighting limitations of stationarity assumptions common in statistical downscaling. Training on years distributed throughout the full climate trajectory performs best overall, indicating that broad sampling of internal variability provides additional information beyond exposure to the forced climate response alone. Models trained on temporally distributed subsets more successfully reproduce variability in unseen ensemble members while retaining strong performance across a wide range of climate diagnostics. Even when trained on only one-tenth of the available high-resolution years, temporally distributed models remain highly competitive with full-data training. These results suggest that, under fixed computational budgets, broad sampling of climate states is more valuable than temporal continuity when allocating scarce high-resolution simulations. The findings provide practical guidance for regional climate downscaling and large-ensemble projection workflows.

AI.tldr: 在有限计算资源下，对比三种训练年份选择策略发现：将高分辨率气候模拟的训练年份分散分布于整个气候轨迹（同时覆盖历史与未来时期）比集中使用连续历史年份或仅首尾年份更优；仅用十分之一的数据即可接近全数据训练效果，表明广泛采样气候状态比时间连续性更重要。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率区域气候模拟计算成本高昂，需要发展机器学习降尺度/仿真模型，但关键问题是：如何在有限的高分辨率模拟预算下，最优地分配训练年份以同时捕捉强迫气候响应和内部变率。
AI.method: 基于CESM2大型集合（美国西部区域），在固定数据预算下比较三种训练年份选择策略：(1) 连续历史年份块；(2) 从模拟期首尾两端抽取；(3) 分布在整个气候轨迹中。评估模型在未见集合成员上的变率重现能力和气候诊断表现。
AI.result: 包含历史和未来年份的训练始终优于仅历史年份；全轨迹分布策略总体最优；仅用十分之一数据时，时间分布模型仍与全数据训练高度竞争；时间分布模型能更好重现未见集合成员中的变率。
AI.conclusion: 在固定计算预算下，广泛采样气候状态比时间连续性更有价值；打破平稳性假设、暴露模型于历史记录之外的未来气候状态至关重要；研究结果为区域气候降尺度和大型集合投影的工作流程提供了实用指导。

title: ZIPP:Zero-shot Image Personalization from Personas
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models are increasingly deployed in open-ended creative contexts, yet their outputs remain impersonal, optimized for aggregate aesthetics rather than individual taste. Human preferences are pluralistic: one user favoring muted, nostalgic portraits may prefer vibrant street photography, while another gravitates toward dreamy film aesthetics. Existing methods require dense interaction histories or per-user fine-tuning, failing in cold-start settings and collapsing context-dependent preferences into a static representation. We introduce zero-shot image personalization from personas (ZIPP), which conditions image generation on natural-language personas (concise descriptors of a user's identity and aesthetic sensibilities) without any user-specific data or weight updates. ZIPP uses an LLM to rewrite prompts from the perspective of a given persona, steering diffusion models toward personalized outputs. To mine personas at scale, we train an inductive Graph Attention Network over a 22M-user Reddit interaction graph with dual contrastive objectives aligning graph structure with visual behavior, then verbalize learned representations into natural-language personas via an MLLM. We introduce ZIPBench, the first zero-shot personalization benchmark with 1.5K users, graph-mined personas, and 40K generated images. Across four benchmarks and 14 LLMs spanning five model families, persona conditioning yields consistent gains (13-20%), with frontier models benefiting most. In the few-shot setting, ZIPP matches or exceeds fine-tuned baselines trained on 100+ examples per user. ZIPP achieves the lowest preference distributional divergence (CMMD 0.16 vs. 0.55), and IPF-normalized demographic evaluation shows it substantially reduces subpopulation bias present in existing methods. Human evaluation confirms a 79% win rate over generic generation and 58-65% over all fine-tuned baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZIPP，一种零样本图像个性化方法，通过自然语言人物画像（persona）条件化文本到图像扩散模型，无需用户特定数据或微调。利用LLM重写提示词、图注意力网络从Reddit图谱挖掘用户画像、多模态大语言模型将表征转化为自然语言描述。在ZIPBench等基准上，人物画像条件化带来13-20%的一致提升，零样本匹配或超越微调基线，人类评估偏好率达79%。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型在开放创意场景中输出缺乏个性化，无法捕捉用户间多元化的审美偏好。现有方法依赖密集交互历史或用户级微调，在冷启动场景下失效，且无法处理上下文相关的动态偏好。
AI.method: 1) 使用LLM从给定人物画像视角重写提示词，引导扩散模型生成个性化输出；2) 训练归纳式图注意力网络(GAT)在2200万用户Reddit交互图上进行双对比学习，对齐图结构与视觉行为；3) 通过多模态大语言模型(MLLM)将学到的表征转化为自然语言人物画像；4) 构建ZIPBench零样本个性化基准（1500用户、图挖掘画像、4万生成图像）。
AI.result: 在4个基准、14个LLM/5个模型家族上，人物画像条件化带来13-20%一致提升，前沿模型收益最大。零样本匹配或超越基于100+样本微调的基线。偏好分布散度最低（CMMD 0.16 vs 0.55），人口统计评估显示子群体偏差显著降低。人类评估：对比通用生成胜率79%，对比所有微调基线58-65%。
AI.conclusion: ZIPP证明了自然语言人物画像作为零样本个性化条件的高效性，无需用户数据或模型更新即可实现细粒度偏好控制，且能减少现有方法中的子群体偏差，为个性化图像生成提供了可扩展的范式。

title: Layer-wise Derivative Controlled Networks Achieve Competitive Accuracy and Gradient Stability Across Data Regimes
summary:
Derivative-controlled networks based on ChainzRule (CR) combine cubic polynomial layers with a lightweight forward-mode per-layer Jacobian penalty (DREG). In this second paper of a multi-part series, we evaluate the generalization properties of CR across data regimes.
  We ablate the shape of the DREG coefficient schedule, demonstrating that the optimal annealing range depends on representation noise. On the Pima Diabetes dataset, CR achieves strong low-data performance and maintains a consistent accuracy advantage over baselines from 5\% to 100\% training data, supported by exceptionally stable gradient tail ratios ($\sim$1.01--1.02 vs. 1.07--1.09 for ReLU networks). Extensions to SST-5 show competitive or superior results in both frozen-embedding and BERT fine-tuned regimes, including outperforming prior BERT baselines despite substantially less training data. These results are statistically significant: CR achieves superior accuracy over the strongest published baselines we could identify on both datasets ($p < 0.05$).
  These results establish that layer-wise derivative control induces a structural inductive bias toward low-frequency, stable representations that generalizes robustly across tabular and NLP domains, data volumes, and representation qualities. The gradient tail ratio serves as a reliable, label-free diagnostic of generalization capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于链式法则的导数控制网络（CR），通过结合三次多项式层与前向模式每层雅可比惩罚（DREG），在不同数据规模下展现出优越的泛化性能。实验表明，CR在Pima糖尿病数据集上从5%到100%训练数据均保持稳定优势，在SST-5数据集上在冻结嵌入和BERT微调场景下均取得竞争性或更优结果。梯度尾比可作为无需标签的泛化能力诊断指标。
AI.motivation: 探索导数控制网络在不同数据规模下的泛化性能，验证层-wise导数控制是否引入结构性的归纳偏置，使其在不同领域和数据量下均能鲁棒泛化。
AI.method: 提出基于链式法则的导数控制网络（CR），包含三次多项式层和轻量级前向模式每层雅可比惩罚（DREG），通过消融实验研究DREG系数调度形状对性能的影响。
AI.result: 在Pima糖尿病数据集上，CR从5%到100%训练数据均保持准确率优势，梯度尾比稳定在1.01-1.02（对比ReLU网络的1.07-1.09）。在SST-5上，CR在冻结嵌入和BERT微调场景均表现竞争性或更优，且统计显著（p<0.05）。
AI.conclusion: 层-wise导数控制引入朝向低频稳定表征的结构性归纳偏置，使CR在表格数据和NLP领域、不同数据量和表征质量下均能鲁棒泛化；梯度尾比可作为可靠的、无需标签的泛化能力诊断指标。

title: A Resilience-as-a-Service assessment framework for coordinated disruption response in interdependent urban transit systems
summary: Urban public transport disruptions require rapid response strategies, yet existing studies rarely provide a decision support framework to compare alternative disruption response solutions using a common set of dynamic, passenger, operator, and environment oriented indicators. This paper proposes a KPI-driven, time-indexed framework to assess the resilience of disruption response solutions in urban transit systems. The framework combines an optimization model with a behavioral evaluation in agent-based simulation. It also underlays the secondary service degradation induced on helper lines when in-service vehicles are withdrawn to support the disrupted corridor. Rather than treating resilience as a single score, it evaluates complementary dimensions including vulnerability, adaptability, robustness, resilience loss, responsiveness, cost-based performance, emissions, and equity. The framework is implemented for the RER B transit line in the Ile-de-France (Paris) network. Results show that the coordinated strategy provides the most balanced resilience profile, combining high service continuity with lower total disruption cost than single mode alternatives, while also improving equity and maintaining competitive environmental performance. Sensitivity analysis further identifies the disruption conditions under which coordinated multimodal response is most valuable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于KPI的时间索引框架，用于评估城市公交系统中断响应方案的韧性，该框架结合优化模型与智能体仿真，从脆弱性、适应性、鲁棒性、韧性损失、响应性、成本、排放和公平性等多个维度进行评估，并在巴黎RER B线路上验证了协调多模式策略的优越性。
AI.motivation: 城市公共交通中断需要快速响应策略，但现有研究缺乏一个通用的决策支持框架来比较不同中断响应方案，无法使用统一的动态、乘客、运营商和环境导向指标进行评估。
AI.method: 提出了一个KPI驱动的、时间索引的韧性评估框架，将优化模型与基于智能体仿真的行为评估相结合，并考虑了辅助线路因车辆被抽调支持中断线路而产生的次级服务降级。从脆弱性、适应性、鲁棒性、韧性损失、响应性、成本绩效、排放和公平性等互补维度进行评估。
AI.result: 在巴黎RER B线路的案例实施中，协调多模式策略提供了最平衡的韧性特征，实现了高服务连续性和更低的总中断成本，同时改善了公平性并保持了有竞争力的环境绩效。敏感性分析进一步识别了协调多模式响应最具价值的条件。
AI.conclusion: 协调多模式策略相比单一模式替代方案具有更优的综合韧性表现，该方法为城市公共交通中断管理提供了有效的决策支持工具。

title: CAAL: Contextual Bandits based Online Hand-Craft Active Learning Strategy Selection
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to the NYRL 2025 Workshop
summary: The challenge with active learning algorithms is the uncertainty of the statistical distribution of unlabeled data, making it difficult to choose the best hand-crafted strategy. To address this, we introduced Contextual Adaptive Active Learning (CAAL). In CAAL, each "arm" represents a hand-crafted strategy. Unlike existing frameworks that select strategies based only on feedback from labeled data, we dynamically choose strategies for labeling batches of data using reward prediction with external context information. This general framework allows for customization with domain knowledge to design more effective rewards and context candidates. In addition, we experimentally show that CAAL outperforms the existing baseline adaptive strategy on public datasets using our reward and context design. Our results are consistent regardless of batch size in each iteration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出上下文自适应主动学习（CAAL）框架，通过奖励预测和外部上下文信息动态选择标注策略，实验表明其优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 主动学习算法面临未标注数据统计分布不确定性的挑战，难以选择最优的手工标注策略。
AI.method: CAAL将每种手工策略视为一个"臂"，利用奖励预测和外部上下文信息动态选择批次标注策略，支持领域知识定制奖励和上下文候选。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，CAAL优于现有基线自适应策略，且结果在不同批次大小下保持一致。
AI.conclusion: CAAL提供了一种通用的主动学习策略选择框架，可通过领域知识定制提升性能。

title: Hybrid E-Assessment in Higher Education: Semi-Automated Grading of Paper-Based Written Examinations
summary: This paper examines the limitations of fully digital and partially digital e-assessment approaches in summative examinations in higher education. The analysis focuses on the didactic narrowing caused by closed question formats and on organizational, technical, and legal constraints that become particularly relevant in large student cohorts. As an alternative, the paper proposes a hybrid e-assessment approach that retains paper-based, problem-oriented examination tasks while enabling semi-automated grading. Assessment-relevant intermediate results are encoded in a structured answer format, entered by students by hand, and subsequently captured from table fields. The central technical bottleneck is reliable recognition of handwritten characters under realistic examination conditions. Recent vision-capable large language models, combined with a two-pass validation principle and comparison against a solution key, can reduce misclassifications and thereby improve the validity, fairness, and scalability of summative assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了高等教育总结性考试中全数字和部分数字评估方法的局限性，并提出一种混合电子评估方法：保留纸质问题导向的考试任务，通过结构化答案格式由学生手写输入并捕获，结合视觉大语言模型进行半自动评分。
AI.motivation: 针对全数字和部分数字评估方法在高等教育总结性考试中的局限性——包括封闭式问题导致的教学窄化，以及大规模学生群体中面临的组织、技术和法律约束——提出更优的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出混合电子评估方法：保留纸质问题导向的考试任务，学生手写填写结构化答案格式，从表格字段捕获答案；采用视觉大语言模型进行手写字符识别，结合两遍验证原则和标准答案比对，减少误分类。
AI.result: 视觉大语言模型结合两遍验证原则与标准答案比对，可减少手写字符识别误分类，提升总结性评估的有效性、公平性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 混合电子评估方法通过保留纸质问题形式并结合半自动化评分，能够在现实考试条件下可靠识别手写字符，改善大规模总结性评估的效度、公平性和可扩展性。

title: The Easy, the Hard, and the Learnable: Confidence and Difficulty-Adaptive Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
summary: RL with verifiable rewards can substantially improve LLM reasoning, yet standard GRPO-style training often treats easy, hard, and learnable questions alike through uniform sampling and weighting, leading to inefficient compute allocation. We study GRPO by tracking token log-probabilities, group-normalized advantages, and the induced token-level update weights. This reveals three recurring dynamics as training proceeds: (1) confidence inflation, (2) advantage contraction, and (3) hierarchical convergence. These findings suggest that the utility of each update depends strongly on both question difficulty and the model's current competence. Motivated by this, we propose Confidence and Difficulty-adaptive Policy Optimization (CoDaPO), which assigns each question a bounded value from rollout confidence and empirical difficulty. CoDaPO then uses this value to reweight policy updates and resample high-value learnable questions within mini-batches, thereby increasing discovery within the learnable band under a fixed compute budget. Across twelve benchmarks, CoDaPO consistently improves accuracy over existing RL methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tmlr-group/CoDaPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoDaPO方法，通过置信度和难度自适应地重新加权策略更新并重采样高价值可学习问题，以解决GRPO训练中对难易问题统一处理导致的计算效率低下问题，在12个基准测试上持续优于现有RL方法。
AI.motivation: 标准GRPO训练对容易、困难、可学习的问题采用统一采样和加权，导致计算分配效率低下。通过分析GRPO中token对数概率、组归一化优势及更新权重，发现了置信度膨胀、优势收缩和层次收敛三种动态现象，表明更新效用强烈依赖于问题难度和模型当前能力。
AI.method: 提出Confidence and Difficulty-adaptive Policy Optimization (CoDaPO)，为每个问题分配一个基于rollout置信度和经验难度的有界值，用于重加权策略更新，并在小批量内重采样高价值的可学习问题，从而在固定计算预算下增加可学习带内的探索。
AI.result: 在12个基准测试上，CoDaPO一致性地优于现有强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应地关注可学习问题，CoDaPO能够更高效地分配计算资源，提升LLM在推理任务上的性能。

title: Can the Environment Speak for Itself? $T^{2}$-GRPO: A Turn-Trajectory Group Relative Policy Optimization for Caregiver Agents
summary: Optimizing large language models (LLMs) for long-horizon caregiver agents requires balancing delayed task objectives with immediate environment dynamics, such as patient distress and resistance. In dementia care, this balance is especially difficult: trajectory level rewards are too sparse for turn level credit assignment, while external LLM-based evaluators are costly and can misread fragmented or indirect patient responses. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{T}urn-\textbf{T}rajectory \textbf{G}roup \textbf{R}elative \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (\textbf{T$^{2}$-GRPO}), a framework that decouples caregiver RL into two normalized reward horizons and enforces safety through a binary hard veto. $T^2$-GRPO derives dense turn-level rewards directly from environment state transitions, measuring changes in patient distress and resistance from a frozen dementia patient simulator. These environment-grounded rewards are combined with trajectory-level evaluations through independent centered-rank normalization, which preserves heterogeneous reward signals and mitigates reward collapse. Extensive experiments on dementia caregivers show that T $^{2}$-GRPO outperforms competitive baselines, indicating a substantial improvement for emotionally sensitive caregiver scenarios that effectively handles immediate patient feedback, long-term care outcomes, and safety constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出T²-GRPO框架，通过将强化学习奖励解耦为回合级与轨迹级两个归一化奖励视野，并引入二元硬否决机制，解决痴呆症护理中长期任务目标与即时环境动态的平衡问题。该方法直接从环境状态转换中提取密集的回合级奖励，结合独立中心秩归一化避免奖励坍缩，在情感敏感的护理场景中显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在长期护理代理场景中面临延迟任务目标与即时环境动态（如患者痛苦和抗拒）的平衡难题。在痴呆症护理中，轨迹级奖励过于稀疏无法进行回合级信用分配，而外部基于LLM的评估器成本高且容易误读碎片化或间接的患者反馈。
AI.method: 提出T²-GRPO框架，将护理强化学习解耦为两个归一化奖励视野：（1）从冻结的痴呆症患者模拟器的环境状态转换中直接派生密集的回合级奖励，测量患者痛苦和抗拒的变化；（2）结合轨迹级评估，通过独立中心秩归一化保留异构奖励信号并缓解奖励坍缩；（3）通过二元硬否决机制强制执行安全性约束。
AI.result: 在痴呆症护理场景的广泛实验中，T²-GRPO在情感敏感的护理场景中优于竞争基线，能够有效处理即时患者反馈、长期护理结果和安全约束。
AI.conclusion: T²-GRPO通过解耦奖励视野和硬否决机制，为情感敏感的长期护理场景提供了一种有效的强化学习框架，显著改善了痴呆症护理代理的性能。

title: Minibatch Selection via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selecting minibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains. Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on computationally expensive proxy models to learn continuous domain weights. We propose PartitionSel, a cross-domain minibatch selection approach that maximizes a validation-guided gradient-matching utility under per-domain budgets encoded as a partition-matroid constraint. By coupling the per-domain budgets through a single utility, PartitionSel is designed to reduce redundancy in selections across domains. The proposed objective is weakly submodular and admits an orthogonal matching pursuit algorithm with provable approximation guarantees. Empirically, we evaluate PartitionSel for minibatch selection during the fine-tuning of Qwen2.5 and Llama-3 on MetaMathQA and Mol-Instructions. PartitionSel achieves robust gains over per-domain and domain-agnostic baselines on both benchmarks. It also reduces the number of conflicting gradient pairs within each batch, indicating that the cross-domain coupling translates into more compatible training updates.

AI.tldr: 提出PartitionSel方法，通过分区拟阵约束下的验证引导梯度匹配效用，实现跨域小批量选择，减少跨域冗余，提升大模型微调效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么在域内独立采样，要么依赖昂贵的代理模型学习连续域权重，缺乏既高效又能跨域协调的小批量选择方法。
AI.method: 提出PartitionSel，在分区拟阵约束（每个域有预算上限）下，最大化验证引导的梯度匹配效用（跨域共享单一效用函数），将问题建模为弱子模函数优化，并用正交匹配追踪算法求解。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5和Llama-3上微调MetaMathQA和Mol-Instructions，PartitionSel优于域内独立和域无关基线，且批次内梯度冲突对数量减少，说明跨域耦合带来了更兼容的更新。
AI.conclusion: 跨域耦合的梯度匹配效用能有效减少冗余选择，产生更一致的训练梯度更新，提升微调性能。

title: FAME: Forecastability-Aware Mixture of Experts for Heterogeneous Time Series Forecasting
summary: Large-scale retail and industrial forecasting systems contain many heterogeneous time series whose lifecycle, sparsity, volatility, seasonality, spectral patterns, and contextual sensitivity differ substantially. A single forecasting model rarely performs well across all regimes, while dense ensembles increase inference cost and provide limited insight into expert suitability. This paper studies forecastability-aware expert routing: learning how data characteristics determine the suitability of forecasting experts. We propose \method{}, a sparse mixture-of-experts framework that represents each series with a multidimensional forecastability fingerprint, mines expert-suitability targets from validation performance, and trains a cost-aware sparse router to activate a small budgeted set of experts for each series. Using a production-scale vending-machine sales dataset from Shandong New Beiyang (SNBC), where the forecasting component has been integrated into the replenishment-planning pipeline, together with public retail benchmarks, we show that expert suitability varies systematically across data regimes. On the industrial dataset with 5,000+ machines and 60M+ transactions, \method{} Top-2 reduces MSE by 12.4\% over the strongest single expert, LightGBM, while executing 1.92 experts per series on average. The deployed component produces demand forecasts, while inventory-oriented gains are estimated by an offline replay simulator under a fixed replenishment policy rather than by online intervention. The framework turns heterogeneous sales forecasting from heuristic model selection into data mining of forecastability patterns and expert specialization. Code is available at https://github.com/hit636/FAME

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAME框架，一种基于稀疏混合专家模型的预测能力感知专家路由方法，通过学习时间序列的预测能力指纹来动态选择最合适的预测专家，在工业级自动售货机数据集上Top-2路由将MSE降低12.4%，平均每序列仅激活1.92个专家。
AI.motivation: 大规模零售和工业预测系统中包含大量异质时间序列，其生命周期、稀疏性、波动性、季节性、频谱模式等特征差异很大。单一预测模型难以在所有场景下表现良好，而密集集成会增加推理成本且难以解释专家适用性。因此需要一种能感知时间序列预测能力并智能路由到合适专家的方法。
AI.method: 提出FAME框架：1) 为每个时间序列构建多维预测能力指纹（forecastability fingerprint）；2) 从验证集性能中挖掘专家适用性标签（expert-suitability targets）；3) 训练一个成本感知的稀疏路由器，每个序列仅激活少量预选专家。采用稀疏混合专家架构。
AI.result: 在山东新北洋（SNBC）的5000+台机器、6000万+交易记录的工业数据集上，FAME Top-2路由相比最强单专家LightGBM降低MSE 12.4%，平均每序列仅执行1.92个专家推理。同时在公开零售基准上也验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 专家适用性在不同数据场景下存在系统性差异，该框架将异构销售预测从启发式模型选择转变为预测能力模式的数据挖掘与专家专业化的学习过程。代码已开源。

title: Overcoming the Limits of Finite Difference Method; Physics-Informed Neural Network for Noisy High-Dimensional Heat Diffusion
summary: High-dimensional transient heat diffusion under noisy boundary conditions exposes a fundamental limitation of classical numerical methods: accuracy degrades catastrophically where physical noise is unavoidable. This paper presents a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) framework as a systematic solution to this problem across one, two, and three spatial dimensions, establishing clear operational regimes that redefine solver selection in noisy thermal systems. Under 20% boundary noise in 3D, PINN sustains approximately 91% accuracy while Finite Difference Method (FDM) collapses to 36%, a clear decisive advantage. This is further confirmed in a physical copper thermal system, where PINN reduces boundary reconstruction error by 3.3 times under realistic noise conditions. This noise resilience is accompanied by a dimensionality-driven efficiency crossover: PINN requires fewer spacetime nodes than FDM in 3D while achieving superior accuracy, exposing the true cost of classical discretization at scale. These findings reframe solver selection: the decisive axis is not accuracy alone, but noise exposure and dimensionality jointly. When noise and dimensionality are both high, the classical solver paradigm is insufficient; this work provides the foundation to justify PINN as the operational standard in such regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出物理信息神经网络（PINN）作为高维含噪边界条件下瞬态热扩散问题的系统性解决方案，证明了PINN在噪声环境下（如3D中20%边界噪声下保持91%准确率，而FDM仅36%）的显著优势，并揭示了维度驱动的效率交叉点：3D中PINN所需时空节点更少且精度更高。研究重新定义了求解器选择标准：噪声暴露和维度共同决定最优方法。
AI.motivation: 高维瞬态热扩散在含噪边界条件下，经典数值方法（如有限差分法）的精度会灾难性下降，而物理噪声在实际系统中不可避免，现有方法缺乏对此问题的系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 采用物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，分别在1D、2D、3D空间维度下对含噪声边界条件的热扩散问题建模，并与有限差分法（FDM）进行对比实验，同时在物理铜热系统上进行验证。
AI.result: 在3D中20%边界噪声下，PINN保持约91%准确率，FDM降至36%；在铜热系统中，PINN将边界重构误差降低3.3倍；3D场景下PINN所需时空节点少于FDM且精度更高。
AI.conclusion: 求解器选择的关键轴不仅是精度，而是噪声暴露与维度的联合影响；在高噪声、高维度条件下，经典求解器范式不足，PINN应作为该场景下的操作标准。

title: Order Matters: Unveiling the Hidden Impact of Macro Placement Sequences via Proxy-Guided LLM Evolution
summary: Macro placement is a fundamental step in modern chip physical design, playing a crucial role in determining the solution quality of high-dimensional combinatorial optimization problems. Despite recent advancements in machine learning for spatial coordinate determination, the temporal dimension of placement sequencing remains largely governed by static heuristics. In this work, we demonstrate that the placement sequence is not merely a preprocessing step but a decisive factor in optimization, where suboptimal early decisions trigger irreversible domino effects that constrain the solution space. To harness this unexplored dimension, we propose \textbf{OrderPlace}, a proxy-guided LLM evolution framework for automatically discovering macro placement order strategies. Instead of relying on manually crafted heuristics such as area- or connectivity-based ordering, OrderPlace explores a broader space of code-level policies, ranging from static scoring metrics to dynamic physics-inspired mechanisms. To mitigate the prohibitive cost of evaluating sequences, we introduce a lightweight proxy evaluation mechanism that efficiently filters candidates using a deterministic greedy probe. Experimental results on the standard ISPD 2005 benchmarks demonstrate that OrderPlace discovers novel ordering strategies. Compared with WireMask-EA and the state-of-the-art method EGPlace, OrderPlace reduces wirelength by 34.04\% and 14.08\%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出OrderPlace框架，利用代理引导的LLM进化自动发现宏布局顺序策略，在ISPD 2005基准上相比SOTA方法EGPlace减少14.08%的线长。
AI.motivation: 宏布局中放置顺序长期以来被静态启发式方法主导，而早期次优决策会引发不可逆的连锁反应限制解空间，亟需探索这一未被充分利用的时间维度。
AI.method: 提出OrderPlace框架，采用代理引导的LLM进化机制自动发现布局顺序策略；设计轻量级代理评估机制，使用确定性贪心探针高效过滤候选策略；探索从静态评分到动态物理启发机制的代码级策略空间。
AI.result: 在ISPD 2005基准上，相比WireMask-EA减少34.04%线长，相比EGPlace减少14.08%线长。
AI.conclusion: 放置顺序是优化中的关键决策因素而非预处理步骤，OrderPlace通过自动发现新颖的顺序策略显著提升了布局质量。

title: Enhancing AI Interpretability and Safety through Localised Architectures
summary: Recent advances in generative AI, especially powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), raise concerns over the interpretability, safety and sustainability of these large and opaque AI models. The power of such architectures is derived not only from the scalability of deep neural networks, but also massively parallel hardware such as GPU clusters. The diffuse nature of deep neural networks gives them great function-approximation capability when provided with sufficient training data but imposes a cost in interpretability and computational efficiency. Observing that localised machine learning (ML) models tend to be more interpretable and computationally efficient than deep neural networks on small datasets, we reason by analogy that similar advantages may apply to specific localised hardware ML architectures. We argue that localised architectures with lower bandwidth but higher expressivity per node have the potential to be fundamentally more interpretable than deep neural networks running on GPU clusters while remaining competitive for smaller datasets. We then evaluate the suitability of various hardware ML paradigms for implementing such localised architectures and evaluate their per-node expressivity, energy efficiency and practical maturity of the technology required.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生成式AI（特别是LLM和LRM）在可解释性、安全性和可持续性方面的挑战，并提出局部化机器学习架构（具有较低带宽但较高每节点表达能力）相比运行在GPU集群上的深度神经网络，在小数据集上可能更具可解释性和计算效率。文章还评估了多种硬件ML范式在实现这种局部化架构时的每节点表达能力、能效和技术成熟度。
AI.motivation: 当前大型生成式AI模型（LLM、LRM）存在可解释性差、安全隐患和可持续性不足的问题，其能力源于深度神经网络的规模化和GPU集群的并行计算，但带来了可解释性和计算效率上的代价。作者希望通过类比局部化ML模型在小数据集上的优势，探索局部化硬件架构是否能在保持竞争力的同时提高可解释性。
AI.method: 采用类比推理方法：从局部化机器学习模型（在小数据集上比深度神经网络更具可解释性和计算效率）出发，推理类似优势可能适用于局部化硬件ML架构。随后评估多种硬件ML范式（如模拟计算、神经形态计算、存内计算等）在实现局部化架构时的每节点表达能力、能效比和技术成熟度。
AI.result: 研究指出局部化架构（低带宽、高每节点表达能力）有潜力从根本上比运行在GPU集群上的深度神经网络更具可解释性，同时在较小数据集上保持竞争力。对多种硬件ML范式的评估涵盖了表达能力、能效和技术成熟度三个维度。
AI.conclusion: 局部化硬件ML架构是提升AI模型可解释性和可持续性的有前景方向，尤其适用于小数据集场景；但不同硬件范式在表达力、能效和成熟度之间需要权衡，未来工作需进一步推动相关技术的实用化。

title: Oversight Has a Capacity: Calibrating Agent Guards to a Subjective, Fatiguing Human
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures. Code and interactive demo: https://github.com/turangenesis/headroom
summary: As LLM agents begin to take real, irreversible actions (shell commands, file edits, deploys), the standard safety pattern is a human-in-the-loop approval gate: risky actions pause and wait for a person. We argue the gate is the easy part; the hard part is the judgment - which actions to stop - which the field evaluates against two false assumptions: that there is a ground-truth notion of "risky," and that the human reviewer is a perfect, infinitely-available oracle. On a hand-labeled set of 125 adversarially-weighted agent actions we show that (i) reviewers only moderately agree on what is risky (Fleiss' kappa = 0.52), so there is no single correct label; (ii) framing the guard as selective classification under asymmetric cost makes its operating limits measurable, and on hard inputs the guard cannot safely auto-decide; and (iii) when the reviewer is modeled as endogenous (fatiguing as escalation load grows), realized safety becomes an inverted-U in the escalation rate: more human oversight can make a system less safe, and the safety-optimal guard escalates below full escalation - a setting a load-aware policy also uses to resist a flooding attack that slips a malicious action past a fatigued reviewer. Agent oversight, framed this way, is not only a classification problem but a resource-allocation one: human attention is finite, and the guard's escalation policy spends it.
