Equipped with DeCAF's flowmap lookahead, we introduce a purpose-built inference-time framework that improves sampling through reward-guided search. Empirically, DeCAF-Boltz statistically improves over Boltz-1x in both accuracy (RMSD) and physical validity scores of protein-ligand poses at strict NFE budgets on the challenging Runs N' Poses, while also showing a more optimal Pareto frontier across all inference compute budgets on PoseBusters. Distilling the state-of-the-art Pearl cofolding model, DeCAF-Pearl outperforms diffusion-based cofolding models and matches its teacher on success rate while using 5x fewer NFEs. We release our code at https://github.com/genesistherapeutics/decaf.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeCAF框架，将最先进的全原子共折叠扩散模型蒸馏为流图（flow map），仅需少量推理步骤即可生成高质量3D生物分子复合物结构，并引入奖励引导的推理时搜索框架进一步提升采样质量。
AI.motivation: 现有全原子3D生物分子复合物生成主要依赖扩散模型，但迭代去噪过程计算成本高昂，限制了常规部署和推理时搜索技术的应用，亟需一种能大幅加速推理同时保持生成质量的方法。
AI.method: 基于去噪器的流图公式，结合端点损失和SE(3)刚性对齐；推导变量变换使模型能在EDM架构的σ-space噪声调度下运行，从而实现从预训练扩散模型的直接蒸馏；并设计奖励引导的推理时搜索框架。
AI.result: DeCAF-Boltz在RMSD和物理有效性上优于Boltz-1x，在Runs N' Poses数据集上以严格NFE预算取得更好结果；DeCAF-Pearl在仅用1/5 NFE的情况下匹配教师模型成功率，优于其他扩散共折叠模型。
AI.conclusion: DeCAF框架有效弥合了扩散模型高质量生成与高效推理之间的差距，为生物分子结构预测提供了一条实用且可扩展的路径，代码已开源。

title: From Rigid to Dynamic: Entropy-Guided Adaptive Inference for Long-Context LLMs
summary: Existing sparse attention and KV cache compression methods for long-context LLM inference typically apply fixed sparsity patterns or uniform budgets across all attention heads, overlooking the substantial variation in attention behavior among heads and contexts. We observe two distinct entropy patterns among attention heads: Rigid Heads, whose entropy stays near zero across input segments, and Dynamic Heads, whose entropy fluctuates significantly. Crucially, the distribution of these types is context-dependent and cannot be predetermined offline. We therefore propose EntropyInfer, a training-free framework that uses attention entropy to adaptively allocate compute at the granularity of individual heads and segments during prefilling. For decoding, we introduce a latent KV cache compression scheme that leverages generated output tokens, rather than prefill tokens alone, to identify and retain the most critical cache entries. Extensive experiments on Llama, Qwen and openPangu model series show that EntropyInfer consistently outperforms baselines including SnapKV, AdaKV, and CritiPrefill, achieving up to 2.39$\times$ end-to-end speedup beyond 100k tokens with minimal quality degradation compared to full attention. The code is released in https://github.com/SHA-4096/EntropyInfer.

AI.tldr: EntropyInfer是一个无需训练的框架，通过注意力熵动态分配计算资源，在预填充阶段区分刚性注意力头（低熵）和动态注意力头（高熵），并在解码阶段利用生成令牌进行潜在KV缓存压缩，从而实现长上下文LLM推理的2.39倍加速且质量损失极小。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏注意力和KV缓存压缩方法对所有注意力头采用固定的稀疏模式或均匀的预算分配，忽略了不同注意力头和行为之间的显著差异，导致计算效率低下。
AI.method: 1) 观察到两种注意力头熵模式：刚性头（熵接近零）和动态头（熵波动大），且分布是上下文相关的；2) 预填充阶段利用注意力熵自适应地为每个头和时间段分配计算资源；3) 解码阶段提出潜在KV缓存压缩方案，利用生成令牌而非仅预填充令牌来识别并保留最关键的缓存条目。
AI.result: 在Llama、Qwen和openPangu模型系列上，EntropyInfer持续优于SnapKV、AdaKV和CritiPrefill等基线方法，在超过10万令牌的长上下文推理中实现高达2.39倍的端到端加速，质量下降极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力熵的自适应分配和基于生成令牌的KV缓存压缩，EntropyInfer在长上下文LLM推理中实现了高效的加速，验证了注意力头行为的上下文依赖性及动态分配策略的有效性。

title: RiskNet: A large-scale dataset of AI risk incidents from news with alignment and multi-dimensional annotations
comment: The manuscript has been submitted to Scientific Data
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across socially consequential domains, reports of AI-related harms and failures have grown in frequency and diversity. Although existing governance frameworks articulate high-level principles for responsible AI, large-scale empirical resources for tracking and analyzing real-world AI risk incidents remain limited. Existing incident collections are often manually curated, relatively small in scale, and insufficient for continuous, data-driven monitoring and downstream computational analysis. To address this need, we present RiskNet, a large-scale dataset of AI risk incidents constructed from large-scale multilingual news sources. RiskNet applies a structured pipeline for AI risk news identification, event-level report screening, incident alignment, and multi-dimensional incident classification. The resulting resource organizes dispersed news reports into incident-centered records and provides benchmark datasets for event classification, incident alignment, and incident-level risk labeling. In its current release, RiskNet covers hundreds of millions of source records and yields a large-scale collection of AI risk-related reports, including aligned incident clusters and annotated benchmark subsets. The dataset is also accessible through an online platform for browsing and exploration. We describe the data sources, processing workflow, taxonomy design, and technical validation of the resource. RiskNet is intended to support downstream research on AI safety, governance, risk analysis, and benchmarking, as well as longitudinal and cross-source analyses of AI-related harms. By providing a structured and reusable empirical resource, RiskNet helps bridge the gap between high-level governance principles and the documented realities of AI risk incidents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RiskNet，一个基于大规模多语言新闻数据构建的AI风险事件数据集，通过结构化流水线实现AI风险新闻识别、事件报告筛选、事件对齐和多维度分类，包含数亿条源记录和对齐的事件簇及标注基准子集，旨在支持AI安全、治理、风险分析与基准测试等下游研究。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有治理框架阐述了负责任AI的高层原则，但缺乏大规模、可支持连续数据驱动监测和计算分析的真实世界AI风险事件实证资源，已有事件集合多为手工整理且规模较小。
AI.method: RiskNet构建了一个结构化流水线，包括：(1) 大规模多语言新闻来源中的AI风险新闻识别；(2) 事件级报告筛选；(3) 事件对齐；(4) 多维度事件分类。数据集提供事件分类、事件对齐和事件级风险标注的基准数据集。
AI.result: 当前版本覆盖数亿条源记录，生成大规模AI风险相关报告集合，包含对齐的事件簇和标注的基准子集，并通过在线平台提供浏览和探索功能。
AI.conclusion: RiskNet作为结构化的可复用实证资源，弥合了高层治理原则与AI风险事件记录现实之间的差距，可支持AI安全、治理、风险分析、基准测试以及纵向和跨来源的AI相关危害分析。

title: AI Scientists Are Only as Good as Their Evidence: A Stratified Ablation of Proprietary Data and Reasoning Skills in Drug-Asset Valuation
summary: AI Scientist agents are often evaluated as if capability were mainly a function of model quality, prompting, or reasoning scaffolds. We test a different hypothesis in drug-asset valuation: for knowledge-intensive scientific decisions, the limiting factor is often the evidence substrate the agent can access. We run a controlled three-arm ablation on a production valuation agent: A is a plain web-only LLM analyst, B adds public structured tools plus a 14-dimension valuation playbook, verifier, objectivity policy and red-team, and C adds the proprietary Noah AI corpus of curated pipeline, trial and deal intelligence. Across a 13-asset stratified benchmark, B improves calibration and audit discipline: tier-in-range accuracy rises from 0.80 to 0.89 and objectivity from 3.16 to 3.30. But B does not remove the factual ceiling. Under capability-superset accounting, A and B recover only 0.25 and 0.38 of the curated gold competitive record, while C recovers 0.96; on the curated long-tail subset, C reaches 0.93 vs. 0.26/0.30. Raw blind-panel decision quality is similar for A and B (7.01 vs. 6.96), so we introduce completeness-aware decision utility: informed decision-quality = decision-quality x gold-coverage. On this metric, C reaches 7.43 vs. 1.76/2.57 for A/B. Even a perfect non-proprietary-data report would be capped at 3.83 by B's coverage. The result is not that reasoning scaffolds are unimportant; they improve calibration and discipline. Rather, proprietary evidence sets the upper bound of what the AI Scientist can know and therefore decide.

AI.tldr: 在药物资产估值领域，知识密集型AI科学家的能力上限主要由可访问的证据基底决定，而非推理能力。专有知识库（Noah AI）使覆盖率从0.38提升至0.96，决策质量从2.57提升至7.43，即使最优推理框架也无法突破非专有数据的覆盖天花板（上限3.83）。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家的评估往往聚焦于模型质量、提示工程或推理框架，忽略了在知识密集型科学决策中，证据基底的可用性可能是更关键的制约因素。作者希望在药物资产估值这一具体场景中验证这一假设。
AI.method: 三组消融对照实验：(A) 纯网页LLM分析师；(B) 增加公开结构化工具+14维估值剧本、验证器、客观性策略与红队；(C) 在B基础上增加专有Noah AI语料库（包含管线、试验与交易情报）。在13项资产的分层基准上评估校准度、客观性、覆盖率与决策质量。
AI.result: (1) B提升校准与审计纪律（层级准确率0.80→0.89，客观性3.16→3.30）；(2) A和B仅恢复0.25和0.38的黄金竞争记录，C恢复0.96；长尾子集C达0.93 vs 0.26/0.30；(3) 原始决策质量A/B相近（7.01 vs 6.96）；(4) 引入覆盖感知决策效用后，C达7.43 vs 1.76/2.57；(5) 即使完美非专有报告也被覆盖率上限限制在3.83。
AI.conclusion: 推理框架虽能改善校准与纪律，但专有证据基底设定了AI科学家可知与可决策的上限。知识密集型科学决策中，证据可及性比推理能力更具决定性。

title: STAR-KV: Low-Rank KV Cache Compression via Soft Thresholding for Adaptive Rank Control
summary: Low-rank projection has emerged as a promising approach for compressing the KV cache by exploiting hidden-dimension redundancy. However, prior methods rely on fixed or heuristic rank selection and struggle to achieve aggressive compression with minimal accuracy degradation. We propose STAR-KV, an adaptive low-rank KV cache compression framework with fine-grained rank control. STAR-KV encompasses 1) a differentiable thresholding mechanism that enables optimal rank selection at both attention-head and block levels, 2) a hybrid decomposition strategy that applies different low-rank factorizations according to the sensitivity of key and value projections, and 3) a low-rank-aware mixed precision quantization that leverages data statistics for near lossless low-bit quantization. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and benchmarks, STAR-KV achieves up to 75% KV cache compression and up to 20x overall KV cache reduction when combined with quantization. Enabled by custom Triton-based GPU kernels, STAR-KV delivers up to 6.9x speedup for the attention module and 3.1x end-to-end generation throughput. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/PriyanshBhatnagar/STAR-KV.

AI.tldr: STAR-KV是一种自适应低秩KV缓存压缩框架，通过可微分阈值机制实现细粒度秩选择、混合分解策略和低秩感知混合精度量化，在多种LLM上达到75%压缩率，结合量化可实现20倍压缩，并带来6.9倍注意力模块加速和3.1倍端到端生成吞吐提升。
AI.motivation: 低秩投影虽能利用隐藏维度冗余压缩KV缓存，但现有方法依赖固定或启发式秩选择，难以在激进压缩下保持精度。需要一种自适应、细粒度的秩控制方法。
AI.method: 1) 可微分阈值机制实现注意力头和块级别的优化秩选择；2) 混合分解策略根据键/值投影敏感性采用不同低秩分解；3) 低秩感知混合精度量化利用数据统计实现近乎无损的低比特量化。
AI.result: 在多种LLM和基准测试上，STAR-KV实现75% KV缓存压缩，结合量化达20倍总体压缩；基于Triton的GPU内核实现注意力模块6.9倍加速和3.1倍端到端生成吞吐提升。
AI.conclusion: STAR-KV通过自适应秩选择和混合策略，在激进的KV缓存压缩下仍能保持模型精度，同时显著提升推理效率。

title: PRISM: Recovering Instruction Sets from Language Model Activations
summary: As LLMs are deployed as agents, reliable monitoring requires knowing not only what they output, but which instructions are steering their behavior. This is difficult when models infer unintended subgoals, follow contextual cues, or are influenced by prompt injections and hidden objectives. While activation-to-language methods suggest that hidden states can reveal natural-language information, existing approaches are not designed to recover the full set of simultaneous instructions, constraints, prohibitions, and subgoals active in agentic settings. We formalize this problem as instruction set retrieval and introduce PRISM, an activation-conditioned interpreter that decodes hidden states from a frozen target model into a faithful bullet list of active instructions. Unlike prior activation-to-language methods, PRISM is trained to recover instruction sets directly, using judge-guided GRPO to reward covered instructions and penalize unsupported ones. Across benign, constrained, prompt-injection, and hidden-objective settings, PRISM outperforms activation-to-language baselines, especially on security-relevant objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM，一种基于激活状态的条件解码器，能够从冻结的目标语言模型的隐藏状态中恢复出完整的指令集（包括约束、禁令、子目标等），在良性、受限、提示注入和隐藏目标等场景中优于现有激活到语言的方法，尤其在安全相关目标上表现突出。
AI.motivation: LLM作为智能体部署时，监控不仅需要知道输出内容，还需要知道哪些指令正在引导其行为。然而模型可能推断出未预期的子目标、遵循上下文线索，或受到提示注入和隐藏目标的影响，现有激活到语言的方法无法恢复代理场景中同时激活的全部指令、约束、禁令和子目标。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为指令集检索任务，提出PRISM——一种激活条件解码器，从冻结的目标模型的隐藏状态解码出可靠的指令列表。PRISM通过法官引导的GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）训练，奖励覆盖的指令并惩罚无依据的指令。
AI.result: 在良性、受限、提示注入和隐藏目标等四种设置下，PRISM在指令集检索任务上优于激活到语言的基线方法，尤其在安全相关目标上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PRISM能够有效从模型隐藏状态中恢复出完整的活跃指令集，为LLM代理的可靠监控提供了新方法，特别适用于检测安全相关的隐藏指令和目标。

title: The Spectral Dynamics and Noise Geometry of Muon
summary: Muon replaces a matrix gradient $G=UΣV^\top$ by its polar factor $UV^\top$. This keeps the singular directions selected by the gradient, but makes the update spectrum flat. We study the optimization bias created by this operation. Under explicit alignment assumptions, we prove that the polar update is the one-step entropy-maximizing choice among bounded updates that use the gradient singular directions and do not adapt to the current weight spectrum. In an underdetermined regression model, we derive exact singular-value dynamics for continuous-time Muon and identify a measurement-dependent condition under which the normalized spectrum moves toward equal nonzero singular values. This geometry also rules out a common low-rank interpretation: at fixed Frobenius norm, Muon's distinguished state has a flat spectrum, whereas nuclear-norm minimization favors spectral concentration. Controlled matrix-sensing experiments separate the effect from simple gradient rescaling, show that norm-matched gradient descent does not reproduce Muon, and recover the predicted flattening trend across broad ablations. In small NanoGPT pretraining, Muon preserves stable rank, has a broad learning-rate plateau, and improves validation loss relative to AdamW; in a matched small-ViT control, the ranking reverses. The resulting picture is regime-dependent: Muon is not universally superior, but its flat-spectrum bias can help when many spectral directions need to remain active.

AI.tldr: Muon通过将矩阵梯度替换为其极因子$UV^\top$来平坦化更新谱，在特定条件下具有熵最大化偏置，在欠定回归中推动谱均匀化，但效果依赖于任务领域，并非普遍优于AdamW。
AI.motivation: 研究Muon优化器（用极因子$UV^\top$替换梯度$G=UΣV^\top$）所产生的优化偏置，特别是其平坦化更新谱对学习动态的影响。
AI.method: 理论分析（熵最大化证明、连续时间奇异值动力学推导），矩阵感知实验（与梯度下降对比），以及小规模NanoGPT和ViT上的实际训练验证。
AI.result: 证明了极更新是熵最大化选择；推导了欠定回归中奇异值趋于等值的条件；实验表明Muon不同于简单梯度缩放，能平坦化谱；在NanoGPT上优于AdamW，但在小ViT上相反。
AI.conclusion: Muon并非普遍优越，其平坦谱偏置在需要许多谱方向保持活跃时有益，效果具有领域依赖性。

title: Self-Explainability in Self-Adaptive and Self-Organising Systems: Status and Research Directions
comment: Under review as a regular paper at ACM Transactions on Autonomous and Adaptive Systems (TAAS)
summary: The growing complexity of self-adaptive and self-organising systems, fuelled by advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI), has made them increasingly difficult to understand and trust. While Explainable AI aims to provide insight into AI decision-making, a more advanced goal is for systems to explain themselves - an ability referred to as Self-Explainability (SX). This article presents a systematic literature review on SX, analysing existing approaches, including their domains, targets, and evaluation methods. The review develops a unified definition and taxonomy of SX and introduces Levels of Self-Explainability, providing a framework for positioning current and future research. Our results show that most SX approaches remain conceptual, with few practical implementations. Moreover, there is currently no formal or de facto standard for evaluating SX, highlighting a major research gap. This work thus establishes a foundation and roadmap for advancing Self-Explainability in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文对自解释性（Self-Explainability, SX）进行了系统性文献综述，提出了统一的定义与分类体系，并引入“自解释性层级”框架。研究发现大多数SX方法仍停留在概念层面，缺乏实际实现，且尚无正式或事实上的评估标准。
AI.motivation: 随着AI驱动的自适应和自组织系统日益复杂，理解和信任这些系统变得越来越困难。虽然可解释AI（XAI）致力于揭示AI决策过程，但更高级的目标是让系统具备自我解释的能力（SX）。现有研究缺乏对SX的系统性梳理和统一框架。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，对现有SX方法进行梳理，分析其应用领域、目标对象和评估方法，并在基础上构建统一的SX定义、分类体系以及自解释性层级框架。
AI.result: 大多数SX方法仍处于概念阶段，实际实现较少；目前不存在正式或事实上的SX评估标准，这构成了主要的研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 本文为推进复杂系统中的自解释性奠定了基础和路线图，明确了当前研究的不足与未来方向。

title: When Are Neural Interaction Discoveries Real? Identifiability, Recoverability, and a Pre-Fit Diagnostic
summary: When a neural time-series model reports that one variable modulates another's effect on a target, is the discovered interaction a property of the data or an artifact of model flexibility? We argue that this is fundamentally a question of identifiability, governed by the geometry of the observed input support rather than by the specific neural architecture. We study the problem in a multiplicative-gating extension of neural additive vector autoregression (GNAVAR), in which source contributions are modulated by other lagged variables. We show that representational capacity is not identifiability: dependent inputs induce leakage between edge-specific interaction terms, and low-dimensional support permits distinct interaction decompositions that agree on the observed data while differing elsewhere. We then prove a population identifiability theorem for normalized minimal GNAVAR decompositions under explicit support conditions, including settings with shared modulators. The theory yields a simple practitioner-facing diagnostic: the effective rank of the joint lag-block covariance predicts, before fitting, whether interaction recovery is feasible for a given candidate set. When the candidate set is unknown, a two-seed stability check provides a practical operational test. The same support condition organizes empirical outcomes into the three states predicted by the theory. Our results show that interaction recoverability depends on support geometry, that effective rank provides a practical pre-fit diagnostic, and that instability across independent fits is a characteristic signature of non-identifiable interaction discovery. The identifiability phenomenon, the support condition, and the instability signature are model-agnostic; GNAVAR is the vehicle that makes them provable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经时间序列模型中变量间交互作用的可识别性问题，发现交互作用的可恢复性取决于观测输入的支持几何结构（低维支持会导致不同分解无法区分），而非具体模型架构。作者提出有效秩可作为拟合前的诊断指标，两种子稳定性检验可作为操作性测试。在乘法门控神经加性向量自回归模型（GNAVAR）上证明了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 当神经时间序列模型报告一个变量调节另一个变量对目标的影响时，发现的交互作用是数据本身的属性还是模型灵活性的伪影？这是一个可识别性问题，现有研究尚未从支持几何角度系统分析。
AI.method: 在乘法门控扩展的神经加性向量自回归模型（GNAVAR）框架下，证明可表示性不等于可识别性：依赖输入导致边特定交互项之间的泄露，低维支持允许在观测数据上一致但在其他地方不同的多种交互分解。提出归一化最小GNAVAR分解的群体可识别性定理及有效秩诊断指标。
AI.result: 交互恢复能力取决于支持几何结构；有效秩是实用的拟合前诊断指标；独立拟合之间的不稳定性是非可识别交互发现的特征信号。实证结果与理论预测的三种状态一致。
AI.conclusion: 交互可恢复性由输入支持几何结构决定，有效秩可作为拟合前的诊断工具，不同初始化的拟合不稳定性是非可识别的标志。这些现象、支持条件和不稳定性信号是模型无关的，GNAVAR仅作为证明载体。

title: Provably Efficient Personalized Multi-Objective Bandits with Proactive Conversational Queries
summary: Personalized decision-making in multi-objective bandits requires learning user-specific trade-offs among competing objectives. Since arm utility depends on both unknown rewards and unknown preferences, existing methods infer preferences only from utility feedback, entangling preference learning with reward exploration. In practice, however, users often reveal their priorities through proactive conversational queries (e.g., "cheap and clean hotel"), yet this structured signal is not leveraged. We formalize a proactive query-based framework in which user queries provide structured preference signals. Modeling these signals via a Plackett-Luce subset choice model, we show that query-only learning is insufficient due to a fundamental shift-invariance barrier. To resolve this, we introduce MO-PQUCB, a hybrid algorithm that integrates query-based preference anchoring with bandit feedback through shift-invariant regularization and dual-exploration UCB. We prove that proactive queries accelerate preference estimation and yield improved regret scaling over prior preference-aware MO-MAB methods. Under corrupted queries, we further characterize statistical limits and design a robust estimator achieving near-optimal performance when the corruption is sparse. Experiments validate both theoretical and practical gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MO-PQUCB算法，通过融合主动查询偏好信号（如"便宜又干净的酒店"）与多目标摇臂赌博机反馈，利用Plackett-Luce子集选择模型建模查询信号，并通过移位不变正则化和双探索UCB解决偏好学习与奖励探索的纠缠问题，理论证明主动查询加速偏好估计并改进遗憾界，在查询被污染时也设计了鲁棒估计器。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅从效用反馈推断用户偏好，将偏好学习与奖励探索纠缠在一起，未利用用户通过主动查询（如"便宜又干净的酒店"）提供的结构化偏好信号。
AI.method: 1) 形式化主动查询框架，用Plackett-Luce子集选择模型建模查询信号；2) 证明仅靠查询学习存在移位不变性障碍；3) 提出MO-PQUCB混合算法，结合基于查询的偏好锚定与摇臂反馈，采用移位不变正则化和双探索UCB；4) 针对查询被污染场景设计鲁棒估计器。
AI.result: 理论证明主动查询加速偏好估计，改进遗憾界；在查询被污染时达到接近最优性能；实验验证理论和实际增益。
AI.conclusion: 主动查询信号可有效提升多目标摇臂赌博机中个性化决策的偏好学习效率，混合框架显著优于仅靠反馈或仅靠查询的方法。

title: Optical Reasoning: Rethinking Images as an Expressive Reasoning Medium Beyond Text
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) improves the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) and has been extended to Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). More recent work further moves from text-based multimodal reasoning toward interleaved-modal reasoning, where intermediate steps can incorporate both textual rationales and visual evidence. In this work, we propose a bolder and more ambitious idea: could images alone serve as the reasoning medium for both language and multimodal tasks? To explore this, we propose optical reasoning, which treats images as a standalone reasoning medium. We instantiate this concept with two variants: typographic-based optical reasoning, which optimizes visual layouts for compact rationale rendering, and graphical-based optical reasoning, which composes text and graphical elements into structured visual rationales. Across mathematical, scientific, and interleaved-modal reasoning benchmarks, optical reasoning can match or even exceed traditional text reasoning while reducing reasoning tokens by an average of 28.57% on language tasks and 16% on multimodal tasks, achieving 1.96 times the token efficiency of text reasoning. These results show that images can effectively and efficiently encode rationales while providing a unified visual canvas for reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“光学推理”（Optical Reasoning）概念，将图像作为独立的推理媒介，通过排版型和图形型两种变体，在语言和多模态任务上匹配或超越传统文本推理，同时减少28.57%-16%的推理token，实现1.96倍的token效率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT方法虽已从纯文本推理扩展到交错模态推理（文本+视觉），但尚未探索纯粹以图像作为推理媒介的可能性。本文旨在验证图像能否独立承担推理媒介的角色，以统一语言和多模态任务的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出光学推理（Optical Reasoning），包含两种变体：1）排版型光学推理（typographic-based），优化视觉布局以紧凑呈现推理过程；2）图形型光学推理（graphical-based），将文本与图形元素组合为结构化视觉推理过程。
AI.result: 在数学、科学和交错模态推理基准上，光学推理匹配或超越传统文本推理；语言任务减少28.57%推理token，多模态任务减少16%；整体token效率达到文本推理的1.96倍。
AI.conclusion: 图像能有效且高效地编码推理过程，同时提供统一的视觉推理画布，为多模态推理提供了新的范式。

title: Sparrow: Sparse Rollout for Stable and Efficient Long-context RL of Large Language Models
summary: Despite being powerful, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) induces extremely long COT, making it computationally expensive. Since RLVR per-step cost is dominated by long-context rollout generation, sparse attention offers a promising way to accelerate dense rollout. However, sparse rollouts require a delicate stability-efficiency tradeoff: overly aggressive sparsity causes collapse, while overly lenient sparsity gives insufficient speedup. In this work, we study this tradeoff through sparse-to-dense actor-policy mismatch. We first observe that sparse rollout collapse is not driven by uniform degradation across tokens: most sparse tokens align perfectly with dense even under aggressive sparsity. Motivated by this, we hypothesize that sparse rollout training remains stable if the lower tail of per-token actor-policy mismatch stays above a critical threshold throughout the trajectory. We introduce a dynamic sparsity schedule that keeps this tail statistic constant during generation and validate our hypothesis. Across Qwen3 thinking-family models, keeping the tail mismatch statistic near a consistent threshold generally enables stable training. We then use a cost model to find the sparsity schedule for maximum speedup under this mismatch threshold, achieving 2.2x, 2.4x, and 2.0x rollout speedups when training Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Qwen3-8B. Empirically, we show the thresholds generalize to a larger model (Qwen3-14B) and another RL domain (coding). Finally, our analysis naturally motivates DistillSparse: lightweight LoRA-based distillation on sparse rollout lets more aggressive sparsity reach the same sparse-to-dense mismatch threshold, yielding higher speedup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态稀疏度调度方法，通过保持每token策略不匹配的下尾统计量恒定，在不导致训练崩溃的前提下加速RLVR中的密集rollout生成，在Qwen3系列模型上实现2.0x-2.4x加速，并引入DistillSparse蒸馏方法进一步提升加速比。
AI.motivation: RLVR虽强大但产生极长COT，计算开销大；稀疏注意力可加速密集rollout，但稀疏与训练稳定性之间存在难以平衡的权衡：过于激进的稀疏导致训练崩溃，过于保守则加速不足。
AI.method: 1. 发现稀疏rollout崩溃并非所有token均匀退化，多数token即使在激进稀疏下仍与密集对齐；2. 提出假设：若每token策略不匹配的下尾统计量在整个轨迹中保持高于临界阈值，训练则稳定；3. 引入动态稀疏度调度，在生成过程中保持该尾统计量恒定；4. 使用成本模型在给定不匹配阈值下寻找最大加速的稀疏度调度；5. 提出DistillSparse：轻量LoRA蒸馏使更激进稀疏能达到相同的稀疏-密集不匹配阈值。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B上分别实现2.2x、2.4x、2.0x rollout加速；阈值泛化到Qwen3-14B及编程RL领域；DistillSparse进一步提升加速比。
AI.conclusion: 基于每token策略不匹配下尾统计量的动态稀疏度调度能有效平衡稀疏加速与训练稳定性，且该方法具有良好的可扩展性和泛化性，DistillSparse蒸馏策略可进一步提升加速效果。

title: Next-Token Prediction Learns Generalisable Representations of Sleep Physiology
summary: Foundation models offer a promising route to compress multi-modal physiological signals into compact representations of human health, with broad applications across sleep medicine, cardiology, neurology and other healthcare domains. Existing models have typically been trained with masked-reconstruction or contrastive objectives. However, masked reconstruction may be poorly suited to the stochastic nature of these signals, while contrastive approaches rely on positive-pair definitions despite the semantic invariances of physiological signals being poorly understood. In this work, we show that next-token prediction is a simple and scalable alternative. We develop Hypnos, a multi-modal sleep foundation model trained using eight different sensing modalities (e.g. EEG, ECG, respiratory signals) drawn from over 20,000 overnight polysomnography recordings. We tokenize each modality into streams of discrete tokens using residual vector quantization, then train a large auto-regressive RQ-Transformer to jointly predict the next token across all modalities in parallel. After training, Hypnos can be applied to continuous streams of sensor data from any subset of supported modalities, generating embeddings for downstream tasks. Across a range of benchmarks, Hypnos significantly outperforms existing foundation models. In sleep stage classification, we match the performance of strong supervised baselines on held-out test sets whilst using \(100\times\) less labelled data. Hypnos even generalises to daytime physiology, surpassing a dedicated ECG foundation model at detecting atrial fibrillation. Our results demonstrate that next-token prediction is a strong self-supervised objective for representation learning from multi-modal physiological signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Hypnos，一种基于下一token预测的多模态睡眠基础模型，在20,000+夜间多导睡眠图上使用8种传感模态训练，通过残差向量量化将每个模态离散化为token流，并训练自回归RQ-Transformer并行预测所有模态的下一token。实验表明，Hypnos在睡眠阶段分类等下游任务中显著优于现有基础模型，仅需1%的标注数据即可匹配强监督基线性能，并能泛化到日间生理信号分析，在房颤检测上超越专用ECG基础模型。
AI.motivation: 现有生理信号基础模型主要采用掩码重建或对比学习目标，但掩码重建不适合生理信号的随机特性，对比学习需要定义正样本对而生理信号的语义不变性尚不明确。作者探索更简单可扩展的下一token预测作为替代方案。
AI.method: 使用残差向量量化(RVQ)将8种模态(EEG、ECG、呼吸信号等)的原始信号分别离散化为离散token序列，然后训练一个大规模自回归RQ-Transformer模型，以并行方式联合预测所有模态的下一token。训练数据来自20,000+夜间多导睡眠图记录。
AI.result: Hypnos在多项基准测试中显著优于现有基础模型。在睡眠阶段分类任务中，仅使用1%的标注数据即可匹配强监督基线的性能。模型还能泛化到日间生理信号，在房颤检测任务上超越专用ECG基础模型。
AI.conclusion: 下一token预测是多模态生理信号表示学习中一种简单且可扩展的强自监督学习目标，为睡眠医学、心脏病学、神经学等领域的应用提供了有效方案。

title: Not Just After One: Sleep-Inspired Replay Prevents Catastrophic Forgetting After Sequential Tasks
summary: One of the critical limitations of artificial neural networks is their lack of ability to continually learn: training on new tasks often leads to interference and forgetting of the previous ones. While several algorithms have been proposed to protect old memories from interference, they are typically applied during or immediately after each new episode of training. In contrast, humans and animals can learn continuously, acquiring multiple new memories during active learning before consolidating all of them into long-term storage. Here we show that multiple new tasks can be trained sequentially before an unsupervised sleep-like replay phase is applied to partially restore performance across all previously learned tasks. Our study further suggests that task-specific information remains resilient to new training but decays gradually as network is trained on new tasks. These findings point to novel principles for developing a broad range of continual learning AI solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在连续学习场景中，多个新任务可依次训练，然后通过一个无监督的类睡眠重放阶段来部分恢复所有先前学习任务的性能，从而模拟人类和动物的主动学习与记忆巩固过程。
AI.motivation: 人工神经网络在连续学习时存在灾难性遗忘问题，而人类和动物能够通过主动学习获取多个新记忆后再将其巩固为长期存储。作者受此启发，试图探索一种更符合生物学习机制的连续学习方案。
AI.method: 在多个新任务上依次进行训练（主动学习阶段），随后应用无监督的类睡眠重放阶段，通过重放机制部分恢复先前任务的性能。
AI.result: 多个新任务可以顺序训练后，通过类睡眠重放部分恢复所有先前学习任务的性能；任务特定信息在新训练中保持韧性，但会随着新任务的持续训练而逐渐衰减。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为开发更广泛的连续学习AI解决方案提供了新原则，表明将主动学习与离线巩固阶段分离是缓解灾难性遗忘的有效策略。

title: From 0-to-1 to 1-to-N: Reproducible Engineering Evidence for MetaAI Recursive Self-Design
summary: Recursive self-design refers to AI-assisted modification of the mechanisms by which an AI system is built, evaluated, and improved. This paper treats MetaAI not as a mature paradigm, but as a working term for a human-seeded, AI-expanded development pattern in which the design space itself becomes a target of modification. We propose an operational evidence framework with four criteria: inspectable target system, meta-level modifier, feedback-directed selection, and recursive continuation. We then map public systems, including Darwin Goedel Machine (DGM), STOP, Goedel Agent, and ShinkaEvolve, against these criteria. DGM provides the most direct currently reported evidence: its published results show improvement from 20% to 50% on SWE-bench Verified and from 14.2% to 30.7% on full Polyglot after 80 iterations, with ablations suggesting that both open-ended exploration and self-improvement contribute. Finally, we provide MetaAI-Mini, a reproducible HumanEval-based protocol and codebase. Because no completed model run is included in this build, MetaAI-Mini is reported as a protocol rather than as an experimental result.

AI.tldr: 本文定义并形式化了“递归自设计”（即AI辅助修改自身构建机制）的概念，提出四要素证据框架，并基于四个公开系统（以DGM为例）进行映射分析，最后提供一个可复现的HumanEval协议MetaAI-Mini。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI系统能力不断增强，但如何让AI参与自身构建机制的改进仍缺乏清晰定义和评估标准。本文将MetaAI作为研究术语而非成熟范式提出，旨在建立统一的证据框架来识别和评估这类系统。
AI.method: 提出四要素操作证据框架：(1) 可检查的目标系统；(2) 元级修改器；(3) 反馈导向的选择；(4) 递归延续。然后将DGM、STOP、Goedel Agent、ShinkaEvolve四个公开系统映射到该框架进行对比分析，最后提供MetaAI-Mini可复现协议。
AI.result: DGM提供了最直接的证据：80次迭代后在SWE-bench Verified上从20%提升至50%，在完整Polyglot上从14.2%提升至30.7%，消融实验表明开放性探索和自我改进均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: MetaAI-Mini由于未包含完整模型运行，仅作为协议而非实验结果报告，表明递归自设计研究仍处于早期阶段，需要进一步的可复现实验验证。

title: Theoretical Foundations of Continual Learning via Drift-Plus-Penalty
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
summary: In many real-world settings, data streams are nonstationary and arrive sequentially, requiring learning systems to adapt continuously without retraining from scratch. Continual learning (CL) addresses this challenge by incorporating new tasks while mitigating catastrophic forgetting, where learning new information degrades performance on previously acquired knowledge. We introduce a control-theoretic perspective on CL that explicitly regulates the evolution of forgetting, framing adaptation as a controlled process subject to long-term stability constraints. We focus on replay-based CL, where a finite memory buffer stores representative samples from prior tasks. We propose COntinual Learning with Drift-Plus-Penalty (COLD), a continual learning framework based on the Drift-Plus-Penalty (DPP) principle from stochastic optimization. To facilitate analysis, we also consider an oracle variant, COLD-ORACLE, as a reference benchmark. At each task, both methods minimize the current task loss while maintaining a virtual queue that tracks deviations from long-term stability on previously learned tasks, capturing the stability-plasticity trade-off as a regulated dynamical process. We establish stability and convergence guarantees that characterize this trade-off through a tunable control parameter. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that COLD consistently outperforms a broad range of state-of-the-art CL methods while providing competitive and controllable forgetting behavior through explicit regulation of stability and plasticity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COLD框架，从控制论视角将持续学习中的遗忘建模为受控过程，利用虚拟队列追踪长期稳定性偏差，通过漂移加惩罚原则在可调控制参数下显式调节稳定性-可塑性权衡，在标准基准上优于多种SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 数据流非平稳且顺序到达，现有持续学习方法虽能缓解灾难性遗忘，但缺乏对遗忘过程的显式调控机制，无法在稳定性与可塑性之间进行可控权衡。
AI.method: 基于控制论视角，将持续学习中的适应性视为受长期稳定性约束的受控过程。采用随机优化中的漂移加惩罚（DPP）原则，在每一任务中最小化当前任务损失的同时维护一个虚拟队列，该队列追踪先前所学任务上长期稳定性的偏离程度，从而将稳定性-可塑性权衡建模为可调节的动态过程。
AI.result: 在标准基准实验上，COLD持续优于多种最先进的持续学习方法，同时通过显式调控稳定性与可塑性，实现了具有竞争力且可控的遗忘行为。
AI.conclusion: 控制论视角为持续学习中的遗忘调控提供了理论框架，COLD通过可调控制参数有效平衡稳定性与可塑性，为持续学习系统提供了稳定性与收敛性保证。

title: Frequency-based Constrained Sampling for Interval Patterns
summary: Output space pattern sampling is a powerful alternative to exhaustive pattern mining for exploring large pattern spaces, as it enables users to focus on representative patterns drawn according to a chosen interestingness measure. In this paper, we address the problem of sampling interval patterns under user-defined syntactic constraints. We introduce CFips, a sampling approach that incorporates constraints directly into the sampling procedure. The approach relies on a multi-step sampling framework and supports several syntactic constraints by decomposing them into elementary predicates on interval bounds while preserving exact sampling guarantees. We formally prove that CFips samples interval patterns proportionally to their frequency within the constrained pattern space. The experimental results show that integrating constraints into the sampling procedure enables to complete mining tasks that would otherwise fail within a given time out.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CFips，一种在带用户定义句法约束的区间模式空间中，按频率成比例进行精确采样的方法，通过将约束分解为区间边界上的基本谓词并嵌入到采样过程中，在保证采样精确性的同时，提升了挖掘效率。
AI.motivation: 传统穷举模式挖掘在大规模模式空间中效率低下，而输出空间模式采样虽能提供代表性模式，但现有方法难以在采样过程中融入用户定义的句法约束，导致需先枚举再筛选，效率受限。
AI.method: 提出CFips方法，采用多步采样框架，将句法约束分解为作用于区间边界的基本谓词，直接在采样过程中融入这些约束，同时保持精确采样的理论保证。
AI.result: 理论证明CFips能在受约束模式空间中按频率成比例采样区间模式；实验表明，将约束集成到采样过程后，能在给定超时内完成原本无法完成的挖掘任务。
AI.conclusion: 将约束直接嵌入采样过程是处理大规模带约束模式空间的有效策略，CFips兼顾了采样的精确性与计算效率。

title: Beyond Linear Activation Steering: Invertible Latent Transformations for Controlling LLM Behavior
summary: Activation steering provides a lightweight inference-time mechanism for controlling large language models (LLMs) by modifying their internal activation vectors toward desired behaviors. Most existing methods compute a fixed steering direction in the original activation space, typically from pairs of contrastive examples using mean differences, linear probes, or arbitrary separability criteria. While effective to a certain extent, these methods treat behavioral control as a global, linear, additive offset: the same direction is applied across inputs, and behaviors are linearly separable. This can be restrictive when behavioral features vary nonlinearly across the activation space or lie on curved and anisotropic manifolds, where the optimal intervention may be input-dependent. To address this limitation, we propose INNSteer, a nonlinear activation steering framework based on invertible latent transformations. Rather than searching for a better steering vector in the original representation space, INNSteer learns a lightweight invertible neural network $φ$ that maps an LLM's activations into a latent space where behavioral classes are more amenable to linear control. At inference time, activations are mapped through $φ$, steered in the latent space, and mapped back through the exact inverse transformation $φ^{-1}$. This makes a simple latent-space translation become a nonlinear, input-dependent intervention in the original activation space. Across experiment settings on multiple LLM families, scales, behavioral traits, and safety benchmarks, INNSteer consistently improves model control over linear, transport-based, and nonlinear steering baselines while largely preserving generation fluency.

AI.tldr: INNSteer提出了一种基于可逆神经网络的非线性激活引导框架，通过将LLM的激活映射到潜在空间进行线性控制，再逆映射回原始空间，实现输入依赖的非线性干预，在多个模型和基准上优于现有线性/非线性引导方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的激活引导方法通常（1）在原始激活空间中计算固定的全局线性偏移方向，（2）假设行为特征在激活空间中线性可分，但实际中行为特征常呈现非线性变化、弯曲各向异性流形，导致最优干预是输入相关的，现有方法无法处理这种依赖性。
AI.method: 学习一个轻量级可逆神经网络φ，将LLM的激活映射到潜在空间；在潜在空间中进行线性引导（简单平移）；通过精确逆变换φ⁻¹将修改后的潜在表示映射回原始激活空间，从而在原始空间中实现非线性的、输入依赖的干预。
AI.result: 在多个LLM家族、不同规模、多种行为特征和安全基准上，INNSteer在模型控制效果上一致优于线性引导、基于传输的引导和其他非线性引导基线，同时较好地保持了生成流畅性。
AI.conclusion: 通过可逆非线性变换将线性控制转化为输入依赖的非线性干预，能够更有效地处理激活空间中复杂的行为特征分布，为LLM行为控制提供了更灵活、更有效的推理时机制。

title: SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks
summary: Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general interactive spatial understanding. We introduce SpatialWorld, a unified benchmark designed specifically for evaluating the interactive spatial understanding of multimodal agents in complex real-world tasks. Integrating eight heterogeneous simulation backends under a shared, simulator-agnostic protocol, SpatialWorld features 760 human-annotated tasks across diverse domains (e.g., household routines, travel, social collaboration). Agents must solve tasks under vision-only partial observability, actively gathering egocentric visual evidence and expressing decisions via a unified, text-based action interface native to MLLMs. For reliable evaluation, each task includes a human-validated initial state, a reference trajectory, and a terminal-state verifier. Evaluating 15 advanced agents reveals that robust spatial task solving remains challenging: the strongest model, GPT-5, achieves an average task success rate (TSR) of only 17.4%, while the leading open-source model, Qwen-3.5, reaches 14.1%. Further analysis exposes a clear mismatch between task success and execution efficiency, alongside substantial domain-specific performance variations. These bottlenecks in active exploration and long-horizon planning position SpatialWorld as a rigorous testbed for future spatial agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpatialWorld——一个统一的多模态智能体交互式空间理解基准，包含760个人工标注任务、8种异构仿真后端，在15个先进智能体评估中最高任务成功率仅17.4%，揭示了主动探索与长程规划两大瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理基准主要依赖被动评估（如静态VQA）或特定于模拟器的流水线，无法评估通用的交互式空间理解能力，亟需一个统一、模拟器无关的评测基准来检验多模态智能体在复杂真实世界任务中的空间推理表现。
AI.method: 集成8种异构仿真后端，采用共享的模拟器无关协议；构建760个人工标注任务，覆盖家庭日常、旅行、社交协作等多个领域；智能体在仅视觉部分可观测条件下主动收集自我中心视觉证据，通过统一的基于文本的动作接口表达决策；每个任务包含人工验证的初始状态、参考轨迹和终止状态验证器。
AI.result: 评估15个先进智能体，最强模型GPT-5平均任务成功率仅17.4%，领先开源模型Qwen-3.5达14.1%；任务成功率与执行效率之间存在明显不匹配，且存在显著的领域特定性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 交互式空间任务求解仍具挑战性，主动探索和长程规划是当前多模态智能体的核心瓶颈，SpatialWorld为未来空间智能体的发展提供了严格的测试平台。

title: The Confidence Trap: Calibration Attacks for Graph Neural Networks
summary: While confidence calibration is essential for trustworthy decision-making in safety-critical applications, the robustness of calibrated GNNs to adversarial structural perturbations remains largely unexplored. However, studying calibration attacks on graphs presents unique technical challenges: (1) the discrete nature of graph structures complicates gradient-based optimization, (2) existing underconfidence objectives fail to drive predictions toward uniform distributions, and (3) GNNs are highly sensitive to edge perturbations, often causing unintended label changes that violate attack constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a \textbf{Unified Graph Calibration Attack (UGCA)} framework designed for \textbf{worst-case (white-box) analysis} of GNN calibration robustness. UGCA introduces a KL-divergence loss to encourage uniform predictive distributions, a reranking mechanism to reduce label flipping, a hybrid loss to recover labels when violations occur, and beam search to explore a broader adversarial search space. We further provide theoretical insights linking model generalization, dataset complexity, and calibration vulnerability, showing that models with higher accuracy or trained on datasets with more classes are more susceptible under this threat model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UGCA substantially increases Expected Calibration Error while preserving classification accuracy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CaptainCuong/Graph-Calibration-Attack.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UGCA框架，用于评估图神经网络在对抗性结构扰动下的校准鲁棒性，通过KL散度损失、重排序机制、混合损失和束搜索等方法，显著提高了期望校准误差同时保持分类精度。
AI.motivation: 尽管置信度校准对于安全关键应用中的可信决策至关重要，但校准后的GNN对对抗性结构扰动的鲁棒性尚未被探索。现有方法面临图结构离散性、欠置信目标失效以及边扰动导致标签翻转等挑战。
AI.method: 提出UGCA框架，包含：(1) KL散度损失促使预测分布均匀化；(2) 重排序机制减少标签翻转；(3) 混合损失在违规时恢复标签；(4) 束搜索扩展对抗搜索空间。并提供理论分析连接模型泛化、数据集复杂度与校准脆弱性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明UGCA在保持分类精度的同时，显著提高了期望校准误差（ECE）。
AI.conclusion: 高精度模型或在多类别数据集上训练的模型在该威胁模型下更容易受到攻击。代码已开源提供复现。

title: Correlation Is Not Enough: Embedding Human Metadata for Individual Causal Discovery
summary:
Ask a pretrained biomedical language model whether "cortisol 28 ug/dL" and "stock-market volatility" are related, and it returns a cosine similarity of 0.83 on a scale where 1.0 means identical. The two share no mechanism. This is not a corner case: every off-the-shelf biomedical encoder we tested (BioBERT, PubMedBERT, BioM-ELECTRA) scores unrelated cross-domain pairs between 0.76 and 0.92 when the answer should be near zero. Accuracy on cross-domain discrimination is 0%.
  Retrieval systems survive this, because a language model downstream filters the noise. A Large Behavioural Model (LBM), a foundation model whose subject is a person rather than a sentence, does not: it reasons over a graph of a user's life and treats embedding proximity as evidence that two events are causally linked. False proximity writes a false causal edge, and everything downstream inherits the error. Here, embedding geometry is not a tuning knob; it is correctness.
  We report the fix. A contrastive pass over 72,034 pairs raises PubMedBERT BIOSSES correlation from 0.633 to 0.828 and within-vs-across-domain separation from 1.05x to 1.63x. A second pass, BODHI, mines hard negatives from edges absent in a biomedical knowledge graph and lifts separation to 2.30x and the discrimination gap to +0.392, at a 4.5% BIOSSES cost. On an Intel Xeon 6737P with AMX, OpenVINO cuts single-query latency from 1367 ms to 10 ms (133x) and reaches 555 sentences/sec. One finding contradicts standard advice: FP16 beats INT8 on this silicon at every serving batch size, and we explain why. The same model on a no-AMX Ice Lake instance runs 13-27x slower. We release the benchmark suite, training corpora, the BODHI generator, and the OpenVINO scripts.

AI.tldr: 预训练生物医学语言模型无法区分跨领域无关概念（如“皮质醇”与“股市波动”），余弦相似度高达0.76-0.92。该问题在大型行为模型中会导致因果推理错误。通过对比学习（72,034对）和BODHI硬负例挖掘，将域间分离度从1.05x提升至2.30x，并借助OpenVINO实现133倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练生物医学语言模型在跨领域判别上完全失效（准确率0%），而大型行为模型（LBM）依赖嵌入邻近性推断因果关系，会将虚假语义相似性写入因果边，导致下游推理链全面崩溃。亟需修复嵌入几何的语义混淆问题。
AI.method: 1) 对比学习阶段：在72,034个跨域/域内对上训练PubMedBERT，提升BIOSSES相关性及域间分离度；2) BODHI阶段：从生物医学知识图谱缺失边中挖掘硬负例，二次训练将分离度推至2.30x；3) 部署优化：使用OpenVINO在Intel Xeon 6737P（AMX）上实现133倍推理加速，并发现FP16优于INT8。
AI.result: PubMedBERT BIOSSES相关性从0.633升至0.828；域间分离度从1.05x升至2.30x；判别差距达+0.392（仅牺牲4.5% BIOSSES）；单查询延迟从1367ms降至10ms（133x），吞吐达555句/秒；无AMX的Ice Lake实例慢13-27倍。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域嵌入混淆是生物医学编码器的系统性缺陷，对比学习+硬负例挖掘可有效修复；AMX指令集对推理加速至关重要；FP16在特定硅片上优于INT8的发现挑战了常规量化建议。

title: Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment for Detection of Low-Magnitude False Data Injection Attacks
summary: False data injection attacks (FDIAs) introducing small measurement perturbations can still cause large deviations in power system state estimation when the injected signals align with the pseudo-null space of the system model. Existing model- and data-driven detectors may fail to identify such low-magnitude but high-impact attacks because residual tests ignore changes hidden in the pseudo-null space, while subspace learning methods capture correlation patterns without enforcing physical consistency. This paper proposes Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment (PCNSA), a framework that detects stealthy FDIAs by preserving, through preprocessing, the geometric correspondence between the physical null space and the measurement-derived pseudo-null space. The key point is a Pseudo-null Space Conserved data Preprocessing (PSCP) step that re-expresses measurements in the physical coordinate frame before subspace extraction. We prove that PSCP preserves the separation between row space and its orthogonal complement, a property that conventional per-feature standardization violates. This keeps the singular value decomposition (SVD)-derived pseudo-null subspace aligned with the physical residual space without explicit knowledge of H. Experiments on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems confirm this principle in practice: stealthy attacks that evade XTM, LSTM, AE and Isolation Forest baselines appear as clear deviations in the aligned subspace, yielding higher F1-score and detection accuracy while remaining robust under partial observability and realistic PMU noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出物理一致零空间对齐（PCNSA）框架，通过伪零空间守恒数据预处理（PSCP）保持测量数据与物理残差空间的几何对应，从而检测传统方法难以识别的隐形虚假数据注入攻击。在IEEE标准系统上的实验表明，该方法在检测精度、F1分数和鲁棒性方面均优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的模型驱动和数据驱动检测器难以识别低幅值但高影响的隐形虚假数据注入攻击，因为残差检验忽略伪零空间中的隐藏变化，而子空间学习方法捕获相关模式但缺乏物理一致性约束。
AI.method: 提出PCNSA框架，核心是PSCP预处理步骤：在子空间提取之前将测量值重新表达在物理坐标系中，保持行空间与其正交补之间的分离特性，使得SVD导出的伪零子空间与物理残差空间自然对齐，无需显式系统矩阵H。
AI.result: 在IEEE 14、30、57和118节点系统上，对XGBoost、LSTM、自编码器和孤立森林等基线均无法检测的隐形攻击，PCNSA在齐子空间中呈现明显偏差，取得更高的F1分数和检测准确率，并在部分可观测和PMU噪声条件下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过保持数据的物理几何结构而非标准化破坏，PCNSA能有效检测隐形FDIA，验证了物理一致性在电力系统安全检测中的关键价值。

title: (Auto)formalization is supposed to be easy: Trellis process semantics for spelling out rigorous proofs
summary: We present Trellis: an autoformalization system that leverages LLM agents in a deterministically constrained workflow to enforce incremental progress in Lean autoformalization tasks through iterative refinement of natural language proofs. Our approach is motivated by the common mathematician's notion of what it means to have a rigorous proof in the first place: namely, that it would be routine to elaborate any part of the proof in further detail. The result is a system which aims to achieve reliable autoformalization on a modest budget and with generalist agents, with specialization to autoformalization coming not from any task-specific agent training but instead from a meaning-of-rigor inspired workflow enforced by process semantics. We link to an end-to-end Lean formalization of a recent Ramsey theory breakthrough produced by the process.

AI.tldr: Trellis是一个利用LLM代理在确定性约束工作流中实现自动形式化的系统，通过自然语言证明的迭代细化来逐步推进Lean自动形式化任务，成功生成了一个端到端的Ramsey理论突破的Lean形式化证明。
AI.motivation: 受数学家对"严谨证明"的理解启发——即证明的任何部分都可以被进一步详细阐述，作者希望构建一个在有限预算下、使用通用代理即可实现可靠自动形式化的系统，无需特定任务的代理训练。
AI.method: 采用LLM代理结合确定性约束工作流，通过过程语义强制实施一种受"严谨性含义"启发的工作流程，对自然语言证明进行迭代细化，实现逐步推进的自动形式化。
AI.result: 成功生成了一个端到端的Lean形式化证明，涉及近期Ramsey理论突破。
AI.conclusion: Trellis表明，通过受数学严谨性概念启发的工作流设计，可以在有限预算下使用通用LLM代理实现可靠的自动形式化，专业化来自流程而非代理训练。

title: Inferring hidden forcing in a biological oscillator using Kolmogorov-Arnold networks
summary: Inferring the forces that drive a dynamical system from partial observations is a fundamental challenge across physics, particularly when distinct underlying mechanisms produce similar observable dynamics. Here we show that the effective muscular forcing underlying avian respiratory dynamics can be reconstructed from measurements of air-sac pressure alone. Using an interpretable learning framework based on Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, we infer the governing equations of the system directly from data and uncover a nontrivial structure in the underlying forcing that is not apparent from the pressure signal, which instead suggests a relaxation-like oscillation. The reconstructed dynamics predict a two-phase activation pattern within each respiratory cycle, which we independently validate through electromyographic recordings of expiratory muscles. These results demonstrate that data-driven reconstruction of dynamical laws can reveal hidden physical structure and provide access to unobserved driving variables, establishing a general route to infer latent forces in partially observed dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络从鸟类的气囊压力观测数据中重构出驱动呼吸动力学的有效肌肉力，揭示出隐藏的两相激活模式，并通过肌电图独立验证，展示了从部分观测数据中推断潜在驱动力的一般方法。
AI.motivation: 从部分观测数据中推断驱动动力系统的力是物理学中的基本挑战，特别是在不同机制产生相似可观测动力学的情况下。本文旨在从单一压力信号中重构鸟类呼吸动力学的有效肌肉驱动力。
AI.method: 基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的可解释学习框架，直接从数据中推断系统的控制方程，重构有效肌肉力。
AI.result: 成功从气囊压力测量中重构出有效肌肉驱动力，揭示了压力信号本身无法体现的非平凡驱动力结构（弛豫振荡看似），预测出每个呼吸周期内的两相激活模式，并通过呼气肌的肌电图记录独立验证。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的动力学定律重建可以揭示隐藏的物理结构并提供对未观测驱动力变量的访问，为部分观测动力系统中潜在力的推断建立了通用路径。

title: Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation: A Learned Precursor to Reward Hacking and Its Generalization
summary: Reward hacking is usually studied after it becomes visible, once a model earns high proxy reward while failing the intended task. We instead study what proxy RL teaches before that failure appears. We introduce Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation (PRIME), a learned capability to assess task correctness, predict proxy acceptance, and reason about exploitable proxy--gold gaps. In coding RL environments with exploitable pytest rewards, we measure PRIME through chain-of-thought monitoring, direct probes, and activation-level concept vectors. We find that PRIME emerges in a staged sequence before sustained reward hacking, and that its current direct-probe score forecasts later hack onset and severity even when the visible hack rate is still low. PRIME also adapts when the evaluator changes, retargeting to whichever proxy--gold gap remains rewarded and persisting when gold reward suppresses overt hacking, and ablating its activation directions reduces hacking. Across checkpoints, in-domain PRIME tracks out-of-domain misalignment. Together these results suggest that exploitable proxy RL amplifies a proxy-internalization capability upstream of visible hacking, making PRIME a candidate early-warning signal for broader alignment risk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRIME（Proxy Reward Internalization and Mechanistic Exploitation）概念，研究在可见的奖励破解行为出现之前，代理模型如何习得一种评估任务正确性、预测代理奖励接受度以及推理代理-真实奖励差异的能力。通过在可被利用的pytest奖励环境中进行编码RL实验，发现PRIME以阶段性序列方式出现，且其直接探针分数可预测后续破解行为的发生时间和严重程度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常仅在奖励破解变得可见（即模型获得高代理奖励但未能完成预期任务）后才对其进行研究，忽略了破解行为出现之前模型内部发生了什么变化。本文旨在研究代理RL在可见失败出现之前教给了模型什么，探索是否存在可作为早期预警信号的内部能力。
AI.method: 在具有可被利用的pytest奖励的编码RL环境中，通过思维链监控、直接探针和激活级概念向量三种方式测量PRIME。研究PRIME的涌现阶段序列、预测能力、对评估器变化的适应性、消融效应以及域内-域外对齐关系。
AI.result: PRIME在持续奖励破解出现之前以阶段性序列方式涌现；当前直接探针分数可在可见破解率仍较低时预测后续破解的发生时间和严重程度；PRIME能适应评估器变化，重新定位到仍被奖励的代理-真实差距；当真实奖励抑制显式破解时PRIME仍持续存在；消融其激活方向可减少破解行为；域内PRIME跟踪域外失调。
AI.conclusion: 可被利用的代理RL会放大代理-奖励内化能力，这种能力出现在可见破解行为的上游，使PRIME成为更广泛对齐风险的潜在早期预警信号。

title: Beyond Probabilistic Similarity: Structural, Temporal, and Causal Limitations of Retrieval-Augmented Generation in the Legal Domain
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard architectural response to unreliability in legal AI, yet high-profile failures, including fabricated citations submitted to courts and anachronistic legal content presented as current, continue to appear across jurisdictions. We argue that these failures are not residual confabulations to be eliminated by scaling language models, but symptoms of an architectural mismatch between probabilistic retrieval and the hierarchical, temporal, and institutional structure of legal knowledge. We develop the argument in three moves. First, we articulate the ontological commitment of legal knowledge as a triad of properties derivable from classical legal theory: hierarchical and mereological structure, diachronic dynamism under operational closure, and causal traceability of institutional provenance grounded in the duty of justification. Second, we identify three corresponding pathologies of retrieval (mereological blindness, diachronic blindness, and causal opacity), each developed with an operational definition, a failure mechanism, a canonical example, and detection criteria for diagnostic use. Third, we review the state of the art through this lens, showing that existing approaches address these requirements unevenly and do not yet compose into a paradigm that treats them as co-constitutive. From this analysis we derive four architectural commitments that characterize the deterministic-by-design direction for legal retrieval: ontological primacy, event reification, bitemporal correctness, and deterministic interaction protocols. The framework concerns quaestio juris (which norms apply and in what state) rather than the downstream tasks that act on identified norms, and addresses legislative and constitutional retrieval primarily, with interpretive time as an explicit extension.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了RAG在法律AI中的失败并非语言模型规模不足所致，而是概率检索与法律知识层级、时间、制度结构之间的架构性错配。作者提出法律知识的三元本体承诺（层级部分结构、时间动态性、制度溯源可归责性），识别出三种检索病理（部分性盲视、时间性盲视、因果不透明性），并推导出确定性设计的四项架构承诺。
AI.motivation: 法律AI中RAG系统持续出现虚假引用、过时内容等严重失败，作者认为这些不是偶发的"幻觉"现象，而是概率检索范式与法律知识本体结构之间的系统性不匹配，需要从架构层面重新审视。
AI.method: 三阶段论证：1）从经典法理推导法律知识的三元本体承诺（层级性、时间动态性、制度可溯源性）；2）据此识别三种检索病理（部分性盲视、时间性盲视、因果不透明性），每个病理给出操作定义、失效机制、典型案例与检测标准；3）以此框架审视现有方法，指出现有方案未将三者作为共构条件处理。
AI.result: 识别出法律检索中概率范式与法律知识结构间的三种根本性错配；指出现有方法对这些要求的覆盖不均衡；提出了确定性设计的四项架构承诺：本体优先性、事件物化、双时态正确性、确定性交互协议。
AI.conclusion: 法律检索应以确定性（而非概率性）为设计方向，从"哪些规范适用及其所处状态"这一法律问题（quaestio juris）出发，而非从下游任务出发。该框架当前主要针对立法与宪法检索，解释性时间作为显式扩展方向。

title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research
summary: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. However, performing this well requires delegation intelligence: the ability to decompose complex tasks, determine when and what to delegate, and integrate returned results into the ongoing workflow. Training data for this capability is scarce in naturally occurring text, and to our knowledge, how to synthesize such data and train models to acquire this capability remains largely unexplored in the open-source community. To bridge this gap, we present a preliminary exploration targeting deep research, a representative long-horizon agent task. Specifically, we design a harness that guides the model toward high-quality task decomposition and delegation, while constraining subagents to return results properly to support the main agent's workflow. The harness-guided trajectories naturally encode correct delegation decisions, which we use as supervised fine-tuning data to internalize delegation intelligence into model weights. Our resulting model, SearchSwarm-30B-A3B, achieves 68.1 on BrowseComp and 73.3 on BrowseComp-ZH, the best results among all models of comparable scale. We will release our harness, model weights, and training data to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过监督微调将任务分解与委派智能内化到模型权重中的方法，训练出的SearchSwarm-30B-A3B模型在BrowseComp和BrowseComp-ZH上取得了同规模最佳成绩。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理长时域复杂任务时，上下文窗口有限成为瓶颈。现有委派范式需要委派智能（任务分解、委派决策、结果整合），但此类训练数据稀缺，且如何合成数据并训练模型获取该能力在开源社区中尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计一个引导框架（harness），引导模型进行高质量的任务分解与委派，同时约束子代理正确返回结果以支持主代理工作流。将引导框架产生的轨迹（编码了正确的委派决策）作为监督微调数据，将委派智能内化到模型权重中。
AI.result: SearchSwarm-30B-A3B模型在BrowseComp上达到68.1，在BrowseComp-ZH上达到73.3，均为同规模模型中的最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过引导框架合成委派决策轨迹并进行监督微调，可以有效内化委派智能，提升模型在长时域复杂任务上的表现。代码、模型权重和训练数据将开源以促进后续研究。

title: STELLAR: Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement for Long-Tailed Species Distribution Modeling
summary: Joint Species Distribution Modeling (JSDM) is a key enabler for biodiversity monitoring and conservation planning. However, accurate JSDM faces two coupled challenges: environmental drivers and species distributions are inherently spatio-temporal, while species co-occurrence patterns exhibit complex non-linear community structure and severe long-tail imbalance driven by rare species. Existing approaches often address these factors in isolation, learning from static covariates or neglecting the historical trajectories of dynamic community structure. To overcome these limitations, we propose STELLAR (Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement), a novel framework that learns a shared latent space where dynamic habitat context and community structure are optimized jointly. Our approach integrates three complementary components: (1) a Graph-Temporal Encoder that employs graph attention and recurrent units to aggregate spatial neighborhood effects and capture the co-evolving historical dynamics of environmental context and community structure; (2) a Context-Anchored Latent Alignment mechanism that structures the latent space using a label-activated mixture prior and supervised contrastive learning, actively clustering species based on shared environmental preferences; and (3) an Imbalance-Aware Decoupled Decoding module that utilizes Asymmetric Loss to focus learning on hard, rare species samples, preventing mode collapse in the long tail. Experiments on the large-scale eBird dataset, curated with domain experts, demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, particularly in predicting rare species and revealing interpretable species interactions.

AI.tldr: STELLAR是一种联合物种分布建模框架，通过图-时序编码器、上下文锚定潜在对齐和不平衡感知解码模块，联合优化时空环境动态与群落结构，在eBird数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其擅长稀有物种预测和可解释的物种交互发现。
AI.motivation: 现有JSDM方法面临两大耦合挑战：环境驱动因素和物种分布具有内在的时空性，而物种共现模式呈现复杂的非线性群落结构和由稀有物种导致的严重长尾不平衡。现有方法通常孤立地处理这些因素，要么从静态协变量学习，要么忽略动态群落结构的历史轨迹。
AI.method: 提出STELLAR框架，包含三个互补组件：(1) 图-时序编码器：利用图注意力和循环单元聚合空间邻域效应，捕捉环境上下文和群落结构的共同演化历史动态；(2) 上下文锚定潜在对齐机制：使用标签激活的混合先验和监督对比学习构建潜在空间，基于共享环境偏好主动聚类物种；(3) 不平衡感知解耦解码模块：利用非对称损失聚焦于难样本和稀有物种，防止长尾中的模式坍塌。
AI.result: 在大规模eBird数据集（经领域专家整理）上的实验表明，STELLAR显著优于最先进的基线方法，尤其在稀有物种预测和可解释的物种交互发现方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: STELLAR通过联合优化动态栖息地上下文和群落结构的共享潜在空间，有效解决了JSDM中的时空动态与长尾不平衡问题，为生物多样性监测和保护规划提供了更准确的建模工具。

title: Multi-Turn Evaluation of Deep Research Agents Under Process-Level Feedback
comment: Published as a workshop paper at SCALE - ICML 2026 (Oral)
summary: Existing benchmarks for deep research agents (DRAs) assess only single-shot outputs, ignoring a key question: can DRAs improve their reports when guided by feedback? To investigate this, we conduct a multi-turn evaluation of DRAs under two feedback settings: self-reflection, in which the agent revises its report without any external diagnostic signal, and process-level feedback, in which the agent receives guidance targeting gaps in its research strategy. To enable process-level feedback, we design Research Gap Inference (RGI), a method that analyzes patterns of satisfied and unsatisfied rubric criteria to infer research-process gaps. Our analysis reveals three key findings: (i) under self-reflection, agents incorporate and regress on rubric criteria at nearly equal rates, yielding negligible net improvement; (ii) a single round of process-level feedback yields substantial gains, raising the normalized score by approximately $8$-$15$ points and yielding a roughly $35$-$40\%$ incorporation rate; (iii) these gains do not compound over subsequent turns, as agents regress on up to $24\%$ of previously satisfied criteria when rewriting the full report to address remaining gaps. Even with targeted guidance, reliable multi-turn improvement remains out of reach for the DRA architectures we evaluate. Our code and results are publicly available at https://github.com/sabharwalrishabh/Multi-Turn-Evaluation-of-DRAs.

AI.tldr: 该研究对深度研究代理（DRA）进行多轮评估，比较了自我反思和过程级反馈两种设置。通过提出的研究缺口推理（RGI）方法提供过程级反馈，发现：自我反思几乎没有净收益；单轮过程级反馈可提升8-15分，但收益在后续轮次中不会累积，且代理在重写报告时会回归多达24%的已满足标准。多轮可靠改进对当前DRA架构仍然难以实现。
AI.motivation: 现有DRA基准仅评估单次输出，忽略了代理能否在反馈引导下改进报告这一关键问题。为填补这一空白，作者进行了多轮评估。
AI.method: 设计多轮评估框架，包含两种反馈设置：（1）自我反思——代理自行修订报告，无外部诊断信号；（2）过程级反馈——通过提出的研究缺口推理（RGI）方法，分析满足和未满足的评分标准模式，推断研究过程中的缺口并提供针对性指导。
AI.result: （i）自我反思下，代理纳入和回归评分标准的比率几乎相等，净改进可忽略；（ii）单轮过程级反馈带来显著收益，标准化分数提升约8-15分，纳入率约35-40%；（iii）后续轮次收益不累积，代理重写报告时对多达24%的已满足标准出现回归。
AI.conclusion: 即使有针对性指导，当前DRA架构仍无法实现可靠的多轮改进，表明现有深度研究代理在迭代优化方面存在根本性局限。

title: A Joint Finite-Sample Certificate for Adaptive Selective Conformal Risk Control
summary: Selective predictors answer on confident inputs and abstain elsewhere; deploying one safely needs a single finite-sample certificate that simultaneously upper-bounds the selected risk, lower-bounds the acceptance probability $\pacc$ above a floor $\pmin$, and lower-bounds the deployment utility. This certificate must be valid under adaptive threshold selection from a finite grid of $m$ pairs on $\ncert$ samples. We give such a certificate for bounded, possibly non-monotone losses by treating the selected risk directly as a ratio rather than through a Hoeffding-style range bound. The construction couples three confidence bounds: a variance-adaptive empirical-Bernstein bound on the ratio risk, a Clopper--Pearson bound on acceptance, and a two-sided closeness bound on utility. Together they lower-bound the certified policy's utility absolutely and to within $2\gammau$ of the best over the \emph{certified set}, both non-vacuous whenever feasible; a regime-scoped third leg matches an external oracle, informative only where the risk margin $\gammar < α$ and vacuous at the headline operating points. Relative to the range-only Hoeffding-ratio construction this sharpens the acceptance-floor dependence from $1/\pmin$ to $1/\sqrt{\pmin}$, and a closed-form corollary identifies a per-pair regime in which our risk bound dominates a Hoeffding conformal risk control (Hoeffding--CRC) selective bound. Empirically, on ImageNet (three ResNets) and COCO val 2017 panoptic, the certificate opens a $+22$ pp certified-acceptance frontier over Hoeffding--CRC and is ${\approx}10{\times}$ tighter than a non-vacuous matched-valid baseline; these gains are regime-scoped, not universal, and absent on ADE20K. The certifier runs in $O(\ncert m)$ time.

AI.tldr: 本文针对选择性预测器，提出了一种有限样本证书，该证书同时给出选择风险的上界、接受概率的下界（高于阈值pmin）以及部署效用的下界，且能适应从有限网格中自适应选择阈值。通过将选择风险直接视为比率而非Hoeffding范围界，结合方差自适应的经验Bernstein界、Clopper-Pearson界和双侧接近界，构建了更紧的证书。理论分析表明接受概率依赖从1/pmin改善为1/√pmin，经验上在ImageNet和COCO上比Hoeffding-CRC领先+22pp认证接受边界，且比非真空基准紧约10倍。
AI.motivation: 现有选择性预测器的安全部署缺乏同时保证选择风险上界、接受概率下界和效用下界的单样本有限证书，且现有方法（如Hoeffding范围界）在自适应阈值选择下过于保守。
AI.method: 提出一个三界耦合的构造：方差自适应的经验Bernstein界约束比率风险、Clopper-Pearson界约束接受概率、双侧接近界约束效用。将选择风险直接作为比率处理，绕过Hoeffding范围界，并通过闭合形式推论给出优于Hoeffding-CRC的条件。
AI.result: 理论结果：接受概率依赖从1/pmin改善到1/√pmin，在特定配对区域风险界优于Hoeffding-CRC。实验上：在ImageNet（三个ResNet）和COCO val 2017全景分割上，比Hoeffding-CRC领先+22pp认证接受边界；比非真空匹配基线紧约10倍；运行时间为O(ncert m)。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多数数据集上显著优于现有基线，但增益具有领域范围性（非普适），在ADE20K上未见提升。

title: Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol (CHAP)
summary: Foundation models are moving from response generation into operational roles. They plan across steps, call tools, request human input, coordinate with other agents, and increasingly carry responsibility for work that affects customers, claims, code, contracts, and clinical decisions. Production deployments are no longer one human supervising one model. They are multi-human, multi-agent collaborations that cross teams, time zones, and trust boundaries. The technical surface for this collaboration remains weakly specified. When an agent drafts a response and a human edits it before it ships, the moment of human judgement is the most valuable signal in the system. In current practice it is recorded, if at all, in application code, chat threads, ticket comments, and tribal memory. Two protocol standards address adjacent concerns: MCP standardises agent access to tools and data, and A2A standardises agent-to-agent interoperability. Neither defines the shared workspace in which humans and agents perform accountable work together. This paper presents CHAP, the Collaborative Human-Agent Protocol. Under CHAP, the override that used to vanish into a chat thread becomes a structured event carrying a diff, a rationale, and a content hash. The handoff between shifts becomes a portable envelope rather than a pinned message. The human approval of an agent's draft becomes a non-repudiable signed decision that can be replayed years later. The protocol achieves this through a small Core (workspaces, participants, tasks, artefacts, and an append-only evidence log) together with composable profiles that add review, modes, routing, deliberation, handoff, identity, signatures, and transparency-backed audit as deployments require them. Specification, reference implementation, conformance suite, and worked examples are available at: https://github.com/BrightbeamAI/chap

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAP（协作人机协议），为多人类、多代理协作生产环境定义一个共享工作空间协议，将人类判断、审批、交接等关键交互从非结构化的聊天记录和部落知识转变为结构化的、可审计、不可抵赖的协议事件，弥补了MCP和A2A协议在人类与代理协作方面的空白。
AI.motivation: 基础模型已从简单的响应生成转向运营角色，需要跨步骤规划、调用工具、请求人类输入、与其他代理协调，并承担影响客户、索赔、代码、合同和临床决策的责任。生产部署已演变为跨团队、跨时区、跨信任边界的人类-代理协作，但当前的协作技术规范仍然薄弱——人类的关键判断信号（如编辑、审批、交接）被记录在应用代码、聊天线程、工单评论和部落知识中，缺乏标准化。
AI.method: CHAP通过一个小型核心（包括工作空间、参与者、任务、制品和仅追加的证据日志）以及可组合的配置文件（涵盖审查、模式、路由、审议、交接、身份、签名和透明度支持的审计）来实现。在CHAP下，人类的覆写操作变为携带差异(diff)、理由(rationale)和内容哈希(content hash)的结构化事件；交接变为可移植的信封(portable envelope)；人类对代理草稿的审批变为可回放、不可抵赖的签名决策。
AI.result: 论文提供了CHAP协议的规范、参考实现、一致性测试套件和实际工作示例，全部开源在GitHub上：https://github.com/BrightbeamAI/chap
AI.conclusion: CHAP填补了MCP（代理与工具/数据交互标准）和A2A（代理间互操作标准）之间的空白，定义了人类与代理共同执行可问责工作的共享工作空间协议，使关键的人机协作交互变得结构化、可审计和可追溯。

title: Autonomous Aerial Manipulation via Contextual Contrastive Meta Reinforcement Learning
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly being deployed in logistics, service robotics, and other real-world applications, creating a growing demand for autonomous payload acquisition and delivery. Existing approaches typically assume pre-attached payloads or rely on specialized grippers, leaving versatile end-to-end aerial delivery largely unresolved, where different payloads induce highly variable flight dynamics, requiring a single policy to adapt online without manual calibration or explicit system identification. To this end, we study \textbf{A}utonomous \textbf{A}erial Manipulation via \textbf{Co}ntextual \textbf{Co}ntrastive Meta Reinforcement Learning (\textbf{\textit{Aco2}}), a fully autonomous aerial delivery setting in which a quadrotor equipped with a lightweight hook continuously picks up, transports, and delivers diverse handle-equipped objects between randomized locations, all without human intervention. First, we design a contextual observation encoder that infers a compact latent context from recent interaction history, enabling the policy to adapt online to payload-dependent dynamics. To further improve the quality of this context, we introduce a contrastive objective that structures the context embedding around task-relevant variations, improving generalization across diverse payloads without requiring explicit system identification. Trained entirely in simulation with extensive domain randomization, \textit{Aco2} can be directly deployed on a physical quadrotor without real-world fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Aco2，一种基于上下文对比元强化学习的自主空中操控框架，使四旋翼无人机能够在无需人工干预的情况下，自主完成多种不同载荷的拾取、运输和投递任务，且无需真实世界微调。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常假设预装载荷或依赖专用抓取器，缺乏能够在线适应不同载荷动态特性的端到端自主空中投递解决方案。不同载荷会导致飞行动力学发生显著变化，需要单一策略在线自适应，无需人工校准或显式系统辨识。
AI.method: 设计上下文观测编码器从最近交互历史中推断紧凑的潜在上下文，使策略能在线适应载荷相关动力学；引入对比学习目标对上下文嵌入进行结构化，使其围绕任务相关变化组织，提升跨载荷泛化能力；在仿真中通过域随机化训练，无需真实数据微调即可直接部署到物理四旋翼。
AI.result: 在随机化位置之间自主完成多种带手柄物体的拾取、运输和投递，无需人工干预，且仿真训练的策略可直接零样本迁移到真实物理四旋翼上。
AI.conclusion: Aco2实现了无需人工干预、无需真实微调的自主空中操控与投递，验证了对比元强化学习结合上下文编码在解决变动力学适应性难题上的有效性。

title: SIGA: Self-Evolving Coding-Agent Adapters for Scientific Simulation
summary: Advanced scientific simulators expose specialized input languages that turn simulation goals into executable configurations, but learning them can cost domain scientists hours to days. We study simulator setup as a problem of agent-tool interface grounding: what minimal simulator-specific adaptations are needed for an off-the-shelf coding agent to operate real scientific software? Our intuition is that coding agents already know how to navigate files, edit code, run commands, and repair outputs, but they lack the simulator's executable contract: its vocabulary, structural constraints, validation rules, and termination conditions. We introduce SIGA, a Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter that supplies this contract through retrieval, procedural memory, in-trajectory validation, and validation-enforced termination. We primarily evaluate SIGA on GEOS, an open-source multiphysics simulator used in subsurface science. SIGA produces a complete GEOS deck in about five minutes with TreeSim above 0.90, matching an extended-budget human expert who took about three hours, a roughly 36x wall-clock speedup. On a harder held-out set, grounding raises TreeSim from 0.720 to 0.789, a roughly 10% relative gain over the bare agent, and can reduce the across-seed standard deviation by 16x. Self-evolution further improves SIGA by rewriting adapter contents from prior trajectories, yielding the highest held-out GEOS mean and matching or outperforming the strongest hand-designed configuration. Transfers to OpenFOAM and LAMMPS show that the dominant mechanism shifts by interface: validation matters most when structural completeness is the bottleneck, while memory and retrieval matter most when domain correctness is the bottleneck. These results suggest that lightweight, self-improvable grounding layers can turn general coding agents into practical operators of scientific software.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGA，一种轻量级适配层，通过提供可执行契约（词汇、结构约束、验证规则、终止条件）将通用编码智能体与科学模拟器接口对接，在GEOS上实现36倍加速，在OpenFOAM和LAMMPS上验证了可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 科学家使用高级模拟器时需学习专业输入语言，耗时数小时至数天。现有编码智能体虽具备通用编程能力，但缺乏模拟器特有的可执行契约，导致无法直接操作科学软件。
AI.method: 提出SIGA（Simulator-Interface Grounding Adapter），包含四个核心组件：检索（retrieval）、程序记忆（procedural memory）、轨迹内验证（in-trajectory validation）和验证驱动的终止（validation-enforced termination），为智能体提供模拟器的词汇、结构约束、验证规则和终止条件。
AI.result: 在GEOS模拟器上，SIGA约5分钟生成完整输入文件，TreeSim高于0.90，达到人类专家约3小时水平（36倍加速）；在更难数据集上，TreeSim从0.720提升至0.789（相对提升10%），跨种子标准差降低16倍。自进化机制进一步提升性能。迁移至OpenFOAM和LAMMPS验证了方法的泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级、可自我改进的接地层可以将通用编码智能体转化为科学软件的实际操作者，不同模拟器接口的瓶颈机制不同（结构完整性vs领域正确性），为降低科学计算门槛提供了可行路径。

title: Routine laboratory trajectories encode the onset of organ-level complications in cancer
summary: Routine laboratory panels drawn during cancer treatment constitute longitudinal physiological recordings of organ function, yet their temporal structure is discarded by single-timepoint prognostic tools. A transformer trained on 2,777,595 laboratory measurements from 3,905 patients with multiple myeloma or ovarian cancer predicted the two-year onset of 162 treatment-associated complications, including therapy-related myelodysplastic syndromes, spanning eight clinical categories, achieving 1.5- to 6.1-fold enrichment above prevalence at the group level. It matched or outperformed non-sequential baselines across grouped endpoints (AUROC gains up to +0.11), demonstrating that longitudinal laboratory trajectories capture evolving complication-specific physiology inaccessible from isolated measurements. Predictions generalised across both cancers, divergence concentrating in disease-specific complications, and biomarker masking recovered signatures consistent with established pathophysiology. External validation on MIMIC-IV and MMRF CoMMpass confirmed transferability across independent healthcare systems (AUROC up to 0.85). Routine oncological laboratory data encode organ deterioration weeks to months before clinical onset, enabling complication-specific surveillance without additional testing infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 利用 Transformer 模型对 2,777,595 次实验室测量数据（来自 3,905 名多发性骨髓瘤或卵巢癌患者）进行纵向轨迹建模，可预测 162 种治疗相关并发症（涵盖 8 个临床类别），实现 1.5-6.1 倍富集，AUROC 提升最高达 +0.11，并在 MIMIC-IV 和 CoMMpass 外部验证集上达到 AUROC 0.85，证明常规实验室数据可提前数周至数月预警器官功能恶化。
AI.motivation: 常规实验室检测数据在癌症治疗过程中构成纵向生理记录，但现有单时间点预后工具丢弃了其时序结构，无法捕获并发症演变的动态信息。
AI.method: 使用 Transformer 对 2,777,595 次实验室测量进行时序建模，预测 162 种治疗相关并发症；通过生物标志物掩码分析验证病理生理一致性，并在 MIMIC-IV 和 MMRF CoMMpass 上进行外部验证。
AI.result: 纵向轨迹预测在群体水平上实现 1.5-6.1 倍富集；AUROC 较非时序基线最高提升 +0.11；跨癌种泛化性能良好，外部验证 AUROC 达 0.85。
AI.conclusion: 常规肿瘤学实验室数据编码了临床发作前数周至数月的器官恶化信号，可在无需额外检测基础设施的前提下实现并发症特异性监测。

title: Evaluation Cards: An Interpretive Layer for AI Evaluation Reporting
summary: AI evaluation results are produced at scale but reported inconsistently across leaderboards, model cards, benchmark papers, and company blogs. The cost is interpretive: readers cannot reliably compare results across sources, identify what a report omits, or trace an aggregate claim to its underlying evidence. Recent efforts address isolated components but leave three gaps: they cover only narrow slices of the evaluation lifecycle and do not compose into a single interpretable record; they specify static representations that do not differentiate the questions different stakeholders bring to the same evidence; and they remain proposals on paper, lacking the extraction infrastructure required for adoption at scale. We present \EvalCards{}, an operational reporting layer that composes benchmark metadata, evaluation run data, and model metadata into a unified record. We (1) derive a reporting schema from a structured review of 52 papers and 10 stakeholder interviews, (2) implement four interpretive signals (reproducibility, documentation completeness, provenance and risk, and score comparability), rendered through reader modes calibrated to research and non-research audiences, and (3) deploy a monitoring tool that applies \EvalCards{} across 5,816 models, 635 benchmarks, and 101,843 results, surfacing systematic gaps in current reporting practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvalCards，一个用于AI评估报告的标准化操作层，通过统一基准元数据、评估运行数据和模型元数据，生成可解释的记录，并部署到5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843条结果上，系统性地揭示了当前报告实践中的缺陷。
AI.motivation: AI评估结果虽大规模产出，但在不同平台（排行榜、模型卡、基准论文、公司博客）上的报告格式不一致，导致读者无法跨源可靠比较结果、识别报告遗漏信息或将聚合声明追溯到原始证据。现有工作仅解决孤立组件，存在三个缺口：覆盖范围窄且无法组合成单一可解释记录；静态表示未区分不同利益相关者的查询需求；停留在纸面提案，缺乏大规模采用所需的提取基础设施。
AI.method: (1) 通过对52篇论文的结构化评审和10次利益相关者访谈，推导出报告模式；(2) 实现四个解释性信号（可复现性、文档完整度、来源与风险、分数可比性），并通过面向研究与非研究受众的读者模式进行渲染；(3) 部署监控工具，将EvalCards应用于5,816个模型、635个基准和101,843条结果。
AI.result: 成功构建了统一的评估报告层，并在大规模数据集上部署，揭示了当前报告实践中系统性的空白。
AI.conclusion: EvalCards通过标准化报告模式和多维解释性信号，填补了AI评估报告在可组合性、受众差异化和大规模基础设施方面的空白，为提升评估结果的可解释性和可靠性提供了可操作的方案。

title: A Theoretical Analysis of Memory and Overfitting Phenomena in Stochastic Interpolation Models
summary: This paper provides a theoretical account of memorization in stochastic interpolation models. By leveraging closed-form expressions for the optimal velocity field and the associated score function, we show that, in the continuous-time oracle setting, both deterministic and stochastic generation processes recover training samples. Under Euler discretization, generated samples remain centered around training samples, with deviations controlled by the step size. We further analyze generation in the presence of estimation errors and show that accumulated estimation errors control the endpoint deviation from the training set. These results imply that the generated sample admits a representation as a training sample perturbed by three controlled terms: a discretization-induced bound, an estimation-error-induced bound, and stochastic Gaussian noise. Based on this characterization, we provide theoretical definitions of overfitting and underfitting in generative models. Synthetic simulations support our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上揭示了随机插值模型中的记忆化机制，证明在连续时间预言机设置下，确定性和随机生成过程都能恢复训练样本；在欧拉离散化下，生成样本围绕训练样本中心分布，偏差由步长控制；存在估计误差时，累积误差控制端点到训练集的偏离。据此提出生成模型中过拟合与欠拟合的理论定义。
AI.motivation: 为随机插值模型中的记忆化现象提供严格的理论解释，并建立生成模型中过拟合与欠拟合的理论框架。
AI.method: 利用最优速度场和评分函数的闭式表达式，在连续时间预言机设置下分析确定性与随机生成过程；通过欧拉离散化和估计误差分析，量化生成样本与训练样本的偏差。
AI.result: 生成样本可表示为训练样本加上三个受控扰动项：离散化诱导的界限、估计误差诱导的界限和随机高斯噪声。
AI.conclusion: 基于偏差分解给出了生成模型中过拟合与欠拟合的理论定义，并通过合成模拟验证了理论发现。

title: Bidirectional Semantic Complementary Tool Retrieval for Remote Sensing Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents provide a novel paradigm for the automated processing of remote sensing(RS) data. Their success in complex RS tasks rely on extensive specialized tool libraries. However, tool documentation often exceeds the context window limits of LLMs, making precise tool retrieval essential for agentic workflows. Existing tool retrieval methods face "semantic asymmetry" bottleneck: natural language queries typically express macro-level intentions lacking tool-specific semantics, while tool documentation provides fine-grained technical descriptions lacking operational context for workflows. To bridge this semantic gap, this paper proposes a bidirectional semantic complementary tool retrieval method. First, on the query side, we introduce a planning-based query enhancement mechanism that leverages the reasoning capabilities of agents to decompose abstract intentions into logical subtasks, thereby actively supplementing the query with missing functional semantics. Second, on the tool side, addressing the strong coupling characteristics of RS tool chains, we construct a dynamic tool dependency graph with continual learning capabilities. By employing a neighborhood information aggregation mechanism, contextual information from precursor tools is explicitly injected into the current node representation, enriching tool descriptions with contextual semantics. Experimental results on the RS dataset GeoPlan-bench and the general-purpose dataset API- Bank demonstrate that the proposed method not only significantly improves tool retrieval accuracy for complex RS tasks but also exhibits robust extensibility for transfer to general-domain tasks. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/geox-lab/BSCTR.

AI.tldr: 针对遥感智能体中工具文档超出LLM上下文窗口限制的问题，本文提出一种双向语义互补工具检索方法：通过规划增强查询机制补充宏观意图的功能语义，并利用动态工具依赖图及邻域聚合机制注入工具链的上下文语义，在RS数据集和通用数据集上显著提升了工具检索准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有工具检索方法面临"语义不对称"瓶颈：自然语言查询通常表达宏观意图，缺乏工具特定的细粒度语义；而工具文档提供的是技术细节描述，缺乏工作流的操作上下文。这种语义鸿沟导致检索精度受限。
AI.method: 提出双向语义互补工具检索方法，包含两个方面：(1) 查询端：基于规划的查询增强机制，利用智能体推理能力将抽象意图分解为逻辑子任务，主动补充缺失的功能语义；(2) 工具端：针对遥感工具链强耦合特性，构建具有持续学习能力的动态工具依赖图，通过邻域信息聚合机制将前驱工具的上文信息注入当前节点表示，丰富工具描述的上下文语义。
AI.result: 在RS数据集GeoPlan-bench和通用数据集API-Bank上的实验结果表明，所提方法不仅显著提升了复杂遥感任务的工具检索准确率，还展现出良好的可扩展性，可迁移至通用领域任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了自然语言查询与工具文档之间的语义鸿沟，通过双向语义补充提升了工具检索性能，且具有跨领域泛化能力。

title: Physics-Guided Dual Decoding and Spectral Supervision for Global 3D Hydrometeor Prediction
summary: While global data-driven models excel at predicting continuous atmospheric variables, three-dimensional hydrometeor forecasting remains challenging due to the zero-inflated, long-tailed distributions of these variables. Standard deep learning optimization often yields overly smooth forecasts, attenuating extreme events and spatial textures. We propose PredHydro-Net, a physics-guided dual-decoding framework that mitigates this smoothing. To resolve multi-variable optimization conflicts, it employs a decoupled architecture where macroscopic thermodynamic and dynamic fields unidirectionally modulate hydrometeor generation. By integrating wavelet-based frequency decoupling, spectral amplitude matching, and adversarial training, the model achieves a favorable trade-off between quantitative accuracy and spatial fidelity. In a 72-h global evaluation, PredHydro-Net outperforms both spatiotemporal deep learning baselines (Earthformer and PredRNNv2) and the operational Global Forecast System (GFS) in extreme-event detection and spectral representation. Furthermore, it demonstrates strong climatological consistency with Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) satellite retrievals. The model reasonably reproduces the three-dimensional cloud structures in extreme weather events, such as Hurricane Ian. Feature attribution confirms its dependence on physical precursors such as relative humidity and wind convergence, offering a robust, physics-informed approach to long-tailed atmospheric prediction.

AI.tldr: PredHydro-Net 提出了一种物理引导的双解码框架，通过解耦宏观热力学/动力学场与微物理场生成、集成小波频率解耦、频谱幅度匹配和对抗训练，有效缓解了全球数据驱动模型在三维水凝物预测中因零膨胀长尾分布导致的过度平滑问题，在72小时全球评估中优于 Earthformer、PredRNNv2 和 GFS，并合理再现了极端天气事件的三维云结构。
AI.motivation: 全球数据驱动模型在预测连续大气变量方面表现出色，但三维水凝物预测面临零膨胀长尾分布挑战，标准深度学习优化常产生过度平滑的预测，削弱极端事件和空间纹理。
