AI.method: 将自洽生成路径定义为可容许局部变分输运校正的随机不动点；局部校正由随机变分输运算子指定，包含散度/几何项、能量项和结构约束三项；提出随机不动点路径残差（R-FPR）作为生成路径与可容许校正之间差距的度量；建立包括适定性、不动点存在性与吸引性、残差到生成误差界、经验残差集中性、连续时间极限、算子级泛化等理论结果。
AI.result: 理论框架统一涵盖了随机正则化最优输运近端步、非OT散度、潜变量核、对抗约束、因果离散核及终端一步映射等多种实例；证明了不动点存在性与吸引性（含非压缩情形）、残差到生成误差的泛化界、经验残差的统计集中性、代理扰动界等核心结论；并从理论层面将端点匹配转化为路径自洽性检验。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个残差控制原则，可用于诊断生成失败、正则化训练以及指导自适应采样，适用于扩散模型、流匹配、一步生成器、VAE、GAN/WGAN和自回归生成器等主流生成范式，为生成模型的统一理解和鲁棒性提升奠定了理论基础。

title: From inverse problems to neural operators: prediction, mechanism, and generalization of data-driven models
summary: Scientists have historically relied on mathematical models based on differential equations to relate system inputs -- forces, fluxes, or heat sources -- to outputs, such as displacement, velocity, concentration, and temperature. These models rely on deep domain knowledge to determine the form of the governing differential equation, which is then calibrated with data by solving an inverse problem. In recent years, the field of Scientific Machine Learning has introduced a variety of alternative modeling strategies for physical systems. A method called Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics learns the governing equation as a sparse linear combination of terms in a user-defined library. Neural Ordinary Differential Equations construct the governing equation by taking in the state and its derivatives at the input layer of a neural network. Entirely foregoing the modeling framework of differential equations, neural operators directly learn a non-linear mapping between the system inputs and outputs. From inverse problems to neural operators, all of these modeling strategies can be conceptualized as data-driven machinery to predict a system's response over a range of inputs. It is then natural to wonder how exactly these various strategies relate to each other, and whether they can be neatly taxonomized. Drawing from the philosophical literature on scientific models, we argue that many model types have a common structure, differing only in the assumed model class of the input-output relation they define. Connecting to philosophical ideas on mechanism, and arguing that data from physical systems arises from solutions to parsimonious differential equations, we propose that only certain models are capable of mechanism discovery, and thus generalization. Our analysis is intended to unite apparently disparate modeling strategies and provide insight into their appropriate use cases.

AI.tldr: 本文从哲学视角对科学机器学习中的多种建模策略（稀疏辨识、神经常微分方程、神经算子等）进行统一分析，指出它们本质上都是定义输入-输出关系的数据驱动方法，区别仅在于假设的模型类别，并提出只有能够从简约微分方程中发现机制的模型才具备泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习领域涌现了多种看似迥异的物理系统建模策略（如SINDy、Neural ODE、神经算子等），这些方法之间的关系不明，缺乏统一的分类框架，导致研究人员难以理解各自适用场景及其泛化能力的根本来源。
AI.method: 借鉴科学哲学中关于科学模型和机制的理论，将不同建模策略统一视为定义输入-输出关系的数据驱动方法，通过比较它们假设的模型类别（model class）差异来进行分类，并结合"物理系统数据源于简约微分方程解"的哲学论点，分析哪些模型能够实现机制发现。
AI.result: 发现多种建模策略具有共同结构，差异仅在于所假设的输入-输出关系模型类别不同；提出只有能够从简约微分方程中揭示机制的模型才能实现真正的泛化。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为科学机器学习中看似不同的建模策略提供了统一的哲学分类框架，阐明了各自的使用场景和泛化能力来源，有助于指导研究人员在不同物理问题中合理选择建模方法。

title: C$^3$ache: Accelerating World Action Models with Cross Inference Chunk Cache
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) generalize better than standard Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies to novel motions and environments, because a video-modeling objective lets them learn from abundant unlabeled video rather than scarce labeled robot demonstrations. This generalization is computationally expensive. To complete a task, a WAM runs over multiple inference chunks, and each chunk requires a costly denoising process. Existing acceleration methods reduce this cost by caching and reusing computation within a single chunk's denoising trajectory. Our empirical analysis reveals a substantial source of redundancy they overlook: redundancy across chunks. When a robot executes a smooth behavior, the residuals computed at a given denoising step are strongly correlated from one chunk to the next. We introduce C$^3$ache, a training-free method that caches and reuses these residuals across inference chunks at the same denoising step. Experiments on benchmarks with a Fast-WAM backbone show that C$^3$ache achieves up to a $2.5\times$ speedup in total wall-clock inference time, with negligible degradation in task success rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出C$^3$ache方法，通过跨推理块缓存和复用去噪残差，在不训练的情况下将世界动作模型的推理速度提升2.5倍，且任务成功率几乎不受影响。
AI.motivation: 世界动作模型（WAM）在泛化能力上优于标准VLA策略，但由于需要多步去噪推理，计算成本高昂。现有加速方法仅关注单个块内的去噪轨迹冗余，忽略了跨块之间的残差相关性这一重要冗余来源。
AI.method: 提出C$^3$ache，一种无需训练的方法，在机器人执行平滑行为时，缓存并复用相邻推理块之间同一去噪步骤计算的残差，从而减少重复计算。
AI.result: 在Fast-WAM骨干网络的基准测试中，C$^3$ache实现了高达2.5倍的总推理时间加速，且任务成功率下降可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 跨块残差冗余是WAM推理加速中一个被忽视但有效利用的优化方向，C$^3$ache以训练-free方式显著提升了推理效率。

title: Online Learning with Recency: Algorithms for Sliding-window Streaming Multi-armed Bandits
summary: Motivated by the recency effect in online learning, we study algorithms for single-pass *sliding-window streaming multi-armed bandits (MABs)* in this paper. In this setting, we are given $n$ arms with unknown sub-Gaussian reward distributions and a parameter $W$. The arms arrive in a single-pass stream, and only the most recent $W$ arms are considered valid. The algorithm is required to perform pure exploration and regret minimization with limited memory, defined as the number of stored arms. The model is a natural extension of the streaming multi-armed bandits model (without the sliding window) that has been extensively studied in recent years. We provide a comprehensive analysis of both the pure exploration and regret minimization problems with the model. For pure exploration, we prove that finding the best arm is hard with sublinear memory while finding an approximate best arm admits an efficient algorithm. For regret minimization, we explore a new notion of regret and give sharp memory-regret trade-offs for any single-pass algorithm. We complement our theoretical results with experiments, demonstrating the trade-offs between sample, regret, and memory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单遍滑动窗口流式多臂老虎机（MABs）中的纯探索和遗憾最小化问题，证明了纯探索中子线性记忆无法找到最优臂但可近似找到，并为遗憾最小化提供了记忆-遗憾权衡理论及实验验证。
AI.motivation: 受在线学习中近因效应的启发，将滑动窗口机制引入流式多臂老虎机模型，以处理仅在最近W个臂有效的场景，扩展了近年来被广泛研究的流式MAB模型。
AI.method: 针对纯探索问题，证明子线性记忆下找到最优臂的困难性，并给出近似最优臂的高效算法；针对遗憾最小化问题，定义新的遗憾概念并推导单遍算法下记忆与遗憾的最优权衡关系。
AI.result: 纯探索：子线性记忆无法精确找到最优臂，但可高效近似找到；遗憾最小化：建立尖锐的记忆-遗憾权衡界限；实验验证了样本量、遗憾与记忆之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为滑动窗口流式MAB提供了全面的理论分析，揭示了记忆约束下探索与利用的根本性权衡，为实际流式决策问题提供了理论指导。

title: Heterophily-Aware Adaptive Knowledge Distillation for Hypergraph Neural Networks
summary: Hypergraph knowledge distillation aims to retain the predictive performance of a hypergraph neural network (HNN) teacher while reducing inference costs through a lightweight student model. In this work, we observe that HNNs exhibit substantially lower prediction performance on heterophilic nodes connected through semantically diverse hyperedges, indicating that the reliability of teacher knowledge varies across nodes. Motivated by this observation, we propose HADES, a heterophily-aware adaptive distillation method for hypergraph neural networks. HADES quantifies node heterophily and leverages it as an estimate of teacher reliability to modulate the transfer of teacher knowledge during distillation. Experimental results on real-world hypergraphs demonstrate that HADES consistently improves student performance across different HNN teachers and distillation objectives. In many cases, the resulting student models surpass the predictive performance of their teachers while achieving up to 12.3 times faster inference.

AI.tldr: HADES是一种针对超图神经网络的知识蒸馏方法，通过量化节点异质性来调节教师知识迁移，使学生模型在推理速度提升达12.3倍的同时，有时甚至超越教师模型的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 观察到超图神经网络在同质性较弱的节点（通过语义多样化的超边连接）上预测性能显著下降，表明教师知识的可靠性因节点而异，需要一种异质性感知的自适应蒸馏方法。
AI.method: 提出HADES方法，量化节点的异质性，并将其作为教师可靠性的估计，从而在蒸馏过程中自适应地调节教师知识的迁移强度。
AI.result: 在真实超图数据集上，HADES一致地提升了学生模型在不同HNN教师和蒸馏目标下的性能，学生模型有时超越教师，且推理速度提升高达12.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 异质性感知的自适应蒸馏能有效提升超图神经网络知识蒸馏的效果，在降低推理成本的同时保持甚至提升预测性能。

title: Beyond Neural Collapse: Task-Intrinsic Geometry Governs Neural Representations in Modular Arithmetic
summary: While neural collapse (NC) predicts that a $K$-class-balanced classifier should organize terminal representations as a $(K-1)$-dimensional simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF), modular addition consistently enters a different regime: networks compress to a two-dimensional cyclic geometry in which both classifier weights and token embeddings lie on circles. We refine the explanation of this phenomenon in three directions. First, we formalize a layerwise non-uniform training mechanism: downstream classifier weights are driven by dense cross-entropy gradients into a rank-2 equiangular configuration before upstream embeddings fully reorganize, and once this classifier plane forms, backpropagated feature gradients constrain embedding motion to the same plane while weight decay suppresses orthogonal components. Second, after this subspace locking, the induced in-plane dynamics admit an entropy-regularized transport interpretation on $S^1$; combined with modular-addition labels, this reduces embedding formation to phase alignment, whose minimizers are single-frequency characters of $\mathbb{Z}/P\mathbb{Z}$ and hence equal-angle points on a circle. Third, we quantify why this solution prevails over NC: a simplex ETF gains only an $O(1)$ advantage in cross-entropy, whereas the cyclic rank-2 solution enjoys a $Θ(K)$ advantage under Schatten or weight-decay surrogates, yielding a critical threshold $λ_{\mathrm{crit}} = Θ(1/K)$. Our results explain both why classifier weights move first and why embeddings subsequently align with them, showing that grokking on modular arithmetic is governed not by maximal separation alone but by a task-structured trade-off between separation, symmetry, and complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文系统解释了模加法任务中神经网络为何趋向二维循环几何结构而非神经坍缩（NC）预测的单纯形等角紧框架：通过层间非均匀训练机制、子空间锁定后的熵正则化输运解释，以及循环解与单纯形解在交叉熵和权重衰减下的复杂度权衡，揭示了模加法任务中"grokking"现象的本质是分离性、对称性与复杂度之间的任务结构化权衡。
AI.motivation: 神经坍缩（NC）理论预测K类均衡分类器应形成(K-1)维单纯形等角紧框架（ETF），但模加法任务中网络始终收敛到二维循环几何结构（权重和嵌入均位于圆上）。作者希望解释这一现象偏离NC预测的原因，并揭示其背后的训练动力学机制。
AI.method: 从三个方向展开：（1）形式化层间非均匀训练机制：下游分类器权重在密集交叉熵梯度驱动下率先形成秩-2等角结构，上游嵌入随后被约束到该子空间，权重衰减抑制正交分量；（2）子空间锁定后，平面内动力学可解释为S¹上的熵正则化输运，结合模加法标签将嵌入形成简化为相位对齐，其极小解为Z/PZ的单频特征（圆上等角点）；（3）定量对比两种解：单纯形ETF在交叉熵上仅获O(1)优势，而循环秩-2解在Schatten范数或权重衰减代理下享有Θ(K)优势，从而导出临界阈值λ_crit = Θ(1/K)。
AI.result: 模加法任务中分类器权重先移动，嵌入随后与之对齐，最终收敛到二维循环几何结构。该解在权重衰减正则化下具有Θ(K)的复杂度优势，远超单纯形ETF的O(1)交叉熵优势，因此当权重衰减系数λ > λ_crit时，循环结构成为全局最优解。
AI.conclusion: 模算术上的grokking现象并非仅由最大分离原则驱动，而是分离性、对称性与复杂度三者之间的任务结构化权衡。权重衰减在偏好低秩、对称解方面起关键作用，导致网络选择循环几何而非单纯形ETF。

title: LEAF: A Learning-Enabled ADMM Framework for Accelerated Convex Optimization
summary: We propose LEAF, a learning-enabled ADMM framework for accelerated convex optimization. The key idea is to approximate the Moreau envelope of the objective function using an Input Convex Neural Network (ICNN), resulting in a learned model that preserves convexity and smoothness. This leads to the proposed Moreau Envelope Learning ADMM (MEL-ADMM) and its splitting variant sMEL-ADMM. Unlike existing approaches that learn high-dimensional operators directly, LEAF learns a scalar-valued Moreau envelope, significantly reducing model complexity and improving data efficiency. The framework accommodates a broad class of convex problems with smooth and non-smooth objectives. By embedding convexity explicitly through the ICNN architecture, the proposed approach maintains high approximation accuracy while preserving key structural properties of the optimization problem. Both MEL-ADMM and sMEL-ADMM are developed with theoretical guarantees of convergence and feasibility under the learned model. Rigorous analysis shows that the proposed methods achieve convergence rates comparable to classical ADMM while reducing per-iteration computational cost. Numerical experiments demonstrate up to an order-of-magnitude speedup over state-of-the-art solvers while maintaining low optimality gaps

AI.tldr: 提出LEAF框架，利用输入凸神经网络(ICNN)逼近目标函数的Moreau包络，实现加速凸优化，在保持收敛保证的同时大幅降低计算开销，实验显示相比SOTA求解器可实现一个数量级的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有学习驱动的优化方法直接学习高维算子，模型复杂度高、数据效率低，且难以保证优化问题的凸性和结构性质。本文旨在通过学习标量值的Moreau包络来降低复杂度，同时保留凸优化问题的关键结构特性。
AI.method: 提出LEAF框架，核心是用ICNN逼近目标函数的Moreau包络，构建MEL-ADMM及其分裂变体sMEL-ADMM。ICNN架构显式嵌入凸性，学习标量Moreau包络而非高维算子，显著降低模型复杂度。
AI.result: 理论证明了所提方法在 learned model 下的收敛性和可行性，收敛速度与经典ADMM相当但每轮迭代计算成本更低。数值实验表明相比SOTA求解器可实现一个数量级的加速，同时保持低最优性差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过ICNN学习Moreau包络的LEAF框架在保持凸性和收敛保证的前提下，显著提升了凸优化问题的求解效率，为学习型优化方法提供了一种兼顾理论保证与实用效率的新范式。

title: Understanding Quantization-Aware Training: Gradients at Quantized Weights Bias to the Low-Loss Basin
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) converts a trained full-precision model into low-bit weights without task-level retraining, while quantization-aware training (QAT) incorporates quantization into the training loop. Although PTQ is efficient and often accurate at moderate bitwidths, it can fail sharply at aggressive bitwidths; QAT is more expensive but can often recover the lost accuracy. We propose a unified geometric framework that explains both PTQ failure and QAT recovery. We model full-precision training as following a low-loss \emph{river} inside a wider \emph{valley}: a normal neighborhood of the river forms a nearly flat \emph{basin}, while leaving this basin incurs a sharp loss increase. When the quantization grid is comparable to the basin width, local PTQ objectives, including rounding and Hessian-based second-order reconstruction, can select a high-loss deployed quantized point outside the basin even when nearby low-loss quantized points exist. In this regime, straight-through-estimator-based QAT has a useful bias: it evaluates gradients at the deployed quantized weights while updating latent full-precision weights, causing the gradient to sense the valley wall and acquire an inward component that steers subsequent quantized iterates back into the basin. We formalize this mechanism through a local landscape model, construct a geometric PTQ failure mode, and prove finite-time QAT recovery under local quantizer-compatibility assumptions. Experiments across vision and language models under multiple neural-network quantization schemes corroborate the predicted basin-crossing failure of PTQ and the corresponding recovery mechanism of QAT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一几何框架解释PTQ在低位宽下的失败原因和QAT的恢复机制：全精度训练沿着低损失"河流"在宽"山谷"中移动，量化网格超过"盆地"宽度时PTQ可能选择高损失点，而STE-based QAT利用梯度向内分量将量化点拉回盆地。
AI.motivation: PTQ在激进低位宽下性能急剧下降，QAT虽昂贵但能恢复精度，现有研究缺乏对这两种现象间统一几何解释的深入理论理解。
AI.method: 提出统一几何框架，通过"河流-山谷-盆地"类比建模损失景观；构造局部景观模型形式化PTQ失败模式；在局部量化兼容性假设下证明QAT有限时间恢复；在视觉和语言模型上多方案验证。
AI.result: PTQ在量化网格接近盆地宽度时会跨越盆地边界选择高损失点；STE-based QAT的梯度更新具有向内分量，能将后续量化点拉回低损失盆地；实验结果支持理论预测的PTQ失败和QAT恢复机制。
AI.conclusion: 该几何框架统一解释了PTQ失败与QAT恢复的底层机制，为设计更鲁棒的量化方法提供了理论基础。

title: Structural Grid Descriptors Predict Within-Task Solver Success on ARC-AGI
summary: We ask whether structural properties of intermediate grid states predict whether a symbolic ARC-AGI solver will succeed, framed as a test of conditional mutual information I(X;Y|task) > 0. Across 44,800 runs spanning two architecturally distinct solvers (beam search and Stochastic DFS), 400 ARC tasks, 28 configurations per solver, and both training and evaluation splits, hand-crafted grid descriptors measured at 50% trajectory completion discriminate successful from failed runs within the same task (mean within-task best-feature AUC = 0.885, p < 0.001 under within-task label permutation). Most predictive content lies along a single grid-complexity axis. The result generalizes across solver architectures: a feature selected on one solver predicts success on the other with AUC 0.747-0.762 in all four transfer directions (p < 0.001, leakage controlled). On a pre-registered held-out set of 41 reliable tasks, the frozen feature n_components_final achieves AUC = 0.765 (95% CI [0.717, 0.810], p < 0.001), robust under task-clustered bootstrap resampling and cross-solver task collapsing. The signal is not explained by solver capacity (configuration-residualized AUC = 0.927 and 0.896 for beam search and SDFS, p < 0.001) and is only weakly coupled to score trajectories (R^2 approximately 0). Early stopping at 50% completion reduces beam-search compute by 33.6% while retaining 98.9% of solves; degenerate-trajectory detection reduces SDFS compute by 65.3% with no solve loss. Finally, on 229 of 400 evaluation tasks the DSL primitive library produces no valid transition from the input grid. This 0-step collapse is invariant to search budget and universally failed by beam search, indicating a DSL coverage limitation rather than a search-budget effect.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了符号化ARC-AGI求解器在执行过程中，中间网格状态的结构属性是否能预测最终求解成功与否。通过44,800次运行实验，发现在50%轨迹完成度时提取的手工网格描述符能够有效区分同一任务内的成功与失败运行（平均组内最佳特征AUC=0.885），且该预测信号主要源于单一网格复杂度轴。该发现跨求解器架构泛化，并可用于提前停止计算（波束搜索减少33.6%计算量，保留98.9%求解率；SDFS减少65.3%计算量，零求解损失）。此外，发现40%评估任务因DSL原语库覆盖率不足导致从输入网格出发即无有效转换。
AI.motivation: 探索ARC-AGI符号求解器在中间网格状态的结构属性是否包含关于最终成功/失败的条件互信息I(X;Y|task)>0，即在同一任务内，中间状态的结构特征能否预测求解结果。
AI.method: 使用两种架构不同的求解器（波束搜索和Stochastic DFS），在400个ARC任务上运行28种配置，共44,800次实验。在50%轨迹完成度时提取手工设计的网格描述符，通过条件互信息框架测试预测能力，并进行跨求解器迁移验证、预注册验证集测试、计算量消融实验等。
AI.result: 组内最佳特征平均AUC=0.885（p<0.001）；跨求解器迁移AUC=0.747-0.762（p<0.001）；预注册验证集AUC=0.765；波束搜索提前停止减少33.6%计算量、保留98.9%求解率；SDFS退化轨迹检测减少65.3%计算量、零求解损失；40%评估任务因DSL覆盖率不足导致0步崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 中间网格状态的结构特征确实包含预测求解成功/失败的有用信息，该信号主要沿单一复杂度轴分布，具有跨架构泛化能力，可用于实际的计算优化。同时揭示了ARC-AGI领域DSL原语库存在严重的覆盖局限性。

title: TRIAGE: Dialectical Reasoning for Explainable Risk Prediction on Irregularly Sampled Medical Time Series with LLMs
summary: Clinical early warning systems built on electronic health records, in which clinical observations are recorded as irregularly sampled medical time series (ISMTS), must deliver both calibrated risk scores for patient triage and interpretable rationales that clinicians can verify. Large Language Models (LLMs) have been explored for this task, yet they collapse graded clinical risk into overconfident binary predictions. This risk polarization undermines both calibration and cross-patient comparability. To address this, we propose TRIAGE, a framework that trains an LLM to generate dialectical reasoning over competing clinical outcomes by eliciting outcome-specific rationales. This dialectical formulation mitigates risk polarization, enabling a single LLM to yield continuous risk scores grounded in explicit clinical reasoning. Evaluated on three ISMTS benchmarks, TRIAGE achieves an average AUPRC improvement of 3.3% and reduces calibration error by 81% compared to the competitive baselines. An LLM-as-a-judge assessment further shows that our rationales surpass post-hoc explanations from the baseline by 20% in clinical reasoning quality. The source code is available at https://github.com/HyeongWon-Jang/TRIAGE .

AI.tldr: TRIAGE框架通过引入辩证推理机制，让LLM在竞争性临床结局之间生成论证性推理，从而解决临床早期预警系统中LLM的风险极化（将分级风险压缩为过度自信的二元预测）问题，在ISMTS基准上AUPRC提升3.3%，校准误差降低81%，且推理质量优于基线20%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在临床早期预警中会将分级风险压缩为过度自信的二元预测（风险极化），破坏了校准性和跨患者可比性，无法同时满足校准风险评分和可解释临床推理的需求。
AI.method: 提出TRIAGE框架，训练LLM通过引出结局特定推理来生成关于竞争性临床结局的辩证推理（dialectical reasoning），从而缓解风险极化，使单个LLM能输出基于显式临床推理的连续风险评分。
AI.result: 在三个ISMTS基准上，AUPRC平均提升3.3%，校准误差降低81%；LLM-as-a-judge评估显示，推理质量超过基线事后解释方法20%。
AI.conclusion: 辩证推理机制能有效解决LLM在临床风险预测中的风险极化问题，同时提升预测性能、校准性和推理可解释性。

title: DynaCF: Mitigating Shortcut Learning in Reward Models via Dynamic Counterfactual Sensitivity
summary: Reward models trained from pairwise preferences often exploit superficial shortcut cues rather than learning true response quality. We propose DynaCF, a dynamic reweighting framework for mitigating shortcut learning in reward model training. Unlike static shortcut heuristics, DynaCF measures shortcut sensitivity online during optimization by applying semantics-preserving counterfactual perturbations and tracking the resulting margin shifts and preference flips under the current model. Samples with higher shortcut sensitivity are dynamically downweighted in the Bradley-Terry objective, encouraging the model to rely less on superficial patterns and more on task-relevant preference signals. Extensive experiments show that DynaCF consistently improves robustness in preference modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出DynaCF动态重加权框架，通过在训练中在线测量对虚假线索的敏感性并降低高敏感性样本权重，减轻奖励模型训练中的捷径学习问题。
AI.motivation: 奖励模型从成对偏好中训练时，常常利用表面虚假线索（捷径）而非学习真正的回答质量，导致偏好建模的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出DynaCF框架：（1）在优化过程中在线测量捷径敏感性——通过语义保持的反事实扰动，追踪当前模型下的边际偏移和偏好翻转；（2）将具有高捷径敏感性的样本在Bradley-Terry目标函数中动态降低权重，迫使模型依赖任务相关的偏好信号而非表面模式。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，DynaCF在偏好建模中持续提升了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DynaCF通过动态重加权有效缓解了奖励模型训练中的捷径学习问题，相比静态启发式方法更优。

title: Beyond Convolution: Advancing Hypergraph Neural Networks with Hypergraph U-Nets
summary: Convolutions have successfully transitioned from image processing to the complex realm of non-Euclidean higher-order domains, particularly in hypergraphs. Despite the success in convolution, the exploration of a popular architecture named U-Net remains largely unexplored for hypergraph data due to the lack of well-defined pooling and unpooling operations. This work pioneers the study of U-Net architectures for hypergraph data, addressing the critical challenge of designing effective pooling and unpooling operations that retain maximal structural information from the input hypergraph. Motivated by hierarchical clustering, we propose to construct the pooling and unpooling operators all at once by cutting the clustering dendrogram at different granularities, named the Parallel Hierarchical Pooling (PHPool) and Unpooling (PHUnpool) operators. Unlike existing pooling methods that risk local structural damage through a sequential learning procedure, our PHPool operators are designed in a global and parallel manner to ensure fidelity to the original hypergraph structure with efficient computation while the PHUnpool operators are tailored to perform inverse operations of the PHPools for hypergraph reconstruction. We validate our model through hypergraph reconstruction simulation, hypergraph classification, and node-level anomaly detection, where it demonstrates superior performance over existing state-of-the-art graph and hypergraph deep learning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将U-Net架构引入超图数据，提出了并行层次化池化(PHPool)和反池化(PHUnpool)算子，通过在聚类树状图上进行不同粒度的切割来全局并行地构建池化/反池化操作，在超图重建、分类和节点异常检测任务中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 超图数据缺乏明确定义的池化和反池化操作，导致U-Net这一在图像和普通图上取得成功的架构尚未被应用于超图数据。现有池化方法通过顺序学习过程可能破坏局部结构，且缺乏有效的反池化机制。
AI.method: 受层次聚类启发，通过在聚类树状图的不同粒度层次进行切割，一次性并行地构建池化(PHPool)和反池化(PHUnpool)算子。PHPool以全局并行方式确保对原始超图结构的保真度，PHUnpool作为PHPool的逆操作实现超图重建。
AI.result: 在超图重建模拟、超图分类和节点级异常检测任务中，所提模型均优于现有的图与超图深度学习最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的并行层次化池化与反池化算子有效解决了超图上的U-Net架构设计难题，全局并行的设计方式比顺序学习的方法更能保持结构信息且计算高效。

title: INFUSER: Influence-Guided Self-Evolution Improves Reasoning
summary: Self-evolution offers a scalable path to stronger reasoning: a pretrained language model improves itself with only minimal external supervision. Yet existing methods either depend on extensively curated or teacher-generated training data, or, when the generator runs unsupervised, reward it by a difficulty heuristic that need not improve the solver. We introduce INFUSER, an iterative co-training framework with two co-evolving roles: a Generator that drafts questions and reference golden answers from a pool of unstructured, automatically collected documents, and a Solver that improves by training on them. The solver is trained with standard correctness rewards against the generator-provided answers, while the generator is rewarded by an optimizer-aware influence score that measures whether each proposed question would actually improve the solver on the target distribution. Because this continuous, noisy influence score is poorly served by standard GRPO, we propose DuGRPO, a dual-normalized variant of GRPO, for generator training. Together, these turn the document pool into an adaptive curriculum that favors questions useful to the current solver, not just hard ones. On Qwen3-8B-Base, INFUSER outperforms strong self-evolution baselines with over 20% relative improvement on Olympiad and SuperGPQA benchmarks, and an 8B INFUSER co-evolving generator outperforms a frozen 32B thinking generator on math and coding. Ablations confirm each design choice is necessary, and two extensions, applying INFUSER to an instruction-finetuned anchor and augmenting it with rule-verifiable RLVR data, further demonstrate the flexibility and generalizability of the framework. Code is available at https://github.com/FFishy-git/INFUSER.

AI.tldr: INFUSER是一个迭代协同训练框架，包含Generator和Solver两个角色。Generator从无结构文档池中生成问题和参考答案，Solver通过训练这些问题来提升能力。Generator通过优化器感知的影响力分数（而非难度启发式）获得奖励，该分数衡量问题对Solver在目标分布上性能提升的贡献。为处理连续噪声的影响力分数，提出DuGRPO（双归一化GRPO）用于Generator训练。在Qwen3-8B-Base上，INFUSER在Olympiad和SuperGPQA基准上相对提升超过20%，8B的INFUSER Generator优于冻结的32B思考型Generator。消融实验验证了每个设计组件的必要性。
AI.motivation: 现有自我进化方法要么依赖精心策划或教师生成的训练数据，要么在无监督生成时使用难度启发式作为奖励，但这种启发式不一定能提升求解器的性能。需要一种更有效的机制来引导生成器产生真正有助于求解器提升的问题。
AI.method: 提出INFUSER框架，包括两个协同进化的角色：Generator从无结构文档池中生成问题和参考答案，Solver通过训练这些问题进行改进。Solver使用标准正确性奖励进行训练，Generator则通过优化器感知的影响力分数获得奖励，该分数衡量每个问题对Solver性能的实际贡献。为处理连续噪声的影响力分数，提出DuGRPO（双归一化GRPO）用于Generator训练。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B-Base上，INFUSER在Olympiad和SuperGPQA基准上相对提升超过20%。8B的INFUSER Generator优于冻结的32B思考型Generator。消融实验验证了每个设计组件的必要性。扩展到指令微调锚点和规则可验证RLVR数据进一步展示了框架的灵活性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: INFUSER通过迭代协同训练和基于影响力的奖励机制，有效将无结构文档池转化为自适应课程，生成对当前求解器更有帮助的问题，显著优于现有自我进化方法。

title: Stage-1 Controls the Entropy Regime, Not the Outcome
summary: Two-stage post-training -- a Stage-1 warm-start (supervised fine-tuning, SFT, or on-policy distillation, OPD) followed by Stage-2 reinforcement learning (RL) -- is increasingly used for vision-language models (VLMs). We ask what Stage-1 actually controls in a small-data study using Qwen2.5-VL-7B with a same-modality 72B VLM teacher for OPD. First, the three warm-starts reach a narrow $53$--$54\%$ band on Geometry3K internal validation, consistent with the narrow range reported by recent specialized methods; this setup provides little evidence that Stage-1 changes the in-domain endpoint. Second, a matched-recipe, early-stopped SFT improves out-of-domain MathVista by $+2.1$ points, reversing the $-9.5$-point drop of an over-trained variant. The clearest difference is the \emph{entropy regime}: OPD enters RL with substantially higher policy entropy than either SFT initialization, and the separation remains visible through the available trajectories. At the in-domain initialization, OPD also has higher answer diversity and pass@16 ($+2.0$ to $+5.2$ points over SFT), although problem-level bootstrap intervals show that the smaller contrast is uncertain. The advantage is absent after RL (endpoint pass@16 values within $1.1$ points) and on MathVista (six models within $1.2$ points). Our contribution is therefore a bounded empirical characterization: Stage-1 is strongly associated with the entropy regime in this setup, but the downstream payoff is small, localized, and not evidence that OPD is a better RL warm-start.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉语言模型两阶段后训练中Stage-1（SFT/OPD）对后续RL的影响，发现Stage-1主要控制策略熵值，但对最终性能影响有限：OPD虽然初始熵值更高、多样性更好，但经过RL后优势消失，在域内和域外任务上最终性能差异很小。
AI.motivation: 探究VLM两阶段后训练中Stage-1（SFT或OPD）究竟控制什么因素，以及不同Stage-1初始化方式对后续RL效果的影响。
AI.method: 使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B作为基础模型，用同模态72B VLM教师进行OPD，比较三种warm-start（SFT、OPD、过训练SFT）在Geometry3K域内验证和MathVista域外测试上的表现，分析策略熵值、答案多样性和pass@16等指标。
AI.result: 1) 三种warm-start在域内Geometry3K上收敛到53-54%的窄带区间；2) 适度SFT提升MathVista +2.1点，过训练SFT导致-9.5点下降；3) OPD进入RL时策略熵值显著高于SFT；4) OPD初始pass@16比SFT高2.0-5.2点，但RL后差距缩小到1.1点以内；5) MathVista上六种模型差距在1.2点以内。
AI.conclusion: Stage-1与策略熵值强相关，但对最终下游收益影响较小、局限且在域内域外均不显著，没有证据表明OPD是比SFT更好的RL初始化方式。

title: OnlyDense: Reduced-Order Modeling for Lagrangian simulation
summary: In science and engineering, Lagrangian simulation methods such as Smooth Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) or Material Point Method (MPM) are often employed to study the behavior of dynamic systems. However, these methods can be prohibitively computationally expensive, particularly when simulating multi-scale spatial or temporal phenomena, e.g., void growth and coalescence within macro-scale geometries, structural failure of spacecraft components resulting from hypervelocity impact of space debris particles, etc. In contrast to graph-based methods, where the state of the system is understood as a discrete set of particles, we propose a learning framework for scalable representation and dynamics modeling of massive particle systems by treating the system state as a function and its evolution as a trajectory in Hilbert space. Rather than representing the state as a discrete set of particles or embedding it in a nonlinear latent manifold, we approximate the state space with a linear subspace spanned by learned neural basis functions. This parameterization enables direct projection to obtain latent coefficients and explicit access to the basis functions, avoiding optimization over a nonlinear latent space. The resulting representation admits a natural interpretation: latent variables correspond to coefficients in Hilbert space, and basis functions correspond to spatial modes, analogous to Proper Orthogonal Decomposition. The framework thus unifies classical projection-based reduced-order modeling with modern deep learning, while remaining invariant to the number of discretization points. Experiments on large-scale SPH simulations with over one million particles, including dynamic events with extreme deformation and fragmentation, demonstrate that the proposed method accurately reconstructs and predicts dynamics, achieving an R$^2$ score above $0.99$ with as few as $32$ basis functions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于希尔伯特空间线性子空间的学习框架，通过神经基函数将大规模粒子系统的状态表示为函数，实现高效降阶建模与动力学预测，在百万级SPH模拟中以32个基函数达到R²>0.99。
AI.motivation: 拉格朗日模拟方法（SPH、MPM）在多尺度时空现象（如空隙生长、超高速冲击碎片）中计算成本极高，现有图方法存在离散表示局限，需要一种可扩展的高效表示与动力学建模方法。
AI.method: 将系统状态视为希尔伯特空间中的函数，用学习得到的神经基函数张成的线性子空间逼近状态空间；通过直接投影获取潜在系数，避免非线性潜在空间优化；框架统一了经典投影降阶建模与深度学习，且对离散点数保持不变性。
AI.result: 在百万级粒子规模的SPH模拟中（含极端变形与碎裂），仅用32个基函数即可精确重构和预测动力学，R²分数超过0.99。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了经典投影降阶与深度学习的统一，为大规模粒子系统的可扩展建模提供了高效方案，保持了对离散点数量的不变性。

title: A Unifying Lens on Reward Uncertainty in RLHF
summary: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is bottlenecked by \emph{reward hacking}, where the policy exploits errors in a proxy reward model (RM) and produces high RM scores without genuine quality gains. A natural mitigation is \emph{pessimism}: penalizing rewards in regions where the RM is uncertain. However, standard scalar RMs provide no principled notion of uncertainty. We argue that the right object is a \emph{distributional} reward model $p(r\mid x,y)$. Under either a Bayesian inference or a KL-distributionally robust optimization (KL-DRO) lens, the KL-regularized RLHF objective admits a closed-form effective reward $\tilde r(x,y) = \pmβ\log\mathbb{E}_p[e^{\pm r/β}]$. The pessimistic branch unifies the prior heuristics for RM ensemble aggregation: mean aggregation, worst-case optimization (WCO), and uncertainty-weighted optimization (UWO) all emerge as limits or truncations of this single expression. This also clarifies the implicit assumptions of each existing rule.

AI.tldr: 本文指出RLHF中的奖励破解问题源于代理奖励模型的不确定性，提出使用分布性奖励模型p(r|x,y)并通过KL-DRO视角导出一个统一的闭式有效奖励表达式，证明悲观分支下均值聚合、最坏情况优化和不确定性加权优化等现有启发式方法均是该表达式的特例或截断形式。
AI.motivation: RLHF存在奖励破解问题，即策略利用代理奖励模型中的错误获得高奖励分而实际质量并未提升。标准标量奖励模型无法提供原则性的不确定性度量，需要一种更好的框架来统一和解释现有的悲观方法。
AI.method: 提出使用分布性奖励模型p(r|x,y)代替标量奖励模型；从贝叶斯推断和KL-DRO两个视角出发，推导KL正则化RLHF目标下的闭式有效奖励表达式；并分析其悲观分支与现有启发式方法（均值聚合、WCO、UWO）的关系。
AI.result: 推导出有效奖励公式，证明均值聚合、最坏情况优化和不确定性加权优化等现有启发式方法均为该统一表达式的极限或截断形式，揭示了每种方法隐含的假设条件。
AI.conclusion: 分布性奖励模型及对应的闭式有效奖励为RLHF中的悲观主义提供了统一的理论框架，为设计更鲁棒的奖励聚合策略奠定了理论基础。

title: Neural Legendre-Fenchel transform with Hessian Preconditioning
summary: The Legendre-Fenchel (LF) transform is a fundamental tool in convex analysis and machine learning that maps lower semi-continuous functions to their convex conjugates. In practice, when closed-form formula are not available for expressing convex conjugates of given functions, one must approximate them using various techniques. One recent such versatile numerical method is the deep Legendre transform method which relies on neural networks although it remains challenging particularly for tackling ill-conditioned functions. This work builds on the reformulation of the LF transform as a projective polarity. A notable property of this framework is its affine invariance. We leverage this affine invariance to introduce a Hessian-based preconditioning strategy. Specifically, we apply an affine deformation around a minimizer so that the second-order Taylor approximation of the function coincides with the canonical paraboloid, whose conjugation map is the identity. A residual network initialized near the identity can then learn this simplified mapping, while the original conjugation map is recovered through the inverse deformation. The proposed preconditioning incurs only a modest computational overhead, consisting of a single eigendecomposition during initialization and two matrix-vector multiplications per query. Experiments on a diverse set of convex functions, including high-dimensional benchmarks, demonstrate improved convergence rates and enhanced numerical accuracy of the conjugation, with particularly significant gains for ill-conditioned problems. Finally, we discuss the scope of applicability of our proposed method and highlight several of its limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于仿射不变性的Hessian预处理策略，通过Legendre-Fenchel变换的射影对偶性重新表述，利用残差网络学习简化映射，显著提升病态凸函数共轭计算的精度与收敛速度。
AI.motivation: Legendre-Fenchel变换是凸分析与机器学习中的基础工具，但实际中许多函数的凸共轭缺乏闭式解，需数值逼近。现有深度Legendre变换方法在处理病态函数时面临挑战，亟需更鲁棒高效的数值方法。
AI.method: 将LF变换重新表述为射影对偶性，利用其仿射不变性引入基于Hessian的预处理策略：在极小点处施加仿射变形，使函数的二阶泰勒近似与标准抛物面一致（其共轭映射为单位映射），然后用初始化在单位映射附近的残差网络学习简化映射，通过逆变形恢复原始共轭映射。预处理仅需一次特征分解初始化及每次查询两次矩阵-向量乘法。
AI.result: 在包括高维基准测试在内的多种凸函数实验上，该方法改善了共轭计算的收敛速率和数值精度，尤其对病态问题提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Hessian预处理策略以微小计算开销实现了对LF变换数值逼近的显著改进，同时论文也讨论了方法的适用范围和局限性。

title: The Hidden Bias of Process Reward Models:PRISM for Rewarding the Right Reasoning
summary: Process Reward Models (PRMs) improve credit assignment for reasoning by providing step-level feedback. However, we identify a hidden bias in PRMs caused by severe imbalance in step-level training data. Standard cross-entropy training amplifies this bias, causing PRMs to overcredit plausible but incorrect steps and produce high false-positive rates. We show that these false positives have an asymmetric downstream effect: false negatives mainly slow exploration, whereas false positives actively steer Best-of-N selection, guided decoding, and policy optimization toward flawed reasoning. This suggests that PRM training should shift from pointwise label fitting to reliable relative comparisons. To address this, we propose PRISM (Precision Ranking for Improved Step Modeling), a policy-aware PRM training framework that learns from contrastive step-level comparisons and hard negatives generated by a temporal lookahead strategy, requiring no new human labels. We further use a difficulty-aware curriculum to optimize the contrastive step margin. Across PRMBench and ProcessBench, PRISM substantially reduces false positives (22% on PRMBench) and improves macro F1 over strong discriminative PRMs. When applied to policy optimization and search tasks, including guided decoding and Best-of-N selection, it consistently improves accuracy (up to 22% for guided decoding and 33% for Best-of-N) and robustness. More broadly, trustworthy process supervision is not just about assigning high rewards, but about rewarding the right reasoning for the right reasons.

AI.tldr: PRM存在由于训练数据不平衡导致的隐藏偏见，标准交叉熵训练会放大这种偏见，导致高误报率。本文提出PRISM框架，通过对比学习、时序前瞻策略和难度感知课程学习来减少误报，提升奖励模型的可靠性和推理准确性。
AI.motivation: PRM因步骤级训练数据严重不平衡而产生隐藏偏见，标准交叉熵训练会放大该偏见，导致模型过度奖励看似合理但错误的步骤（高假阳性率）。假阳性对下游任务的负面影响具有不对称性：假阴性主要减慢探索，而假阳性会主动将Best-of-N选择、引导解码和策略优化引向错误推理方向。
AI.method: 提出PRISM（Precision Ranking for Improved Step Modeling）框架：1）从点式标签拟合转向对比式相对比较学习；2）使用时序前瞻策略生成困难负样本；3）引入难度感知课程学习（difficulty-aware curriculum）优化对比步骤的边界（contrastive step margin）。不需要额外人工标注。
AI.result: 在PRMBench上假阳性率降低22%，宏F1优于强判别式PRM；应用于引导解码时准确率提升22%，Best-of-N提升33%。
AI.conclusion: 可信的过程监督不仅在于分配高奖励，更在于以正确的方式奖励正确的推理。PRM训练应从点式标签拟合转向可靠的相对比较。

title: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
comment: Technical report. 11 pages. Code and model available at https://github.com/libertywing/FlashMemory-Deepseek-V4 and https://huggingface.co/libertywing/FlashMemory-Deepseek-V4
summary:
Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA), a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. Rather than passively attending to all historical tokens, LSA proactively predicts future context demands and preserves only the query-critical KV chunks in the GPU memory. Crucially, we instantiate this architecture via a backbone-free decoupled training strategy. By formulating the indexer as a standard dual-encoder architecture, we train it independently using standard retrieval training frameworks without ever loading the massive backbone model into GPU memory.
  We demonstrate that this "less is more" paradigm significantly maximizes serving efficiency while acting as an effective attention denoiser in tasks that rely on long-term global memory. Across primary long-context evaluation suites (e.g., LongBench-v2, LongMemEval, and RULER), FM-DS-V4 compresses the average physical KV cache footprint down to merely 13.5% of the full-context baseline, while consistently preserving or slightly elevating downstream accuracy (+0.6% absolute margin on average). Crucially, at extreme 500K scales, FlashMemory suppresses the physical KV cache overhead by over 90% without destabilizing the backbone's core reasoning capacities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA)的新颖推理范式，通过神经记忆索引器（基于DeepSeek-V4架构）主动预测未来上下文需求，仅保留关键KV块在GPU内存中。采用解耦训练策略，索引器作为独立双编码器训练，无需加载主干模型。在LongBench-v2、LongMemEval、RULER等评测中，平均物理KV缓存压缩至全上下文的13.5%，准确率平均提升0.6%；在500K超长上下文下，KV缓存开销降低超90%且不损害推理能力。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM在解码时需保留完整KV缓存，导致超长上下文服务中出现严重的GPU内存瓶颈，亟需一种高效的内存管理方案来支持超长上下文推理。
AI.method: 提出Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA)推理范式，核心组件为基于DeepSeek-V4架构的神经记忆索引器。该索引器采用双编码器架构，通过解耦训练策略独立训练（使用标准检索训练框架），无需加载大规模主干模型到GPU内存。在解码时，索引器主动预测未来上下文需求，仅将查询关键的KV块保留在GPU内存中。
AI.result: 在LongBench-v2、LongMemEval、RULER等长上下文评测集上，物理KV缓存压缩至全上下文基线的13.5%，下游准确率平均提升0.6%。在500K超长上下文规模下，物理KV缓存开销降低超过90%，且不破坏主干模型的核心推理能力。
AI.conclusion: "少即是多"的LSA范式在最大化服务效率的同时，还能作为有效注意力去噪器，特别适用于依赖长期全局记忆的任务，为超长上下文LLM推理提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: Beyond FLOPs: Benchmarking Real Inference Acceleration of LLM Pruning under a GEMM-Centric Taxonomy
summary: Pruning has emerged as a dominant paradigm for accelerating large language model (LLM) inference, spanning a broad spectrum of methods that remove computation across tokens, layers, heads, dimensions, and attention patterns. Despite sharing the same objective, these pruning approaches induce fundamentally different execution behaviors, causing realized speedups to depend heavily on hardware and kernel implementations. Consequently, the practical acceleration benefits of different pruning families remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a GEMM-centric taxonomy that reorganizes existing pruning methods according to the logical \textbf{M}, \textbf{N}, and \textbf{K} dimensions of general matrix multiplication (GEMM). Leveraging this abstraction, we build a unified benchmarking framework that enables implementation-consistent comparison across the pruning design space and systematically characterizes the acceleration--quality Pareto frontier. Our results show that static depth pruning remains the strongest Pareto-optimal baseline and stays closest to its theoretical acceleration upper bound in memory-bounded scenarios. During prefill, the frontier transitions from static depth at low quality loss (0\%--4\%), to dynamic depth at moderate loss (5\%--16\%), and finally to static width pruning at higher loss levels (17\%--26\%). These findings establish the first unified view of the practical limits of pruning-based LLM acceleration and provide guidance for future pruning research.\footnote{Code is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/LLM-Pruning/tree/main/PruningInferSim}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GEMM维度（M、N、K）的统一剪枝分类法，系统性地评估了各类剪枝方法在LLM推理加速中的实际效果。研究发现静态深度剪枝在低质量损失下最优，预填阶段随着质量损失增加，最优策略从静态深度过渡到动态深度再到静态宽度剪枝。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法种类繁多，但不同方法在硬件和内核实现上导致截然不同的执行行为，实际加速收益缺乏统一理解和系统比较。
AI.method: 提出基于GEMM维度（M、N、K）的统一分类法，将现有剪枝方法重新组织；构建统一的基准测试框架，实现跨剪枝设计空间的一致性比较，并系统刻画加速-质量帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 静态深度剪枝是最强的帕累托最优基线，在内存受限场景中最接近理论加速上限。预填阶段：低质量损失（0%-4%）时静态深度最优，中损失（5%-16%）时动态深度最优，高损失（17%-26%）时静态宽度最优。
AI.conclusion: 建立了首个关于剪枝加速LLM实际限制的统一视角，为未来剪枝研究提供了指导方向。

title: Stabilizing On-Policy Distillation for MLLM Reasoning with Global Normalization
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an important post-training paradigm. By using a stronger teacher model to provide dense, fine-grained supervision for sampled trajectories, OPD offers a clear advantage over reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), which typically depends on sparse binary or outcome-based environmental feedback. However, naive token-level distillation can suffer from gradient instability, due to magnitude misalignment in outlier states. To address this issue, we propose Globally Normalized Distillation Policy Optimization (GNDPO), a practical method that stabilizes optimization by transforming raw KL scores into batch-level relative advantages. This normalization effectively mitigates gradient explosions while retaining the benefits of token-level guidance. Experimental results show that GNDPO substantially improves training robustness and downstream performance across multimodal reasoning tasks. The code is released at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/GNDPO.

AI.tldr: 针对在线策略蒸馏中梯度不稳定性问题，提出全局归一化蒸馏策略优化（GNDPO），通过将原始KL分数转化为批量级相对优势来稳定优化，在 multimodal 推理任务上提升了训练鲁棒性和下游性能。
AI.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏中，逐token级别的蒸馏会因异常状态的幅度不匹配导致梯度不稳定（梯度爆炸），现有基于环境反馈的强化学习方法（RLVR）依赖稀疏二值信号，监督不够细粒度。因此需要一种既能保留细粒度token级指导又能稳定优化的方法。
AI.method: 提出全局归一化蒸馏策略优化（GNDPO）：将原始KL散度分数转换为批量级相对优势（batch-level relative advantages），通过这种归一化手段消除异常状态带来的幅度差异，从而缓解梯度爆炸问题，同时保留token级指导的细粒度优势。
AI.result: 在 multimodal 推理任务上，GNDPO显著提升了训练鲁棒性和下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: GNDPO是一种实用的在线策略蒸馏优化方法，通过全局归一化有效解决了梯度不稳定问题，在保持细粒度监督优势的同时提升了训练稳定性，代码已开源。

title: From Shortcuts to Reasoning: Robust Post-Training of Theory of Mind with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Theory of Mind (ToM) is a must-acquire skill for modern foundation model systems to operate effectively and safely in the real world. Recent works have explored honing ToM via post-training; however, we show that such progress is confounded by a pervasive "shortcut" issue: tasks can reach up to 99% accuracy by simply exploiting spurious causal correlations, leading to a false sense of ToM. Motivated by this, we first develop a framework to systematically examine ToM datasets for shortcuts and provide guidance for future development. We find that questions reducible to pure state tracking, such as "belief," are especially shortcut-prone compared to mind questions, such as "intention," where reasoning beyond tracking is required. Using four shortcut-free datasets across three ToM contexts, we then comprehensively study whether Reinforcement Fine-Tuning with verifiable rewards and explicit reasoning chains, called Thinking-RFT, elevates ToM beyond Supervised Fine-Tuning, or SFT. Our key findings are as follows. First, Thinking-RFT effectively improves ToM in all scenarios, with a 6% improvement over SFT, particularly in complex higher-order reasoning, with a 10% improvement over SFT, and multimodal cases, with a 7% improvement over SFT. It also generalizes notably better to unseen domains and higher-order queries while being more robust to counterfactuals. Second, ToM benefits specifically from the joint effect of reasoning and RL: Thinking-RFT outperforms Non-Thinking-RFT by 7% on average. Third, RFT works by learning to ground its reasoning on anchor cues, such as keywords and state changes, that correspond to causal factors. We believe our study is useful for developing effective and robust ToM post-training datasets and advancing critical ToM capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有ToM训练存在利用虚假因果相关性的捷径问题，并提出了Thinking-RFT（带可验证奖励和显式推理链的强化微调）方法。实验表明，Thinking-RFT在多个ToM场景下优于SFT（平均提升6%），尤其在高阶推理（提升10%）和多模态（提升7%）任务上表现显著，且具有更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有ToM后训练存在"捷径"问题——任务可通过利用虚假因果相关性达到99%准确率，造成虚假的ToM能力提升。需要系统性地解决这一问题并开发真正有效的ToM训练方法。
AI.method: 1. 开发了系统性框架用于检测ToM数据集中的捷径问题；2. 提出Thinking-RFT方法，结合可验证奖励的强化学习与显式推理链；3. 在4个无捷径数据集、3种ToM上下文中对比Thinking-RFT与SFT的效果。
AI.result: Thinking-RFT在各方面优于SFT：整体提升6%，高阶推理提升10%，多模态提升7%。非Thinking-RFT（仅有RL无推理链）平均低于Thinking-RFT 7%。RFT通过将推理锚定在与因果因素对应的关键线索（关键词、状态变化）上发挥作用。
AI.conclusion: Thinking-RFT能有效提升ToM能力，推理链与强化学习的联合效应是关键。研究对开发有效的ToM后训练数据集和推进关键ToM能力具有重要参考价值。

title: Addressing Market Regime Changes and Heavy-Tailed Returns in Portfolio Optimization via Bayesian VAR and Elliptical Black-Litterman
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Extends our prior work [Mikriukov et al., ICIC 2025] on Black-Litterman under Elliptical Distributions (BLED). Manuscript under review
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks for portfolio optimization have shown promise for their ability to learn allocation rules dynamically from market data. However, these models fail to account for fat-tailed returns, which characterize actual market behavior with more frequent extreme events. Furthermore, historical data is treated homogeneously, without accounting for temporal importance, leading models to fail during regime changes. We propose a new BAVAR-BLED algorithm that combines methods derived from Bayesian-Averaging Vector Autoregressive (BAVAR) and the Black-Litterman model using Elliptical Distributions (BLED) within a TD3 architecture. BAVAR captures a set of vector autoregressive representations that consider multi-scale temporal features, enabling adaptive allocation decisions based on regime-aware estimates of return expectations and dispersion matrices. These estimates serve as prior inputs to BLED, a model that uses Student's t-distributions, allowing for more realistic fat tail return estimates. The BAVAR-BLED algorithm uses transformer networks for view construction and CNNs for risk-aversion estimates, which modify dynamic allocation decisions based on market conditions. An evaluation of 29 Dow Jones Industrial Average constituents over a decade-long market period shows that BAVAR-BLED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving Sharpe and Sortino ratios of 1.72 and 2.70, respectively, and total returns of 57.26%.

AI.tldr: 提出BAVAR-BLED算法，结合贝叶斯平均向量自回归与Black-Litterman椭圆分布模型，在TD3架构下进行投资组合优化。该算法使用Transformer构建市场观点、CNN估计风险厌恶系数，通过t分布捕获厚尾特征，在道琼斯30只成分股10年数据上实现了夏普比率1.72、索提诺比率2.70和57.26%的总回报，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习投资组合优化框架存在两个关键缺陷：一是未能考虑实际市场中频繁极端事件导致的厚尾收益分布；二是将历史数据同质化处理，忽略时间重要性，导致模型在市场体制转换时失效。
AI.method: 在TD3架构中融合BAVAR（贝叶斯平均向量自回归）与BLED（Black-Litterman椭圆分布模型）。BAVAR捕获多尺度时序特征的多组VAR表示，生成体制感知的期望收益和离散矩阵估计；这些估计作为BLED的先验输入，BLED使用t分布实现更真实的厚尾收益估计。算法采用Transformer网络构建市场观点，CNN估计风险厌恶系数，根据市场条件动态调整配置决策。
AI.result: 在道琼斯工业平均指数29只成分股跨越十年的市场数据上，BAVAR-BLED显著优于现有最先进方法，实现了夏普比率1.72、索提诺比率2.70和总回报57.26%。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合贝叶斯平均VAR、Black-Litterman模型、t分布厚尾建模以及Transformer/CNN深度学习架构，BAVAR-BLED有效解决了DRL框架中厚尾收益和体制转换适应性问题，显著提升了投资组合优化性能。

title: Hybridizing Equilibrium Propagation with Ising Machines for Efficient Energy-Based Learning
summary: The rapid evolution of artificial intelligence has led to substantial advances in deep neural networks. Nonetheless, conventional GPU-based training remains highly energy-demanding, motivating the exploration of physical dynamics and compatible energy-based learning schemes, such as equilibrium propagation (EP). EP-based training, however, frequently suffers from convergence to local minima due to phase-space contraction. Here we introduce an Ising-dynamics-inspired equilibrium-propagation framework in which dissipative Hopfield relaxation is replaced by an extended phase-space dynamics with conjugate variables. The resulting training paradigm keeps the local two-phase learning rule of EP while changing the physical route by which neural states reach equilibrium. We show that this dynamics lowers effective energy barriers, accelerates convergence, improves noise robustness, and trains deep convolutional Hopfield networks on MNIST, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-10 with performance comparable to backpropagation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于伊辛动力学的平衡传播框架，用扩展相空间动力学替代耗散型Hopfield松弛，在保持局部两相学习规则的同时加速收敛、增强噪声鲁棒性，并在多个数据集上达到了与反向传播相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GPU训练深度神经网络能耗巨大，而基于物理动力学的能量学习方案（如平衡传播EP）虽然更具能效优势，但由于相空间收缩常收敛到局部最小值，性能受限。
AI.method: 将耗散型Hopfield松弛替换为具有共轭变量的扩展相空间动力学（受伊辛动力学启发），在保留EP局部两相学习规则的前提下，改变神经网络达到平衡态的物理路径。
AI.result: 该方法降低了有效能量势垒、加速了收敛、提高了噪声鲁棒性，并在MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10上训练的深度卷积Hopfield网络性能与反向传播相当。
AI.conclusion: 扩展相空间动力学能有效克服EP因相空间收缩导致的局部极小值问题，在保持能效优势的同时提升训练性能，为基于物理动力学的高效深度学习提供了新路径。

title: Counterfactual Transport Flows for Offline Conservative Trajectory Refinement
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a path to policy improvement from logged data alone, using historical returns or other measurable outcomes as world feedback. A key difficulty is improving observed behavior without extrapolating beyond what the offline data supports. We propose \emph{counterfactual transport flows}, a source-conditioned trajectory refinement framework for offline decision-making guided by world feedback. Given a low-feedback candidate trajectory, we construct local preference pairs from offline data by retrieving nearby trajectories in latent trajectory space with higher task-specific feedback, and use them as weak supervision for conservative refinement. The framework learns instance-specific refinement directions: at inference time, a refinement strength parameter controls how far the candidate trajectory is transported, enabling a trade-off between preserving the original behavior and applying stronger improvement. Experiments on D4RL benchmarks, including AntMaze and MuJoCo tasks, show that our method improves behavior from historical returns as world feedback, while providing interpretable trajectory-level refinement paths.

AI.tldr: 提出反事实传输流（Counterfactual Transport Flows）框架，通过在潜空间检索高反馈轨迹构建局部偏好对，实现离线决策中的保守轨迹优化，在D4RL基准上取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习面临的一个关键困难是如何在不超出离线数据支持范围的情况下改进观测到的行为，即避免外推错误。
AI.method: 提出反事实传输流框架：在潜在轨迹空间中检索具有更高任务反馈的邻近轨迹，构建局部偏好对作为弱监督信号，对低反馈候选轨迹进行保守优化。推理时通过强度参数控制轨迹传输程度，平衡原始行为保持与改进强度。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准（AntMaze和MuJoCo任务）上，该方法利用历史回报作为世界反馈改进行为，并提供可解释的轨迹级优化路径。
AI.conclusion: 反事实传输流能够在不外推的前提下改进离线数据中的行为，通过可控的优化强度实现行为保持与改进之间的权衡。

title: Optimizing Energy-based Neural Network Training with Coherent Ising Machine
summary: While Ising machines serve as advanced physical solvers for the Ising model,enabling applications in combinatorial optimization and neural network training,their scalability for large-scale neural networks remains constrained by hardware connectivity limitations and suboptimal training methodologies. In this work,we leverage a Coherent Ising Machine (CIM) to train an energy-based neural network using Equilibrium Propagation, achieving performance comparable to existing software-based implementations. We further enhance the algorithm by integrating the Adam optimizer to solve for the ground state of a Hopfield energy network, significantly improving convergence speed and solution accuracy. Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of our approach across deeper network architectures and convolutional operations. Our results highlight the potential of CIM dynamics as a scalable platform for training complex neural networks, offering a pathway toward energy-efficient implementations via analog circuits, optoelectronics, or integrated photonics. This work establishes a novel physical framework for next-generation AI hardware development.

AI.tldr: 本文利用相干伊辛机（CIM）结合均衡传播算法训练能量基神经网络，并引入Adam优化器提升收敛速度和精度，展示了该方法在深层网络和卷积操作中的可扩展性，为下一代AI硬件提供了新型物理框架。
AI.motivation: 伊辛机虽能解决组合优化和神经网络训练问题，但受限于硬件连接性和次优训练方法，难以扩展到大规模神经网络。
AI.method: 使用相干伊辛机（CIM）执行均衡传播（Equilibrium Propagation）训练能量基神经网络，并整合Adam优化器求解Hopfield能量网络的基态。
AI.result: 所提方法性能与现有软件实现相当，显著提升了收敛速度和求解精度，并成功扩展到更深层网络架构和卷积操作。
AI.conclusion: CIM动态特性可作为训练复杂神经网络的可扩展平台，通过模拟电路、光电子或集成光子学实现能效更高的AI硬件，为下一代AI硬件发展奠定物理框架。

title: Claw-R1: A Step-Level Data Middleware System for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has become an important post-training paradigm for turning LLMs from static chatbots into interactive agents, giving rise to representative applications such as OpenClaw. Existing work mainly focuses on policy optimization algorithms and training frameworks, but pays less attention to the full data lifecycle of agent-environment interactions, from data production to training consumption. To bridge this gap, we present Claw-R1, an interactive step-level data middleware system for agentic RL. Claw-R1 connects heterogeneous agent runtimes with RL training backends through two core components: a Gateway Server and a Data Pool. The Gateway Server captures multi-turn interaction steps through a unified LLM API entry point, while the Data Pool organizes them into step-level records consisting of prompt IDs, response IDs, rewards and other metadata. In our demo, users can interactively inspect live trajectories, examine the state, action, and reward of each step, curate data by quality and readiness, and configure training-ready batches for different downstream RL algorithms. Overall, Claw-R1 treats agent interaction traces as managed data assets rather than temporary runtime logs. Through this demonstration, we hope to encourage the community to recognize the importance of data management in agentic RL. Our code is available at https://github.com/AgentR1/Claw-R1 and the demonstration video can be found at link https://youtu.be/Pw47dAOw6B0.

AI.tldr: Claw-R1是一个面向智能体强化学习的交互式步骤级数据中间件系统，它通过Gateway Server和数据池连接异构智能体运行时与RL训练后端，将智能体交互轨迹作为可管理的数据资产进行全生命周期管理。
AI.motivation: 现有工作主要关注策略优化算法和训练框架，但对智能体-环境交互数据的全生命周期（从数据生产到训练消费）关注不足，缺乏系统化的数据管理方案。
AI.method: 提出Claw-R1系统，包含两个核心组件：Gateway Server通过统一LLM API入口捕获多轮交互步骤，Data Pool将步骤组织为包含提示ID、响应ID、奖励等元数据的记录。支持用户交互式检查轨迹、查看状态/动作/奖励、按质量和就绪程度筛选数据、为不同RL算法配置训练批次。
AI.result: 将智能体交互轨迹视为可管理的数据资产而非临时运行时日志，实现了从数据生产到训练消费的完整闭环管理。
AI.conclusion: Claw-R1填补了智能体RL中数据管理系统的空白，希望推动社区重视数据管理在智能体RL中的重要性。

title: Improved Convergence Analysis of Topology Dependence in Decentralized SGD
summary: Decentralized SGD is a fundamental algorithm in decentralized learning, although the influence of an underlying network topology on its convergence behavior is not yet fully understood. Existing convergence analyses have shown that topologies with a small spectral gap significantly deteriorate the convergence rate of Decentralized SGD in both homogeneous and heterogeneous cases. However, many prior papers have reported that indeed the choice of the topology has a significant experimental impact in the heterogeneous case, but has little experimental impact on training behavior in the homogeneous case. In this paper, we present a tighter convergence analysis of Decentralized SGD, offering a more precise understanding of how topologies affect the convergence rate than the prior analysis. Specifically, unlike existing convergence analyses that used only the spectral gap as a property of the topology, our novel analysis shows that all eigenvalues of the mixing matrix affect the convergence rate. Throughout the experiments, we carefully evaluated the convergence behavior of Decentralized SGD and demonstrated that our novel convergence analysis can more accurately describe the effect of topology on the convergence rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了去中心化SGD的更紧收敛性分析，证明混合矩阵的所有特征值而非仅谱隙影响收敛速率，并通过实验验证了新分析能更准确描述拓扑对收敛的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化SGD的收敛分析仅使用谱隙作为拓扑性质，无法充分解释实验中拓扑在异构场景下有显著影响而同构场景下影响很小的现象，需更精确的理论分析。
AI.method: 提出了一种更紧的收敛性分析，证明了混合矩阵的所有特征值都影响收敛速率，而不仅仅是谱隙。
AI.result: 新分析比现有分析更精确地描述了拓扑对收敛速率的影响，与实验观察更一致。
AI.conclusion: 混合矩阵的完整特征谱而非仅谱隙决定了去中心化SGD的收敛行为，为理解网络拓扑对分布式学习的影响提供了更精细的理论基础。

title: Crop Recommendation and Agricultural Query Answering System Using Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks and Hybrid Retrieval Augmentation
summary: This paper presents a unified system designed to support precision agriculture by integrating advanced weather prediction, crop recommendation, and a question-answering tool for farmers. We propose two deep learning models -- a Transformer-based Graph Neural Network and a Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (STGCN) -- to forecast weather conditions for the next 30 days using data from 1,359 locations in Nepal. The STGCN outperforms the Transformer-based model in accuracy (MSE ~0.011 vs. 0.013), effectively modeling both spatial and temporal dependencies in climate data. These predictions are combined with static soil properties such as pH, moisture, and organic content to generate localized crop recommendations through a scoring algorithm that matches each crop's optimal growing conditions. Additionally, we develop a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that leverages domain-specific agricultural documents to answer farmers' questions in natural language. The entire system is deployed via a mobile application, offering real-time suggestions and conversational support. User feedback confirms the system's usability and relevance, especially in rural settings where personalized farming guidance is limited. Overall, our approach demonstrates how combining machine learning models with local agricultural data can empower farmers with actionable insights, promoting more informed decisions, better crop yields, and increased resilience to climate variability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套集成天气预报、作物推荐和农业问答功能的精准农业系统，利用STGCN和Transformer-GNN进行30天天气预报，结合土壤数据生成作物推荐，并通过RAG聊天机器人为农民提供自然语言问答服务，最终以移动应用形式部署。
AI.motivation: 尼泊尔等农村地区缺乏个性化的农业指导，农民难以获取准确的天气预报和作物种植建议，导致作物产量受气候变异性影响较大。
AI.method: 1) 采用Transformer-based GNN和STGCN两种深度学习模型，利用1359个地点的数据预测未来30天天气；2) 将天气预报与土壤理化性质（pH、水分、有机质）结合，通过评分算法生成作物推荐；3) 构建基于检索增强生成（RAG）的农业问答聊天机器人；4) 通过移动应用部署整个系统。
AI.result: STGCN在天气预测任务上优于Transformer模型（MSE约0.011 vs 0.013），系统通过用户反馈验证了其在农村环境中的可用性和相关性。
AI.conclusion: 将机器学习模型与本地农业数据相结合，能够为农民提供可操作的见解，促进更明智的决策、提高作物产量并增强对气候变异性的适应能力。

title: CANS: Accelerating Multiuser Collaborative Edge Inference via Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures, 5 tables, submitted for possible journal publication
summary: Recently, mobile edge computing (MEC)-enabled collaborative deep neural network (DNN) inference has emerged as a promising approach for delivering intelligent services to resource-constrained mobile devices. A representative scenario is multi-user collaborative edge inference, where distinct devices independently partition their DNN models and offload backend computation to a common edge server over wireless networks. However, determining the optimal DNN partition for each device is challenging due to unknown and time-varying system conditions, including fluctuating wireless links and diverse device capabilities. To address this problem, we propose Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon (CANS), a collaborative edge inference framework that enables devices to adaptively learn optimal DNN partitions by sharing informative feedback during online inference. To handle the challenge of device heterogeneity and better leverage offline inference experience, we integrate a novel FedLinUCB-DW algorithm that groups devices of the same type and warm-starts online exploration using local offline early-exit inference experience. Furthermore, we provide theoretical guarantees for FedLinUCB-DW by deriving the regret upper bound. We also validate our method on both a simulated environment and a hardware prototype system. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that CANS achieves lower inference latency compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Especially, in prototype experiments on two edge devices, the proposed CANS reduced average inference latency by up to 50% compared to the non-cooperative baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CANS框架，通过联邦线性UCB-DW算法让多用户设备在协作边缘推理中自适应学习最优DNN分割点，在异构设备场景下利用离线早退推理经验进行热启动，显著降低推理延迟（原型系统最高降低50%）。
AI.motivation: MEC支持的协作DNN推理中，多用户设备各自分割模型并将后端计算卸载到边缘服务器，但无线链路波动和设备能力差异导致最优DNN分割点难以确定。
AI.method: 提出CANS框架，集成FedLinUCB-DW算法：对同类型设备分组，利用本地离线早退推理经验热启动在线探索，在在线推理过程中通过共享信息反馈自适应学习最优分割点。
AI.result: 仿真和硬件原型实验表明CANS优于现有基线，在双设备原型实验中平均推理延迟降低高达50%。
AI.conclusion: CANS通过设备分组和离线经验热启动有效应对异构性，在协作边缘推理中显著降低延迟，并提供了理论 regret 上界保证。

title: Asymptotic Optimality of Thompson Sampling for Risk-Averse Bandits with Sub-Gaussian Rewards
summary: We prove that $ρ\text{-}\mathrm{NPTS}_{\mathrm{SG}}$, an anchor-free nonparametric Thompson Sampling algorithm for risk-averse bandits, achieves regret matching the instance-dependent lower bound to leading order in $\log n$, establishing it as asymptotically optimal for any continuous risk functional $ρ$ (CVaR, mean-variance, Sharpe ratio, distortion risk measures, and more) on the class of distributions with bounded density and sub-Gaussian tails, including Gaussian arms. Both this result and its bounded-support counterpart require only continuity of $ρ$: strictly weaker than the dominance condition of prior parametric Thompson Sampling results, and strictly weaker than the Lipschitz condition of UCB-type algorithms, yielding the first instance-optimal guarantees for non-Lipschitz functionals such as the Sharpe ratio without parametric reward assumptions. The bounded-support case is developed first as a stepping stone sharing the same proof structure. The key technical contributions are a discretisation lemma (bounded support) and a truncated discretisation lemma (sub-Gaussian tails), each projecting the growing-alphabet Dirichlet posterior onto a fixed grid via the Dirichlet aggregation property, holding all polynomial prefactors at fixed degree independent of sample size and breaking the super-exponential barrier that blocked prior proofs.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了一种无锚点的非参数汤普森采样算法（ρ-NPTS_SG）在风险厌恶型多臂赌博机问题上达到了实例依赖下界的渐近最优性，仅需风险泛函ρ的连续性条件，打破了先前方法对参数化假设或Lipschitz条件的依赖，关键贡献在于通过离散化引理和截断离散化引理将Dirichlet后验投影到固定网格，克服了超指数复杂度障碍。
AI.motivation: 现有风险厌恶型多臂赌博机算法要么依赖参数化奖励假设（如高斯分布），要么要求风险泛函满足支配条件或Lipschitz连续性，无法处理如夏普比率这类非Lipschitz泛函且无需参数化假设的场景。本文旨在设计一种无需锚点、无需参数化假设、仅需连续性条件即可达到渐近最优的算法。
AI.method: 提出ρ-NPTS_SG算法，一种无锚点的非参数汤普森采样方法。关键技术包括：(1) 有界支撑情况下的离散化引理；(2) 次高斯尾部情况下的截断离散化引理。两者均利用Dirichlet聚合性质将增长字母表的Dirichlet后验投影到固定网格上，使得所有多项式前置因子保持固定次数，独立于样本量。
AI.result: 该算法的遗憾值在log n主导阶上匹配实例依赖下界，达到渐近最优。适用范围包括CVaR、均值-方差、夏普比率、扭曲风险测度等任意连续风险泛函，且仅需分布具有有界密度和次高斯尾部（包括高斯分布）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次为夏普比率等非Lipschitz泛函在无参数化奖励假设下提供了实例最优保证，证明了连续性条件严格弱于先前方法的支配条件和Lipschitz条件，是风险厌恶型多臂赌博机问题理论的一个重要突破。

title: The Injection Paradox: Brand-Level Suppression in Safety-Trained LLM Recommendations via RAG Context Injection
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, 15 tables. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Failure Modes in Agentic AI (FAGEN), a non-archival venue
summary: We present a reproducible failure mode of safety training in RAG-based LLM recommendation -- the Injection Paradox -- in which prompt injections embedded in retrieved documents backfire against the attacker, suppressing the target brand below the injection-free baseline. In safety-trained Claude models, documents containing prompt injections suffer a sharp drop in recommendation rate, and this suppression propagates beyond the injected document to unmodified documents of the same brand. In Claude Opus 4.6, the target brand drops from a 54% baseline to zero top-2 recommendations across all 50 trials, even though only 1 of 4 brand documents in the corpus contains an injection. The directional pattern is reproduced in counterfactual experiments and across three brands. A contrasting result across the GPT models tested, where the same injection instead increases recommendations, suggests model-family differences in how injection-like context affects recommendation behavior. These findings raise the technical possibility of a reverse-attack scenario in which an adversary embeds injections in a competitor's documents to suppress the competitor's brand via safety-sensitive model behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了一种RAG推荐系统中安全训练的可复现失效模式——"注入悖论"（Injection Paradox）：检索文档中的提示注入会反向抑制目标品牌的推荐率，使其低于未注入的基线水平。在安全训练的Claude模型中，注入文档的推荐率急剧下降，且该抑制效应会扩散至同一品牌的其他未修改文档。Claude Opus 4.6中目标品牌从54%基线降至零推荐（50次试验均无Top-2推荐），即使语料中仅1/4的文档含注入。该模式在反事实实验和三个品牌中复现。GPT模型则表现出相反方向（注入提升推荐），表明模型家族间存在差异。这些发现提出了"反向攻击"场景的技术可能性：攻击者可在竞争对手文档中嵌入注入，通过安全敏感行为压制对手品牌。
AI.motivation: 发现并系统描述RAG推荐系统中安全训练导致的意外副作用——提示注入非但未能劫持模型输出，反而因安全机制触发而抑制了被注入内容的推荐率，揭示了一种新型安全漏洞。
AI.method: 在RAG架构的推荐系统中，向品牌文档中嵌入提示注入，观察安全训练的Claude模型（包括Opus 4.6）的推荐行为变化；设置反事实实验控制变量，跨三个品牌验证现象稳健性；与GPT系列模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: Claude Opus 4.6中，仅1/4文档含注入时，目标品牌Top-2推荐率从54%降至0%；抑制效应扩散至同一品牌的未修改文档；GPT模型中注入反而提升推荐，呈现方向性差异。
AI.conclusion: 安全训练在RAG推荐场景中存在未被预期的失效模式，安全敏感行为可被反向利用为攻击向量——攻击者可故意在竞争对手文档中嵌入注入，利用模型的安全抑制机制压制对手品牌。

title: Orange Lab: Lowering Barriers to Data Mining through Embedded Interactive Workflows
summary: While visual programming of data analysis workflows has become an important vehicle for the democratization of data science, such systems remain largely confined to standalone applications and offer limited support for transitioning their visual analytics solutions into interactive web environments. As a result, data analysis pipelines are difficult to share, embed, and adapt into user-facing analytical tools. We present Orange Lab, a web-based collaborative environment for visual data analytics. At its core, Orange Lab enables users to visually construct machine learning workflows from modular components, where interactions in any component propagate seamlessly through the workflow, turning static pipelines into dynamic, reactive systems that support exploration and data-driven storytelling. Our key contribution is component exposition, a paradigm that allows authors to embed selected workflow components, or parts of their interfaces, into arbitrary web contexts, creating synchronized, interactive interfaces while hiding underlying workflow complexity. This enables the development of tailored analytical views and narrative-driven experiences that integrate data analysis directly into online materials. We demonstrate the approach through deployments in data literacy education, where embedded components guide students in hands-on exploration of machine learning concepts without requiring knowledge of the underlying system, showing that Orange Lab effectively lowers barriers to entry and supports the democratization of data science.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Orange Lab，一个基于Web的协作式可视化数据分析环境。其核心贡献是"组件暴露"范式，允许用户将可视化工作流中的选定组件嵌入任意网页上下文中，创建同步的交互式界面，从而支持数据驱动故事叙述和民主化数据科学。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化数据科学工作流系统主要局限于独立应用程序，缺乏将分析方案转换到交互式Web环境的能力，导致数据分析流程难以共享、嵌入和适配为用户面向的分析工具。
AI.method: 提出"组件暴露"（component exposition）范式，允许作者将工作流中的选定组件或其界面部分嵌入任意网页上下文，创建同步的交互界面，同时隐藏底层工作流复杂性。系统基于模块化组件构建，支持交互在组件间无缝传播，形成动态响应式系统。
AI.result: 通过数据素养教育场景的部署验证，嵌入组件能引导学生动手探索机器学习概念而无需了解底层系统，表明Orange Lab有效降低了入门门槛，支持数据科学民主化。
AI.conclusion: Orange Lab通过组件暴露范式弥合了可视化分析工具与Web环境之间的鸿沟，为数据科学民主化提供了新的技术路径。

title: BSTabDiff: Block-Subunit Diffusion Priors for High-Dimensional Tabular Data Generation
comment: Published as a paper at the 2nd DeLTa Workshop, ICLR 2026
summary: High-Dimensional Low-Sample Size (HDLSS) tabular domains (e.g., omics) are characterized by $n \ll m$, where $n$ = number of samples, and $m$ = number of features. Such domains often exhibit strong local correlation groups, sparse cross-group dependencies, heavy-tailed non-Gaussian marginals, heteroscedastic noise, and structured missingness, making direct density learning in $\mathbb{R}^m$ ill-conditioned since $n \ll m$. We propose BSTabDiff, a block-subunit generative framework that partitions the $m$ observed features into $M$ latent blocks ($M \ll m$) and generates each block via a shared low-dimensional subunit variable, concentrating global dependence learning in the compact block-latent space $\mathbb{R}^M$ while decoding to the full feature space with copula-driven dependence, flexible per-feature marginals, and explicit missingness mechanisms. BSTabDiff supports modern deep priors on block latents, including diffusion and normalizing flows, enabling stable synthesis and controllable benchmark generation in the HDLSS regime. Empirically, BSTabDiff produces more realistic and stable high-dimensional synthetic data when compared with unstructured tabular generators on HDLSS data.

AI.tldr: 针对高维小样本（HDLSS）表格数据（如组学数据）中n≪m带来的病态密度学习问题，提出BSTabDiff，一种块-子单元生成框架：将m个特征分为M个潜在块（M≪m），通过共享低维子单元变量生成每个块，在紧凑的块潜在空间R^M中学习全局依赖，用copula驱动解码到全特征空间，支持扩散/流等现代深度先验，在HDLSS场景下生成更真实稳定的高维合成数据。
AI.motivation: HDLSS表格数据（如组学）存在样本数远小于特征数（n≪m）的问题，直接在高维空间R^m中进行密度学习是病态的；这类数据还具有强局部相关组、稀疏跨组依赖、重尾非高斯边缘分布、异方差噪声和结构化缺失等特征，现有生成模型难以有效处理。
AI.method: 将m维观测特征划分为M个潜在块（M≪m），每个块通过一个共享的低维子单元变量生成；全局依赖学习压缩在紧凑的块潜在空间R^M中；解码到全特征空间时使用copula驱动依赖、灵活的特征边缘分布和显式缺失机制；支持扩散模型和归一化流等现代深度先验作为块潜在先验。
AI.result: 在HDLSS数据上，BSTabDiff相比非结构化的表格生成器能够生成更加真实和稳定的高维合成数据。
AI.conclusion: BSTabDiff通过块-子单元分解降低了HDLSS场景下密度学习的病态性，实现了稳定的高维合成和可控基准生成。

title: ERBench: A Benchmark and Testsuite for Equation Discovery Algorithms
summary: Equation discovery aims to automate the discovery of scientific models in the form of mathematical equations from data. Technically, equation discovery is implemented by symbolic regression algorithms. Performance of symbolic regression for equation discovery is measured along two dimensions: Prediction accuracy on test data, and recovery of known groundtruth formulas. For standard regression, accuracy is typically measured on in-domain test data, for instance, by splitting a data set randomly into training and test data. While this makes sense for in-domain interpolation, which is the common goal in ordinary regression, it can be a misleading proxy for true model discovery and generalization. The obvious alternative is to measure out-of-domain accuracy. However, obtaining challenging out-of-domain test data is a non-trivial problem. Therefore, we focus on equation recovery for evaluating symbolic regression algorithms for equation discovery. The rationale is that symbolic regression algorithms that perform well in recovering known groundtruth formulas are good candidates to perform well in unknown equation discovery. Existing benchmarks for symbolic regression include equation recovery tasks, however, with only a small number of groundtruth formulas that are publicly known. Moreover, these benchmarks place less emphasis on evaluating the robustness of algorithms in terms of their behavior under changing dimensionality, sampling size, sampling distribution and sampling domain. This, however, is of central importance to practitioners wanting to discover equations for modeling natural phenomena, since data is almost certainly noisy and comes from diverse domains, distributions, and sample sizes. To fill this gap, we introduce the Equation Recovery Benchmark (ERBench), a new evaluation framework designed to rigorously assess algorithms explicitly targeting the task of equation discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERBench基准测试框架，用于严格评估符号回归算法在方程发现任务中的公式恢复能力，重点关注算法对维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域变化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有符号回归基准存在公式数量少、公开已知的问题，且缺乏对算法在变化维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域下鲁棒性的评估，而这对于从业者从含噪、多样的真实数据中发现方程至关重要。
AI.method: 提出Equation Recovery Benchmark (ERBench)，一个专门评估方程发现任务的基准框架，通过公式恢复率来评估符号回归算法，并系统性地测试算法在不同维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域下的表现。
AI.result: ERBench能够更全面地评估符号回归算法在方程发现中的鲁棒性，弥补了现有基准在测试条件多样性方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 符号回归算法在公式恢复任务中的表现是评估其方程发现能力的有效代理指标，ERBench通过系统化测试条件变化提供了更严格的评估标准。

title: Internalizing Geometric Law: Learning from Solver Residuals for Precision-Critical Generation
summary: Large Language Models frequently hallucinate in precision-critical domains such as technical diagramming and mechanical design, where outputs must satisfy strict geometric constraints. We study open-ended geometric synthesis from natural language: translating free-form descriptions into precise constructions whose entities must simultaneously satisfy dozens of interacting constraints. To make this tractable, we release PyGeoX, a programmable geometric DSL that compiles declarative constraints into a differentiable loss, and PyGeoX-Bench, a stratified suite of 300 problems with per-constraint verifiable rewards. Using PyGeoX as a verifier, we identify a failure mode we call Outlier Gradient Masking: under global-norm rewards (any scheme that aggregates residuals through a single norm, for example, $\exp(-\mathrm{MSE})$), a single outlier constraint can nullify the learning signal across all others. To address this, we propose Saturating Additive Rewards (SAR), which decompose the reward into bounded per-constraint terms, preserving partial progress and ensuring consistent gradients even under severe violations. Against MSE-based rewards, the natural baseline for geometry solvers, SAR improves the hard-tier solving rate by $2.3\times$, and the resulting 8B model is competitive with much larger frontier systems on this benchmark. We release the engine, benchmark, and data at https://github.com/Huawei-AI4Math/PyGeoX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PyGeoX——一种可编程几何DSL，将自然语言描述编译为可微损失函数，并发现全局范数奖励下的"异常梯度掩码"问题，提出饱和加性奖励（SAR）以分解为有界逐约束项，在几何合成任务上显著提升求解率。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在精度关键领域（如技术制图、机械设计）频繁产生幻觉，其输出必须满足严格的几何约束。现有方法在处理开放式的、包含数十个相互约束条件的几何合成问题上效果不佳。
AI.method: 1) 发布PyGeoX，一种可编程几何DSL，将声明式约束编译为可微损失函数；2) 发布PyGeoX-Bench，包含300个分层问题及逐约束可验证奖励；3) 发现异常梯度掩码（Outlier Gradient Masking）问题；4) 提出饱和加性奖励（SAR），将奖励分解为有界逐约束项，确保梯度一致性。
AI.result: 相比基于MSE的奖励（几何求解器的自然基线），SAR在困难级别问题上求解率提升了2.3倍，且8B模型在该基准上可与更大规模的尖端系统竞争。
AI.conclusion: 饱和加性奖励（SAR）能有效缓解异常梯度掩码问题，在复杂几何约束条件下实现更稳定有效的学习信号，提升LLM在几何合成任务上的表现。

title: Trajectory Geometry of Transformer Representations Across Layers
summary: Understanding how transformer representations evolve across layers, not merely what they encode, remains an open problem in mechanistic interpretability. We recast the transformer forward pass as a discrete population trajectory through a high-dimensional representation manifold, drawing on geometric tools from computational neuroscience. Rather than probing for pre-specified features, we characterize trajectory geometry using five metrics computed directly in the ambient space: trajectory length, curvature, a semantic convergence index, layerwise cosine similarity, and representational stability. Across three model families (GPT-2, TinyLlama, Qwen2.5) and five controlled prompt families, we report four findings. First, semantically related prompts converge significantly in middle-to-late layers (peak CI 0.41--0.58, p<0.001, Mann-Whitney U), consistent with attractor-like dynamics. Second, reasoning tasks produce trajectories of greater curvature than lexical variations (0.71--0.83 rad vs. 0.27--0.31 rad), suggesting curvature encodes computational complexity. Third, ambiguous tokens exhibit trajectory bifurcation with up to 5.6x representational separation by the final layer, absent in unambiguous controls. Fourth, layerwise cosine similarity reveals a universal three-phase structure: encoding, elaboration, and output preparation, consistent across all three architectures. All four effects vanish under shuffled-layer and random-embedding controls. We release a fully open-source, model-agnostic pipeline and argue that trajectory geometry constitutes a principled, probe-free lens for mechanistic interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Transformer前向传播视为高维表示流形上的离散群体轨迹，利用计算神经科学的几何工具，通过五种轨迹度量（轨迹长度、曲率、语义收敛指数、层间余弦相似度、表示稳定性）分析表示演化。在三个模型家族和五类提示词上发现：语义相关提示在中后期层显著收敛；推理任务比词汇变体产生更大曲率；歧义token出现轨迹分叉；层间余弦相似度揭示统一的编码-精化-输出三阶段结构。
AI.motivation: 理解Transformer表示如何逐层演化（而不仅仅是编码了什么内容）仍是机制可解释性的开放问题。现有方法多依赖于预定义特征的探针分析，缺乏对表示轨迹几何特性的系统性、无探针的刻画工具。
AI.method: 将Transformer前向传播重定义为高维表示流形上的离散群体轨迹，借鉴计算神经科学的几何工具；在原始表示空间中直接计算五种度量：轨迹长度、曲率、语义收敛指数、层间余弦相似度和表示稳定性；在GPT-2、TinyLlama、Qwen2.5三个模型家族及五类受控提示上实验；使用打乱层序和随机嵌入作为控制对照。
AI.result: 语义相关提示在中后期层显著收敛（峰值CI 0.41-0.58, p<0.001）；推理任务轨迹曲率大于词汇变体（0.71-0.83 rad vs 0.27-0.31 rad）；歧义token最终层表示分离达5.6倍；层间余弦相似度揭示所有架构共有的三阶段结构；所有效应在控制条件下消失。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹几何构成了一个原则性的、无需探针的机制可解释性视角，作者发布了完全开源、模型无关的分析流水线。

title: Intention Driven Identification of In-Possession Match Phases in Association Football through Temporal Graph Learning
summary: Understanding tactical organisation of association football, hereafter referred to as football, requires identifying distinct match phases. Yet in-possession phases are rarely directly observable and are shaped by evolving tactical intentions, rather than spatial patterns alone. This study proposes a data-driven framework for identifying in-possession match phases from spatiotemporal tracking data. Seven German Bundesliga matches recorded at 25 Hz with TRACAB were analysed. A hierarchical phase model was defined with three tactical intentions (Invade Opponent Space, Keep Possession, Scoring) and six phases (Build Up, Progression, Counter Attack, Maintenance, Sustained Threat, Finishing). A Temporal Graph Attention Network (T-GAN) was developed to combine frame-level player-interaction graphs, contextual features, and Transformer-based temporal modelling. Performance was evaluated using frame-level F1 and a sequence-aware Intersection over Truth-Dominance (IoT-D) metric. T-GAN achieved macro-average frame-level F1 scores of 0.87 at the intention level, 0.76 for invasion-related phases, and 0.79 for scoring phases. At the sequence level, mean diagonal IoT-D F1 increased from 0.68 to 0.79 for intentions and from 0.61 to 0.71 for phases after post-processing, indicating improved temporal coherence. Model comparisons showed that sequence modelling was the main driver of segmentation quality, while graph-based relational modelling was particularly beneficial for Counter Attack recognition. Exploratory player attention analysis further suggested that wide and midfield positional groups contributed strongly to phase discrimination. Overall, the framework translates continuous tracking data into tactically interpretable in-possession phase representations, with potential applications in automated match annotation, tactical analysis, and playing-style profiling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空追踪数据、结合时间图注意力网络（T-GAN）的框架，用于识别足球比赛中的控球阶段。在7场德甲比赛中，该框架在意图层面实现了0.87的宏平均F1分数，在阶段层面实现了0.76–0.79的F1分数，并通过后处理提升了时序一致性。图关系建模对反击阶段的识别尤为有效，边路和中场位置组对阶段判别贡献显著。
AI.motivation: 足球控球阶段难以直接观测，受战术意图驱动而非仅空间模式决定。现有方法难以从连续追踪数据中自动识别具有战术解释性的控球阶段，因此需要一种数据驱动的框架来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 定义三级战术意图和六阶段层次模型；构建T-GAN，融合帧级球员交互图（图注意力网络）、上下文特征与Transformer时序建模；使用帧级F1和序列感知IoT-D指标评估；采用后处理提升时序连贯性。
AI.result: 意图级别宏平均帧级F1=0.87；入侵阶段F1=0.76，得分阶段F1=0.79。序列级IoT-D F1：意图从0.68提升至0.79，阶段从0.61提升至0.71。序列建模是分割质量的主要驱动力，图建模对反击识别帮助最大。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能将连续追踪数据转化为战术可解释的控球阶段表示，可用于自动比赛标注、战术分析和打法特征画像，证明图与时序建模的联合架构在足球阶段识别中的有效性。

title: PRISM: Topology-Aware Cross-Modal Imputation for Modality-Deficient Federated Graph Learning
summary: Multimodal federated graph learning (MM-FGL) aims to collaboratively learn from decentralized graphs with text and images. However, real-world clients may not share a common modality basis: a visual-search client may contain image--interaction graphs but no seller descriptions, while a catalog client may provide text but no product images. We refer to this practical setting as client-level modality deficiency. Unlike random instance-wise missingness, a deficient client lacks the local semantic basis needed to reconstruct the absent modality. More importantly, in graph learning, incomplete representations initialize message passing, so imputation errors can be filtered, mixed, and amplified by the receiving topology. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{PRISM} (\textbf{P}roactive \textbf{R}etrieval and \textbf{I}mputation via \textbf{S}tructural \textbf{M}eta-prompting), a topology-aware federated cross-modal imputation framework. Rather than reconstructing the missing modality solely from local observations, PRISM recovers missing-modality semantics from the federation and introduces them into local graph propagation under topology-aware control.
